meta.plot: À l’été 1991, Camille, 15 ans, rencontre Martin et Alexandre sur la plage d’une station balnéaire de la côte vendéenne. Tiraillée entre les deux garçons, elle va vivre avec eux une folle histoire d’amour sur plus de trente ans. Au fil de quatre saisons, courant sur quelques jours saisis à dix ans d’intervalle, leur relation est mise à l’épreuve du temps, des accidents de la vie, de la parentalité et de la folie du monde

1.title: FR - Les saisons - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - Les saisons - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR - Les saisons - S01E03 - Episode 3
FR - Les saisons - S01E04 - Episode 4

meta.plot: Dans ENTRE LES LIGNES, Étienne Fortin-Gauthier et Alexandre Volpato explorent les sujets brûlants du Québec avec audace et humanité. Du journalisme de terrain sans filtre, qui donne la parole aux oubliés, expose les contradictions et éclaire les zones grises. Une série qui bouscule les idées reçues.

1.title: FR - Entre les Lignes - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - Entre les Lignes - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR - Être Parent - S01E01 - The Greatest Adventure
1.plot: A journey like no other – full of moments of joy and danger. For animal parents in the wild, the stakes could not be higher, with success ensuring the future of life on our planet.

1.title: FR - Être Parent - S01E02 - Oceans
1.plot: Parenting in the ocean is rare, and demands dedication and intelligence. From navigating the reef, to teaching their young to hunt giants, these parents have the most remarkable strategies on Earth.

1.title: FR - Être Parent - S01E03 - Grasslands
1.plot: Parents must constantly balance risk and reward when raising young in open grasslands. Whilst abundant grass promises plentiful food and places to call home, this alone cannot guarantee success.

1.title: FR - Être Parent - S01E04 - Freshwater
1.plot: Water is essential to all life on Earth but too much or too little can be disastrous. Parents must master timing, to overcome freshwater’s constant change and successfully raise the next generation.

1.title: FR - Être Parent - S01E05 - Jungles
1.plot: Raising young in the complex world of jungles requires ingenuity. Parents must become masters of their environment and learn to exploit every opportunity through determination and teamwork.

meta.plot: Un parcours unique, plein de risques et de récompenses. David Attenborough raconte des histoires de dévouement, d'ingéniosité et de sacrifice alors que les animaux se lancent dans un défi épique : devenir parents.

1.title: FR - How to Ruin Love - S01E01 - Love Fool
1.plot: Just days before their anniversary, Zoleka starts to believe that her boyfriend Kagiso is having an affair with her bestie Amahle.

1.title: FR - How to Ruin Love - S01E02 - Chasing Love Backs
1.plot: A viral video of Zoleka's outburst puts her acting career in jeopardy and costs Kagiso an app sale worth millions, threatening his family home.

1.title: FR - How to Ruin Love - S01E03 - Maybe Love Is Not Enough
1.plot: After getting back in Amahle's good graces, Zoleka proposes a daring plan to Kagiso. Aunt Doreen takes ownership of Papi's home.

1.title: FR - How to Ruin Love - S01E04 - All You Need Is Love
1.plot: When her insecurities get the better of her again, Zoleka loses sight of her happy ending.

meta.plot: Soupçonnant son petit ami de lui être infidèle, Zoleka essaie de le prendre sur le fait... et gâche sa demande en mariage. Maintenant, elle va devoir le reconquérir.

1.title: FR - Sandokan [VOSTFR] - S01E01 - The Malaysian Tiger
1.plot: Sandokan and his crew board a ship and free a captive, who is convinced the pirate is the warrior from an old prophecy. Landing in Labuan in disguise, Sandokan meets Marianne, the consul's daughter and clashes with Brooke, a pirate hunter.

1.title: FR - Sandokan [VOSTFR] - S01E02 - The Pearl of Labuan
1.plot: Marianne is celebrating her twenty-first birthday. Sandokan and Brooke are invited to the ball. Tension builds between the three, but Sandokan must first free Yanez and his crew, imprisoned in the dungeons, and try not to blow his cover.

meta.plot: Sandokan is a Malaysian pirate who, along with his friend Yanez and their crew, attacks the British forces from his island of Mompracem. During his adventures, he falls in love with Lady Marianna Guillonk, an English-Italian aristocrat.

1.title: FR - Tour de France : Au cœur du peloton - S01E01 - The Grand Départ
1.plot: With mere days to go, Quick-Step Alpha Vinyl announces their lineup and assesses the odds against them. Can Fabio Jakobsen sprint his way to a comeback?

1.title: FR - Tour de France : Au cœur du peloton - S01E02 - Welcome to Hell
1.plot: Stacked with fierce riders, team Jumbo-Visma takes on the cobblestones — but mechanical challenges and internal competition make for a chaotic stage.

1.title: FR - Tour de France : Au cœur du peloton - S01E03 - The Weight of a Nation
1.plot: A third of the way into the race with no wins for France, Groupama-FDJ and AG2R-Citroën enter the mountain stage with the eyes of a nation upon them.

1.title: FR - Tour de France : Au cœur du peloton - S01E04 - Attack, Counter Attack
1.plot: During the Granon stage, Jonas makes a bid for the yellow jersey — but when a swift Slovenian gets in his way, Jumbo-Visma changes their plan of attack.

1.title: FR - Tour de France : Au cœur du peloton - S01E05 - Breakneck Speed
1.plot: As EF Education-EasyPost strategically showcase their young talent, the INEOS Grenadiers consider using their secret weapon: newcomer Thomas Pidcock.

1.title: FR - Tour de France : Au cœur du peloton - S01E06 - Plan B
1.plot: When their leader drops out, Alpecin-Deceuninck hedges their bets on Jasper "Disaster" Philipsen. Will he live up to his nickname or redeem himself?

1.title: FR - Tour de France : Au cœur du peloton - S01E07 - Everything for the Podium
1.plot: The last week of the tour arrives. With his legacy on the line, 2018 winner Geraint Thomas battles Groupama-FDJ leader David Gaudu for a podium spot.

1.title: FR - Tour de France : Au cœur du peloton - S01E08 - Road to Paris
1.plot: A final push in the mountains remains between the sprinters and Paris. While Fabio finds his fire, Jonas and Wout fight Tadej Pogačar to the finish.

meta.plot: Des larmes aux victoires, cette série suit plusieurs équipes qui s'affrontent durant l'édition 2022 de la plus grande course cycliste du monde.

meta.plot: Pour la première fois, Jessica et Thibault, Manon et Julien, Laura et Nikola, Maeva, Paga et Giuseppa, Greg, Océane et Marine se livrent sans filtre et sans tabou. Vos stars de séries-réalité préférées ont accepté de nous ouvrir leurs portes et de nous faire partager les moments les plus intimes de leur vie de famille.

1.title: FR - The Narrow Road to the Deep North - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: While writing a speech for an upcoming book launch, renowned surgeon and celebrated war hero, Dorrigo Evans is thrust back into memories of his time as a POW in WW2 and of his brief, yet unforgettable, love affair with Amy Mulvaney. A love which sustained him through this dark time.

1.title: FR - The Narrow Road to the Deep North - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: We witness the burgeoning love affair between Dorrigo and Amy in the 1940s, which is in stark contrast to his present day marriage to his wife, Ella. The banality of his current life in the 1980s leads Dorrigo to take a risk that puts his surgical career in jeopardy.

1.title: FR - The Narrow Road to the Deep North - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Dorrigo has come under investigation for a risky procedure he performed, placing a further strain on his marriage. A marriage that is already feeling the effects of Dorrigo's everlasting love for Amy, a love both cannot resist. We also witness Dorrigo's deep love and care towards the soldiers when a cholera outbreak spreads through the POW camp, and his friend Rabbit becomes increasingly unwell.

1.title: FR - The Narrow Road to the Deep North - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Dorrigo and Amy's affair must end when Dorrigo is shipped off to war, where as a prisoner he bares witness to the most horrific of crimes.

1.title: FR - The Narrow Road to the Deep North - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Dorrigo returns from war and tries to get on with his life without Amy and many of his friends he lost to the POW camp. While in the present, the day of the book launch arrives and Dorrigo's reflections on his life come to a head.

meta.plot: En 1989, en Australie, Dorrigo Evans, chirurgien renommé et héros de guerre, se prépare à prononcer un discours lors de la sortie d’un ouvrage consacré à la Seconde Guerre mondiale. Cet événement ravive les souvenirs de son passé : en 1943, alors qu’il était médecin militaire fait prisonnier par les Japonais, il fut contraint de travailler sur la ligne de chemin de fer reliant la Thaïlande à la Birmanie. Dans l’enfer de la jungle, entre violence, maladie et perte, il trouva la force de survivre grâce au souvenir de son amour interdit avec Amy Mulvaney, la femme de son oncle.

1.title: FR - Pro Bono [VOSTFR] - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Kang Da-wit's rise as a judge comes to a crashing halt after a scandal. A far less glamorous opportunity offers him an unexpected new start.

1.title: FR - Pro Bono [VOSTFR] - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR - Pro Bono [VOSTFR] - S01E03 - Episode 3
FR - Pro Bono [VOSTFR] - S01E04 - Episode 4
FR - Pro Bono [VOSTFR] - S01E05 - Episode 5
FR - Pro Bono [VOSTFR] - S01E06 - Episode 6
FR - Pro Bono [VOSTFR] - S01E07 - Episode 7
1.plot: When the pro bono team learns they're being disbanded, Da-wit wagers that they can be valuable. Soon, they handle a case involving a popular singer.

1.title: FR - Pro Bono [VOSTFR] - S01E08 - Episode 8
1.plot: A shocking discovery complicates Eliyah's case, prompting the pro bono team to challenge her contract — even as public opinion turns against her.

1.title: FR - Pro Bono [VOSTFR] - S01E09 - Episode 9
1.plot: After the pro bono team narrowly avoids being shut down, a shadowy figure approaches Park Gi-ppeum — asking her to file a lawsuit against Da-wit.

1.title: FR - Pro Bono [VOSTFR] - S01E10 - Episode 10
1.plot: Da-wit stands trial as a defendant, facing the very team he has mentored. Meanwhile, both sides hunt for the truth that could bring light to the turmoil.

1.title: FR - Pro Bono [VOSTFR] - S01E11 - Episode 11
FR - Pro Bono [VOSTFR] - S01E12 - Episode 12
FR - Un jour, peut-être - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - Un jour, peut-être - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: After Jiwoo's divorce story breaks, Kyeong-do becomes caught up in a scandal himself. With help from his friends, he manages to publish a rebuttal article. However, at the request of Ji-woo's older sister, Ji-yeon, he ends up getting involved with Ji-woo once again.

1.title: FR - Un jour, peut-être - S01E03 - Episode 3
FR - Un jour, peut-être - S01E04 - Episode 4
FR - Un jour, peut-être - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Jin-eon steps back in response to Kyeong-do's flirting. Kyeong-do then settles into Ji-woo's home, insisting he will stay close and take care of her alcoholism.

1.title: FR - Un jour, peut-être - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: Kyeong-do ultimately gives up his training program in Chicago. Meanwhile, Ji-woo learns the secret between Ji-yeon and Kyeong-do. Now Ji-woo must decide what to do.

1.title: FR - Un jour, peut-être - S01E07 - Episode 7
1.plot: The two finally confirm their feelings for each other. However, Jin-eon still seems to have lingering feelings for Ji-woo. Meanwhile, Kyeong-do hears a shocking story about Min-woo from Ji-yeon.

1.title: FR - Un jour, peut-être - S01E08 - Episode 8
FR - Un jour, peut-être - S01E09 - Episode 9
FR - Un jour, peut-être - S01E10 - Episode 10

meta.plot: Dans la vingtaine, Lee Kyeong-do et Seo-Ji-woo se séparent après une relation passionnelle. Dix ans plus tard, ils se retrouvent, l'un comme journaliste sur un scandale d'infidélité, l'autre comme épouse de l'homme impliqué. La candeur de la jeunesse s'est certes estompée, mais leur amour ne s'est jamais éteint. Kyeong-do tient à prouver, à elle et à lui-même, que son amour demeure inchangé.

1.title: FR - L'essor de l'Empire ottoman - S01E01 - The New Sultan
1.plot: After claiming the Ottoman throne, Mehmed II sends an unmistakable signal to Byzantine emperor Constantine XI. Enter Genoese mercenaries.

1.title: FR - L'essor de l'Empire ottoman - S01E02 - Through The Walls
1.plot: Mehmed launches an ambitious siege to break through the walls of Constantinople, but Giustiniani's mercenaries manage to forestall the Janissaries.

1.title: FR - L'essor de l'Empire ottoman - S01E03 - Into The Golden Horn
1.plot: Mehmed's men dig underground tunnels in an attempt to shatter city walls. The tides turn against the Ottomans when a naval blockade founders.

1.title: FR - L'essor de l'Empire ottoman - S01E04 - Loose Lips Sink Ships
1.plot: Mehmed moves his ships overland to the Golden Horn in a daring, visionary feat. In the shadow of betrayal, Giustiniani attacks the Ottoman fleet.

1.title: FR - L'essor de l'Empire ottoman - S01E05 - Ancient Prophecies
1.plot: Amid a spiral of brutality and low morale, Mehmed makes Giustiniani an enticing offer. The grand vizier urges Mehmed to seek a truce with his rival.

1.title: FR - L'essor de l'Empire ottoman - S01E06 - Ashes to Ashes
1.plot: Ottoman cannons reduce the city walls to rubble, and Venetian reinforcements arrive too late. Mehmed ushers in a new era for the Ottoman Empire.

2.title: FR - L'essor de l'Empire ottoman - S02E01 - House Of War
2.plot: Mehmed II solidifies his reign, but in nearby Wallachia, childhood friend Vlad the Impaler gains notoriety and seeks to challenge Mehmed's hegemony.

2.title: FR - L'essor de l'Empire ottoman - S02E02 - Troubled Waters
2.plot: Mehmed sends Maria to coax Hungarian King Matthias Corvinus into an alliance. An epic battle along the Danube River looms, and Vlad has the upper hand.

2.title: FR - L'essor de l'Empire ottoman - S02E03 - Land Of Dracula
2.plot: Mehmed's troops advance into Wallachia, and Vlad employs guerrilla tactics to weaken his rival. A threat lurks in the imperial palace.

2.title: FR - L'essor de l'Empire ottoman - S02E04 - Brothers No More
2.plot:
4. Brothers No More

As the war drags on and resources dwindle, Vlad wages biological warfare on Mehmed's army. Radu closes in on Vlad's castle to take Anastasia hostage.

2.title: FR - L'essor de l'Empire ottoman - S02E05 - Night Attack
2.plot: Mehmed prepares to strike a fatal blow to Vlad's army. A spy is found in Mehmed's camp. Vlad launches a nighttime attack, but a surprise awaits.

2.title: FR - L'essor de l'Empire ottoman - S02E06 - Destiny
2.plot: Vlad and Mehmed face off. Maria and Gülbahar foil the Wallachian plot. Ottoman troops march into an abandoned Târgoviște and face a gruesome sight.

meta.plot: Le sultan ottoman Mehmed II mène une campagne épique pour s'emparer de la capitale byzantine de Constantinople et façonne le cours de l'Histoire pour les siècles à venir.

"Quelque part sur la planète, il y a des gens qui vous attendent" : cette phrase résume bien le concept de la série d’émissions intitulée Rendez-vous en terre inconnue. D’abord diffusée sur France 5, avant d’apparaître en prime-time sur France 2, cette émission convie une personnalité célèbre à découvrir et partager un mode de vie radicalement différent. Cette émission reposant sur l’idée très simple d’une rencontre et sur les liens émouvants qui se tissent au cours du reportage suscite des réactions enthousiastes de la presse et des téléspectateurs

meta.plot: An ordinary man who inherits super strength discovers a greater evil out to steal his power. The one catch? Every use drains money from his wallet.

1.title: FR - Cashero - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Unable to afford a place with Kim Min-suk, Kang Sang-ung visits his father — who grants him a power that will test both his morals and his bank account.

1.title: FR - Cashero - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Sang-ung calls Park Jeong-ja for help when he finds himself in a crisis — only to end up in danger. Meanwhile, Jo Anna uses Min-suk as bait to lure him.

1.title: FR - Cashero - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: After realizing he's become a target, Sang-ung trains with Byeon Ho-in and Bang Eun-mi. Soon after, he contacts Jeong-ja for help to face Anna's army.

1.title: FR - Cashero - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Longing for a normal life, Sang-ung considers selling his power to the Mundane Vanguard — but Ho-in attempts to stop him from making a mistake.

1.title: FR - Cashero - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: After narrowly escaping danger, Sang-ung, Ho-in and Eun-mi find themselves taunted by Jo Nathan. Soon, they investigate a drug ring at a nightclub.

1.title: FR - Cashero - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: After escaping another trap, Sang-ung realizes his regular life is taking a negative impact. But Anna comes forward with an unexpected proposal.

1.title: FR - Cashero - S01E07 - Episode 7
1.plot: The bank scheme quickly turns perilous, pitting Sang-ung against Anna and Nathan. But Nathan lures him in by taking what matters most.

1.title: FR - Cashero - S01E08 - Episode 8
1.plot: Fighting for his love, Sang-ung goes toe-to-toe with the Mundane Vanguard. Will he and his friends finally become the heroes they were meant to be?

meta.plot: Dès son apparition aux côtés du prince héritier des Pays-Bas, Máxima Zorreguieta se retrouve sous les feux de la rampe. Lorsque Willem-Alexander lui demande de l'épouser, son passé la rattrape. Une discussion animée éclate au sujet de la carrière politique de son père sous le régime Videla, une discussion à laquelle elle n'avait jamais été confrontée dans son propre cercle. Qu'est-ce qui permet à cette Argentine de s'épanouir enfin dans une vieille cour européenne ? Et comment Máxima peut-elle rester fidèle à elle-même sans renoncer à sa famille ? Ou bien ces deux choses sont-elles incompatibles ?

FR - Máxima - S01E06 - Episode 6

meta.plot: L'une des fêtes milanaises les plus sélectes vire au drame quand une femme affirme avoir été victime d'une agression sexuelle. Ce documentaire raconte l'enquête qui a suivi.

1.title: FR - Terrazza Sentimento : Décadence d'un milliardaire - S01E01 - Parties
1.plot: Milan's partygoers recall lavish, invite-only events at Terrazza Sentimento. But in October 2020, the penthouse party sparks disturbing allegations.

1.title: FR - Terrazza Sentimento : Décadence d'un milliardaire - S01E02 - Drugs
1.plot: While police recover deleted CCTV footage, victim reports in Milan and Ibiza fuel a widening case against Alberto Genovese, and the media frenzy begins.

1.title: FR - Terrazza Sentimento : Décadence d'un milliardaire - S01E03 - Guilt
1.plot: As the court nears a verdict, investigators examine Genovese's mindset, a former classmate reflects on his past — and one insider dominates the press.

1.title: FR - The Copenhagen Test [VOSTFR] - S01E01 - Copenhagen
1.plot: Trying to prove he's not the mole at his agency, an analyst makes a discovery that upends his life.

1.title: FR - The Copenhagen Test [VOSTFR] - S01E02 - Glass House
1.plot: Alexander and The Orphanage are forced to work together, building a trap with Alexander as the bait.

meta.plot: Dana a 9 ans, et elle adore les dinosaures. Sa vie va changer pour toujours grâce au Guide des dingos des Dinos, qui lui apprend plein de choses sur les dinosaures tout en lui donner le pouvoir de les imaginer dans la vraie vie !

1.title: FR - Dino Dana - S01E01 - Dino Field Guides
1.plot: Dana is a 9-year old girl who loves dinosaurs. Her life changes forever when she's given a Dino Field Guide, which not only teaches her new things about dinosaurs, but gives her the power to imagine dinosaurs into real life.

1.title: FR - Dino Dana - S01E02 - Dino Divers / A Game of Microrapter and Mouse
FR - Dino Dana - S01E03 - All in the Dino Family / Snakes and Dinosaurs
FR - Dino Dana - S01E04 - Dinos of a Feather / Dino Baby Talk
FR - Dino Dana - S01E05 - Dino Doctor / Be My Dino Baby
FR - Dino Dana - S01E06 - Dino Defender / The Dino Days of Summer
FR - Dino Dana - S01E07 - Calling All Plesiosaurs / King of the Dance Floor
FR - Dino Dana - S01E08 - Fossil Finders / Dino Rescue Train
FR - Dino Dana - S01E09 - Mega Tooth / Dino Dodgeball
FR - Dino Dana - S01E10 - Get That Incisivosaurus / Dino Sight
FR - Dino Dana - S01E11 - I Dig History / Dinomite
FR - Dino Dana - S01E12 - Face Your Fearosaurus / Herd it Loud and Clear
FR - Dino Dana - S01E13 - Dino Match Maker / Lost and Sound

2.title: FR - Dino Dana - S02E01 - Tusk Love
2.plot: Dana's dino experiment goes awry when she finds an abandoned baby Triceratops and tries to reunite it with its family.

2.title: FR - Dino Dana - S02E02 - Dino Rivalry/Dino Skater
2.plot: When Uncle Ravi comes over for a curry cook-out Dana must protect Dad's special ingredient, a spicy mirchi pepper, from being eaten by hungry herbivores! Dana conducts Dino Experiment 618: What does it feel like to go as fast as a Compsognathus, the fastest dinosaur? With her Compsognathus skateboard she's ready to feel the speed, but first she must master the basics of skateboarding.

2.title: FR - Dino Dana - S02E04 - Taming the Smilodon/DIY Dino
2.plot: Smitten with Cai's new foster kitten, Dana tries to convince Cai to adopt the kitten while imaging what it would've been like for cave-people domesticating a Smilodon. When Grandma watches over Dana, Dana's disappointed because she and Dad planned to transform her bike into a Dromaeosaurus for Dino Experiment 612: How does a Psittacosaurus use its tail quills to protect itself.

2.title: FR - Dino Dana - S02E05 - A Dino Never Forgets/Claw & Order
2.plot: Dana comes across a herd of traveling sauropods and learns about why and how they migrate. Using what she learns she helps Mr. Hendrickson's move into a new home a little easier. Dana and her family plan to have a picnic lunch, but find their picnic basket has been slashed. The family heads to Dino Court, to try "The Case of the Picnic Basket Slasher".

2.title: FR - Dino Dana - S02E06 - Reptile Connection/Three Dinos and a Baby
2.plot: Ms. Currie asks Dana to help her choose a reptile that's most like a dinosaur to adopt for Trek's upcoming birthday. Together they scour the local Reptile Zoo and pet store for the perfect pet. Dana neglects to do her part to help take care of Nixon because she's too preoccupied with Dino Experiment 620: How do Edmontosaurus take care of their babies.

2.title: FR - Dino Dana - S02E07 - Dinoback Riding/Overnight Dino
2.plot: At Grandma's farm Dana conducts Dino Experiment 625: What does it feel like to ride a Hippodraco? With Grandma's guidance and Saara's love of horses, they help Dana learn what it feels like to ride a "Horse Dragon". Dana wants to stay up all night to do Dino Experiment 623: Are there nocturnal dinosaurs? But her Dad's just come back from a late hospital shift and wants to go to bed.

2.title: FR - Dino Dana - S02E08 - Saaratops/Raising Dino Expectations
2.plot: Dana uses her time at Grandma's farm to conduct Dino Experiment 615: Who would win in a fight? A Triceratops, Diabloceratops, or Kosmoceratops? Dana, Grandma and Saara all get invested and choose a dino to root for. Dana discovers the differences between dino and human babies a when Mom's friend Ashley and her new baby Ben stop by for a visit.

2.title: FR - Dino Dana - S02E09 - The Fast and The Fiercest/Growing Up Dino
2.plot: When Dana, Saara and Uncle Ravi go gokarting together, Dana learns helpful techniques from a nearby Stygimoloch to help as they race each other. Dana is doing Dino Experiment 624: Why does the baby Brachiosaurus eat so much? Meanwhile, Saara adeals with her very first face pimple, an early sign of growing up.

2.title: FR - Dino Dana - S02E10 - Dino Thieves/The Dino Giver
2.plot: Dana has a nightmare where Saara's a Super Villain who steals an Ozraptor bone from a special, traveling display at the ROM. Dana learns that male Dromaeosaurus give gifts to impress female Dromaeosaurus, just like Dana's Dad did to try and impress young Dana.

2.title: FR - Dino Dana - S02E11 - The First Elephant/Dino Burrow
2.plot: Dana's at the museum studying Mammoth fossils when she tells Dad and Saara a fantastical story about the cave people that lived among them. Dana and Saara are shoveling the driveway when Dana is distracted by a Troodon who has dug a den under her tree house. Dana wants to figure out why the Troodon dug the dens, but also promised to help Mom shovel the driveaway.

2.title: FR - Dino Dana - S02E12 - Dino Kitty/Dino, It's Cold Outside
2.plot: Dana accidentally lures a Smilodon into her house, but when mom tells her wiild animals aren't allowed inside Dana uses Nixon as bate to lure the Smilodon outside before Mom and Saara notice. Dana conducts Dino Experiment 608: How Do Dinosaurs Survive the Winter? With some holiday help from Ms. Currie and her grandsons, she discovers some surprising results.

2.title: FR - Dino Dana - S02E13 - Game of Bones
2.plot: In this two-part special, Dana creates an elaborate board game called the Game of Bones that brings out the competitive side of her family as she explains what happened when a meteorite ended the reign of the dinosaurs.

meta.plot: La vie d'un shérif tentant de conjuguer sa vie familiale et son métier difficile. Il doit d'ailleurs très souvent calmer les tensions entre deux communautés : les habitants de la petite ville dans laquelle il a grandi et les Indiens habitant à Ramapo Mountain. Après une tragédie et un incident avec sa femme, il va s'associer avec un membre dangereux de la tribu. Malheureusement, cette alliance reviendra inévitablement les hanter à tous...

1.title: FR - The Red Road - S01E01 - Arise My Love, Shake Off This Dream
1.plot: The story follows a sheriff trying to police the small New Jersey town where he grew up and a nearby Native American settlement begins with a tragedy that impacts both factions of the area.

1.title: FR - The Red Road - S01E02 - The Wolf and the Dog
1.plot: Determined to cover up the truth by any means necessary, Harold's sworn duty to protect and serve suffers in the aftermath of the accident.

1.title: FR - The Red Road - S01E03 - The Woman Who Fell from the Sky
1.plot: Rachel makes an interesting discovery at her grandparents' house; Junior falls further under Kopus' spell; Jean's emotional turbulence worsens.

1.title: FR - The Red Road - S01E04 - The Bad Weapons
1.plot: Harold finds himself caught between his role as law enforcement and the deal he has struck with Kopus.

1.title: FR - The Red Road - S01E05 - The Great Snake Battle
1.plot: Harold makes a curious discovery as he puzzles over new details; Kopus heads to Brooklyn armed with new knowledge; Jean makes a bold decision.

1.title: FR - The Red Road - S01E06 - Snaring of the Sun
1.plot: Kopus finds himself up against the wall and in imminent danger; Harold discovers heartbreaking news about his family's past.

2.title: FR - The Red Road - S02E01 - Gifts
2.plot: Kopus is released from jail and returns home with an ankle monitor, while Harold deals with locals who are not happy about the Lenape tribe receiving federal recognition.

2.title: FR - The Red Road - S02E02 - Graves
2.plot: Kopus becomes the focal point for all of the suspicion from the tribe. Harold protects Junior, jeopardizing his standing in the police department.

2.title: FR - The Red Road - S02E03 - Intruders
2.plot: After hearing of Captain Warren’s suicide, Harold, Jean and her parents discuss their uneasiness. Marie meets with the Tribal Council to discuss the issue of a casino, which Sky is fiercely opposed to.

2.title: FR - The Red Road - S02E04 - A Cure
2.plot: Believing his career is over, Harold meets with the Mayor. Rachel finds Jean’s diary and is deeply disturbed. Kopus confronts Harold.

2.title: FR - The Red Road - S02E05 - The Hatching
2.plot: Jean is distraught over Rachel’s episodeand believes her father knows more than he lets on. Kopus visits Junior’s campsite.

2.title: FR - The Red Road - S02E06 - Shadow Walker
2.plot: In New Jersey, Jean spirals further out of control. She confronts her father about his actions against her brother. Harold later goes to Marie to make peace.

meta.plot: Dans la Corée du Sud des années 1970, suivez deux hommes aux antipodes du pouvoir : l'un animé par l'ambition, l'autre par la justice. Alors que leurs mondes s'entrechoquent, la cupidité, la loyauté et la survie s'entremêlent dans une bataille qui façonnera une nation.

1.title: FR - Made in Korea [VOSTFR] - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: A plane headed for Fukuoka is hijacked and Kitae, a business man, faces a crisis.

1.title: FR - Made in Korea [VOSTFR] - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Geonyoung uncovers the KCIA's suspicious activities while working to bring down a crime boss.

1.title: FR - Made in Korea [VOSTFR] - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Kitae begins working on an operation as Geonyoung digs into the KCIA’s activities. Geumji returns with her son but refuses to reveal the father.

1.title: FR - Made in Korea [VOSTFR] - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Kitae meets Yuji of the Ikeda clan in a push to scale up operations, and the pair agree to work together. Meanwhile, Geonyoung follows them to Japan.

1.title: FR - Made in Korea [VOSTFR] - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Geonyoung figures out how to arrest Kitae, who obliviously continues to expand his business.

1.title: FR - Made in Korea [VOSTFR] - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: Kitae searches for a new business partner with Yuji, while Geonyoung sets a trap to catch him.

meta.plot: Chaque rencontre entre Jimin et Jung Kook du groupe BTS se solde par un mélange de chaos et d'excitation ! Durant l'été 2023, ils partent faire un voyage inoubliable avant de faire leur service militaire. Le récit de leurs aventures imprévisibles regorge de surprises. Jimin et Jung Kook finiront-ils leur voyage sains et saufs ?

1.title: FR - Are You Sure?! [VOSTFR] - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Right after Jung Kook's GMA performance, Jimin and Jung Kook embark on an unpredictable travel adventure.

1.title: FR - Are You Sure?! [VOSTFR] - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Their carefree trip faces sudden rain. Can they finish the trip without a hitch?

1.title: FR - Are You Sure?! [VOSTFR] - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: The second trip of the show is to Jeju Island, which features a special guest! Who could it be?

1.title: FR - Are You Sure?! [VOSTFR] - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: The youngest members of BTS enjoy their Jeju trip filled with delicious food and joy. Will their peace continue to the end of the trip?

1.title: FR - Are You Sure?! [VOSTFR] - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: The "Are You Sure?!" Jeju trip ends with abundant memories on their last night.

1.title: FR - Are You Sure?! [VOSTFR] - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: Before enlistment, Jimin and Jung Kook go to Sapporo for an epic food tour. Their final trip begins.

1.title: FR - Are You Sure?! [VOSTFR] - S01E07 - Episode 7
1.plot: Winter in Sapporo means skiing! Jimin and Jung Kook thoroughly enjoy the slopes, leaving no regrets.

1.title: FR - Are You Sure?! [VOSTFR] - S01E08 - Episode 8
1.plot: On their last night in Sapporo, Jimin and Jung Kook look forward to future adventures together.

2.title: FR - Are You Sure?! [VOSTFR] - S02E01 - Is This Even a Trip?!
2.plot: Without warning, Jimin and Jung Kook set off on their second trip. Where will they go this time?

2.title: FR - Are You Sure?! [VOSTFR] - S02E02 - Unpredictable Adventures in the Alps
2.plot: Will Jimin and Jung Kook make it through a perfect day in the Swiss Alps?

2.title: FR - Are You Sure?! [VOSTFR] - S02E03 - A Legendary Day beneath the Matterhorn
2.plot: Jimin and Jung Kook spend a special day beneath the iconic 4,000-meter Matterhorn.

2.title: FR - Are You Sure?! [VOSTFR] - S02E04 - Laughter and Chaos in Zermatt
2.plot: Magical moments under the stars quickly turn chaotic as Jimin and Jung Kook wonder, "Are you sure?!"

2.title: FR - Are You Sure?! [VOSTFR] - S02E05 - Thrilling Freedom on the Lake
2.plot: Jimin and Jung Kook relax, cook, and play games, but their day on the lake quickly turns wild.

2.title: FR - Are You Sure?! [VOSTFR] - S02E06 - Unforgettable Punishment and Magical Evening
2.plot: Jimin and Jung Kook enjoy Zurich's night view amid laughter and tension. Where are they off to next?

2.title: FR - Are You Sure?! [VOSTFR] - S02E07 - A Chaotic Journey from Switzerland to Vietnam
2.plot: Jimin and Jung Kook eventually reach Da Nang, but surprise games turn their perfect day into chaos.

2.title: FR - Are You Sure?! [VOSTFR] - S02E08 - The Final Adventure in Da Nang
2.plot: Jimin and Jung Kook’s adventure, full of laughter and magic, finally reaches its last moment.
