meta.plot: Irlande, dans une petite ville du comté de Donegal. Quinze ans après avoir été portée disparue, la mère du policier Conall O Suilleabhain est retrouvée enterrée dans une tourbière. Écarté de l’enquête, Conall se lance à la recherche de la vérité, tandis que Ciara Kate, une jeune journaliste, compte sur l’affaire pour faire décoller sa carrière…

1.title: FR - Boglands, enquête en terre noire - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Life in a small Donegal town is utterly changed with the discovery of the body of a local woman who went missing 15 years previously. Conall, the local Garda, is forbidden from working the case but this isn't going to stop him.

1.title: FR - Boglands, enquête en terre noire - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Sabine's funeral takes place and her son, Conall, and her husband, Art, are the main murder suspects. Ciara Kate is convinced that Sabine was having an affair and decides to investigate.

1.title: FR - Boglands, enquête en terre noire - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: While the official investigation puts Conall firmly in the frame for his mother's murder, Conall follows a lead involving his college friends who were present the night Sabine was killed.

1.title: FR - Boglands, enquête en terre noire - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: The community gather to watch the crime reconstruction on national television. The programme unearths a new prime suspect, a close friend of Art and Sabine, and a pillar of the community.

1.title: FR - Boglands, enquête en terre noire - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Conall is held hostage by an armed Ray, the prime suspect. But he claims he is being framed by the police. Who will Conall believe? And will they both make it out alive?

1.title: FR - Boglands, enquête en terre noire - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: In the aftermath of the siege, the narrative is that Ray is guilty. But neither Ciara-Kate or Conall are convinced. They continue their investigations and the truth about what happened to Sabine is finally uncovered.

meta.plot: Clubs privés, tenues haute couture et galas de charité sont au cœur de cette série de téléréalité qui se déroule dans un paradis luxueux, riche en mélodrames.

1.title: FR - Members Only: Palm Beach - S01E01 - Welcome To Palm Beach
1.plot: Hilary hosts a party at her mansion and snubs a seasoned socialite. Rosalyn mentors newbie Ro-Mina, whose manners — and outfits — annoy the others.

1.title: FR - Members Only: Palm Beach - S01E02 - Will The Real Queen Please Stand Up?
1.plot: A Palm Beach legend crowns Rosalyn at a high tea, while an overeager Ro-Mina gets a frosty reception from the other guests. Taja brokers a peace summit.

1.title: FR - Members Only: Palm Beach - S01E03 - How Do You Solve A Problem Like Maria?
1.plot: Maria has a vulnerable moment at a pool party — made worse by Hilary's rebuke. Gale's constant name-dropping and one-upping wears thin.

1.title: FR - Members Only: Palm Beach - S01E04 - Boobs and Knees
1.plot: Maria's DJ party is a bit too risqué for some of the women. Hilary revokes an invite to her wedding. Gale gets wind of Taja's snarky remarks.

1.title: FR - Members Only: Palm Beach - S01E05 - Fifth Time’s A Charm
1.plot: Hilary's ceremony is overshadowed by a notable absence. Rosalyn and Gale take Ro-Mina shopping for conservative clothing to help her fit in.

1.title: FR - Members Only: Palm Beach - S01E06 - It’s My Party And I’ll Cry If I Want To
1.plot: Hilary attends Maria's fundraiser, but makes it clear she's only there for Coco. The women are insulted by Ro-Mina's birthday party wishes.

1.title: FR - Members Only: Palm Beach - S01E07 - Allergic To Phony
1.plot: Ro-Mina visits an etiquette expert and the lesson gets out of hand. Rosalyn sticks up for Gale's legitimacy when she's called a fraud.

1.title: FR - Members Only: Palm Beach - S01E08 - Game Of Crowns
1.plot: Taja's celebration sours when she gathers the women and calls them out on their vicious gossip. Rosalyn and Hilary try to bury the hatchet.

meta.plot: La citadine Sophie déménage dans une petite ville du Texas, où elle rencontre la charismatique Margot Banks. Elle rejoint rapidement un club géré par cette dernière, les Hunting Wives, où d'autres riches épouses font plus que tirer au fusil pour s'amuser. Bientôt, une jeune fille de la région est retrouvée morte dans les bois où se réunissent les épouses.

1.title: FR - The Hunting Wives - S01E01 - Strange and Unfamiliar Places
1.plot: New to East Texas, Sophie O'Neil bonds with the alluring Margo Banks, who shows Sophie another side of life.

1.title: FR - The Hunting Wives - S01E02 - Knockin' Boots
1.plot: Jed considers a run for governor. Margo aims to protect their privacy as the Hunting Wives navigate behind closed doors. The dead blond woman in the woods is found.

1.title: FR - The Hunting Wives - S01E03 - Sunrise Tells the Story
1.plot: Margo has a surprise for Sophie and Callie's jealousy grows, as does Jill's concerns. A chilly discovery is made about the unidentified dead woman.

1.title: FR - The Hunting Wives - S01E04 - Cheat Day
1.plot: After a body is discovered in the woods, tensions ignite as Margo and Brad rush to align their stories. Sophie searches for her missing handgun.

1.title: FR - The Hunting Wives - S01E05 - Not Her First Rodeo
1.plot: Sophie desperately tries to manage her situation. Jill is determined to protect her son at all costs.

1.title: FR - The Hunting Wives - S01E06 - Deep in the Heart of Texas
1.plot: Determined to prove her innocence, Sophie searches for answers. Margo hits the campaign trail. Nina's fondness for Pete grows.

1.title: FR - The Hunting Wives - S01E07 - Shooting Star
1.plot: New information in Abby's murder investigation threatens to seal the fate of Sophie and the Hunting Wives. Starr discovers an unbearable truth.

1.title: FR - The Hunting Wives - S01E08 - Sophie's Choice
1.plot: With Nina's safe return, Pete's suicide and Abby's killer shot dead, Sophie and Margo rest easy knowing the murder is solved, or so they think.

meta.plot: Quand un adolescent disparaît, une policière liée personnellement à l'affaire rejoint une enquête compliquée qui révèle des loyautés farouches et de vieilles querelles familiales.

1.title: FR - Land of Sin - S01E01 - You've Been Warned
1.plot: Malmö detectives Dani and Malik pay an unwelcome visit to a rural village to investigate the disappearance of a teenager — only for Dani, it's personal.

1.title: FR - Land of Sin - S01E02 - Unidentified Man #1
1.plot: Questions mount in the case as fresh evidence and buried secrets surface. Dani and Malik pursue multiple leads to track down an unknown suspect.

1.title: FR - Land of Sin - S01E03 - Brothers
1.plot: Malik bends the rules to help a heartbroken colleague deal with a painful prospect. Elis confronts a menacing figure from his past.

1.title: FR - Land of Sin - S01E04 - Järven
1.plot: While Järven issues an ultimatum to secure his safety, Elis forms an unlikely alliance to prove a potentially dangerous theory.

1.title: FR - Land of Sin - S01E05 - Queen Bee
1.plot: As unsettling new evidence and hard truths come to light, both police and locals scramble to find those responsible — before it's too late.

meta.plot: Dans les années qui suivent leurs aventures au sein du NCIS, Anthony « Tony » DiNozzo et Ziva David se retrouvent à élever leur fille Tali ensemble. Cependant, leur tranquillité est brusquement interrompue lorsque l'entreprise de sécurité de Tony devient la cible d'attaques mystérieuses. Contraints de fuir à travers l'Europe pour leur survie, ils se retrouvent face à un ennemi invisible et doivent réapprendre à se faire mutuellement confiance. Leur voyage épique les amène à découvrir des secrets enfouis et à affronter leur passé, avec pour seul espoir de pouvoir enfin vivre en paix et en sécurité.

1.title: FR - NCIS : Tony & Ziva - S01E01 - No Country Is Safe
1.plot: Their family now in danger, Tony and Ziva must find who is behind a nefarious cyber-attack.

1.title: FR - NCIS : Tony & Ziva - S01E02 - No Friend of Mine
1.plot: Tony and Ziva track down the elusive hacker, only to join forces when Interpol closes in.

1.title: FR - NCIS: Tony & Ziva - S01E03 - Cover Story
1.plot: Unsure who to trust and framed for a terrorist bombing, Tony and Ziva go off the grid.

1.title: FR - NCIS: Tony & Ziva - S01E04 - Wedding Crashers
1.plot: Tony and Ziva use a wedding as an undercover operation to root out their enemies.

1.title: FR - NCIS: Tony & Ziva - S01E05 - To Be Determined
1.plot: The Missing secretary General of Interpol leads Tony and Ziva to a high security prison.

1.title: FR - NCIS: Tony & Ziva - S01E06 - We've Got Company
1.plot: The stakes grow even higher when the safe house Tali has been hiding in is compromised.

1.title: FR - NCIS: Tony & Ziva - S01E07 - Dark Mirror
1.plot: Tony and Ziva return to Paris on a mission to spy on the double agents who are framing them.

1.title: FR - Zabić Miss - S01E01 - Part One
1.plot: While Agnieszka Kotlarska's star on the pageant circuit rises, behind closed doors the young model deals with a persistent stalker.

1.title: FR - Zabić Miss - S01E02 - Part Two
1.plot: As Agnieszka balances her flourishing career and expanding family, her stalker reemerges after she narrowly avoids a fatal plane crash.

1.title: FR - Zabić Miss - S01E03 - Part Three
1.plot: After Agnieszka is killed and the trial begins, her friends and family must confront the senseless ending to her life.

meta.plot: Quand Reda sort de prison, il espère renouer avec son ancien complice devenu entre-temps le second de Carlotti, le Parrain qui règne en maître sur le nord de l’île. Reda a du mal à trouver sa place dans ce monde de voyous qui a beaucoup changé et comprend vite qu'il ne sera pas accepté par la bande de la Plaine Orientale. Au même moment débarque à Bastia sa demi-sœur Ines qu’il a perdue de vue depuis l’enfance. C’est aujourd’hui une jeune magistrate qui intègre le premier pôle anti-mafia constitué par la police et la justice locale. Déterminée à faire tomber le Parrain Carlotti, elle propose à Reda une alliance secrète. Se signe alors un pacte à haut risque entre les deux…

1.title: FR - Plaine orientale - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: A few days before his release from prison, Reda receives a visit from his half-sister Ines, whom he barely knows. She has just joined the anti-Mafia unit in Bastia as a judge. This department, headed by Judge Maertens, is investigating the murder of a mayor who is believed to have resisted the Mafia. Upon his release from prison, Reda approaches his former gangster friends, but he realizes that there is no longer a place for him and finds himself relegated to the drug dealing spot in the Lupino housing project.

1.title: FR - Plaine orientale - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: After regaining his place in Lupino's deal, Reda realizes, along with Nacéra, that Taracci, one of Guerrieri's men, is swindling them. Ines and Judge Maertens continue their investigation separately, and both find evidence implicating the same company: Corsica Distribution.

1.title: FR - Plaine orientale - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Judge Maertens learns that Taracci is linked to Carlotti's gang but also to Lupino's trafficking operation. Ines is sent to stake out the location with Albertini. When Carlotti realizes that Reda is threatening his business, he decides to go after his father. This is too much for Reda, who makes a radical decision.

1.title: FR - Plaine orientale - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Reda reconnects with his childhood sweetheart, Alexandra. Now married to Jean-Do Guerrieri, she is still in love with him. Reda's father is forced to partner with Carlotti. Undercover in Lupino, Ines gathers valuable information while protecting Reda. The latter decides to set up his own business without informing the Plaine gang.

1.title: FR - Plaine orientale - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: The anti-Mafia unit continues its investigation into Lupino's deal. Ines finally receives congratulations from Judge Maertens. Reda continues his parallel deal and arouses the suspicions of the anti-Mafia unit, which begins to investigate him. Eva Maertens does not understand why he does not appear in any of Ines' reports.

1.title: FR - Plaine orientale - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: Ines is forced to confess her secret to Albertini. Eva Maertens meets Reda and tells him that she suspects Jean-Do Guerrieri deliberately caused the accident in which Reda's father was injured. When questioned by the police, Alexandra will do everything she can to protect her daughter's father.

1.title: FR - Plaine orientale - S01E07 - Episode 7
1.plot: After clearing his name with the police, Alexandra asks Jean-Do to leave their home. Rachida, the mother of Ines and Reda, returns to Bastia following a tragedy. Having been estranged from her son Reda for many years, she demands that Ines let her speak to him. Meanwhile, Reda seeks to meet César Carlotti...

1.title: FR - Plaine orientale - S01E08 - Episode 8
1.plot: Reda is arrested by Judge Maertens as part of the investigation into the ambush on Jean-Do Guerrieri. The net is closing in on the brother and sister. Carlotti discovers that Ines Amrani, the judge investigating him, is Reda's half-sister.

meta.plot: Un groupe de pompiers héroïques de Seattle. L'histoire est centrée sur la recrue Andrea Herrera, fille du capitaine de caserne Pruitt Herrera qui soutient leur équipe à chacune de leurs interventions. Les courageux et braves hommes et femmes qui ont tissé des liens solides, mettent tout en oeuvre pour freiner les ravages des flammes et sauver la vie des autres. Un aperçu d'un univers difficile qui nous fait connaître des personnages attachants dont le courage et l'éthique dictent leur manière d'être dans l'exercice de leurs fonctions.

1.title: FR - Grey's Anatomy : Station 19 - S01E01 - Stuck
1.plot: When the team responds to an apartment fire, Captain Pruitt takes a hit, the future of the station’s leadership is in jeopardy and firefighter Andy Herrera is forced to step up. Meanwhile, new recruit Ben Warren is trading in the scalpel for a fresh start as a firefighter, but it hasn’t been easy.

1.title: FR - Grey's Anatomy : Station 19 - S01E02 - Invisible to Me
1.plot: With the absence of Captain Pruitt, Andy and Jack try to navigate how to work together, and a car accident on a rural road puts both the victims and the crew’s lives at risk.

1.title: FR - Grey's Anatomy : Station 19 - S01E03 - Contain the Flame
1.plot: Upon the arrival of Batallion Chief Frankel, Jack begins his first shift as co-captain and continues to butt heads with Andy on leadership styles. Captain Pruitt has a difficult time following doctor’s orders and winds up back at the station to take on administrative duties. Meanwhile, the rest of the team at Station 19 responds to an attic fire at JJ’s apartment building and a call to a pool house party.

1.title: FR - Grey's Anatomy : Station 19 - S01E04 - Reignited
1.plot: As if being co-captains weren’t hard enough, Andy and Jack find themselves in disagreement over spending decisions at the station. Meanwhile, the firefighters respond to a structure fire at a brand-new bed-and-breakfast; and Ryan calls Maya when he finds her brother in some trouble.

1.title: FR - Grey's Anatomy : Station 19 - S01E05 - Shock to the System
1.plot: Miranda Bailey visits Ben at work, meeting his new co-workers for the first time. While most of the team responds to a motor vehicle accident involving an electrical danger, Andy and Maya are paired up to go on their first stakeout.

1.title: FR - Grey's Anatomy : Station 19 - S01E06 - Stronger Together
1.plot: Andy, Jack and 18 other candidates take the captaincy drill test, gunning for one spot as captain of Station 19. Meanwhile, Travis is serving as acting captain while Andy and Jack are away for the day; and Ben confronts Vic about her fears.

1.title: FR - Grey's Anatomy : Station 19 - S01E07 - Let It Burn
1.plot: Ryan tags along to a disaster drill training at Station 19 where he and Jack get competitive. Captain Pruitt’s health weakens and Andy is sticking by his side. Meanwhile, both the firehouse crew and police department respond to a strip mall fire, forcing Jack and Ryan to work together.

1.title: FR - Grey's Anatomy : Station 19 - S01E08 - Every Second Counts
1.plot: Ripley interviews each member of the Station 19 crew to determine whether Andy or Jack should be given the role of captain. Meanwhile, a mom’s day out on a party bus takes a turn for the worst; and Captain Pruitt continues his treatment.

1.title: FR - Grey's Anatomy : Station 19 - S01E09 - Hot Box
1.plot: In the final days before the Station 19 captaincy is announced, Pruitt warns Andy not to be disappointed with the outcome. Meanwhile, Ben gets upset with Pruitt for having told Bailey the dangers of firefighting; and the team gets trapped inside the garage of a burning house, putting several lives at risk.

1.title: FR - Grey's Anatomy : Station 19 - S01E10 - Not Your Hero
1.plot: Ben reaches a new milestone as a rookie and, as is tradition, receives something from the crew. Chief Ripley holds final interviews for the role of captain but is interrupted when the team is called to a massive skyscraper fire, causing several lives to hang in the balance.

2.title: FR - Grey's Anatomy : Station 19 - S02E01 - No Recovery
2.plot: Lives hang in the balance as the members of Station 19 continue to fight a raging inferno inside a skyscraper. Meanwhile, Pruitt’s health is in grave danger at Grey Sloan; and a seasoned firefighter with a mysterious past arrives at Station 19, leaving everyone to wonder what the future holds.

2.title: FR - Grey's Anatomy : Station 19 - S02E02 - Under the Surface
2.plot: It’s a life-and-death situation when a young boy falls into water pipes beneath the city of Seattle. With the clock ticking, the firefighters of Station 19 jump into action to save his life.

2.title: FR - Grey's Anatomy : Station 19 - S02E03 - Home to Hold Onto
2.plot: When Station 19 receives a call from concerned neighbors regarding a resident in their apartment building, the team heads out to investigate. When they arrive to evaluate the scene, they're shocked by what they find inside. Meanwhile, in an effort to create a solid working relationship between the fire and police departments, Ryan takes an unlikely member of the team on a ride-along.

2.title: FR - Grey's Anatomy : Station 19 - S02E04 - Lost and Found
2.plot: Everyone is less than enthusiastic when Sullivan assigns each member of the crew a specialty skill to learn. During a house call, Ryan is caught off guard when he comes face-to-face with someone from his past; and Sullivan, Andy and Maya handle a structure fire in a derelict building.

2.title: FR - Grey's Anatomy : Station 19 - S02E05 - Do a Little Harm …
2.plot: Captain Sullivan continues his efforts to bring together the fire and police departments by hosting a training seminar that does not go as planned. Meanwhile, Ben and Miranda have an honest conversation about their marriage, leading Miranda to make a tough decision about their future.

2.title: FR - Grey's Anatomy : Station 19 - S02E06 - Last Day on Earth
2.plot: Just when Ryan agrees to talk it out with his dad, Greg Tanner makes an unexpected visit to Station 19, leaving Ryan and others confused. In an effort to connect with his crew, Captain Sullivan enlists the help of an unlikely source for some bonding tips.

2.title: FR - Grey's Anatomy : Station 19 - S02E07 - Weather the Storm
2.plot: As the team gathers for a Friendsgiving celebration at Dean’s, a violent windstorm touches down in Seattle. As the storm picks up speed, creating dangerous fire conditions, the crew must put the festivities on hold and report for duty, leaving some of them in a life-threatening situation.

2.title: FR - Grey's Anatomy : Station 19 - S02E08 - Crash and Burn
2.plot: In the aftermath of the windstorm, Andy and Sullivan’s fates remain unknown while trapped in the overturned aid car. Meanwhile, back at the station, the team confronts Jack about his well-being; and when it’s safe enough to venture out, they search for their fellow firefighters in a race against time.

2.title: FR - Grey's Anatomy : Station 19 - S02E09 - I Fought the Law
2.plot: When Andy, Maya and Dean respond to a call, they find an injured woman with amnesia; but soon into the treatment process, they realize there is much more to her story.  Meanwhile, Captain Sullivan takes Ben and Jack on a house call that quickly becomes a close call for the patient they’re treating, while Ryan may not have seen the last of his father, Greg.

2.title: FR - Grey's Anatomy : Station 19 - S02E10 - Crazy Train
2.plot: Jack and Maya are called to treat people stuck in a subway train and discover a potential threat to the passengers and themselves. Meanwhile, Travis, Ben and Dean get pressured into inviting Sullivan to help repaint walls in Travis’ house and come to a surprising conclusion about Sullivan.

2.title: FR - Grey's Anatomy : Station 19 - S02E11 - Baby Boom
2.plot: When an RV crashes into Station 19, the team races against the clock to save lives and secure the building’s compromised structure. Meanwhile, a surprise delivery arrives at reception.

2.title: FR - Grey's Anatomy : Station 19 - S02E12 - When It Rains, It Pours!
2.plot: While struggling to help victims of a crash on a desolate road, Vic finds the courage to confront a difficult situation. Meanwhile, Ben prepares to go out for Medic One, causing some concern over his current Station 19 responsibilities, and Pruitt spends time with a special someone.

2.title: FR - Grey's Anatomy : Station 19 - S02E13 - The Dark Night
2.plot: A blackout in Seattle creates dangerous situations throughout the city and the members of Station 19 head out on calls, including locating a missing girl and helping a man on life support where every second counts.

2.title: FR - Grey's Anatomy : Station 19 - S02E14 - Friendly Fire
2.plot: When Station 19 gets called to a structure fire at a coffee processing plant, the team risks their lives to save Station 42’s captain. Meanwhile, Ripley and Vic consider a shocking option to save their relationship; Andy gets some surprising news about some of her fellow crew members, and Pruitt takes on a new position.

2.title: FR - Grey's Anatomy : Station 19 - S02E15 - Always Ready (II)
2.plot:
Following a deadly blaze inside a coffee beanery, the members of Station 19 find themselves on high alert as a beloved member of their team lands at Grey Sloan, leaving the future uncertain in the face of a life-threatening situation.

The crossover starts on Grey's Anatomy S15E23 What I Did for Love (I)

2.title: FR - Grey's Anatomy : Station 19 - S02E16 - For Whom the Bell Tolls
2.plot: Following a life-threatening situation that left the future of a member of Station 19 unclear, the crew gathers to face the outcome. Andy and Ben respond to a man impaled by a chandelier. Meanwhile, Station 19 is called upon to organize shipments of supplies and assist with wildfires in Los Angeles.

2.title: FR - Grey's Anatomy : Station 19 - S02E17 - Into the Wildfire
2.plot: The members of Station 19 pack their gear and head to Los Angeles, California, to help battle a deadly wildfire raging out of control. While the team works to evacuate residents, they meet Terry, and Ben makes a split-second decision that changes both of their lives.

3.title: FR - Grey's Anatomy : Station 19 - S03E01 - I Know This Bar (I)
3.plot:
After a car crashes into Joe’s Bar, Andy and Sullivan lead the team of firefighters as they work to rescue their fellow crewmates Ben and Pruitt, Grey Sloan doctors and interns, and bar patrons before the building comes crumbling down.

The crossover continues on Grey's Anatomy S16E10 Help Me Through the Night (II).

3.title: FR - Grey's Anatomy : Station 19 - S03E02 - Indoor Fireworks
3.plot: The new Seattle fire chief is introduced to Station 19 and leaves the crew skeptical after his visit. Later, the firefighters are called to a department store fire caused by exploding fireworks, which triggers painful memories from Ben’s past and inspires him to pursue a new endeavor. Maya advocates for herself and her career, while Jack becomes more intertwined with an acquaintance; and Andy and Ryan have a heart-to-heart.

3.title: FR - Grey's Anatomy : Station 19 - S03E03 - Eulogy
3.plot: While Pruitt grieves a monumental loss, Andy refuses to do the same and, instead, throws herself into work. Meanwhile, the crew responds to a widespread carbon monoxide leak, and Sullivan makes a controversial choice for captain.

3.title: FR - Grey's Anatomy : Station 19 - S03E04 - House Where Nobody Lives
3.plot: Ben and Jack mollify a group of homeless foster and biological siblings so they can help save a life, triggering memories from Jack’s past. Meanwhile, Maya pushes the team too hard and struggles to bring them together; and Pruitt threatens to take drastic action when refused a request.

3.title: FR - Grey's Anatomy : Station 19 - S03E05 - Into the Woods
3.plot: In an effort to increase morale, Maya takes the crew on a team-building camping trip that doesn’t exactly go according to plan. Their bond is put to the test as they work to save first-time campers after a gruesome bear attack. Meanwhile, Pruitt takes steps to repair his relationship with Andy, and Sullivan goes to extreme lengths to find relief from the pain in his leg.

3.title: FR - Grey's Anatomy : Station 19 - S03E06 - Ice Ice Baby
3.plot: When a blizzard hits Seattle, Travis must take a difficult call and members of the crew are forced to face their truths. Meanwhile, Ben has rising suspicions about a colleague.

3.title: FR - Grey's Anatomy : Station 19 - S03E07 - Satellite of Love
3.plot: As Ben readies the new Physician Response Team truck for the field, his suspicions about Sullivan and the missing Fentanyl continue to grow. Meanwhile, Jack and Rigo try to look past their differences when they are forced to work together and fight a mysterious gas station fire; Dean and JJ try to work through their differing parenting styles; and Travis meets someone new.

3.title: FR - Grey's Anatomy : Station 19 - S03E08 - Born to Run
3.plot: The Station 19 crew responds to a drunk driver scene. Meanwhile, Dean receives advice from Pruitt on a difficult situation, and Sullivan seeks help from Dr. Amelia Shepherd.

3.title: FR - Grey's Anatomy : Station 19 - S03E09 - Poor Wandering One
3.plot: When an Army veteran threatens to blow up a pawn shop, Sullivan reflects on his time as a Marine to deescalate the situation. Meanwhile, Vic and Dean try to reason with a man battling Alzheimer’s disease; and Pruitt takes a stand to honor fallen firefighters.

3.title: FR - Grey's Anatomy : Station 19 - S03E10 - Something About What Happens When We Talk
3.plot: After some tense and traumatic experiences, the firefighters get a visit from a psychologist .

3.title: FR - Grey's Anatomy : Station 19 - S03E11 - No Days Off
3.plot: While at a lunch seeking Pruitt’s blessing for their relationship, Andy and Sullivan jump into action when ICE attempts to raid the restaurant. Meanwhile, Travis gets roped into an awkward lunch with Chief Dixon, Emmett and Emmett’s girlfriend; and Ben invites Grey-Sloan Memorial surgeons Owen Hunt, Teddy Altman and Jackson Avery to get a sneak peek of the new PRT vehicle.

3.title: FR - Grey's Anatomy : Station 19 - S03E12 - I’ll Be Seeing You
3.plot: The Station 19 crew battles a storage facility fire with growing complications, and Dr. Jackson Avery pops over from Grey Sloan and ends up collaborating with old pal Ben Warren.

3.title: FR - Grey's Anatomy : Station 19 - S03E13 - Dream a Little Dream of Me
3.plot: Vic rallies the crew to pose for a calendar photo shoot that will support a good cause. Meanwhile, Emmett comes clean to Ben and Sullivan, and shows Andy a softer side.

3.title: FR - Grey's Anatomy : Station 19 - S03E14 - The Ghosts That Haunt Me
3.plot: Andy returns to work while she and Jack fight to save people trapped in a collapsing bowling alley. Meanwhile, Ben confronts Sullivan about his drug problem; and Maya’s mother, Katherine, pays Maya a visit.

3.title: FR - Grey's Anatomy : Station 19 - S03E15 - Bad Guy
3.plot: Ben, Jackson and Emmett are put in a precarious and dangerous position with a potential victim. Andy’s search for more background on her family opens her eyes, and Vic and Travis are caught in the middle of a corruption scheme.

3.title: FR - Grey's Anatomy : Station 19 - S03E16 - Louder Than a Bomb
3.plot: Andy becomes painfully suspicious of the circumstances surrounding her mother’s death and goes to her aunt looking for answers. Meanwhile, the members of the crew work to evacuate a doctor from Pac-North hospital and find themselves in a life-threatening situation; and Sullivan undergoes surgery for his chronic leg pain.

4.title: FR - Grey's Anatomy : Station 19 - S04E01 - Nothing Seems the Same
4.plot: When the COVID-19 pandemic hits Seattle, the Station 19 crew leans on each other for support. Andy tries to make sense of her mother’s return, while Sullivan settles into a new routine. And it’s all-hands-on-deck when a group of teenagers unintentionally starts a wild fire.

4.title: FR - Grey's Anatomy : Station 19 - S04E02 - Wild World
4.plot: Andy takes the day off to continue to sort out her family life; Maya and Carina do their best to maintain their relationship while unable to physically see each other due to COVID-19 restrictions, and Sullivan strives to work on his sobriety. Meanwhile, the team responds to a call involving a wild animal.

4.title: FR - Grey's Anatomy : Station 19 - S04E03 - We Are Family
4.plot: The future of Sullivan's career hangs in the balance as his disciplinary hearing gets underway, and Ben, Dr. Richard Webber, Emmett Dixon and former Fire Chief Dixon are called to testify. Meanwhile, the crew investigates an electrical fire at a neglected apartment building that serves as the home and performance space for some of Seattle's most prominent drag queens.

4.title: FR - Grey's Anatomy : Station 19 - S04E04 - Don't Look Back in Anger
4.plot: The team responds to a difficult domestic dispute involving a pregnant woman. Meanwhile, Travis struggles to deal with a family crisis, and Maya and Carina’s relationship continues to grow.

4.title: FR - Grey's Anatomy : Station 19 - S04E05 - Out of Control
4.plot: Andy and Sullivan find a way to stay connected; Ben confronts a tough loss, and Jack and Inara grow closer. Meanwhile, while off duty, the crew jumps into action to help a mother in distress, but their heroic efforts spark conflict with police officers who are less than eager to offer support.

4.title: FR - Grey's Anatomy : Station 19 - S04E06 - Train in Vain
4.plot: Carina and DeLuca pursue Opal, the woman suspected of sex trafficking. Maya leaves Andy in charge for the yearly inspection. Dean and Vic struggle to cope with the fallout Dean’s traumatic arrest.

4.title: FR - Grey's Anatomy : Station 19 - S04E07 - Learning to Fly
4.plot: The Station 19 crew is called to a cult gathering where they find their leader dancing on the roof and claiming he can fly. Travis gets a surprise visit from his father. Dean makes a difficult decision that could affect his career trajectory.

4.title: FR - Grey's Anatomy : Station 19 - S04E08 - Make No Mistake, He’s Mine
4.plot: Vic’s love life is complicated again as she learns of a shocking secret. Meanwhile, Andy grows frustrated at Sullivan for undermining her authority, and Maya struggles to keep her jealousy at bay when one of Carina’s old flames comes to visit.

4.title: FR - Grey's Anatomy : Station 19 - S04E09 - No One Is Alone
4.plot: Vic and Travis’ friendship is put to the test as they respond to calls to help two best friends in need. Meanwhile, Jack realizes he has a greater impact on Marcus than he realizes, and new details about Travis’ late husband’s tragic death are revealed.

4.title: FR - Grey's Anatomy : Station 19 - S04E10 - Save Yourself
4.plot: Andy, Sullivan, Dean and Ben are faced with a tough choice while trying to save a couple trapped in their car. Meanwhile, Dean second guesses his legal fight against the Seattle Police Department; Travis’ dad fears he will be outed when his “golfing friend” is exposed to COVID-19; and Carina’s immigration status is called into question.

4.title: FR - Grey's Anatomy : Station 19 - S04E11 - Here It Comes Again
4.plot: Maya, Jack, Vic, Travis and Sullivan respond to a burn call at an ice rink. Meanwhile, a pregnant woman and her husband seek out the station for help; and Maya and Carina have a difficult conversation.

4.title: FR - Grey's Anatomy : Station 19 - S04E12 - Get Up, Stand Up
4.plot: In the wake of national outcry after the tragic murder of an unarmed Black man, Maya brings in Dr. Diane Lewis to grief counsel the team.

4.title: FR - Grey's Anatomy : Station 19 - S04E13 - I Guess I'm Floating
4.plot: Ben and Dean wrestle with life and death after the Black Fighter’s Coalition banquet.

4.title: FR - Grey's Anatomy : Station 19 - S04E14 - Comfortably Numb
4.plot: Ben finally faces the health issues he has been putting off. Meanwhile, Jack and Inara help their neighbor out of a trashy situation, and Carina and Maya reevaluate their relationship.

4.title: FR - Grey's Anatomy : Station 19 - S04E15 - Say Her Name
4.plot: When Vic helps her parents through a devastating loss, they have a long overdue conversation about the anguish of being Black in America.

4.title: FR - Grey's Anatomy : Station 19 - S04E16 - Forever and Ever, Amen
4.plot: Maya addresses some unresolved family issues, and the crew takes matters into their own hands when faced with a life-or-death moment on scene. Meanwhile, Andy and Sullivan’s marriage is put to the test.

5.title: FR - Grey's Anatomy : Station 19 - S05E01 - Phoenix from the Flame (I)
5.plot:
Relationships are challenged at Station 19 following Sullivan’s actions at Maya and Carina’s wedding, putting his marriage with Andy to the test. Dean comes to terms with his feelings for Vic, while Travis rekindles an old flame. The annual Phoenix Festival brings out some reckless behavior in some of Seattle’s citizens, challenging the teams at Station 19 and Grey Sloan Memorial.

The crossover continues on Grey's Anatomy S18E01 Here Comes the Sun (II).

5.title: FR - Grey's Anatomy : Station 19 - S05E02 - Can't Feel My Face
5.plot: Andy and Sullivan’s relationship continues to be tested. Meanwhile, Emmett joins Dean and Vic on a mental health call, and Maya does some soul searching.

5.title: FR - Grey's Anatomy : Station 19 - S05E03 - Too Darn Hot
5.plot: When a heat wave hits Seattle, Station 19 becomes a cooling center and chaos ensues with locals who aren’t used to the extreme temperatures. Andy deals with regret and finds a friend in Theo. Joey comes face-to-face with his past during a ride-along with Ben and Jack

5.title: FR - Grey's Anatomy : Station 19 - S05E04 - 100% or Nothing
5.plot: Diane returns to help with Crisis One intervention training for Station 19 and Station 23 firefighters. Meanwhile, Andy and Sullivan continue to be at odds, and Jack helps a young autistic man on a city bus.

5.title: FR - Grey's Anatomy : Station 19 - S05E05 - Things We Lost in the Fire (I)
5.plot: When Theo and Vic hit a relationship milestone, Vic is forced to reckon with her feelings about commitment. Andy takes refuge at Dean’s home and helps care for Pruitt, while Dean considers a new potential career opportunity. Meanwhile, an explosion rips apart a neighborhood and changes the lives of our firefighters forever.  The crossover continues on Grey's Anatomy S18E05: Bottle Up and Explode! (II)

5.title: FR - Grey's Anatomy : Station 19 - S05E06 - Little Girl Blue
5.plot: Station 19 and Station 23 each attempt to celebrate Thanksgiving following the fallout from the neighborhood explosion. The firefighters come together to cook, toast to loved ones they have lost, and celebrate the families they have become.

5.title: FR - Grey's Anatomy : Station 19 - S05E07 - A House Is Not a Home
5.plot: Vic and Jack lean on one another as they process the loss of Dean while Ben and Bailey try to convince Dean’s parents to allow them to raise Pru. Meanwhile at Station 23, Andy’s role temporarily expands and Sullivan subs in. Carina and Maya explore growing their family.

5.title: FR - Grey's Anatomy : Station 19 - S05E08 - All I Want For Christmas Is You
5.plot: It’s the most wonderful time of the year and the firefighters have their hands full responding to a number of crises throughout Seattle. Putting aside their differences and personal drama, they come together to try and achieve a Christmas miracle.

5.title: FR - Grey's Anatomy : Station 19 - S05E09 - Started from the Bottom (I)
5.plot: A new chief starts at Station 19. Meanwhile, the crew responds to a young girl seeking help and a call about an SUV flown over a cliff.  The crossover continues on Grey's Anatomy S18E09: No Time to Die (II)

5.title: FR - Grey's Anatomy : Station 19 - S05E10 - Searching for the Ghost
5.plot: Travis and Theo face danger while responding to an emergency at a haunted house. Ben continues his fight for Baby Pru; Vic opens up to Andy; and Station 19 prepares to welcome patients to the Dean Miller Memorial Clinic.

5.title: FR - Grey's Anatomy : Station 19 - S05E11 - The Little Things You Do Together
5.plot: The Station 19 crew offers aid to a man who sets himself on fire. Theo proves his devotion to Vic; Sullivan seeks advice from Dr. Webber; and Travis comes to a realization about his love life.

5.title: FR - Grey's Anatomy : Station 19 - S05E12 - In My Tree
5.plot: The Dean Miller Memorial Clinic has its opening day. Meanwhile, Sullivan gives Beckett an ultimatum, and the crew responds to a skydiving incident

5.title: FR - Grey's Anatomy : Station 19 - S05E13 - Cold Blue Steel and Sweet Fire
5.plot: Through a series of flashbacks, Sullivan and Natasha’s past is revealed. Meanwhile, Ben and Bailey have a discussion with Pru’s grandparents, and the crew responds to a fire at a candy factory.

5.title: FR - Grey's Anatomy : Station 19 - S05E14 - Alone in the Dark
5.plot: The crew at Station 23 faces a difficult goodbye. Meanwhile, Andy meets a charming firefighter, and Emmett invites Travis to have dinner with his parents.

5.title: FR - Grey's Anatomy : Station 19 - S05E15 - When the Party's Over
5.plot: Andy deals with the aftermath of a trauma.

5.title: FR - Grey's Anatomy : Station 19 - S05E16 - Death and the Maiden
5.plot: Andy's fate remains unknown as a trial date is set. Meanwhile, Vic and Sullivan are approached by an unexpected guest, and the crew responds to a row of townhouses on fire.

5.title: FR - Grey's Anatomy : Station 19 - S05E17 - The Road You Didn't Take
5.plot: Vic and Theo respond to a domestic disturbance between the parents of a trans teenager; Jack learns shocking new details about his childhood, and Ben and Travis help a clinic patient that’s long overdue for medical treatment.

5.title: FR - Grey's Anatomy : Station 19 - S05E18 - Crawl Out Through the Fallout
5.plot: Andy tracks down a witness to testify at her trial. Meanwhile, Carina and Maya deal with a stressful situation, and the crew responds to a car wreck.

6.title: FR - Grey's Anatomy : Station 19 - S06E01 - Twist and Shout
6.plot: The Station 19 crew jumps into action as a violent tornado rips through Seattle. Amidst the chaos, the team makes a shocking discovery buried under a tree, and Travis' first responder instincts kick into high gear at a political event.

6.title: FR - Grey's Anatomy : Station 19 - S06E02 - Everybody's Got Something to Hide Except Me and My Monkey
6.plot: Travis discusses his position in the mayoral race as he is determined to kick Dixon out, and Maya admits to blackmail. Meanwhile, the team is called to a fire at a run-down apartment complex that reveals an unsettling cause.

6.title: FR - Grey's Anatomy : Station 19 - S06E03 - Dancing With Our Hands Tied
6.plot: The Station 19 crew responds to the scene of a car accident where two teenagers are trapped inside of an electric car. The scene grows increasingly tense when the teen’s father shows up furious at his son for taking his beloved car without permission. Ben and Maya find themselves caught in the middle of a domestic dispute involving a couple that they detest

6.title: FR - Grey's Anatomy : Station 19 - S06E04 - Demons
6.plot: Maya and Theo answer a call at a Halloween carnival; but when fire hits the corn maze, the dangers quickly escalate and Maya risks her own life to prove her worth to her increasingly hostile captain. Meanwhile, Station 19 hosts the neighborhood kids for trick-or-treating; a prank war breaks out in the house, and Jack is haunted by a ghost from his past.

6.title: FR - Grey's Anatomy : Station 19 - S06E05 - Pick up the Pieces
6.plot: The Station 19 crew works against the clock to rescue a group of employees trapped inside of a malfunctioning battery recycling plant. Carina plans a special surprise in an attempt to reconnect with Maya; Travis gets caught in the crosshairs of dirty politics, and Jack turns up at clinic day only to be confronted with new details about his past.

6.title: FR - Grey's Anatomy : Station 19 - S06E06 - Everybody Says Don't
6.plot: When a lightning storm crashes a helicopter, the team is drawn away from hosting a fire boot camp for young women, and Natasha calls on Jack to help Vic run the camp instead. As the storm brews outside, things get even more heated inside between Carina and Maya on the fall finale of Station 19.

6.title: FR - Grey's Anatomy : Station 19 - S06E07 - We Build Then We Break
6.plot: After a terrifying lightning strike, the Station 19 crew works overtime to extinguish the fire at Meredith Grey's home. Meanwhile, Maya is rushed to Grey Sloan Memorial Hospital due to a medical emergency.

6.title: FR - Grey's Anatomy : Station 19 - S06E08 - I Know a Place
6.plot: Dixon threatens Natasha in the aftermath of his poor judgement. Meanwhile, Jack is met with disappointment on his first day back. Diane visits Maya, and the team responds to a fire in Theo's old neighborhood.

6.title: FR - Grey's Anatomy : Station 19 - S06E09 - Come as You Are
6.plot: Theo realizes there is an uptick of fires in his old neighborhood and finds himself returning. At the clinic, Sullivan greets a patient with a large chest burn. Carina treats a pregnant patient who presents her with an offer.

6.title: FR - Grey's Anatomy : Station 19 - S06E10 - Even Better Than the Real Thing
6.plot: A simulation fire training goes dangerously wrong. Maya tries to make amends, and Bailey encourages Carina to listen. Meanwhile, Jack’s sister shows up at the station with a friend, an injury and an attitude.

6.title: FR - Grey's Anatomy : Station 19 - S06E11 - Could I Leave You?
6.plot: The team is forced to make a risky call that could cost them dearly after Tomás’ barbershop catches fire. Diane drops by the station and is called back into action alongside Vic and Carina. Beckett makes a decision about his future.

6.title: FR - Grey's Anatomy : Station 19 - S06E12 - Never Gonna Give You Up
6.plot: A call from a social media star’s livestream sends the team on an unusual rescue. Travis’ mayoral campaign takes off, much to his chagrin. Back at the station, Ben treats a patient with a surprising diagnosis.

6.title: FR - Grey's Anatomy : Station 19 - S06E13 - It's All Gonna Break
6.plot: The crew finds themselves in the middle of a family dispute and a renovation that’s gone off the rails. Ben crashes as Bailey and Carina go undercover at a crisis pregnancy center. Travis preps with Eli for a mayoral town hall.

6.title: FR - Grey's Anatomy : Station 19 - S06E14 - Get It All Out
6.plot: Emotions boil over at the station as the team chafes against Theo’s leadership style. Carina enlists Ben and Maya to help her with a patient in an uncomfortable position. Natasha and Sullivan’s relationship hits a roadblock.

6.title: FR - Grey's Anatomy : Station 19 - S06E15 - What Are You Willing to Lose
6.plot: A shoddily assembled structure poses a dangerous challenge for our heroes leaving Ben with a difficult choice to make. Maya and Carina work to get their relationship back on track, while Natasha must decide what – or whom – she wants to prioritize.

6.title: FR - Grey's Anatomy : Station 19 - S06E16 - Dirty Laundry
6.plot: The team responds to a tragic freeway pileup. Andy helps Natasha face the fallout of a recent decision just as Ben deals with the fallout of his own.

6.title: FR - Grey's Anatomy : Station 19 - S06E17 - All These Things That I've Done
6.plot: It’s election day at Station 19, with all eyes on the mayoral race. Andy, Theo and Sullivan vie to be named captain, and Vic forges an unexpected bond after going rogue.

6.title: FR - Grey's Anatomy : Station 19 - S06E18 - Glamorous Life
6.plot: The Station 19 crew trade in their turnouts for tuxes and gowns as they attend the Firefighters Ball, but when disaster strikes, they jump into action to save the day.

7.title: FR - Grey's Anatomy : Station 19 - S07E01 - This Woman's Work
7.plot: Andy steps into the station’s captaincy as Jack's life hangs in the balance. The team is called to a hostage situation. Natasha fights for her career, and Maya and Carina make a choice.

7.title: FR - Grey's Anatomy : Station 19 - S07E02 - Good Grief
7.plot: Ben and Theo respond to a challenging Crisis One call, and Jack struggles adjusting to his new reality. Maya and Carina treat a nanny with a surprising diagnosis. Travis finds a surprise at Dixon's wake, and Vic joins Beckett at a family funeral.

7.title: FR - Grey's Anatomy : Station 19 - S07E03 - True Colors
7.plot: The Station 19 crew struts their stuff at the FABruary Winter Pride parade, where Maya encounters someone important from her past. Carina looks to Bailey for support, while Travis and Eli arrive at a crossroads.

7.title: FR - Grey's Anatomy : Station 19 - S07E04 - Trouble Man
7.plot: The Station 19 team faces a grueling 24-hour shift that threatens to split them apart. Andy must make an impossible decision, and Maya and Carina navigate new parenthood.

7.title: FR - Grey's Anatomy : Station 19 - S07E05 - My Way
7.plot: Andy Herrera earns her captain's stripes as she fearlessly leads her team during a life-or-death emergency at Seattle's most beloved landmark. Vic struggles with emotional burnout, and Maya helps Carina navigate some difficult news.

7.title: FR - Grey's Anatomy : Station 19 - S07E06 - With So Little to Be Sure Of
7.plot: With both Vic's job and Crisis One in jeopardy, a flashback shows how the program has changed the lives of the team and the local community. Meanwhile, Ben keeps a secret from Bailey.

7.title: FR - Grey's Anatomy : Station 19 - S07E07 - Give It All
7.plot: The crew responds to a call at a local park, only to have their assumptions challenged by the Tulalip Tribe when they arrive. Meanwhile, Maya confronts her past, and Carina goes on the offense.

7.title: FR - Grey's Anatomy : Station 19 - S07E08 - Ushers of the New World
7.plot: Station 19 uses its clinic to care for asylum seekers who have been bussed in from out of state. Meanwhile, Natasha gets a visit from her sister, and Vic receives surprising news.

7.title: FR - Grey's Anatomy : Station 19 - S07E09 - How Am I Supposed to Live Without You (1)
7.plot: When a wildfire threatens Seattle, the crew must jump into action to save their city. Meanwhile, as the station undergoes changes, Andy contemplates the future.

7.title: FR - Grey's Anatomy : Station 19 - S07E10 - One Last Time (2)
7.plot: As Station 19 continues to battle an existential wildfire, the team grapples with the possibility of a future that will be changed forever.

meta.plot: Le Président, affaibli par la maladie, attaqué de toutes parts y compris par son propre camp, est amené à faire la lumière sur quatre tournants de son parcours, tant politique que romanesque, au cours desquels Danielle Mitterrand et Anne Pingeot, les deux femmes de sa vie, vont révéler tour à tour leur rôle clé.

1.title: FR - Mitterrand confidentiel - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - Mitterrand confidentiel - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR - Mitterrand confidentiel - S01E03 - Episode 3
FR - Mitterrand confidentiel - S01E04 - Episode 4

meta.plot: Adaptée d'un roman en ligne, Spring Fever est une comédie romantique qui suit Yoon Bom (Lee Joo-been), qui s'installe dans la petite ville de Sinsu pour un nouveau départ. D'abord distante et froide, elle s'ouvre peu à peu après sa rencontre avec Sun Jae-gyu (Ahn Bo-hyun).

1.title: FR - Spring Fever [VOSTFR] - S01E01 - Your Uncle Is That Guy
1.plot: In the small seaside town of Shinsu-eup, where the villagers closely monitor each other's every move, Yoon Bom is a figure who carries a question mark. Speculation abounds as to how Yoon Bom, once a successful teacher in Seoul, ended up in this town... But one figure boasts an overwhelming presence that instantly steals all their attention: Seon Jae-gyu, the townspeople's number one target of vigilance. When Bom enters his radar, her monotonous daily life begins to unravel!

1.title: FR - Spring Fever [VOSTFR] - S01E02 - Your Uncle Has A Job
FR - Spring Fever [VOSTFR] - S01E03 - Your Uncle Is A Dad
1.plot: Bom glimpses an unexpected side of Jae-gyu and starts to think he might not be so bad after all. Then a shocking rumor begins spreading through town: Jae-gyu isn't Han-gyul's uncle, he's his dad! The news keeps weighing on her, so she decides to confront it head-on.

1.title: FR - Spring Fever [VOSTFR] - S01E04 - Your Uncle Is a Heir
1.plot: Bom's heart freezes over again when she realizes Jae-gyu knows her secrets. She throws up a cold wall and tells him to stay out of her life. Determined to clear up the misunderstanding, Jae-gyu brings out his ultimate move to win her back. Will it be enough to thaw Bom's heart?

1.title: FR - Spring Fever [VOSTFR] - S01E05 - Your Uncle Is Not Participating
1.plot: Shinsu-eup's biggest festival, the Shinsu High School Sports Festival, is underway. However, Jae-gyu, unaware that Bom has been transferred to the Baek team, declares his withdrawal. Without Jae-gyu, the Baek team struggles to muster, and Bom's face fills with dejection . Jae-gyu's inability to compete in order to keep his promise to Han-gyeol is beyond words. Bom visits Jae-gyu and offers words that fuel his yearning!

1.title: FR - Spring Fever [VOSTFR] - S01E06 - Your Uncle Is A Thief
1.plot: Bom admits to her feelings for Jaegyu, but refuses to meet with his parents any longer. Jaegyu declares to her that he will wait until Hangyeol graduates. Until then, they agree to maintain a strictly public distance. However, contrary to their firm promise, their jealousy towards each other only grows...!

1.title: FR - Spring Fever [VOSTFR] - S01E07 - Episode 7
1.plot: The misunderstanding between them has been resolved, but perhaps it was after their accidental kiss? The fact that they have to wait until Han-gyeol's graduation is disappointing and regrettable. Ultimately, they agree to a one-day date before officially entering into a relationship. Will their secret date go smoothly?

1.title: FR - Spring Fever [VOSTFR] - S01E08 - Your Uncle... Collapsed?
1.plot: Someone witnesses Jaegyu and Bom's love affair. He proposes a secret deal to Bom and Jaegyu in exchange for keeping it a secret. Meanwhile, a sudden typhoon strikes Shinsu-eup, and the residents gather one by one at Jaegyu's house, the only one in the village that hasn't lost power. However, Bom mysteriously disappears, and Jaegyu and Lee Jun must brave the storm to find her...!

1.title: FR - Spring Fever [VOSTFR] - S01E09 - Your Uncle Is… Dating Ms. Bom?
1.plot: Han-gyul learns his mother is alive and argues with Jae-gyu. During the festival, shocking news forces Bom and Jae-gyu to make a major choice.

1.title: FR - Spring Fever [VOSTFR] - S01E10 - Your Uncle… Got Hurt?
1.plot: Nan-hee disapproves of Jae-gyu and Bom but stays close to watch them. A misunderstanding lands Jae-gyu in the hospital, shocking Bom.

1.title: FR - Spring Fever [VOSTFR] - S01E11 - Your Uncle Is… Going Somewhere?
1.plot: Jae-gyu shares his painful past with Bom, unsure of her feelings. Meanwhile, a reporter's news of Nan-hee brings Bom's past back into the spotlight.

1.title: FR - Spring Fever [VOSTFR] - S01E12 - Episode 12

meta.plot: Quand il tente de se mettre dans la peau de son idole, le plus grand fan d'un artiste de trap découvre qu'être une superstar n'est pas aussi simple qu'il n'y paraît.

1.title: FR - Fanático - S01E01 - Quimera
1.plot: When Lázaro meets his friends at a Quimera show after work, the unthinkable happens — and the tragedy creates an opportunity.

1.title: FR - Fanático - S01E02 - In the Flesh
1.plot: Lázaro starts making the most of his resemblance to Quimera and crashes a party at the beach.

1.title: FR - Fanático - S01E03 - A Privilege
1.plot: Héctor makes a proposal to Lázaro, who decides to try out a new lifestyle. Salva's girlfriend Mia has doubts about their plan.

1.title: FR - Fanático - S01E04 - The Art of Doing Business
1.plot: The team pitches their concept to Quimera's record label. Lázaro's TV debut ruffles some feathers.

1.title: FR - Fanático - S01E05 - Lázaro
1.plot: Lázaro doesn't get the welcome he was hoping for at home. Preparing for his first show as Quimera, he'll need to choose a path forward.

1.title: FR - Street Food: USA - S01E01 - Los Angeles, California
1.plot: Carnitas simmered with love, skewers kissed by fire, hot dogs that make the score — some of the best eats in LA can be found in its many communities.

1.title: FR - Street Food: USA - S01E02 - Portland, Oregon
1.plot: Portland's freethinking food scene fosters barbecue brisket tacos, loaded mac and cheese — and Thuy Pham's heartfelt Vietnamese vegan pork belly.

1.title: FR - Street Food: USA - S01E03 - New York, New York
1.plot: Always on the go, the Big Apple fuels its hustle with soul-stirring shrimp and grits, crisp slices, spicy halal chicken and rice, and snappy dogs.

1.title: FR - Street Food: USA - S01E04 - New Orlean, Louisiana
1.plot: Amid a party city's mix of po'boys, snoballs and crawfish, Ms. Linda Green's beloved yakamein bubbles with inspiration, even in the face of tragedy.

1.title: FR - Street Food: USA - S01E05 - Oahu, Hawaii
1.plot: Sparkling fresh poke. Succulent kalua pig. Tempting, tender kalbi. For a real taste of Hawaii, take a bite at its lunch trucks and holes-in-the-wall.

1.title: FR - Street Food: USA - S01E06 - Miami, Florida
1.plot: Souse — that bold, vinegary broth boosted with meat and potatoes — saved Souseman Larry's life in a town built on fritas, pikliz and Cuban sandwiches.

meta.plot: Découvrez les saveurs uniques de la cuisine de rue des États-Unis et la diversité des personnes qui se consacrent corps et âme à leurs recettes.

Indomptables est une grande saga familiale aux accents country, qui raconte l’histoire de deux clans, celui de la très influente famille Richer, propriétaire des Entreprises Richer, mené par Philippe, un homme admiré de tous; et celui des redoutables Martineau, producteurs agricoles, mal-aimés dans la communauté et dirigé par le rustre Michel. Les deux patriarches s’apprêtent à conclure une transaction majeure : les Entreprises Richer passent aux mains des Martineau. Mais cet accord tant attendu sera perturbé par un événement aussi troublant qu’inattendu. Dès lors, tout chavire pour eux, mais aussi pour leurs trois héritiers respectifs qui se retrouvent bientôt pris à partie dans la lutte sans merci que cet événement déclenche entre les deux familles. Une guerre sans foi ni loi qui aura des conséquences que personne n’avait imaginées…

1.title: FR - Indomptables - S01E01 - Episode 1

meta.plot: À 17 ans, Lily est enlevée par un professeur de confiance. Cinq ans plus tard, elle s'échappe et rentre chez elle. Elle révéle des années de sévices dans une cave secrète et forçant sa famille à affronter le traumatisme pour reprendre leur vie.

1.title: FR - Girl Taken - S01E01 - Snatched
1.plot: Lily accepts a lift home, unaware of Rick's intentions.

1.title: FR - Girl Taken - S01E02 - Trapped
1.plot: Nearly a year later, Lily remains trapped and pregnant in Rick's dollhouse.

1.title: FR - Girl Taken - S01E03 - Escape
1.plot: Five years after her kidnapping, Lily escapes - but Rick denies everything.

1.title: FR - Girl Taken - S01E04 - Showdown
1.plot: Rick, in prison, offers to talk on one condition: he'll only speak to Lily.

1.title: FR - Girl Taken - S01E05 - Crisis
1.plot: Lily refuses to attend Rick's trial. Abby uncovers a shocking truth.

1.title: FR - Girl Taken - S01E06 - Manhunt
1.plot: With Rick on the run, a terrified Lily fears for her life. Season finale.

1.title: FR - HIS & HERS - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: TV newswoman Anna returns to her small Georgia hometown to report on a murder case, in which her estranged husband Jack is the lead investigator.

1.title: FR - HIS & HERS - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Jack and Priya try to poke holes in a key suspect's alibi. Anna returns to her alma mater for a contentious interview with an old classmate.

1.title: FR - HIS & HERS - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Anna jumps at a chance to return to the anchor desk. Zoe confronts Jack about what he's been hiding. Alice's decline forces some tough conversations.

1.title: FR - HIS & HERS - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Jack struggles to placate the locals at a fiery town hall. Priya's suspicions reach a breaking point. Anna is haunted by painful memories.

1.title: FR - HIS & HERS - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Backed into a corner, Jack grows increasingly erratic. Anna finds herself on the opposite side of an interview. Richard's past comes to light.

1.title: FR - HIS & HERS - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: As the case comes to a close, Jack and Anna must reckon with the sins of the past — and the brutal consequences in the present.

meta.plot: Dans la chaleur étouffante d'Atlanta, Anna vit dans une solitude obsédante, s'éloignant de ses amis et de sa carrière de journaliste. Mais lorsqu'elle entend parler d'un meurtre à Dahlonega, la ville paisible où elle a grandi, elle revient à la vie et se jette sur l'affaire en quête de réponses. Le détective Jack Harper n'apprécie guère son implication et se méfie...
Si les soi-disant rencontres avec des extraterrestres sont depuis longtemps réfutées, pour beaucoup, l'existence des ovnis n'est pas une probabilité, mais une certitude.

1.title: FR - Ovnis : Classés top secret - S01E01 - Project Blue Book Unknown
1.plot: During the Cold War Project Blue Book came into being – aimed at gathering and analysing UFO observations. To this day, many cases still raise unanswered questions.

1.title: FR - Ovnis : Classés top secret - S01E02 - The White House Cover Up
1.plot: What’s the truth of the organisation known as the MJ-12, an alleged secret committee of elite experts rumoured to have included an American President? Was its establishment related to the mysterious events over Roswell and could it still be active today?

1.title: FR - Ovnis : Classés top secret - S01E03 - Code Name Aurora
1.plot: Phillip J. Corso claims that the US army possesses at least one crashed extra-terrestrial craft, what secrets are to be found behind the veil of the mysterious Project Aurora?

1.title: FR - Ovnis : Classés top secret - S01E04 - Hacked and Leaked
1.plot: This episode follows the stories of American UFO witnesses Betty Cash and Vickie Landrum, Scottish hacker Gary McKinnon, former musician Tom Delonge and John Podesta.

1.title: FR - Ovnis : Classés top secret - S01E05 - Secret Soviet UFO Research
1.plot: The Petrozavodsk incident of 1977 was the key moment which determined the official Soviet response to the UFO phenomenon. The sighting of unknown objects in the skies above the Russian city led to the creation of two special boards: scientific and military. In 1987, a military helicopter pursues an unknown object which fits the description of the “TIC-TAC” UFO.

1.title: FR - Ovnis : Classés top secret - S01E06 - After Disclosure
1.plot: What do we know about the intentions of UFOs? Answers might be found in an incident that took place in the African city of Ruwa, where an unknown vehicle landed on the property of a school and whose crew members communicated telepathically with the local children.

meta.plot: Ce programme enquête sur les apparitions d'OVNI, les prétendus enlèvements et les rencontres extraterrestres dans les paysages sauvages de l'Alaska.

1.title: FR - Aliens In Alaska - S01E01 - Men in Black
1.plot: Strange men in black suits knock on the door of a UFO witness after an eerie light show. A woman is terrorized by small humanoid creatures that only she can see.

1.title: FR - Aliens In Alaska - S01E02 - Alien Flight Plan
1.plot: A routine flight turns terrifying when a bush pilot witnesses unsettling UFO activity. A former government operative reveals top-secret coordinates to an alleged alien base. A man chases a playful pair of levitating lights across Juneau.

1.title: FR - Aliens In Alaska - S01E03 - Night Stalkers
1.plot: An extraterrestrial stalker leaves a family frozen in fear outside of Juneau. A maritime monster nearly capsizes an aircraft on Alaska’s famed Lake Iliamna. A hunter thwarts an attempted abduction by a fireball-spitting UFO.

1.title: FR - Aliens In Alaska - S01E04 - They Walk Among Us
1.plot: Hunters unearth new clues about Bigfoot’s cosmic origins. An Air Force veteran receives a shocking response when he reports UFO activity over Fairbanks. Piercing lights from above disrupt a late-night party near Wasilla, Alaska.

1.title: FR - Aliens In Alaska - S01E05 - Nightmare below zero
1.plot: A man on a night-time snowmobile ride suddenly feels something has been implanted in his leg. And, an otherworldly beast stalks a family over three generations.

1.title: FR - Aliens In Alaska - S01E06 - The Mother Ship
FR - Aliens In Alaska - S01E07 - Captured
FR - Aliens In Alaska - S01E08 - Above and Far Beyond

meta.plot: Hagen, soldat loyal et commandant du roi, est prêt à tout pour défendre son royaume. Mais derrière son devoir se cache un secret : son amour interdit pour la princesse Kriemhild. Son monde bascule lorsque les Huns menacent d’envahir et qu’un invité inattendu fait son entrée : Siegfried, le légendaire tueur de dragons. Pour renforcer son pouvoir, le roi cherche à épouser Brunhild, la reine Valkyrie aux anciens pouvoirs magiques. Pour obtenir sa main, il devra compter sur Hagen et Siegfried. Ce choix déclenche une série d’événements dramatiques qui mèneront à une lutte sans merci entre amour, loyauté et ambition.

1.title: FR - La Guerre des Royaumes - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Burgundy is surrounded by enemies. Siegfried's arrival sparks new hope, but King Gunther is hatching a dangerous plan. Much to the displeasure of master-at-arms Hagen, who is secretly in love with the king's daughter Kriemhild.

1.title: FR - La Guerre des Royaumes - S01E02 - Episode 2

meta.plot: Josephine "Jo" Bradley est sûre d'une chose : c'est qu'elle est un bon flic. Originaire de Chine et abandonnée par une famille qu'elle n'a jamais connu, elle a été adoptée par une professeur de sinologie de Vancouver. Ambitieuse, elle a choisi de dédier sa vie à la justice. Récemment promu au sein de la division homicide de la police de Vancouver, elle reçoit sa première grosse affaire. Tout commence quand Charles Xie, le fils d'une riche famille, disparaît et que son corps est retrouvé enterré de manière rituelle. Jo vient aussi d'apprendre qu'elle a le cancer et doit prendre une décision difficile. Risquant sa carrière et sa vie, elle se confronte à la famille Xie, menée par le puissant patriarche Li-Rong Xie, pour découvrir leurs secrets et le mystère derrière la mort de leur fils.

1.title: FR - Blood and Water - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: When Charlie Xie, the son of a prominent real estate developer, turns up dead, Detective Jo Bradley gets her first case as lead – the same day she also receives devastating personal news.

1.title: FR - Blood and Water - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: As the Xie family struggles to accept Charlie's death, Jo finds evidence pointing to the killer, though the motive remains hidden.

1.title: FR - Blood and Water - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Jo and Gorski catch a break in the case, forcing the Xies to close ranks on the investigation. Jo's cancer is interfering with her work and Teresa's condition worsens.

1.title: FR - Blood and Water - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: The Xie family struggles to make sense of Charlie's murder while Jo and Gorski look to Anna and James as suspects. Jo feels the pressure of being primary detective and Gorski's starts to recognize that something is seriously wrong with his partner.

1.title: FR - Blood and Water - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Losing patience with Jo's inexperience, Gorski presses to take over the investigation. Time is running out and Lt. Chu is anxious for answers.

1.title: FR - Blood and Water - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: Charlie's funeral brings out the worst in the Xies and a terrible secret comes to the surface. Ron Xie confronts Jo but ends up revealing more than he intended.

2.title: FR - Blood and Water - S02E01 - Episode 1
FR - Blood and Water - S02E02 - Episode 2
FR - Blood and Water - S02E03 - Episode 3
FR - Blood and Water - S02E04 - Episode 4
FR - Blood and Water - S02E05 - Episode 5
FR - Blood and Water - S02E06 - Episode 6
FR - Blood and Water - S02E07 - Episode 7

3.title: FR - Blood and Water - S03E01 - Turning
FR - Blood and Water - S03E02 - Triggered
FR - Blood and Water - S03E03 - Ghosts
FR - Blood and Water - S03E04 - Blood Brothers
FR - Blood and Water - S03E05 - Enough
FR - Blood and Water - S03E06 - Check Mate

FR - Blood and Water - S04E02 -
FR - Blood and Water - S04E03 -
FR - Blood and Water - S04E04 -
FR - Blood and Water - S04E05 -
