1.title: FR - Mary Kills People [VOSTFR] - S01E09 - Please, Save Me from This Pain
1.plot: Yena (Yoon Ga-i) embarks on her final journey with Geon-su (Kang Ki-dong), and Gwang-cheol (Baek Hyun-jin) clashes with So-jeong (Lee Bo-young) as he begins a business of assisted death targeting the rich.

1.title: FR - Mary Kills People [VOSTFR] - S01E10 - The Situation Is Getting Out of Control and Dangerous
1.plot: So-jeong (Lee Bo-young) is attacked by the police at the scene of an assisted death due to Gwang-cheol's (Baek Hyun-jin) scheme. Unable to stand by and watch, So-jeong (Lee Bo-young) steps in herself.

1.title: FR - Mary Kills People [VOSTFR] - S01E11 - There Is No Place to Run Anymore
1.plot: So-jeong (Lee Bo-young) decides to save Mi-young (Woo Mi-hwa) and asks Ji-hoon (Lee Min-ki) for help. Ji-hoon (Lee Min-ki) demands she confess everything...

1.title: FR - Mary Kills People [VOSTFR] - S01E12 - There Are Definitely Patients Who Need Euthanasia
1.plot: Dae-hyun (Kang Ki-young), who has just been released from prison, visits So-jeong (Lee Bo-young), who works at Maria Welfare Hospital. Meanwhile, Seon-ju (Kim Young-ok), a terminally ill breast cancer patient, appears before them.

meta.plot: Jusqu'où peut-on aller pour aider un être cher souffrant de troubles mentaux? Avec empathie, Monic Néron et Paul Arcand donnent la parole aux proches qui se dévouent chaque jour, tout en cherchant eux-mêmes à garder la tête hors de l'eau.

1.title: FR - Je suis la: Les Proches aidants en santé mentale - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - Je suis la: Les Proches aidants en santé mentale - S01E02 - Episode 2

meta.plot: En 2023, Eun Gyeol (Ryeoun) est un lycéen passionné par la musique. La journée, c'est un élève modèle studieux, mais quand vient la nuit, il se métamorphose en guitariste dans un groupe. Un jour, il est attiré par hasard dans une boutique de musique étrange et se retrouve subitement en 1995. Il se retrouve alors nez à nez avec son père, Ha Yi Chan (Choi Hyun Wook) lui-même lycéen ! Yi Chan prend Eun Gyeol pour un fou lorsqu'il l'entend l'appeler « papa ». Mais fait encore plus préoccupant, il semblerait que Yi Chan ait le béguin pour une violoncelliste hautaine qui s'appelle Se Kyeong (Seol In Ah) et pas pour sa future mère Cheong Ah (Shin Eun Soo) ! Afin de tenter de rétablir la situation, Eun Gyeol rejoint le groupe mené par son futur père. Mais cela lui permettra-t-il de rapprocher ses futurs parents... et pourra-t-il un jour rejoindre son époque ?

1.title: FR - Twinkling Watermelon [VOSTFR] - S01E01 - Passion Is Born
1.plot: Eun-gyeol and his family move into a new neighborhood. He meets a man who offers to teach him how to play the guitar, and Eun-gyeol works hard to learn it. As he deals with bullies at school, he practices playing the guitar until he is as good as the man who taught him. However, tragedy strikes, and he and his family are forced to move again.

1.title: FR - Twinkling Watermelon [VOSTFR] - S01E02 - Eun Gyeol Quits Music
1.plot: Eun-gyeol tries his best to quit music, but it's not easy for him to do. He gets scouted to join SPINE9, an indie band in Hongdae. To make things worse, he finally gets his hands on the guitar promised by the Viva Music store owner. He is torn by which path to take and finds himself walking into a suspicious music store.

1.title: FR - Twinkling Watermelon [VOSTFR] - S01E03 - Seoul 1995
1.plot: Eun-gyeol gets stuck in 1995 and doesn't know how to return to the present. What's worse is that he meets his young father, Yi-chan, who can talk and wants to start a band to impress a girl who isn't Eun-gyeol's mother. Eun-gyeol poses as Yoon Dong-jin, a musical genius, in order to try to become a member of Yi-chan's band.

1.title: FR - Twinkling Watermelon [VOSTFR] - S01E04 - Eun Gyeol Becomes Yi Chan's Tutor
1.plot: Eun-gyeol encounters Se-gyeong in her teens and learns a few things about her life that don't make sense in the future. Meanwhile, Yi-chan meets Chung-ah for the first time, but she doesn't say a word. Yi-chan tries to get away from Eun-gyeol, but Eun-gyeol follows him to the Snail Guesthouse and ends up becoming Yi-chan's math tutor.

1.title: FR - Twinkling Watermelon [VOSTFR] - S01E05 - Se Gyeong Leaves the Country
1.plot: Eun-gyeol resolves to stop the accident that caused Yi-chan to become deaf and clings to him, vowing to teach him everything he needs to know. He even promises to gift him the band Yi-chan needs. However, the school festival is in one month, and the person Yi-chan is doing this for has left the country and isn't going to return.

1.title: FR - Twinkling Watermelon [VOSTFR] - S01E06 - Se Gyeong Returns
1.plot: Everyone is confused at Se-gyeong's return, especially Eun-gyeol, who sternly warns her to stay away from Yi-chan. However, it doesn't work, and Se-gyeong approaches Yi-chan with different intentions. Meanwhile, Chung-ah can only stand by and watch as she realizes she's lost her chance to tell Yi-chan how she feels.

1.title: FR - Twinkling Watermelon [VOSTFR] - S01E07 - Where Are You Eun Gyeol ?
1.plot: Chung-ah wakes up, realizing she's lying on a hospital bed, with the revelation that Yi-chan carried her there on his back. Later, Yi-chan learns her name from her tag for the first time. Meanwhile, Eun-gyeol has been silent for days, causing concern for Yi-chan. Attempting to locate him, Yi-chan hands out flyers and ends up facing trouble with local thugs. Se-gyeong desperately meets with each band member to verify something important.

1.title: FR - Twinkling Watermelon [VOSTFR] - S01E08 - I Found Ha Eun Gyeol
1.plot: Eun-gyeol wakes up at the house of the Jinsung Family after the accident. He finds out that Chung-ah was the daughter of Chairman Yoon Gun-hyung. Meanwhile, Yi-chan is hospitalized after getting beat up by the local thugs. Se-gyeong tells him that Chung-ah was the one who called for help to save him. Meanwhile, Eun-gyeol decides to help Chung-ah learn the sign language.

1.title: FR - Twinkling Watermelon [VOSTFR] - S01E09 - Friendship or Love?
1.plot: Astounded by Eun-gyeol's candid love confession for Se-gyeong, Yi-chan retaliates with a spirited punch. Eun-gyeol's attempts at self-defense lead to Yi-chan having a bleeding nose on both sides. The schoolyard transforms into a battleground as students try to intervene, and the entire situation gains momentum. Se-gyeong (actually Eun-yu) is left in shock by the unexpected confession. Meanwhile, Eun-gyeol uncovers a hidden secret about Chung-ah.

1.title: FR - Twinkling Watermelon [VOSTFR] - S01E10 - Let Yourself Twinkle
1.plot: Eun-gyeol can't hide his feelings for Se-gyeong and ends up kissing her. Chung-ah's stepmother calls Eun-gyeol separately and tells him to quit before he teaches Chung-ah sign language. The members of the band decide to change their band name and theme right before the festival and ask Se-gyeong and Chung-ah for help. Meanwhile, Eun-gyeol learns that Master has sent a helper for him.

meta.plot: Les talents de détective d'Emily, propriétaire d'un magasin de Noël, sont mis à l'épreuve lorsqu'elle enquête sur des meurtres locaux. Malgré l'affection grandissante que lui porte l'inspecteur Sam, le passé d'Emily éveille des soupçons.

1.title: FR - Meurtre sous le gui - S01E01 - Poison in a Pear Tree (1)
1.plot: Christmas shop owner Emily Lane uses secret skills to investigate a murder when a poisoned cookie links her to the crime. Detective Sam Wilner navigates the holidays with daughter Violet.

1.title: FR - Meurtre sous le gui - S01E02 - Poison in a Pear Tree (2)
1.plot: With time running out to prove her friend's innocence, Emily puts her own secret past on the line to find the real tree farm killer, raising suspicion from Detective Sam Wilner.

1.title: FR - Meurtre sous le gui - S01E03 - Peril of the Belles (1)
1.plot: After a string of suspicious accidents, Emily goes undercover in the local choir to investigate. Sam, however, remains skeptical. Violet takes on more responsibility at the shop.

1.title: FR - Meurtre sous le gui - S01E04 - Peril of the Belles (2)
1.plot: When the choir attacks escalate, Emily and Sam grow closer as they work together to find the culprit. Emily helps Violet out of a precarious situation by tapping into her dark past.

1.title: FR - Meurtre sous le gui - S01E05 - Death of a Humbug (1)
1.plot: The murder of the town Scrooge leads Emily and other shopkeepers to A Christmas Carol themed scavenger hunt orchestrated by the victim. Emily tries to keep Sam at arm's length.

1.title: FR - Meurtre sous le gui - S01E06 - Death of a Humbug (2)
1.plot: As Christmas draws closer, Emily continues to solve the scavenger hunt while also tracking a killer. Violet plans a surprise for Sam. Emily's mysterious past complicates her future.

2.title: FR - Meurtre sous le gui - S02E01 - Cold War (1)
2.plot: After a year of avoidance, Emily and Sam reunite to solve the disappearance of the school chess coach, triggering echoes of Emily's past; Violet hopes to attend the winter dance with her crush.

2.title: FR - Meurtre sous le gui - S02E02 - Cold War (2)
2.plot: Emily goes undercover at the school to solve the chess coach's murder; tensions rise when Sam suspects Violet's date, and the winter dance turns into a game of cat and mouse with the killer.

2.title: FR - Meurtre sous le gui - S02E03 - The Ides of December (1)
2.plot: The art world comes to Fletcher's Grove! When Sam's old partner is murdered guarding a high-profile painting, Emily teaches Sam to sleuth off the grid, and we uncover more of Emily's past.

2.title: FR - Meurtre sous le gui - S02E04 - The Ides of December (2)
2.plot: Emily and Sam unravel a complicated web of lies around the mysterious painting, discovering the lengths people will go to keep secrets, including Emily's; Violet crafts a special present.

2.title: FR - Meurtre sous le gui - S02E05 - 'Twas the Fight Before Christmas (1)
2.plot: When an upscale restauranteur is murdered, Emily finds herself harboring an unlikely fugitive as she sleuths to clear their name; Sam is thrown when his ex-wife arrives in town.

2.title: FR - Meurtre sous le gui - S02E06 - 'Twas the Fight Before Christmas (2)
2.plot: Emily and Sam race to solve the murder before the new restaurant's Christmas feast; confronted with danger, Emily opens up to Sam and stops running from her past; Violet connects with her mom.

meta.plot: Quand Nordin Kynani qui adore le luxe est contraint par sa mère à passer une année à enseigner dans une école défavorisée, il pense que ce sera facile. Mais entre des élèves rebelles, une principale corrompue et son propre ego, Nordin apprend vite que la vraie vie ne se résume pas aux belles voitures, mais bien à l'impact que l'on a. Réussira-t-il avec ses élèves ou échouera-t-il en beauté ?

1.title: FR - Nordin [VOSTFR] - S01E01 - Siuuuu!
1.plot: Nordin Kynani lives the luxurious life, until his mother forces him to teach at a rundown elementary school for a year. What starts as a simple punishment turns into a battle against bureaucracy, corrupt principals, and his own prejudices. While he teaches his students to dream, he discovers that he still has a lot to learn himself. But is he willing to truly change?

1.title: FR - Nordin [VOSTFR] - S01E02 - Snowden
1.plot: When Nordin discovers that the school purposely gives low recommendations to secure subsidies, he vows to expose the system. He signs his class up for a prestigious debate, but the opposition is ruthless, both on and off the stage. While Hayat doubts her political ambitions, Vera sets a trap that could cost Nordin his career. But Nordin isn't playing to participate, he's playing to win.

1.title: FR - Nordin [VOSTFR] - S01E03 - Don't you have any wasabi to smear between your buttcheeks?
1.plot: When Nordin discovers a museum filled with stolen art, he springs into action. With Amine, Souf, and his students, he devises a brilliant plan to make the truth go viral. Meanwhile, Hayat gets entangled in political games and realizes she's just a pawn. As Vera's sinister plans for the school advance, Nordin faces his past and a threat that could change everything.

1.title: FR - Nordin [VOSTFR] - S01E04 - No List, No Entry.
1.plot: Sports day is coming, but the students of De Ekster are sure they'll lose badly. Nordin doesn't care. If they can't win with talent, they'll win with wit. While Nordin executes a shady plan to take down the rivals, Vera uncovers a secret that could cost him everything. Hayat starts her own political party, but is the Netherlands ready for a Kynani in parliament?

1.title: FR - Nordin [VOSTFR] - S01E05 - With or without mocro taks?
1.plot: Nordin forgets this is a vacation and finally settles into teaching. He accidentally discovers Vera and her corrupt clique plotting to shut down the school. Souf and Amine pitch their dream startup, while Hayat battles a media storm in politics. After Nordin ruins a deal and everything falls apart, he's forced out by blackmail. Is this the end of Master Nordin?

1.title: FR - Nordin [VOSTFR] - S01E06 - Chaos in the Zoo
1.plot: When Nordin is fired, it seems he's leaving his old life behind for good. But as he struggles in the corporate world, his former students uncover a dark plot to close their school. With a daring musical and plenty of courage, the kids risk it all. Will Nordin realize in time where he truly belongs?

meta.plot: Maripier Morin et Jean-Philippe Perras se lancent dans une audacieuse aventure : transformer leur maison en foyer intergénérationnel.

1.title: FR - Les Morin-Perras sous le même toit - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - Les Morin-Perras sous le même toit - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR - Les Morin-Perras sous le même toit - S01E03 - Episode 3
FR - Les Morin-Perras sous le même toit - S01E04 - Episode 4
FR - Les Morin-Perras sous le même toit - S01E05 - Episode 5

meta.plot: Lee Soo Yeon a dû dire adieu à son rêve de devenir pilote à cause de sa mauvaise vue. Abattu, il décroche à la place un poste au département de la planification à l'aéroport international d'Incheon. Il cache aussi un secret qui l'empêche de se rapprocher de ses collègues. Mais sa vie bascule quand Han Yeo Reum, une jeune femme joviale et maladroite, débarque au service des passagers. Yeo Reum essaie d'atteindre la perfection dans son travail, mais ses émotions lui jouent parfois des tours. Elle se retrouve sur le chemin de Soo Yeon, avec qui elle se dispute souvent. Ces deux collègues qui n'ont rien en commun arriveront-ils à mettre leurs différends de côté au profit de l'amour ?

1.title: FR - Where Stars Land [VOSTFR] - S01E01 - There Is No Such Thing as Coincidence
1.plot: Due to her anger management issues while working at her previous team, Transportation Services, Han Yeo Reum is transferred to Passenger Services. However, she is late on her first day at work. When she comes in, she hears a coworker asking his superior why they should take in someone so troublesome.

1.title: FR - Where Stars Land [VOSTFR] - S01E02 - I Only Care about Competence
1.plot: After finding out that Soo Yeon has only been working at the airport for 4 months while she has worked for a year, Yeo Reum becomes enraged. She goes to Team Manager Yang Seo Goon and asks her how she could appoint him as her mentor. However, Seo Goon tells her that if it hurts her pride, she should do well at work because that is the only thing that matters.

1.title: FR - Where Stars Land [VOSTFR] - S01E03 - I Wish to Conceal Myself
1.plot: Yeo Reum finally realizes that Soo Yeon had saved her from a flying car on the day of her job interview. However, Soo Yeon tells her that he does not recognize her and that they have never met before. Despite all this, she thanks him for saving her life. Meanwhile, someone puts in a call to the airport, claiming that they have installed a bomb.

1.title: FR - Where Stars Land [VOSTFR] - S01E04 - Life Is Easy for You, Right?
1.plot: Yeo Reum and Soo Yeon get into an argument. She tells him that unlike him, many people including herself need to work their hardest in order for their superiors to recognize them. However, he tells her that she simply has a victim mentality and lacks self-awareness.

1.title: FR - Where Stars Land [VOSTFR] - S01E05 - It’s Your Last Task at T1
1.plot: Soo Yeon tells Yeo Reum that he cannot feel pain in his right arm. After hearing this, Yeo Reum begins to become more and more curious about him and the story behind his painless arm. Meanwhile, Seo Goon’s team moves from Terminal 1 to Terminal 2.

1.title: FR - Where Stars Land [VOSTFR] - S01E06 - Speaking One’s Mind
1.plot: Words spread regarding a dispute between a passenger and Yeo Reum and a Security Team employee. Because the passenger got a scratch on her face, she has declared that she will sue the airport. No matter how much Yeo Reum tells the others that it was not their fault and that the passenger had attacked them first, she has a difficult time convincing them.

1.title: FR - Where Stars Land [VOSTFR] - S01E07 - Soo Yeon Becomes Interested in Yeo Reum
1.plot: Due to a horrible car accident years ago, Soo Yeon was at the brink of death and barely survived. As a result, he was given a machine-like right arm. Ever since, he refused to allow anything to move his heart. However, after meeting Yeo Reum, he decides to work at the airport for a bit longer and also becomes interested in her.

1.title: FR - Where Stars Land [VOSTFR] - S01E08 - Did Someone Cause Trouble Again?
1.plot: Ian Santos, a Filipino, is caught trying to enter Korea with a forged passport. He begs the Immigration Office to just allow him to be with his wife while she gives birth and promises to leave the country right after. However, he is forced to go back to the Philippines right away. While on his way to the plane, he pushes an accompanying staff worker and runs.

1.title: FR - Where Stars Land [VOSTFR] - S01E09 - Human Error
1.plot: A plane tries to land at Incheon airport. However, as the plane descends near the airport, fire erupts from its engine, and the entire airport falls into chaos. Soo Yeon finds Yeo Reum being extremely nervous and finds out that her mother is on that plane. After thinking what he could do for her, he decides to find Yeo Reum’s mother himself.

1.title: FR - Where Stars Land [VOSTFR] - S01E10 - Was It You?
1.plot: The fire on the plane and the passengers on board are all taken care of. Yeo Reum’s mom gets injured during the process, and she hears someone claiming to be Yeo Reum’s friend help her out. After hearing this story, Yeo Reum looks around to find Soo Yeon, but he is nowhere to be found.

1.title: FR - Where Stars Land [VOSTFR] - S01E11 - He’s Too Normal
1.plot: When Yeo Reum asks Soo Yeon whether he likes her or not, he tells her the truth. Yeo Reum becomes dumbfounded and does not know what to do. Later on, she meets Eun Seob and tells him what has happened. Meanwhile, In Woo tells Seo Goon that it is impossible that Soo Yeon is living a normal life.

1.title: FR - Where Stars Land [VOSTFR] - S01E12 - I’m Going to Get Rid of You
1.plot: During a meeting, In Woo brings up the topic about Soo Yeon and his support device. He asks Moo Ja to look into In Woo with the excuse that the majority’s safety is more important than an individual’s privacy. Seo Goon tells Soo Yeon about this and warns him to stay low for the time being. When Soo Yeon asks In Woo why he did it, he tells him that he’s going to take him down.

1.title: FR - Where Stars Land [VOSTFR] - S01E13 - Am I Being Turned Down?
1.plot: Seeing that Yeo Reum does not have a place to stay for the night, Soo Yeon offers his place. At first, she reluctantly agrees, and they arrive at his house. While Soo Yeon goes into his room to get changed, Yeo Reum decides to secretly pack her belongings to go to a sauna but gets caught by him.

1.title: FR - Where Stars Land [VOSTFR] - S01E14 - Soo Yeon and Yeo Reum Are a Couple
1.plot: Seo Goon puts Soo Yeon in charge of persuading In Woo to allow their team to have a lounge area for the workers, and he obeys her. Meanwhile, Eun Seob visits T2 to eat with Yeo Reum. While waiting for her, he overhears a group of employees gossiping about Yeo Reum and Soo Yeon.

1.title: FR - Where Stars Land [VOSTFR] - S01E15 - Do You Know My Dad?
1.plot: After Soo Yeon says something that Yeo Reum’s father used to say, she asks him whether he knew her dad or not. He tells her that he has known her father for a long time but didn’t mention it to her in case she did not have a good relationship with her father. Meanwhile, Young Joo’s doorbell rings, and she goes out only to find Yeo Reum standing awkwardly with her luggage.

1.title: FR - Where Stars Land [VOSTFR] - S01E16 - You Should Be Apologizing to the Passenger
1.plot: While chasing a drug broker, Young Joo gets hurt. Instead of chasing the culprit, Dae Gi runs to her and asks her how critical her injuries are. However, Young Joo gets upset and asks him whether he would have done the same if she were a guy. Meanwhile, a fight breaks out between a passenger and a security check employee. In Woo tells the employee to beg in front of the passenger until he decides to forgive him. However, Seo Goon feels differently.

1.title: FR - Where Stars Land [VOSTFR] - S01E17 - How Much Do You Know About Soo Yeon
1.plot: Soo Yeon saves Moo Ja from getting beaten up by the group of brokers whom he chased down before. However, one of the men electrocutes Soo Yeon, and he falls to the ground. Moo Ja sees electric currents running through Soo Yeon’s body. Meanwhile, Yeo Reum calls Soo Yeon to see if he is okay, but he does not pick up.

1.title: FR - Where Stars Land [VOSTFR] - S01E18 - What’s Soo Yeon to You?
1.plot: After the incident, Soo Yeon is told not to use the synthetic arm until he fully recovers since it could worsen his current condition. However, he finds himself missing Yeo Reum too much and decides to leave the house while wearing it. Meanwhile, Yeo Reum finds out that an old man’s son left his own father in Korea.

1.title: FR - Where Stars Land [VOSTFR] - S01E19 - An Unwelcome Old Friend
1.plot: Mister Jang strongly suggests that Soo Yeon needs to take a rest for a while, but Soo Yeon insists on going back to work. At the airport, Yeo Reum runs into a high school classmate Min Jung who used to bully her. Min Jung who now works for a travel agency plans to take advantage of Yeo Reum to get some benefits for her work. In the meantime, Dae Gi loses his radio while quarreling with a pickpocket in the airport.

1.title: FR - Where Stars Land [VOSTFR] - S01E20 - You Shouldn’t Keep Secrets from Her
1.plot: Min Jung continues to blackmail Yeo Reum, and Seo Goon gets to hear their conversation. A man who has found Dae Gi’s radio keeps fooling around him without returning it. And Dae Gi is told to be on stand-by until he finds the radio back. Meanwhile, Eun Seob tells Soo Yeon to share his conditions with Yeo Reum, but Soo Yeon says he want to keep it secret from her.

1.title: FR - Where Stars Land [VOSTFR] - S01E21 - I’ve Found Out Why I Break Down
1.plot: Soo Yeon thinks he has found out why his support device malfunctions. And he seriously considers quitting his job at the airport. Yeo Reum finds a man who has Dae Gi’s radio. In the meantime, someone in the office happens to see Mr. Lee receive an envelope from those who are in charge of managing the vans and taxis and spread a rumor that Mr. Lee is bribed.

1.title: FR - Where Stars Land [VOSTFR] - S01E22 - Sort out the Situation
1.plot: Director Kwon gets to know about the bribe Mr. Lee received from those who are in charge of managing the vans and taxis. He gets furious and questions Mr. Lee about what’s inside in the envelope. Meanwhile, Yeo Reum sees a man threatening a female reception staff with a weapon in the airport. She tries to sort out the situation.

1.title: FR - Where Stars Land [VOSTFR] - S01E23 - Soo Yeon Decides to Take Revenge
1.plot: The man who threatened the information desk staff and ended up hurting Yeo Reum runs away. Dae Gi and Young Joo get scolded by Moo Ja for losing him. Soo Yeon finds out that Yeo Reum got injured and was taken to a hospital. He feels frustrated with the fact that there’s nothing he can do for her because he’s disabled sitting on a wheelchair. Soo Yeon decides to take revenge on the man who hurt Yeo Reum.

1.title: FR - Where Stars Land [VOSTFR] - S01E24 - Moo Ja Suspects Soo Yeon
1.plot: Yeo Reum, Dae Gi, and Young Joo come to the police station to testify about the incident at the information desk as witnesses. After the testimony, the three and Soo Yeon spend time together having a meal and dessert and riding a rail bike. In the meantime, Moo Ja continues to suspect that Soo Yeon was the one who beat up the criminal with his power.

1.title: FR - Where Stars Land [VOSTFR] - S01E25 - One Tough Day for Mr. Gong
1.plot: Moo Ja comes to visit Mr. Jang and ask a few questions about the device Soo Yeon is wearing. In the meantime, Mr. Gong of Passenger Services gets involved in a scandal that he is abusing his power and forces subcontractors to have a drink with him after work. To make things worse, Mr. Gong’s daughter happens to visit his office on the day Mr. Gong is questioned by the Internal Affairs Team.

1.title: FR - Where Stars Land [VOSTFR] - S01E26 - Mr. Jang Warns Soo Yeon of His Condition
1.plot: Mr. Jang suggests that Soo Yeon get a thorough medical check-up because his inflammation level came out too high, but Soo Yeon refuses, saying that he is perfectly fine now. Meanwhile, Soo Yeon happens to see In Woo having a talk with Director Jo who made Soo Yeon severely injured in the past. Soo Yeon gets disappointed that In Woo is still associating with Director Jo.

1.title: FR - Where Stars Land [VOSTFR] - S01E27 - Incheon International Airport Surrounded by Heavy Fog
1.plot: Incheon International Airport is put on emergency alert as it gets surrounded by heavy fog. Flights from and to the airport are delayed or canceled, and passengers are stuck in the airport. In the meantime, Yeo Reum finds out that Soo Yeon is in serious condition and he's just pretending to be fine.

1.title: FR - Where Stars Land [VOSTFR] - S01E28 - Tough Day for All the Staff and Passengers
1.plot: Because of the heavy fog, all the passengers are stranded at the airport. All the staff at the airport is busy taking care of the delayed passengers. Meanwhile, Soo Yeon shows his resentment towards Mr. Jang for telling Yeo Reum about his condition. When Soo Yeon spends time alone in a park, Director Jo and his subordinates approach Soo Yeon.

1.title: FR - Where Stars Land [VOSTFR] - S01E29 - Who’s Behind In Woo?
1.plot: Soo Yeon fights against Director Jo and his subordinates. Director Jo gets shocked to see what Soo Yeon is capable of with his arm. In the meantime, Moo Ja keeps trying to find out who’s behind In Woo, and Seo Goon wants to know why Moo Ja is asking around about In Woo.

1.title: FR - Where Stars Land [VOSTFR] - S01E30 - Soo Yeon Goes Missing
1.plot: Soo Yeon gets nose blood in front of Yeo Reum. Yeo Reum tries to help Soo Yeon, but he refuses Yeo Reum’s help and goes to a restroom alone. Then, a group of thugs follows into the restroom. One of them looks familiar to Soo Yeon, and they take Soo Yeon somewhere. When Security Services staff arrives at the mensroom, Soo Yeon is not there. Then, everyone including Moo Ja and In Woo starts to find Soo Yeon.

1.title: FR - Where Stars Land [VOSTFR] - S01E31 - Soo Yeon is Apprehended by Director Jo
1.plot: Dae Gi’s efforts to rescue Soo Yeon at the airport are held back by Moo Ja. Dae Gi and In Woo move out individually to the place where Soo Yeon is taken. In Woo suffers injury while trying to release Soo Yeon from Director Jo, which leads Soo Yeon to use his strengths in order to save In Woo.

1.title: FR - Where Stars Land [VOSTFR] - S01E32 - Soo Yeon Resigns from the Airport
1.plot: Soo Yeon submits a resignation after deciding to leave the airport. Yeo Reum is heartbroken to hear about it from Seo Goon and tries to hold back Soo Yeon from leaving. However, Soo Yeon seems persistent with his decision.

meta.plot: Hori Kyôko est la coqueluche de sa classe, une lycéenne jolie et populaire aux excellents résultats. Mais le soir venu, elle doit tenir la maison à la place de ses parents qui travaillent et s'occuper de son petit frère, Sôta. Un jour pas comme un autre, Sôta se fait mal dehors. Un garçon inconnu qui prend sur lui de le ramener chez sa famille, mais quand Kyôko leur ouvre la porte, c'est interloqué qu'il prononce son nom avec un soupçon d'hésitation. Elle se rend alors compte que la personne qui vient de ramener son frère n'est autre qu'un camarade de classe...

1.title: FR - Horimiya - S01E01 - A Tiny Happenstance
1.plot: Hori-san lives a double life: trendy, popular girl at school, simple, strong-willed caretaker at home. After a chance encounter with her classmate Miyamura, she finds out that she’s not the only one who hides her true self away.

1.title: FR - Horimiya - S01E02 - You Wear More Than One Face
1.plot: When her mother asks about Miyamura, Hori comes to a frightening realization. Later, the Student Council ropes Hori into extra work, but when conflict arises, it's up to Miyamura to smooth things over.

1.title: FR - Horimiya - S01E03 - That's Why It's Okay
1.plot: Miyamura reflects on his past and present. Hori responds to Remi's selfish demand. A heated conversation between Ishikawa and Miyamura ends with a fistfight.

1.title: FR - Horimiya - S01E04 - Everybody Loves Somebody
1.plot: The student council room becomes a cool hangout. Hori tries to get Miyamura flustered. An old friend brings out a new side of Miyamura. Later, when Hori gets sick, Miyamura comes to her rescue.

1.title: FR - Horimiya - S01E05 - I Can't Say It Out Loud
1.plot: A rumor complicates Hori and Miyamura's budding relationship. Kyosuke comes home to roost and instantly takes a liking to Miyamura. Sakura evaluates her friendship with Remi.

1.title: FR - Horimiya - S01E06 - This Summer's Going to Be a Hot One
1.plot: Miyamura ends up staying the night. Rumors spread like wildfire at school. Shindo calls the couple over to share a bag of candy. A second-year girl begins to stalk Miyamura.

1.title: FR - Horimiya - S01E07 - You're Here, I'm Here
1.plot: Sakura finds the courage to get closer to Toru. Yoshikawa struggles to voice what she truly wants. Miyamura goes away for a week-long trip. Hori worries about her horror obsession.

1.title: FR - Horimiya - S01E08 - The Truth Deception Reveals
1.plot: Remi reflects on how she and Sengoku started dating. Miyamura discovers a hidden side of Hori. When Yoshikawa gets asked out, the gang gets Ishikawa to help.

1.title: FR - Horimiya - S01E09 - It's Hard, but Not Impossible
1.plot: Miyamura runs into some unfriendly faces. Hori tries to get Miyamura to fulfill her darkest desires. Mizouchi's love is unrequited. Tanihara confronts his past with Miyamura.

1.title: FR - Horimiya - S01E10 - Until the Snow Melts
1.plot: Hori has an unexpected demand of Miyamura. When Yoshikawa learns her fake relationship with Ishikawa might be coming to an end, she's forced to reflect on her own feelings.

1.title: FR - Horimiya - S01E11 - It May Seem Like Hate
1.plot: The gang tries to get Yanagi to loosen up. Iura is clueless as to how much he terrifies Sawada. When Iura’s sister Motoko is struggling with entrance exams, Iura asks Hori to help.

1.title: FR - Horimiya - S01E12 - Hitherto, and Forevermore
1.plot: Yoshikawa heads over to Ishikawa's house. Christmas brings romantic holiday cheer to all. Hori and Miyamura discuss their future.

1.title: FR - Horimiya - S01E13 - I Would Gift You the Sky
1.plot: As graduation approaches, Miyamura reflects on the past year, an uncertain future, and the new life he’s found.

meta.plot: Le juge Lee, convaincu que la justice pouvait triompher au tribunal, a bravé les ordres de ses supérieurs et condamné un président de conglomérat à la prison à vie, avant d'être assassiné. Mais était ce dû aux secrets qu'il avait surpris enfant ?

1.title: FR - Le retour du juge [VOSTFR] - S01E01 - The judge's son-in-law, hired as a servant at Haenal Law Firm
1.plot: Lee Han-young, a former corrupt judge, comes to his senses after presiding over a trial involving Gojin Chemical.

1.title: FR - Le retour du juge [VOSTFR] - S01E02 - He returned exactly ten years ago
1.plot: Lee is assassinated but miraculously travels back in time, determined to right his wrongs.

1.title: FR - Le retour du juge [VOSTFR] - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Lee seeks to correct the sentencing errors he made in the past and is determined to avoid similar mistakes.

1.title: FR - Le retour du juge [VOSTFR] - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Seoul presents a hidden advantage to Lee and he forms an alliance with Prosecutor Kim Jin-a.

1.title: FR - Le retour du juge [VOSTFR] - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: A step closer to finding his killer, Lee makes a bold decision and pledges false allegiance to Kang Sin-jin.

1.title: FR - Le retour du juge [VOSTFR] - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: Judge Lee obtains incriminating evidence of Woo and continues to expand his influence.

meta.plot: Le monde de la haute couture sombre dans le chaos lorsque des mannequins internationales commencent à mourir dans des circonstances mystérieuses et macabres. Les agents du FBI Cooper Madsen et Jordan Bennett sont envoyés à Paris pour découvrir la vérité. Au fur et à mesure qu'ils enquêtent, ils découvrent un virus sexuellement transmissible qui transforme les gens ordinaires en êtres d'une perfection physique absolue, mais avec des conséquences terrifiantes.

1.title: FR - The Beauty - S01E01 - Beautiful Pilot
1.plot: FBI agents Cooper Madsen and Jordan Bennett are assigned to investigate a shocking incident at a fashion show in Paris.

1.title: FR - The Beauty - S01E02 - Beautiful Jordan
1.plot: The discovery of a gruesome crime scene sends Cooper and Jordan to Venice, Italy.

1.title: FR - The Beauty - S01E03 - Beautiful Christopher Cross
1.plot: An unlikely partnership is formed after The Assassin is sent to clean up a messy situation.

1.title: FR - The Beauty - S01E04 - Beautiful Chimp Face
1.plot: Cooper interviews an assistant editor following a disturbing event at the offices of a fashion magazine in New York City.

1.title: FR - The Beauty - S01E05 - Beautiful Billionaires
1.plot: A group of billionaires gather to make history.

1.title: FR - The Beauty - S01E06 - Beautiful Patient Zero
1.plot: A team of scientists stumble upon a life-changing secret.

1.title: FR - The Beauty - S01E07 - Beautiful Living Rooms
1.plot: A desperate family is forced to make a difficult decision.

1.title: FR - The Beauty - S01E08 - Beautiful Brothers
1.plot: The Corporation's master plan intensifies.

1.title: FR - The Beauty - S01E09 - Beautiful Evolution
1.plot: Cooper and Jordan form an alliance with a mysterious person.

1.title: FR - The Beauty - S01E10 - Beautiful Beauty Day
1.plot: A hot new trend goes viral.

1.title: FR - The Beauty - S01E11 - Beautiful Betrayal
1.plot: Beauty has a price.

meta.plot: Une ancienne danseuse sur glace revient sur la patinoire avec un nouveau partenaire passionnant, tout en conservant des sentiments pour son ancien partenaire, son premier amour.

1.title: FR - Finding Her Edge - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - Finding Her Edge - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR - Finding Her Edge - S01E03 - Episode 3
FR - Finding Her Edge - S01E04 - Episode 4
FR - Finding Her Edge - S01E05 - Episode 5
FR - Finding Her Edge - S01E06 - Episode 6
FR - Finding Her Edge - S01E07 -
FR - Finding Her Edge - S01E08 -

meta.plot: Do Yong-Sik est un homme de 31 ans avec quelques problèmes. Il a préparé l'examen de la fonction publique pendant des années. Pendant ce temps, son apparence physique s'est détériorée, avec désormais un gros intestin. Do Yong-Sik est également impuissant. Il décide de se rendre dans une clinique d'urologie pour soigner son impuissance. Là, Do Yong-Sik rencontre son premier amour Lee Ru-Da. Elle travaille à la clinique comme urologue.

1.title: FR - You Raise Me Up [VOSTFR] - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - You Raise Me Up [VOSTFR] - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR - You Raise Me Up [VOSTFR] - S01E03 - Episode 3
FR - You Raise Me Up [VOSTFR] - S01E04 - Episode 4
