FR - You Raise Me Up [VOSTFR] - S01E06 - Episode 6
FR - You Raise Me Up [VOSTFR] - S01E07 - Episode 7

meta.plot: Au lycée, Qiao Jing Jing était amoureuse de Yu Tu, un génie passionné d'aérospatiale, mais bien qu'elle se soit déclarée elle n'a jamais eu l'occasion de concrétiser son amour. Dix ans plus tard, Qiao Jing Jing est devenue une grande célébrité. Alors qu'elle a l'occasion de devenir l'ambassadrice du célèbre jeu vidéo Honor of Kings, une vidéo est postée en ligne affectant sa réputation : en effet, elle serait une joueuse très médiocre et son image ne correspondrait pas à celle du jeu. Craignant pour sa carrière, elle se voit contraint de participer à une cérémonie dans laquelle elle devra jouer Honor of Kings avec des fans sélectionnés au hasard. En s'entrainant au jeu, elle va recroiser la route de Yu Tu qui va devenir son coach de jeu.

1.title: FR - You Are My Glory [VOSTFR] - S01E01 - Accidental Encounter
1.plot: Jing Jing is the endorser of Honor of Kings, but someone posted a video of how badly she plays. As a result, she must train hard to participate in an entertainment game to prove herself. Yu Tu happens to be playing the game lately and invites Jing Jing to a group battle by mistake.

1.title: FR - You Are My Glory [VOSTFR] - S01E02 - Contemplation
1.plot: Yu Tu is contemplating whether to resign from his work in the research institute. If he works in finance, he can earn four times more than he is making now, but the galaxy is what he aspires to. Meanwhile, Jing Jing devises a plan to get Yu Tu to coach her in Honor of Kings to improve her skills.

1.title: FR - You Are My Glory [VOSTFR] - S01E03 - We Meet Again
1.plot: Jing Jing requests Yu Tu to be her coach but he politely refuses. With continuous training, Jing Jing gets better at the game, surprising even to her manager. Upon finding out that Yu Tu lives in the same city, Jing Jing tricks Yu Tu to go to her house and they finally meet each other.

1.title: FR - You Are My Glory [VOSTFR] - S01E04 - Training
1.plot: Yu Tu finally agrees to be Jing Jing's coach. Yu Tu goes to Jing Jing's place and teaches her how to play the game. They practice all day long to find the right hero for Jing Jing.

1.title: FR - You Are My Glory [VOSTFR] - S01E05 - A Clean Break
1.plot: Yu Tu meets up with Xia Qing and has a clean break with her. Then he attends a class gathering and gets mocked for his career path. Jing Jing helps him to get even.

1.title: FR - You Are My Glory [VOSTFR] - S01E06 - The Single's Day
1.plot: After playing a few matches, Yu Tu picks a few heroes that he thinks are suitable for Qiao Jing Jing's skill level. Meanwhile, Xiao Zhu notices that Yu Tu has started to treat Qiao Jing Jing differently. While playing with other gamers, Yu Tu records the game to help Qiao Jing Jing learn how to analyze the game better.

1.title: FR - You Are My Glory [VOSTFR] - S01E07 - A Night Out
1.plot: After Yu Tu has a somewhat awkward dinner with his friends, he asks if Jing Jing wants to go to a movie. Jing Jing picks a movie, but then realize it might make Yu Tu think of unpleasant memories. And even though they're careful, Jing Jing is still caught on camera by a fan. While Jing Jing and Yu Tu are watching a livestream at her house, Ling arrives with the makeup artists and stylists.

1.title: FR - You Are My Glory [VOSTFR] - S01E08 - Level Up
1.plot: Jing Jing secures a role in a new movie and takes joy in being asked to gain a bit more weight for the role. She decides to introduce Yu Tu to Ling and brings him to Ling's house where he meets her close colleagues for the first time. She also sets a goal to level up in rank in the game.

1.title: FR - You Are My Glory [VOSTFR] - S01E09 - The First Sight
1.plot: Yu Tu sees his teacher and his wife in the restaurant that he and Jing Jing is in, and he invites them to eat with them. The conversation turns sour when his resignation is mentioned, and Yu Tu gets mad at Jing Jing when she defends him. Afterwards, Yu Tu receives an urgent call to go on a business trip to fix a problem with J-X, so they don't see each other for some time.

1.title: FR - You Are My Glory [VOSTFR] - S01E10 - Salvaging
1.plot: Yu Tu and Guan Zai work hard to salvage J-X satellite. As they're going back to their apartment, Guan Zai falls ill and worries about his family. Meanwhile, Yu Tu invites Qiao Jing Jing for games on Honor of Kings.

1.title: FR - You Are My Glory [VOSTFR] - S01E11 - The Reconciliation
1.plot: Yu Tu returns from Xi'an and reconciles with Qiao Jing Jing. Then he takes care of Guan Zai who is admitted to the hospital. Later, when Yu Tu continues to coach Qiao Jing Jing, she finds that he has changed after the trip.

1.title: FR - You Are My Glory [VOSTFR] - S01E12 - Making Decisions
1.plot: Shen Jing is having a hard time coping with Guan Zai's cancer. Yu Tu is staying by Qiao Jing Jing's side to train her, giving her good advice on who to pick for her team. Qiao Jing Jing is surprised when Yu Tu asks her what she wants for her birthday.

1.title: FR - You Are My Glory [VOSTFR] - S01E13 - Super League
1.plot: The Super League begins and the players are divided into two teams of five. After training so hard under Yu Tu, Jing Jing confidently strategize with her chosen teammates. Can Jing Jing and her team win the battle against other professional gamers?

1.title: FR - You Are My Glory [VOSTFR] - S01E14 - Second Round
1.plot: The second round of the competition begins. Which team will win the second round? After the competition is over, Yu Tu feels out of place.

1.title: FR - You Are My Glory [VOSTFR] - S01E15 - Different Worlds
1.plot: On their way back from Super League, Qiao Jing Jing finds out that Yu Tu is going back to work at the research institute. She confesses to Yu Tu. However, he tells her that he will not be seeing her anymore.

1.title: FR - You Are My Glory [VOSTFR] - S01E16 - Hard to Let Go
1.plot: After Yu Tu starts working at the institution again, he manages to lead the team to some success. However, with the original leader Guan Zai gone, his responsibilities increase. In the meantime, Yu Tu's ex-girlfriend comes to Shanghai, while Qiao Jing Jing hasn't been in touch with him.

1.title: FR - You Are My Glory [VOSTFR] - S01E17 - Walking Down Memory Lane
1.plot: Yu Tu visits his parents in Yixing before going on his one-month business trip. He digs out his old computer and reads his old chats with Qiao Jing Jing, reminiscing the past. When taking a walk with his mom, they talk about the old days and his mom’s regrets of discouraging him from doing what he wanted in the past.

1.title: FR - You Are My Glory [VOSTFR] - S01E18 - Testing
1.plot: Yu Tu refuses to join any group activities during the outfield trip. He reads his old chats with Qiao Jing Jing again. Guan Zai calls Yu Tu and his advice inspires Yu Tu to write Jing Jing a letter. The next day, Yu Tu sends out the letter via post.

1.title: FR - You Are My Glory [VOSTFR] - S01E19 - Reunion
1.plot: Jing Jing questions her ex-boyfriend's sincerity. She receives Yu Tu's letters and reads them. After her performance, she finds Yu Tu waiting to send her back to Yixing to spend the new year.

1.title: FR - You Are My Glory [VOSTFR] - S01E20 - New Year
1.plot: Yu Tu confesses his feelings to Qiao Jing Jing but he is rejected by her since she thinks that he’s not sincere. He fetches her back to Yixing anyway and they spend the new year separately with their own families.

1.title: FR - You Are My Glory [VOSTFR] - S01E21 - Forgiven
1.plot: When Pei Pei asks, Jing Jing doesn't want to talk about Yu Tu, yet she decides to join the class gathering because of him. Upon hearing that Jing Jing will be at the gathering, Yu Tu rushes over for her.

1.title: FR - You Are My Glory [VOSTFR] - S01E22 - Happy Together
1.plot: Qiao Jing Jing and Yu Tu are officially together. Jing Jing wants to hide their relationship from their parents, but when Yu Tu's mom catches him and Jing Jing together by their house, Jing Jing comes up with lies. Yu Tu returns the favor with Jing Jing's parents before he drives her back to Shanghai.

1.title: FR - You Are My Glory [VOSTFR] - S01E23 - Long Distance Relationship
1.plot: Yu Tu stays over at Jing Jing's place. Xiao Zhu and Qiu Ling are surprised to find out that they are officially together. Yu Tu and Jing Jing start their long distance relationship as Jing Jing starts filming out of town.

1.title: FR - You Are My Glory [VOSTFR] - S01E24 - White Lies
1.plot: Qiao Jing Jing returns to Shanghai a day earlier due to a change in her filming schedule. Due to the traffic situation, she goes to Yu Tu's house instead. In order to get Jing Jing to stay over at his house, Yu Tu pretends to play badly at Honor of Kings to delay her.

1.title: FR - You Are My Glory [VOSTFR] - S01E25 - The Sleepover
1.plot: Qiao Jing Jing spends the night at Yu Tu's house, unaware that the house is being watched. The next morning, Yu Tu follows her to a jewelry event and has to disguise himself as part of the staff. Later that night, they are ready to take the next step in their relationship.

1.title: FR - You Are My Glory [VOSTFR] - S01E26 - Surprise Visit
1.plot: Jing Jing goes back to work in the desert, where she has trouble connecting to the Internet. Yu Tu visits her after completing his assignment nearby. Rushing as he has to return to Shanghai on the same day, he gets down to business immediately.

1.title: FR - You Are My Glory [VOSTFR] - S01E27 - Staying Over
1.plot: Jing Jing decides to stay over at Yu Tu's place after the filming ends. She lies that she'll be leaving the next morning, but Yu Tu finds out from Qiu Ling that she's having a break for two months. Then he surprises her with a revamped room.

1.title: FR - You Are My Glory [VOSTFR] - S01E28 - Meet My Girlfriend
1.plot: Guan Zai returns to work, but Yu Tu feels sad about Guan Zai withdrawing from God Finder. Jing Jing convinces him by comparing it to their relationship. Meanwhile, Yu Tu introduces Jing Jing to his colleagues during Guan Zai's welcome dinner.

1.title: FR - You Are My Glory [VOSTFR] - S01E29 - The Proposal
1.plot: Chen Xue invites Jing Jing and Yu Tu over to her place for dinner. Later on, Yu Tu invites Jing Jing to watch him play in a basketball match and takes the chance to officially introduce her to his colleagues. He proposes to her after the match and both of their families start planning for their wedding.

1.title: FR - You Are My Glory [VOSTFR] - S01E30 - The Dream Wedding
1.plot: Jing Jing wants Yu Tu to apply for the institute's group wedding instead of holding one on their own. Yu Tu doesn't agree at first but soon changes his mind after knowing Jing Jing's dream wedding. He makes a formal proposal and proceeds with the romantic group wedding.

1.title: FR - You Are My Glory [VOSTFR] - S01E31 - Family Visit
1.plot: Yu Tu invites Jing Jing to the launch site. Jing Jing knows that Yu Tu doesn't have time for her, so she takes all the other family members of the staff to go sightseeing so that Yu Tu can focus at work. At night, Yu Tu tells Jing Jing about his next task after the launch.

1.title: FR - You Are My Glory [VOSTFR] - S01E32 - Final Launch
1.plot: It is finally the day of the launch of God Finder. People from all over the country gather at the launch site at Wenchang to witness history. With immense tenacity and competence, Yu Tu leads his unit, and along with other units, they execute the mission perfectly.

1.title: FR - Free Bert - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - Free Bert - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR - Free Bert - S01E03 - Episode 3
FR - Free Bert - S01E04 - Episode 4
FR - Free Bert - S01E05 - Episode 5
FR - Free Bert - S01E06 - Episode 6
FR - Tomodachi Game - S01E01 - Huh? Yuichi-kun Suspects His Friends?
1.plot: After the hard-earned funds for their expensive high school class trip are stolen, sophomore Yuichi and his four best friends are kidnapped by Manabu, a surreal character from a creepy late-night anime show. The mischievous Manabu challenges the students to a series of mind games that the five must decipher and outwit in order to win back their trip funds, uncover the thief, and pay off a huge and mysterious debt.

1.title: FR - Tomodachi Game - S01E02 - You Have a Lot to Say to Me, Don't You?
1.plot: Yuichi and friends reach the end of Kokkuri-san, uncovering dimensions of trickery in the Tomodachi Game that they hadn't imagined. When they move on to a second game, a socially destructive version of sugoroku, the group struggles to maintain balance as personal secrets are revealed and trust is stretched to its absolute limit.

1.title: FR - Tomodachi Game - S01E03 - There's No Way I'd Believe That
1.plot: Dark secrets are exposed as the second game, Bad-Mouth Sugoroku, continues. Yutori is devastated when a traumatic episode from her past is revealed, leading her to suspect the only other person who knew—Shiho. As debts increase, the five friends are driven further apart. With no one else to turn to, Yutori clings to Yuichi for help, and Yuichi pledges his support.

1.title: FR - Tomodachi Game - S01E04 - Seriously? That's So Cringe
1.plot: Responsible for the theft of the class funds, the application to play Tomodachi Game, and the exposure of all kinds of dirty secrets in Bad-Mouth Sugoroku, Tenji now tries to alienate Shiho from the others so he can have her all to himself. As a result of his attempts, a rift develops between Shiho and Yutori that threatens to destroy their friendship. But while Tenji is busy sweet-talking Shiho and planning his next move, a "special chance" appears for Shiho that might change the direction of the game.

1.title: FR - Tomodachi Game - S01E05 - Yuichi-kun, You're Pretty Dumb, Aren't You?
1.plot: Shibe reels from the accusation that he has "actually killed a person." Despite protesting that he never did such a thing, he loses the audience's confidence and is thrust into first place. Meanwhile, Tenji finds himself in a distressing situation after realizing Yuichi is the one who wrote the card. Yuichi then makes the shocking announcement that he knows who the traitor is.

1.title: FR - Tomodachi Game - S01E06 - I Really Can't Be Friends with a "Murderer"
1.plot: Backed into a corner by Yuichi's plan, Tenji is forced to confess that he applied to play Tomodachi Game. Yuichi spells out the traps he set to smoke out the traitor and reveals that he had been manipulating the game from the start. The second game then reaches a breathtakingly unexpected conclusion.

1.title: FR - Tomodachi Game - S01E07 - I'll Take 20 Million Yen Worth of Your Life
1.plot: After clearing Bad-Mouth Sugoroku, Yuichi and Tenji find themselves trapped in a dark cave for three days. During their isolation, Tenji makes the shocking revelation that he had already experienced a Tomodachi Game in the past. Meanwhile, a team of new opponents lies in wait outside, anxious to challenge the two partners to a grueling third game.

1.title: FR - Tomodachi Game - S01E08 - It's a Game Where You Wait, and Wait, and Wait...and Keep Waiting
1.plot: The third game, Friendly Hide-and-Seek, begins. Rival Group K, bolstered by an apparent 'genius' strategist, proceeds with a clear numerical advantage. Eager to regain Yuichi's trust, Tenji volunteers to be Group C's hider, but the couple's plans are strained by the addition of a new female teammate, Mizuse Maria. Yuichi confidently tells Tenji to "just trust me and wait," but then doesn't return for days...

1.title: FR - Tomodachi Game - S01E09 - Hurry Up and "Switch Sides"
1.plot: Yuichi, who hasn’t left the starting point in the two days since the game began, suddenly announces his desire to switch to Group K. The Group K members, puzzled by Yuichi’s apparent intention to abandon his hiding teammate, ask their Captain to decide whether or not to let Yuichi in. Meanwhile, Tenji, who has stayed in hiding and trusted Yuichi all along, is finally reaching his physical breaking point.

1.title: FR - Tomodachi Game - S01E10 - The Third Game Is Over!
1.plot: Finally able to shake his Group K guards, Yuichi succeeds in delivering food to Tenji. After being pushed off the cliff by Yuichi, Maria slowly gets closer to her saviors Hyakutaro and Chisato, but that too is a trap set by Yuichi to destroy the friendships in Group K.

1.title: FR - Tomodachi Game - S01E11 - Do You Really Have Noting You Care About?
1.plot: With "true genius" Kei controlling things from the shadows, Group K succeeds in finding Tenji. Facing the "worst thing that could have happened," Tenji makes a phone call to a certain individual. The third game, Friendly Hide-and-Seek, then reaches its conclusion. While the two groups struggled to outwit each other, Shiho, Shibe, and Yutori, who had been temporarily released for the third game, returned to school only to be met with cold stares from their classmates.

1.title: FR - Tomodachi Game - S01E12 - What's Most Important to Me Is...
1.plot: Yuuichi goes to help Kokorogi knowing it will be very dangerous, but things could turn out worse than imagined.

meta.plot: Le lycéen Yuichi Katagiri place l’amitié au-dessus de tout ! Il a une vie épanouie avec ses amis Shiho Sawaragi, Tenji Mikasa, Makoto Shibe et Yutori Kokorogi. Cependant, un incident les entraîne dans un jeu dans lequel ils doivent rembourser une énorme dette. La seule façon de gagner le "Tomodachi Game", c’est de ne jamais douter de ses proches. Mais leur amitié va être mise à rude épreuve… Vont-ils se faire confiance ou se trahir entre-eux ?

1.title: FR - La linea della palma - S01E01 - Back home
1.plot: The discovery of a body in Lake Lugano, along with some photographs linking the victim to a stolen Caravaggio masterpiece, push journalist Anna Romano to investigate the mysterious disappearance of her father years earlier.

1.title: FR - La linea della palma - S01E02 - Freeport
1.plot: Convinced that her father's disappearance is linked to art trafficking, Anna attempts to recover the stolen Caravaggio, despite everyone trying to stop her. However, her investigation puts her family under strain and alarms the mafia.

1.title: FR - La linea della palma - S01E03 - Follow the money
1.plot: Anna follows a series of financial clues that lead her to a secret network of art dealers connected to a mysterious Duchess. Her discoveries, however, not only undermine her faith in her father's innocence, but also put her in further danger.

1.title: FR - La linea della palma - S01E04 - The Caravaggio
1.plot: Anna sneaks into the Duchess's palace, where she makes a completely unexpected discovery. With her life in danger, the journalist is forced to take a desperate step to save herself; however, the case is far from being resolved.

1.title: FR - La linea della palma - S01E05 - The deal
1.plot: The forensic analysis reveals some disconcerting details, so Anna decides to return to Lugano to uncover an even more complex conspiracy, made of murky deceptions, mafia debts, and fragments of priceless works of art.

1.title: FR - La linea della palma - S01E06 - Family reunion
1.plot: When Anna finally uncovers the traumatic secret that has haunted her for years, her world is completely turned upside down. The journalist faces an impossible decision: protect her family or reveal the truth?

meta.plot: Le chanoine Daniel Clement, recteur, se retrouve mêlé à une enquête pour meurtre après qu’un cousin du mécène de l’église est découvert avec une blessure mortelle par arme blanche, infligée à l’aide d’un sécateur, ce qui l’amène à démêler le mystère.

1.title: FR - Murder Before Evensong [VOSTFR] - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Canon Daniel Clement's life unravels when his mother, Audrey, arrives unannounced, and one of his parishioners, Anthony Bowness, is found dead. But as Clement investigates the man's death, he begins to receive threats and questions who he can trust.

1.title: FR - Happy's Place - S01E01 - Pilot
1.plot: When Bobbie inherits her late father's tavern, Happy's Place, she's shocked to learn that she also has a new business partner in the half-sister she never knew existed.

1.title: FR - Happy's Place - S01E02 - Tapped Out
1.plot: When Isabella starts trying to make changes to the tavern, Bobbie worries that this new partnership may not work out. Bobbie offers to take Isabella under her wing so she can learn the ins and outs of the tavern, but Happy's lawyer fumbles Bobbie's plan.

1.title: FR - Happy's Place - S01E03 - Don't Sweat It
1.plot: Bobbie asks Isabella to move in with her, but when Isabella sees that Bobbie likes to address conflict head on, Isabella decides it might not be the best idea.

1.title: FR - Happy's Place - S01E04 - Fish Fry Monday
1.plot: When Emmett sees Bobbie drowning in work, he devises a clever ruse to give her a much-needed day off fishing, all under the guise of reviving the tavern's Fish Fry Mondays. Isabella dives into the world of bartending with Gabby.

1.title: FR - Happy's Place - S01E05 - Ladies' Night
1.plot: After Gabby's latest heartbreak, Bobbie and Isabella throw a Ladies' Night at the tavern to show Gabby she doesn't need a man to be happy, but things don't go as planned. Steve and Takoda tease Emmett about his sudden interest in dating apps.

1.title: FR - Happy's Place - S01E06 - Happy's House
1.plot: Bobbie reluctantly agrees to take Isabella to Happy's house in search of a connection to their late father, leading to Bobbie worrying about what they may find. Gabby hopes to strike it rich by searching through Happy's excessive penny collection on the hunt for a rare copper penny. Emmett and Steve both come in on their day off for some alone time.

1.title: FR - Happy's Place - S01E07 - Ho-Ho-Howey
1.plot: When the tavern's health insurance is threatened to be canceled, Gabby has a plan. She'll persuade her friend Danny to host his company party at Happy's. The catch is everyone must call Bobbie "Gabby" and Gabby "Bobbie." What could go wrong?

1.title: FR - Happy's Place - S01E08 - Dear Jack
1.plot: When Bobbie catches Isabella doing a slow-fade breakup with her long-distance boyfriend, she convinces her to send a Dear John letter. Steve brings in a review praising Chef Emmett's cooking and acknowledging the tavern's bartender, "Abby."

1.title: FR - Happy's Place - S01E09 - Emcee Squared
1.plot: When Bobbie tries to claim her rightful role as emcee for the Tavern's anniversary party, she ignites a fierce showdown with Gabby, who's determined to steal the spotlight. Isabella and Steve bet on who will come out on top, adding fuel to the fire.

1.title: FR - Happy's Place - S01E10 - The MacAllister Girls
1.plot: When Bobbie's strong-willed daughter, Gracie, comes to visit from her military base in Qatar, Bobbie worries she and Isabella might not get along. Gabby, Emmett, Steve and Takoda all compete to give Gracie the best homemade gift.

1.title: FR - Happy's Place - S01E11 - Heart of the Matter
1.plot: When Emmett is late to work, Bobbie becomes paranoid at the thought of why and begins to overreact. Gabby and Takoda help Steve pick out a new barstool to prove changing his OCD habits won't negatively impact the world.

1.title: FR - Happy's Place - S01E12 - Baby Doll
1.plot: After Gabby expresses her concerns about parenting, Bobbie reassures her she'd be a great mother, which prompts Gabby to bring in an AI baby doll and turn the tavern into her personal day care.

1.title: FR - Happy's Place - S01E13 - Mama Drama
1.plot: When Isabella's mom, Maritza, arrives, Bobbie tells the crew she's forgiven her for what happened with Happy, only to realize Maritza holds a grudge against her; Emmett and Takoda try to find out why Steve can't return to his home in Colombia.

1.title: FR - Happy's Place - S01E14 - Accountability
1.plot: When Isabella accidentally implies she doesn't trust Steve's work on the tavern's taxes, Bobbie and Steve decide to have some fun and teach her a lesson. Gabby goes on a health kick, enlisting Takoda as her personal trainer.

1.title: FR - Happy's Place - S01E15 - Sisters Ink
1.plot: When Isabella gifts Bobbie matching sister mugs, Bobbie is forced to quickly think of an equally thoughtful gift, resulting in Isabella expecting the sisters to get matching tattoos. Steve and Takoda investigate where Emmett has been sneaking off.

1.title: FR - Happy's Place - S01E16 - Whiskey Business
1.plot: When Steve drops his favorite pen down a crack in the bar, Bobbie decides to pry the bar open to find it, discovering a very valuable bottle of whiskey in the process. Steve is thrown by Emmett's reaction to breaking a knife that Steve gifted him.

meta.plot: Merlin, the immortal son of the bard Taliesin and Atlantean Princess Charis, is followed through his tragic upbringing, descent into madness, and shocking disappearance, leading to the legend that surrounds him. Set before King Arthur's birth, Merlin, assumed dead or a myth, reemerges in sub-Roman Britain to unite the fractured kingdoms under threat from Saxon invaders.

1.title: FR - The Pendragon Cycle: Rise of the Merlin [VOSTFR] - S01E01 - Island of the Mighty
1.plot: The age of gods is dying, and the tribes of Britain descend into chaos. One man hears a voice that will change history.

1.title: FR - The Pendragon Cycle: Rise of the Merlin [VOSTFR] - S01E02 - The Vision of Taliesin
1.plot: A forbidden union gives birth to a prophecy that will outlive the world that made it.

1.title: FR - The Pendragon Cycle: Rise of the Merlin [VOSTFR] - S01E03 - A Fatherless Child
1.plot: Hardened by exile, Merlin returns as old powers fall and the Saecsens rise — his visions more urgent than ever.

1.title: FR - The Pendragon Cycle: Rise of the Merlin [VOSTFR] - S01E04 - The King of Maridunum
1.plot: A Britain bleeds, Merlin must forge unity from chaos — while darkness moves behind kings and blades.

1.title: FR - The Pendragon Cycle: Rise of the Merlin [VOSTFR] - S01E06 - Ganieda
1.plot: After years in exile, Merlin returns to a divided kingdom and meets the woman who will test his destiny.

1.title: FR - Positively Yours [VOSTFR] - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Jang Hee-won, a career-driven woman who discovers her crush is dating her friend behind her back. While processing this betrayal, she has a chance, albeit messy, encounter with Kang Du-jun, a perfect second-generation chaebol.

1.title: FR - Positively Yours [VOSTFR] - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Du-jun has been trying to contact Hee-won since their night together. When they meet at the office, she tries to avoid him, but he corners her to demand an explanation for her sudden disappearance from the hotel.

1.title: FR - Positively Yours [VOSTFR] - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Hee-won faces a crisis when her new product recipe is leaked to a competitor. She confronts Du-jun to defend her team, insisting on taking full responsibility.

meta.plot: Lee Tang n'a jamais cherché à être tueur. Mais sa propension à démasquer les criminels va faire de lui un justicier.

1.title: FR - A Killer Paradox - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Flailing at life, Lee Tang panics after he kills a man after work. Soon, Jang Nan-gam is on the case — discovering a disturbing truth about the victim.

1.title: FR - A Killer Paradox - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: A mysterious woman approaches Tang, claiming to know his secret and begins to blackmail him. The weight of his actions starts taking a mental toll.

1.title: FR - A Killer Paradox - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Nan-gam struggles to find clear answers as he investigates the latest deaths. After connecting with an enigmatic figure, Tang decides to turn himself in.

1.title: FR - A Killer Paradox - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Wondering if the same killer is behind all the murders, Nan-gam probes Roh Bin for clues, leading to an unlikely partnership between the two.

1.title: FR - A Killer Paradox - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: As Nan-gam notices a clear pattern among the recent murders, he searches for Tang — unaware of another mysterious man who is doing the same.

1.title: FR - A Killer Paradox - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: In his search for Tang, Song Chon confronts Bin — who desperately turns to Nan-gam for help. But Tang agrees to meet with Chon, who has a proposition.

1.title: FR - A Killer Paradox - S01E07 - Episode 7
1.plot: Nan-gam comes face to face with Chon, who recognizes him from the past. As Bin and Tang plan their final escape, Bin receives a menacing phone call.

1.title: FR - A Killer Paradox - S01E08 - Episode 8
1.plot: The endgame to the chase leads to a final fight — and it's everyone versus Chon. In the process, Nan-gam finally learns the truth about his father.

meta.plot:
Simon Williams, acteur raté au passé chaotique, voit sa vie basculer lorsqu’un réalisateur excentrique décide de relancer "Wonder Man", un film de super-héros culte qu’il idolâtrait enfant. Bien décidé à décrocher le rôle, Simon se lance dans un casting improbable — avec pour mentor inattendu Trevor Slattery, ancien imposteur du Mandarin, désormais acteur désabusé mais étrangement lucide.

Dans les coulisses d’Hollywood, entre egos surdimensionnés, tournages déjantés et pressions médiatiques, Simon découvre que devenir un héros à l’écran pourrait bien réveiller en lui des pouvoirs insoupçonnés… et des conflits bien réels.

1.title: FR - Wonder Man - S01E01 - Matinee
1.plot: Somebody's actually remaking "Wonder Man?"

1.title: FR - Wonder Man - S01E02 - Self-Tape
1.plot: It's never been this hard to do a self-tape before.

1.title: FR - Wonder Man - S01E03 - Pacoima
1.plot: Birthday parties are kind of stressful.

1.title: FR - Wonder Man - S01E04 - Doorman
1.plot: Ding dong.

1.title: FR - Wonder Man - S01E05 - Found Footage
1.plot: Try a peach ring. You'll understand.

1.title: FR - Wonder Man - S01E06 - Callback
1.plot: It is tight, Jake.

1.title: FR - Wonder Man - S01E07 - Kathy Friedman
1.plot: The New York Times finds us fascinating.

1.title: FR - Wonder Man - S01E08 - Yucca Valley
1.plot: Don't let your babies grow up to be cowboys.

1.title: FR - Memory of a Killer [VOSTFR] - S01E01 - Pilot
1.plot: After carrying out a hit on his latest assigned target, Angelo begins to realize his mind may be failing him as his two, completely separate lives are slowly crashing together.

1.title: FR - Memory of a Killer [VOSTFR] - S01E02 - Ferryman
1.plot: After the hit on his daughter, Angelo warns Maria about her mom's killer. FBI Agent Grant questions him, while Angelo and Joe handle a mob accountant.

1.title: FR - Memory of a Killer [VOSTFR] - S01E03 - Samurai
1.plot: Dutch assigns Angelo to kill an Internal Affairs Agent who threatens to take down their whole operation. Still rattled by the shooting, Maria seeks Dave's help in procuring a gun. Agent Grant runs into Angelo, who suspects she may see him as more than just the father of a victim.

1.title: FR - Memory of a Killer [VOSTFR] - S01E04 - Unhappy Ending
1.plot: Angelo postpones a hit to hunt for The Ferryman, who he believes was responsible for the hit on Maria. Meanwhile, the FBI investigates a crime scene linked to Angelo.

1.title: FR - Memory of a Killer [VOSTFR] - S01E05 - Betrayal
1.plot: While on a hit Angelo remembers a pivotal moment in his life, 5 years ago, when he learned his brother had Alzheimer's and Angelo was forced to make a life-changing decision.

1.title: FR - Memory of a Killer [VOSTFR] - S01E06 - Uncle Jacob
1.plot: Haunted by fractured memories, Angelo questions his perception of reality. Joe helps Angelo plan a high-tech public assassination of a Russian mob accountant who is about to testify on live TV. Detective Woods investigates one of Angelo's murders, bringing him one step closer to uncovering Angelo's secret life.

1.title: FR - Memory of a Killer [VOSTFR] - S01E07 - Dr. Parks
1.plot: Angelo learns that a previous job may be the key to unmasking The Ferryman. Meanwhile, Dave has a big break in his investigation that could expose Angelo's true identity.

1.title: FR - Memory of a Killer [VOSTFR] - S01E08 - Tailored by Fabroni
1.plot: Major revelations threaten to upend Angelo's family. Joe gets the opportunity of a lifetime.

1.title: FR - Memory of a Killer [VOSTFR] - S01E09 - Shoot the Piano Player
1.plot: After a stunning reveal, Angelo races against the clock to protect the ones he loves from The Ferryman's path of death and destruction.

meta.plot: Angelo Ledda mène une double vie : tueur à gages redoutable à New York et vendeur de photocopieurs et père de famille paisible à Cooperstown, dans le nord de l'État de New York. Toutes deux sont menacées lorsqu'on lui diagnostique la maladie d'Alzheimer, une maladie qui lui a déjà coûté son frère aîné.
Alors qu’un trafic illicite menace une Corée du Sud dénuée d'armes à feu, un flic déterminé fait équipe avec un partenaire mystérieux pour éviter que le pays sombre dans le chaos.

1.title: FR - Trigger - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: When a shocking mass shooting shatters Korea's calm, Lee Do races to stop the violence — then realizes the threat of illegal guns is just beginning.

1.title: FR - Trigger - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: As shootings spread, Lee Do discovers guns in the hands of everyday citizens. When a victim hits close to home, his investigation grows more urgent.

1.title: FR - Trigger - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: A police raid uncovers a cache of military weapons. Lee Do and his new ally Moon Baek close in on the arms network as the city reels from bloodshed.

1.title: FR - Trigger - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Lee Do confronts a violent standoff and must decide how far to go to stop the killings, while suspicions about Moon Baek threaten their fragile alliance.

1.title: FR - Trigger - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Guns reach bullied students and grieving parents, sparking new tragedies. Lee Do uncovers a network delivering weapons to vulnerable people across Korea.

1.title: FR - Trigger - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: A gun in the hands of a student spells crisis at school. As panic spreads, Lee Do and Moon Baek race rush to restore order — but it may be too late.

1.title: FR - Trigger - S01E07 - Episode 7
1.plot: As fear and confusion grow, police and gangs rush to recover illegal guns. Lee Do feels powerless as the true scale of the arms crisis comes to light.

1.title: FR - Trigger - S01E08 - Episode 8
1.plot: Police raid the gun syndicate, and rival gangs and old enemies clash in bloody battles. Lee Do is pushed to the limits as violence hits all of Korea.

1.title: FR - Trigger - S01E09 - Episode 9
1.plot: As guns reach new hands and fear sweeps the nation, Moon Baek's message echoes through the media. Across Korea, people must choose how to respond.

1.title: FR - Trigger - S01E10 - Episode 10
1.plot: With emotions running high, Lee Do and Moon Baek move toward a crossroads. One final choice will shape Korea's future — or plunge it into darkness.

1.title: FR - Fullmetal Alchemist - S01E01 - Those Who Challenge the Sun
1.plot: When Edward and Alphonse meet a so-called religious leader who can invoke miracles, they believe he's carrying the philosopher's stone.

1.title: FR - Fullmetal Alchemist - S01E02 - Body of the Sanctioned
1.plot: Edward and Alphonse struggle over whether they should reveal the truth behind Cornello's miracles -- and possibly ruin the townspeople's lives.

1.title: FR - Fullmetal Alchemist - S01E03 - Mother
1.plot: A young Ed and Al are determined to bring back their dead mother, who was their pillar of strength during dreary times of war.

1.title: FR - Fullmetal Alchemist - S01E04 - A Forger's Love
1.plot: While on their way to seek out an important man from their childhood, Ed and Al come across a town haunted by a ghostly woman.

1.title: FR - Fullmetal Alchemist - S01E05 - The Man with the Mechanical Arm
1.plot: Ed and Al hop aboard a train to Central City and quickly find themselves defending the passengers -- including Gen. Hakuro -- from terrorists.

1.title: FR - Fullmetal Alchemist - S01E06 - The Alchemy Exam
1.plot: Once in Central City, Ed and Al move into the vast mansion of sewing-life alchemist Shou Tucker and begin to prepare for the Alchemy Exam.

1.title: FR - Fullmetal Alchemist - S01E07 - Night of the Chimera's Cry
1.plot: Now an official State Alchemist, Ed takes a closer look at Tucker's chimera experiments and begins to realize there's something very wrong going on.

1.title: FR - Fullmetal Alchemist - S01E08 - The Philosopher's Stone
1.plot: A disenchanted Ed resigns from his position as State Alchemist, and when Winry arrives in town, she may be the serial killer's next victim.

1.title: FR - Fullmetal Alchemist - S01E09 - Be Thou for the People
1.plot: Ed and Al go on assignment to inspect a small mining colony and discover its inhabitants are being heavily taxed by a tyrant and his Alchemist.

1.title: FR - Fullmetal Alchemist - S01E10 - The Phantom Thief
1.plot: While trying to avoid their meeting with Mustang, Ed and Al end up in a small town and become embroiled in a manhunt for a female Robin Hood.

1.title: FR - Fullmetal Alchemist - S01E11 - The Other Brothers Elric (1)
1.plot: Ed and Al head to Xenotime in hopes of finding the Philosopher's Stone, but they find only two boys creating a strange red water.

1.title: FR - Fullmetal Alchemist - S01E12 - The Other Brothers Elric (2)
1.plot: Ed and Al uncover a conspiracy involving the Tringham Brothers' father, his involvement with the red water and the disease that's stricken Xenotime.

1.title: FR - Fullmetal Alchemist - S01E13 - Fullmetal vs. Flame
1.plot: Ed reports back to Mustang in East City, where discussion of Doctor Marcoh and the Philosopher's Stone leads to a duel between Ed and the colonel.

1.title: FR - Fullmetal Alchemist - S01E14 - Destruction's Right Hand
1.plot: While the shape-shifting Envy disguises himself as Cornello, Ed and Al find Marcoh and learn about the Stone's involvement in the Ishbal Rebellion.

1.title: FR - Fullmetal Alchemist - S01E15 - The Ishbal Massacre
1.plot: As the Strong Arm Alchemist defends them from the surrounding chaos, Marcoh reveals to the Elrics the vast atrocities of the Ishbal Massacre.

1.title: FR - Fullmetal Alchemist - S01E16 - That Which Is Lost
1.plot: As Marcoh faces a deadly encounter with Lust, Armstrong and the Elrics flee to Resembool. Ed is sent into a rage when they lose Al in the process.

1.title: FR - Fullmetal Alchemist - S01E17 - House of the Waiting Family
1.plot: While resting and receiving repairs back in Resembool, Ed visits his mother's grave and Al reveals his concerns about his fading memories.

1.title: FR - Fullmetal Alchemist - S01E18 - Marcoh's Notes
1.plot: Ed and Al are forced to go in search of another source for Marcoh's book after Lust, Gluttony and Scar burn the First Branch Library to the ground.

1.title: FR - Fullmetal Alchemist - S01E19 - The Truth Behind Truths
1.plot: Ed and Al are horrified when they learn what the key ingredient in making a Philosopher's Stone is, but they forge ahead to explore an abandoned lab.

1.title: FR - Fullmetal Alchemist - S01E20 - Soul of the Guardian
1.plot: Several malfunctions in their armor impede Ed and Al as they face off against some tortured souls bound to empty suits.

1.title: FR - Fullmetal Alchemist - S01E21 - The Red Glow
1.plot: Barry sets off a series of explosions that inadvertently free Greed and the other prisoners. Tucker returns from the dead in a surprising new form.

1.title: FR - Fullmetal Alchemist - S01E22 - Created Human
1.plot: As Envy, in the form of Basque Grand, gathers the human ingredients to form the Stone, Maes Hughes sets out to rescue the Elrics from Laboratory 5.

1.title: FR - Fullmetal Alchemist - S01E23 - Heart of Steel
1.plot: Edward upsets Winry with his refusal to talk, and Alphonse decides to confront Edward with his questions about artificial souls.

1.title: FR - Fullmetal Alchemist - S01E24 - Bonding Memories
1.plot: Alphonse runs off and comes face to face with Scar, who's been hiding out among the mercenary-plagued refugees of Ishbal.

1.title: FR - Fullmetal Alchemist - S01E25 - Words of Farewell
1.plot: When Ed and Al take Winry on a quest to tail Scar and learn more about the Stone, they discover a connection between Lab 5 and the war in Ishbal.

1.title: FR - Fullmetal Alchemist - S01E26 - Her Reason
1.plot: As Ed, Al and Winry arrive in Rush Valley to retrieve automail, Mustang figures that a high-ranking officer must be responsible for Hughes' death.

1.title: FR - Fullmetal Alchemist - S01E27 - Teacher
1.plot: Edward and Alphonse fear for their lives when they come face to face with Izumi Curtis, their former teacher, who brings them back to Dublith.

1.title: FR - Fullmetal Alchemist - S01E28 - All is One, One is All
1.plot: In order to teach them a life lesson and give them time to reflect, Izumi leaves Ed and Al on Yock Island -- the place where she first found them.

1.title: FR - Fullmetal Alchemist - S01E29 - The Untainted Child
1.plot: Edward and Alphonse discover that the young boy on Yock Island is, all at once, an alchemist, a homunculus and able to transmute his own body.

1.title: FR - Fullmetal Alchemist - S01E30 - Assault on South Headquarters
1.plot: As the military captures the mysterious Yock Island boy and imprisons him in South Headquarters, Yoki spots Scar among a group of Ishbalans.

1.title: FR - Fullmetal Alchemist - S01E31 - Sin
1.plot: Envy disguises herself as Bradley and plucks the homunculus child from Izumi. Meanwhile, the boy remembers his past after he eats Stone fragments.

1.title: FR - Fullmetal Alchemist - S01E32 - Dante of the Deep Forest
1.plot: Izumi drops in on Ed and Al's fight with Wrath, a new homunculus who seeks the rest of Edward's body in order to make himself human.

1.title: FR - Fullmetal Alchemist - S01E33 - Al, Captured
1.plot: When Martel takes over Al's armor and brings him to Greed's headquarters, it's up to Izumi and Edward to come to the rescue

1.title: FR - Fullmetal Alchemist - S01E34 - Theory of Avarice
1.plot: With Ed, Izumi and Sig in his custody, Lt. Col. Archer reinstates Shou Tucker as State Alchemist and orders his men to hunt down Greed.

1.title: FR - Fullmetal Alchemist - S01E35 - Reunion of the Fallen
1.plot: As Edward and Alphonse head out to the Ishbal camp with Winry, Lust is sitting down at a restaurant when a man from her past enters the room.

1.title: FR - Fullmetal Alchemist - S01E36 - The Sinner Within
1.plot: Ed and Alphonse hope to learn more about the Philosopher's Stone when they lend a hand to a group of Ishbalan refugees being shipped further south.

1.title: FR - Fullmetal Alchemist - S01E37 - The Flame Alchemist, The Bachelor Lieutenant & The Mystery of Warehouse 13
1.plot: While he investigates Mustang, Lt. Havoc orders his man Falman to find him a girlfriend. Later, Mustang must investigate the haunted Warehouse 13.

1.title: FR - Fullmetal Alchemist - S01E38 - With the River's Flow
1.plot: After an argument splits up Ed, Al and Winry, Al bumps into a familiar face, and Winry decides to investigate Hughes' murder with Sheska.

1.title: FR - Fullmetal Alchemist - S01E39 - Secret of Ishbal
1.plot: Kimblee is named State Alchemist and heads out with the troops to Liore, where Scar is gouging out the earth with a large stone.

1.title: FR - Fullmetal Alchemist - S01E40 - The Scar
1.plot: After Lust and Gluttony drop in on Edward's confrontation with Scar in Liore, the seventh and final homunculus is finally revealed.

1.title: FR - Fullmetal Alchemist - S01E41 - Holy Mother
1.plot: With the help of Rose, the Holy Mother, Scar instructs the inhabitants of Liore not to provoke violence as they lure the military into town.

1.title: FR - Fullmetal Alchemist - S01E42 - His Name Is Unknown
1.plot: With Ed busy aiding the people of Liore, Scar is the only one who can help Alphonse when his armor begins transforming into an explosive compound.

1.title: FR - Fullmetal Alchemist - S01E43 - The Stray Dog
1.plot: While the Elric Brothers flee Liore, Winry meets a complete stranger in Resembool who is later introduced to her as Ed and Al's father.

1.title: FR - Fullmetal Alchemist - S01E44 - Hohenheim of Light
1.plot: As the Elrics' father, Hohenhelm of Light, sets out to confront the leader of the Homunculi, Lyra and Rose find a secret stairway in an old church.

1.title: FR - Fullmetal Alchemist - S01E45 - A Rotted Heart
1.plot: A complex and entangled history reveals itself as Van Hohenheim of Light battles Dante, the leader of the Homunculi.

1.title: FR - Fullmetal Alchemist - S01E46 - Human Transmutation
1.plot: The brothers are in danger when they become separated. Ed returns to Dante's mansion to look for clues. Al meets with the deranged Shou Tucker.

1.title: FR - Fullmetal Alchemist - S01E47 - Sealing the Homunculus
1.plot: Wrath believes that Sloth is his real mother. Sloth battles Shou Tucker. Ed realizes that Al has been tricked by Tucker.

1.title: FR - Fullmetal Alchemist - S01E48 - Goodbye
1.plot: Armstrong declares an uprising against the Führer on the northern border while Ed, joined by Izumi, fights the remaining Homunculi in Central.

1.title: FR - Fullmetal Alchemist - S01E49 - The Other Side of the Gate
1.plot: King Bradley comes home to give his son a birthday gift. Edward meets with Russell in an abandoned church. Maria and Denny arrive to support Izumi.

1.title: FR - Fullmetal Alchemist - S01E50 - Death
1.plot: Edward Elric arrives in World War I after being pulled through the Gate. Roy Mustang confronts his enemy, Homunculus Pride.

1.title: FR - Fullmetal Alchemist - S01E51 - Laws and Promises
1.plot: Edward Elric realizes he must make the ultimate sacrifice if he wants to retrieve his brother from the Gate. Hawkeye breaks free from her captors.

meta.plot:
Les frères Elric (Edward et Alphonse) ont hérité leur talent d’alchimiste de leur père qui a quitté le foyer familial sans jamais revenir.

À la suite de la mort de leur mère, les deux jeunes tentent de la faire revivre grâce à l'alchimie, en faisant une transmutation humaine malgré l'interdit. L'opération échoue et les deux frères en subissent le contrecoup… Al disparaît et Ed perd sa jambe mais sauve son frère privé de son corps en fixant son esprit dans le corps en métal d'une armure médiévale avec un cercle de transmutation tracé avec son sang, mais doit pour cela sacrifier un bras. Par la suite, il utilisera des prothèses mécaniques en métal, les mécagreffes (1er doublage) ou automails (second doublage).

Ed passe ensuite l'examen et devient Alchimiste d'État, afin de pouvoir voyager et trouver la pierre philosophale, pour que son frère et lui retrouvent leur corps.

meta.plot: Une escapade romantique à Paris prend une fâcheuse tournure, lorsque la disparition soudaine de son petit ami Tom, à bord d'un train en direction du sud de la France, embarque Alice dans une folle aventure ponctuée de multiples dangers. Au fil de ses péripéties, la jeune femme découvre des secrets choquants sur l'homme qu'elle pensait connaître...

1.title: FR - Vanished - S01E01 - Rosefinch
1.plot: Alice searches for her boyfriend Tom, uncovering secrets in his charity that make her question his past and what she thought she knew.

1.title: FR - Vanished - S01E02 - Limerence
1.plot: Alice uncovers secrets about Tom as allies turn suspect; after a murder and a deadly chase, she fears he's caught in something darker.

1.title: FR - Vanished - S01E03 - The Fatted Calf
1.plot: Alice's doubts about Tom grow as she uncovers his secret ties; after a deadly encounter, she takes a new identity to learn the truth.

meta.plot: À peine sorties de prison et sans options, deux femmes gèrent une société de désinfection, jusqu'à ce qu'une cliente louche les ramène à la vie qu'elles espéraient tant fuir.

1.title: FR - Time Flies - S01E01 - Today, I'm starting over
1.plot: Two parolees slog through pest control jobs to make ends meet. But Manca's health concerns and mounting bills leave Inés desperate for a better option.

1.title: FR - Time Flies - S01E02 - The Price of Poison
1.plot: After learning the cost of Manca's biopsy, Inés weighs a risky but lucrative offer from Susana Bonar — a wealthy client who won't take no for an answer.

1.title: FR - Time Flies - S01E03 - Life Goes On
1.plot: Before prison, Inés hosts a lavish birthday dinner for her husband Ernesto, where family insults and parenting spats push her composure to the brink.

1.title: FR - Time Flies - S01E04 - Stop Digging
1.plot: As Bonar's erratic behavior raises red flags, Manca and Rody dig into her past. Inés rushes to gather lethal supplies after Bonar tightens the deadline.

1.title: FR - Time Flies - S01E05 - The Point of No Return
1.plot: A tragic memory reveals the source of Bonar's grief. Manca and Rody trace her ties to Inés as shady suppliers put her at risk during a pesticide pickup.

1.title: FR - Time Flies - S01E06 - Time Flies
1.plot: While Manca undergoes surgery, Inés learns of Bonar's macabre plan — and must act fast when those she loves most appear to be in danger.

meta.plot: Quand une épidémie d'insomnie mortelle se propage à Stockholm, une vague d'événements étranges, d'accidents et de violence déferle sur la ville. Alors que le chaos envahit la capitale suédoise, un ministre disgracié doit choisir entre son pays et sa famille, tandis qu'une ambulancière pleine de ressources et une jeune influenceuse égocentrique luttent pour survivre à ce fléau.

1.title: FR - Vaka - Les Éveillés - S01E01 - Wide Awake
1.plot: Christian, the Minister for Health, is already drowning in political and personal troubles when a wave of strange events, accidents, and violence washes over Stockholm. As Elin, an ambulance nurse, pulls double shifts amid the chaos, she misses warning signs about her wife Moa's condition. Meanwhile, teenage influencer Linda senses a crisis and begins speculating online.

1.title: FR - Vaka - Les Éveillés - S01E02 - Behind Closed Doors
1.plot: Christian sets boundaries with his addict son and buries himself in work as Stockholm's crisis intensifies. When a disaster rocks the city, he's forced to take decisive action. Meanwhile, Linda grows concerned about her neighbors' strange behavior, and Elin's wife Moa's sudden outburst leads to devastating consequences. Elsewhere, a scientist uncovers an alarming discovery.

1.title: FR - Vaka - Les Éveillés - S01E03 - Thicker Than Water
1.plot: Linda capitalizes on the crisis on social media while fighting growing anxiety. Her neighbor Johannes embarks on a classified mission, taking his son along, while Elin desperately navigates a crumbling healthcare system to help her infected wife Moa. Meanwhile, Hugo struggles to adapt to prison life as his father Christian assumes new responsibilities amid the escalating epidemic.

1.title: FR - Vaka - Les Éveillés - S01E04 - Break The Fall
1.plot: Elin helplessly watches the VAKA virus consume her wife Moa while battling early symptoms herself, desperately seeking any cure. As Christian faces public blame for the outbreak, Saga begins to doubt his ability to lead. Hugo, fearing he'll pay for his father's mistakes, reaches out for help from prison. Linda grows concerned for Isak as his father Johannes braces for the worst.

1.title: FR - Vaka - Les Éveillés - S01E05 - The Greater Good
1.plot: As Stockholm spirals into chaos, Saga turns to military intervention when her curfew proves ineffective. Johannes launches his plan while Linda draws on her knowledge of apocalyptic films to survive. With Moa's condition reaching critical levels, Elin defies protocols to secure help from the government. Meanwhile, Christian finally reaches his breaking point.

1.title: FR - Vaka - Les Éveillés - S01E06 - Cut and Run
1.plot: Linda and Isak encounter other survivors during their escape attempt, Christian makes a last-ditch effort at redemption. Elin and Moa participate in a desperate experimental treatment, while Saga witnesses the harsh consequences of her policies firsthand. Our stories overlap as societal constructs start to crumble and the people of Stockholm realize nothing will ever be the same.

meta.plot: Découvrez A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms dans ce regard captivant sur la façon dont la nouvelle série HBO de l'univers Game of Thrones a vu le jour.

1.title: FR - A Knight in the Making [VOSTFR] - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Follow A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms from the page to the screen in this fascinating and comprehensive look at how HBO's newest series in the Game of Thrones universe was brought to life.

1.title: FR - A Knight in the Making [VOSTFR] - S01E02 - Episodes 2 & 3
1.plot: Get the full scoop on Episodes 2 and 3 of A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms in this behind-the-scenes special that explores character arcs, the eye-popping jousting sequences, and the stunning Ep. 3 climax.

meta.plot: Dotée du pouvoir d'exaucer les vœux, la vie d'une renarde cynique à neuf queues prend un tournant lorsqu'elle rencontre un footballeur, changeant ainsi le destin des deux personnages.

1.title: FR - Juste humaine - S01E01 - An Inevitable Event
1.plot: Eun Ho lives a glamorous life granting the wishes of the wealthy. Until one day, she crosses paths with Kang Si Yeol, a high school soccer player.

1.title: FR - Juste humaine - S01E02 - The Hour of Transfer
1.plot: Without explanation, Eun Ho's power drains away after her encounter with Si Yeol. She soon appears before him again, demanding that he make a wish.

1.title: FR - Juste humaine - S01E03 - The Rise and Fall
1.plot: After giving away his wish to Hyun U Seok, Si Yeol enrages Eun Ho — and wakes up to unintended consequences as he tries to understand his new reality.

1.title: FR - Juste humaine - S01E04 - The Price of Good Deeds
1.plot: Desperate for his life back, Si-yeol pleads with Woo-seok to reverse the wish. But Jang Do-cheol kidnaps Si-yeol - putting him and Eun-ho in peril.

1.title: FR - Juste humaine - S01E05 - Episode 5
FR - Juste humaine - S01E06 - Episode 6

meta.plot: Lorsque Ditte Jensen se retire avec les honneurs des services secrets danois, elle emménage dans un immeuble de Reykjavik où elle va pouvoir cultiver son jardin et vivre sa vie dans l’anonymat. Mais Ditte ne peut cesser d’être qui elle est. Un soldat d’élite et une guerrière. Et bientôt l’immeuble se transforme en champ de bataille pour un monde meilleur. Avec son sens profond de la justice, elle décèle les problèmes de ses voisins et se sent obligée de les aider, qu’ils le veuillent ou non. Et dans son monde, la fin justifie les moyens. Toujours.
