FR - La Voisine danoise - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR - La Voisine danoise - S01E03 - Episode 3
FR - La Voisine danoise - S01E04 - Episode 4
FR - La Voisine danoise - S01E05 - Episode 5
FR - La Voisine danoise - S01E06 - Episode 6

meta.plot:
Deux cents ans ont passé depuis le grand déluge qui a mis fin à l'âge des Dofus et transformé les continents de l'époque en archipels. Les eaux montent, la nature devient folle ? Des choses se sont passés, d'autres se sont terminés, mais le Wakfu, l'énergie primordiale créatrice du monde est fortement perturbée par un être mystérieux.

Sur une petite île au large de la nation d'Amakna, se trouve un petit village perdu dans la forêt : Emelka. Dans ce petit village, démarre les épopées d'un jeune garçon du nom de Yugo, qui vient de découvrir ses pouvoirs, mais aussi ses origines.

C'est ici que tout commence.

1.title: FR - Wakfu - S01E01 - The Child from the Mist
1.plot: Grougaloragran, a mysterious and ancient entity, appears one with a baby carriage. After defeating a mysterious foe with powers over time, who wants Grougaloragran's life force, or "Wakfu", Grougaloragran comes across Alibert, who is quitting his profession as a bounty hunter after almost taking a innocent man to jail. Grougaloragran leaves the baby carriage with Alibert, believing that he will be a good father to the baby inside. He also leaves a message for the adoptive father, along with a baby Tofu (Bird). 12 years later, Alibert has opened an inn and established a small town. The boy, now called Yugo, believes himself to be a ordinary boy until he discovers that he has the ability to create portals. He puts it to the test when a monster rampages though town, ending up at his Inn. Ruel, who was passing though town, teams up with Yugo and defeats the beast, which turns out to have been a Iop possessed by a demon trapped in an item, in this case a sword known as a Shushu. Alibert, seeing Yugo's power, decides to tell him the truth: that he is adopted and that his real family is out there somewhere.

1.title: FR - Wakfu - S01E02 - Yugo the Eliatrope
1.plot: The village is attacked by Polters, creatures that turn humans into shrubs, Yugo and his team go to the Forbidden Forest to find out why the Polters are doing this. Inside they encounter the ruler of the forest, the Soft Oak, who plans to turn all humans into trees in revenge for the destruction his forest has suffered. Amalia, a member of Yugo's party, convinces Soft Oak that not all men are like this and that only free men can protect the forests. She then heals him with magic and he agrees to turn the shrubs back into humans. In the village, Yugo and his father are attacked by the time villain from 12 years ago, now revealed to be a Xelor named Nox. Nox manipulates time to age Alibert rapidly and he calls Yugo a Eliatrope, swearing to get Yugo's Wakfu one day. Alibert, knowing that Yugo deserves to know the truth, tells him that his real family, the Eliatrope race, are out there somewhere at a place called Oma Island. Yugo's friends agree to help him find his real family and stop Nox and set off for the adventure.

1.title: FR - Wakfu - S01E03 - The Black Crow
1.plot: The group goes to Kelba's market in search of a map to begin their quest. When they arrive they find the marketplace under attack by the Black Crow. The groups learns about a shop run by Kabrok, a old adventurer who hung up his cape and became a stock boy, and Miranda, who is Kabrok's strict, but loving, wife. They have a map the group can buy, but are unable to sell thanks to the Black Crow. The heroes lay a trap for the Black Crow and are able to take him down. The Black Crow is revealed to be Kabrok, who was bored with his life, craved adventure again, and felt that attacking the local merchants was the way to get it. Kabrok and his wife sell the group a map.

1.title: FR - Wakfu - S01E04 - The Ugly Pageant
1.plot: Lost, the group finds themselves in front of a tower belonging to four sisters who wish to find the perfect husband. Percedal, completely smitten just by the top of one of their heads, climbs up to get a kiss. When he gets to the top, he finds that the sisters are actually ugly because of a curse put on them after the picky girls had ridiculed every single suitor. To be cured, one of them must be kissed by a man, and they hold Percedal captive until they get their kiss. The group dons disguises to get inside the tower. The nine of them decide to hold a little contest to see who will get the kiss from Pinpin, which ends up being pure torture. Things quickly go wrong when Eva enrages the sisters and causes them to attack the group. Freeing Pinpin, the group flees with the aid of one of the sisters, who believes that they got what they deserved and is sorry for what they did to Pinpin. As they flee, Pinpin blows the sister a kiss, which turns the sisters and their tower back to normal.

1.title: FR - Wakfu - S01E05 - The Magnificent Five
1.plot: The group comes across a village of Puddles, cephalopod-like gelatinous creatures that turn into puddles. They are constantly attacked by a pack of Taures Bullies, wild bovine beasts that constantly raid their village for food. The group manages to fight them off, but know they will return as they always have. Not wanting to turn a blind eye to turmoil, and needing food themselves, the group decide to help train the Puddles so they can be ready for the next raid. The Bullies attack again, but the group, along with the Puddles, quickly overpower them. However, the Bullies brought one of their leaders, their father, Mandhal the Mighty. He proves to be a tough foe, even having his own beam attack, but Yugo uses his portal to deflect Father's beam attack back at him. With Father defeated, and worried about Mother finding out, the Bullies flee, leaving the Puddles to live in peace.

1.title: FR - Wakfu - S01E06 - Vampyro
1.plot: With no other route to take, the group is forced to pass though an inhospitable town full of decay and zombie-like townsfolk. Vampyro, a vampire, comes to claim Eva as his wife, by using a magical ring to take her shadow, i.e. her soul. The group launches a rescue mission, avoiding ghouls launched by Vampyro. While scaling his castle, the group is overrun by vampire bats. Percedal volunteers to stay behind while the others go to rescue Eva. They arrive and find that Vampyro is using Eva's body as a vessel for his true love, Shadofang. Vampyro uses his shadow stealing powers on Ruel, turning him into a beast that Amalia eventually defeats. Amalia, Yugo, and Percedal fight Vampyro, but he proves to be too powerful. However, during the fight, they discover his weakness: he's allergic to Az, their mascot. the group uses Az to their advantage, overpowering Vampyro and getting the ring off of him. He turns back to his original self, a magistrate named Wagner. His release also turns the town and the townspeople back to normal and returns the shadows of Eva and Ruel.

1.title: FR - Wakfu - S01E07 - Poisonous Beauty
1.plot: Amalia is bitten by a poisonous Red Rose. Ruel says that his old friend, an Eniripsa named Nausica, lives nearby and can help heal her. They learn that the only cure to a Red Rose bite is sap from the rare Severum tree, which is located deep in the nearby Maleficent forest. Ruel and Yugo leave to gather the sap while Percedal and Eva stay behind to help care for Amalia. Not long after Ruel and Yugo leave, Amalia's doll goes berserk, attacking Nausea, Percedal, and Eva. It merges with Rubilax, turning into a monstrous demon. The trio overpower it, forcing Rubilax out and cutting the doll up into pieces, but the pieces turn into other dolls and attack in masses. In the forest, Ruel and Yugo are attacked by giant Venus flytraps, but are saved by a forest dweller named Sybannak. They are forced to help her in exchange for the sap, but when the tasks become tedious and monotonous, Ruel instead decides to steal some sap. Enraged, Sybannak attacks with the Venus flytrap monsters. Rue and Yugo escape with the sap and return to Nausea's where they save Amalia and return the dolls back to normal.

1.title: FR - Wakfu - S01E08 - Xav the Baker
1.plot: Following a very delicious smell, the group finds a man attacking a beast made entirely out of bread. They mistake the man for the attacker, only to later find out that the man, a innocent baker named Xav, was attacked by Breadnaughts who were after the rare Golden Wheat stored in his barn. Before the attack, Xav was going to enter a bread baking contest with the special wheat which is thought to produce exquisite bread. Wanting to fix their mistake, Yugo decides to help Xav make the bread while the others harvest the wheat. They enter the competition and with Yugo's help, Xav wins. The Breadnaught inadvertently reveals that she is Chouquette, Xav's father's former apprentice, and that she was after the wheat because she is in love with her master and wanted him to win.

1.title: FR - Wakfu - S01E09 - Ruel's Bag
1.plot: The group is staying at Xav's place, and getting some tips on how to deal with Grufon from its original master, Gonnard the Great. A traveling herald passes though and tells the group that kamas (gold coins) are being stolen throughout the land. Ruel, afraid his own Kamas will be stolen, retreats into his magical bag, and uses a recall potion to return home. The others, Gonnard included, follow after him. They discover his home is built into a clay mesa and has a special code to keep intruders out and keep his stash of Kamas hidden. Gonnard reveals himself to be a shapeshifting genie that turns into whatever he eats, and as he eats kamas, he's as hard as gold. He overpowers the group and eats more kamas. Ruel, not one to give up his kamas, tricks him into eating chocolate coins instead. Gonnard eats them and turns into chocolate. Ruel traps him inside a glass vase and leaves Gonnard in his vault.

1.title: FR - Wakfu - S01E10 - The Gobbowl inferno (1)
1.plot: Upon arriving to the city of Bonta, Yugo & co. try to buy a boat to get them to Oma Island, but it's expensive. So Ruel enters them in gobbowl match, with his old team, Real Gobbly, against professional player Kriss Krass & his team, Lamechester United.

1.title: FR - Wakfu - S01E11 - The Gobbowl inferno (2)
1.plot: Ruel & his team, Real Gobbly, along with Percedal, play against opposing team, Lamechester United, led by professional gobbowl player, Kriss Krass.

1.title: FR - Wakfu - S01E12 - The Gobbowl inferno (3)
1.plot: When Real Gobbly is on the verge of losing, Ruel sends in Yugo, Amalia & Eva for one last effort to win the match and get the boat to Oma Island.

1.title: FR - Wakfu - S01E13 - Calm Blue Sea
1.plot: Having bought the boat with the kamas they earned in Bonta, Yugo and his friends go finally on the island of Oma. Only, it would seem that there is a stowaway on board of the ship, a passenger with willful intentions...

1.title: FR - Wakfu - S01E14 - Moon Island
1.plot: In the course of their trip at sea, the five friends encounter a terrible tempest and their boat is wrecked on an island. Yugo, Amalia and Evangelyne disembark in search of food, but primitive Sadida take them in hostage: these are Kaniboules! And it seems that they have the poor habit to give the foreigners in sacrifice in their godhead: big Moon... This smells bad for our heroes!

1.title: FR - Wakfu - S01E15 - Adamai
1.plot: Amalia, Tristepin and Evangélyne wake up on a tiny islet. The boat was attacked by a mythical living being, Kralamoure Géant, and sank into the abyss. By way of islet, there is a huge and green island protected by an ancient fate of invisibility. The mysterious island of Oma where there should be the true family of Yugo.

1.title: FR - Wakfu - S01E16 - The Eliacube
1.plot: Yugo continues his exploration of the island of Oma with Adamaï, his brother dragon. During this time, by surveying the caverns, the companions discover the ruins of a very ancient temple kept by a terrible dragon! Stopping at nothing, the Grouilleux de Nox heads to the island!

1.title: FR - Wakfu - S01E17 - Grougaloragran the Eternal
1.plot: The battle between the dragon Grougaloragran and Nox rages. Having been sent to the ice of the big North, Yugo and his friends wait for the end of this ultimate battle, feeling tension because it is the World of Twelve that is at stake!

1.title: FR - Wakfu - S01E18 - The Brotherhood of the Tofu
1.plot: Grougaloragram failed... Our friends have to be divided into two groups: on one hand, Ruel, Tristepin, Amalia and Evangelyne set off towards the kingdom Sadida to tell them about the threat which Nox represents, on the other Yugo and Adamaï which go looking for the Dofus in which Grougaloragran is going to reincarnate...

1.title: FR - Wakfu - S01E19 - The Sadida Kingdom
1.plot: Since the departure of Amalia, the kingdom Sadida changed. The king is away and it is therefore Armand de Sheran Sharm, the brother of Amalia who governs the kingdom. During this time, Yugo and his brother Adamaï are still in search of the Dofus of Grouraloragran, but they do not know that Nox sent a formidable enemy in their wake...

1.title: FR - Wakfu - S01E20 - The Tree of Life
1.plot: The king Sadida is in the sanctum of the Tree of life, heart of the Kingdom Sadida which is mysteriously sick. Overstepping the ban of the prince Armand, Amalia and Evangelyne go to the King to tell it about the imminent attack of the Kingdom by Nox. But things do not turn out as they had envisaged it... During this time, Ruel searches a means to get away from the prison cell into which he was unfairly thrown...

1.title: FR - Wakfu - S01E21 - Igol
1.plot: Yugo and his brother Adamaï arrive on the famous island where Grougaloragran would have hidden the Dofus. Wanting to know about it more on his powers of Eliatrope, Yugo launches into a crossing of the Desert. But It would seem that the hunter of Nox, Igôle, has arrived on the island.

1.title: FR - Wakfu - S01E22 - Rubilax
1.plot: Having hurt Evangelyne by employing from Rubilax in the Kingdom Sadida, our Iop finishes his escape in the desert and goes looking for the tomb of his ancient Master: Goultard. To his surprise, Goultard is not dead. Our Iop brain is going to discover how to become a true Shushu Guardian... He has to confront Rubilax and make him fear him.

1.title: FR - Wakfu - S01E23 - The Quest for the Dofus
1.plot: Yugo and Adamaï reach the goal of their trip finally: the secret shrine in which Grougaloragran hid his Dofus. There, they make the acquaintance of the guardian of the Dofus. But Igôle did not die, contrary to what our heroes thought...

1.title: FR - Wakfu - S01E24 - Reunion
1.plot: The kingdom Sadida is on the brink of war, getting ready for the unavoidable attack of Nox. It is necessary to prevent the clock of Xélor from teleporting to the island at all costs. Amalia and Evangelyne wait without hoping too much for the return of their companions...

1.title: FR - Wakfu - S01E25 - I Am A Legend
1.plot: Nox and his troops land on the island. The Xélor attacks without deferring more from the purpose of his crusade: Wakfu contained in the Tree of Life. But the heart of the kingdom Sadida is protected by the colossal plant wall of the protective trees. Also the The Brotherhood of Tofu is in pursuit... Together, they well intend to hold the line.

1.title: FR - Wakfu - S01E26 - Mount Zinit
1.plot: The line did not hold and final battle to protect the Tree of Life begins. Our heroes have a last trump: Yugo and his brother Adamaï entered the clock without Nox knowing with the crazy hope of taking over Eliacube, source of the power of the Xélor. Everything rests on their shoulders...

2.title: FR - Wakfu - S02E01 - Monsters and Chimeras
2.plot: Yugo is reunited with his father. Evangelyne believes that Percedal isn't dead and that she hears his voice. Ruel gets in trouble while looking for treasure underground.

2.title: FR - Wakfu - S02E02 - Rubilaxia
2.plot: Evangelyne searches for Sadlygrove and gets into a fight with Remington Smisse.

2.title: FR - Wakfu - S02E03 - Remington Smisse
2.plot: Evangelyne goes after Remington who stole Sadlygrove.

2.title: FR - Wakfu - S02E04 - Grovy's return
2.plot: Rubilax captures Amalia, Ruel and Yugo but Evangelyne and Sadlygrove come to the rescue.

2.title: FR - Wakfu - S02E05 - The Dragon-Pig
2.plot: On their way back to Sadida the gang angers the legendary Dragon-Pig.

2.title: FR - Wakfu - S02E06 - Qilby
2.plot: Yugo and Adamaï try to learn more about their people by activating the Eliacube but accidentally free Qilby.

2.title: FR - Wakfu - S02E07 - Ambush
2.plot: The group starts their new adventure by taking a cable car and has to defend it against some black ravens.

2.title: FR - Wakfu - S02E08 - Knight Justice
2.plot: Knight Justice takes Yugo and his friends prisoners because he holds them responsible for setting Rubilax free.

2.title: FR - Wakfu - S02E09 - Rushu's World
2.plot: After getting dragged into the ShuShu realm by Anathar Yugo, Sadlygrove and Remington have to fight their way out of it.

2.title: FR - Wakfu - S02E10 - Kriss la Krass
2.plot: Yugo defends Kriss Krass at court in Brakmar.

2.title: FR - Wakfu - S02E11 - The Masked Boufbowler
2.plot: The gang and Kriss Krass play Boufbowl to save him from losing his head.

2.title: FR - Wakfu - S02E12 - The Mmmmmmmmmporg
2.plot: The Masked Boufbowler changes sides. Now they have to fight the legendary Mmmmmmmmmporg.

2.title: FR - Wakfu - S02E13 - The Night of the Thirsters
2.plot: The Pandawa people got turned into mindless zombies and nearly infest the whole group around Yguo, too.

2.title: FR - Wakfu - S02E14 - The Voice Thief
2.plot: Ruel bets with the owner of an inn that he and his companions can stop the Voice Thief.

2.title: FR - Wakfu - S02E15 - Wabbit Island
2.plot: Yugo and his friends fight through a dungeon to find a boat but they don't get what they expected.

2.title: FR - Wakfu - S02E16 - The Cursed Fountain
2.plot: Evangelyne shows her soft side and the gang has to help to lift a curse off two lovers.

2.title: FR - Wakfu - S02E17 - The Council ofTwelve
2.plot: Representatives of the twelve races gather in the Sadida Kingdom to hear Qilby's story.

2.title: FR - Wakfu - S02E18 - Cléophée
2.plot: The group meets Cléophée, Evangelyne's sister.

2.title: FR - Wakfu - S02E19 - A Fistful of Kamas
2.plot: Cléophée, Ruel, Sadlygrove and Yugo search for a boot but get into trouble with some pirates.

2.title: FR - Wakfu - S02E20 - The Zinit
2.plot: Qilby shows his true face to Adamaï.

2.title: FR - Wakfu - S02E21 - The Island of the Bellaphones
2.plot: Bellaphones bewitch the boys and the girls have to save them.

2.title: FR - Wakfu - S02E22 - The Silence of the Rings
2.plot: Ruel plays dead to find a legendary treasure and the gang saves another pair of lovers.

2.title: FR - Wakfu - S02E23 - The Crimson Claws
2.plot: Yugo and his friends arrive at Crimson Claw Island but they're not the first.

2.title: FR - Wakfu - S02E24 - Phaeris the Powerful
2.plot: Yugo meets Phaeris, another dragon, who unlocks Yugo's true powers for his fight against Qilby.

2.title: FR - Wakfu - S02E25 - The Blank Dimension
2.plot: Qilby tells Yugo his story and what he plans to do with the Eliacube while the other fight against Rushu.

2.title: FR - Wakfu - S02E26 - The Eliatrope People
2.plot: Yugo meets the Eliatrope children and together they fight Qilby.

3.title: FR - Wakfu - S03E01 - Falling Down
3.plot: When a large pandawa arrives at the door of Tristepin and Evangelyne in the middle of a snowstorm, the family's life is turned upside down. Yugo and Ruel continue to seek out Adamai who has been missing since the battle against Ogrest. In the Sadida kingdom, Amalia stands vigil at the side of her dying father when Yugo and Ruel arrive bearing bad news.

3.title: FR - Wakfu - S03E02 - Like Father, Like Daughter
3.plot: Having faced off against Adamai, Tristepin, Rubilax and Elely lie at the bottom of a ravine out in the snow. Dragging her father to safety, Elely takes on the pandawa head to head. Literally. In order to save his life, Pinpin makes a deal with Rubi.

3.title: FR - Wakfu - S03E03 - Oropo's Tower
3.plot: Yugo, Amalia, Ruel, and Pinpin and Elely march towards Oropo's tower to rescue Evangelyne and Flopin. When Elely triggers a trap, the group are suspended in a temporal zone where each step ages them. Oropo probes the minds of the group, causing them to face their darkest fears.

3.title: FR - Wakfu - S03E04 - Beastly Girl
3.plot: The gang, traumatized by the time bubble, enter Oropo's tower to rescue Eva and Flopin. Inside they meet an Osamodas girl, who tries to convince Elely that Oropo and his brotherhood are actually good.

3.title: FR - Wakfu - S03E05 - A Iop Hides Himself to Cry
3.plot: The gang arrive at the Iop floor of the tower, which turns out to be protected by a corrupted Goultard, who goes by the name, "Dark Vlad". Percedal decides to fight him on his own and the fight brings back some memories of the moments the two of them shared.

3.title: FR - Wakfu - S03E06 - The Ecaflip's Scratching Post
3.plot: Yugo, Amalia, Ruel, and Elely arrive at the Ecaflip floor of the tower. Its protector is Kerubim and Atcham's brother, Ush. Being an Ecaflip, he loves to gamble and invites the gang to play a deadly game.

3.title: FR - Wakfu - S03E07 - Pinball Hazard
3.plot: The gang continue their journey to the top of the tower. At the Feca floor, they encounter a demigod named Bump. He is willing to let them pass without fight, but he has a peculiar condition: he wants Yugo, Ruel and Amalia's pants to add to his underwear collection.

3.title: FR - Wakfu - S03E08 - Arpagone
3.plot: Arriving at the Enutrof floor, the gang find four doors, so they decide to split up in order to find the exit quicker. Along his way, Ruel reminisces about his youth and a girl he once loved named Arpagone. Ruel encounters Arpagone, who takes him captive so that a fake one can infiltrate the group. The Fake Ruel converses with Yugo about his love for Amalia, wondering if she'd ever feel the same ever she ever stopped the stubborn princess routine.

3.title: FR - Wakfu - S03E09 - The Sadida Temple
3.plot: Yugo, Amalia, Elely, and fake Ruel arrive at the Sadida floor wherethey meet the Demi-God of the race, revealing that she doesn't want to fight, but to talk. She discovers the Fake Ruel among their party and captures him. Arpagone tries to convince the real Ruel to join her and Oropo. Evangelyne and Flopin manage to escape their prison but are intercepted by Toxine and Echo. Echo tries to persuade them to come back, but Toxine electrocutes her and chains her up as her hate for Echo trumps everything else. She goes into a sadistic fight against Flopin and Eva and they somehow manage to fight her off but launching her into a Well of Shadows – a representation of her own soul, dark, evil, and chaotic – but she fires an energy bolt as she falls in, striking Eva in the womb and electrocuting her.

3.title: FR - Wakfu - S03E10 - When the Walls Fall Down
3.plot: Thanks to Toxine, Evangelyne goes into labor while the baby's godly powers activate, causing untold pain as she prepares to give birth with help from Echo, who is able to minimize the pain. The baby, having a demigod's strength, causes the tower to crumble from the shockwaves it emanated during labor. Only Oropo's power is preventing the tower itself from collapsing, but only barely. He sends Adamai to find the cause, finding it to be the son that is coming. He decides to keep them safe from the crumbling debris around them so that he and Echo can have a conversation later. Eva gives birth to a boy, ending the shockwaves and the pain, but the tower is in shambles. Oropo and Adamai set the pieces with those alive gently on the ground, allowing everyone to reunite and for Percedal to meet his new son. Before she could head over, however, Fake Ruel knocks out Amalia and transforms into a fake Amalia, sending the real one to Oropo.

3.title: FR - Wakfu - S03E11 - Oropo
3.plot: Along with Amalia and sharing a tender kiss, Oropo tells the story of his birth, revealing his true identity and the motivation behind his actions. When Yugo used the Eliatrope Dofus' to help Percedal battle Ogrest, he had inadvertently created a time loop in which a shadow race, the Eliotropes, were created long ago. They were essentially copies of Yugo, but they slowly began to die off, leaving Oropo as the last.

3.title: FR - Wakfu - S03E12 - The Hyperzaap
3.plot: Oropo is about to open the Hyperzaap and use it to destroy the gods. As he reveals his true intentions and the fact that he lied to everyone, with the Sadida Demi-Goddess revealing that it was he who set the world's tragedies into motion, such as Nox finding the Eliacube and Ogrest turning into the demon he was, his brotherhood of demigods start to turn against him. He uses his powers to send Yugo into a coma, where he confronts his demons in the forms of Qilby and Nox, who he had been suffering waking nightmares from since he arrived at the tower.

3.title: FR - Wakfu - S03E13 - Inglorium
3.plot: The Brotherhood of the Tofu and the demigods join forces to stop Oropo from killing the gods in a final battle that will decide the fate of the World of Twelve, and the universe. After a climatic battle, Oropo activates the Hyperzaap. In a last act of self-sacrifice, Echo uses her powers to send Yugo's group and the Demi-Gods though the Hyperzaap, leaving her and Oropo, who still loves her, to die as the Eliacube creates a massive black hole that destroys Oropo's dimension. Yugo and his friends find themselves in Inglorium, the realm of the gods.

4.title: FR - Wakfu - S04E01 - Far from the World
4.plot: As strange eyes appear over different regions of the World of Twelve, the Brotherhood of the Tofu moves through the devastated landscape of Ingloriom towards a temple bathed in an intriguing glow. They have no idea who they're about to meet in the ruins of this dimension, let alone the revelations that await Yugo in the only temple left standing.

4.title: FR - Wakfu - S04E02 - The Goddess of Love
4.plot: Inside the temple, the Goddess Eliatrope welcomes her sons and their friends. Still exhausted from their recent fight with Oropo, the group decides to split up and return to the World of Twelve.

4.title: FR - Wakfu - S04E03 - A New World
4.plot: Back in the Sadida Kingdom, Amalia learns some tragic news. Meanwhile, Yugo is getting to know his sister a little better. Far across the World of Twelve, an old man continues his journey. And at the Stroud home, Ruel wakes up to a very unpleasant surprise.

4.title: FR - Wakfu - S04E04 - The Assembly
4.plot: The World of Twelve's leaders gather in response to recent events. Accompanied by his mother, Yugo tries to explain their reasoning to the assembled dignitaries. Unfortunately, his words don't have the desired effect. Meanwhile, a new threat draws closer to the Sadida Kingdom.

4.title: FR - Wakfu - S04E05 - Necromas
4.plot: As Necros approach Albuera Island, Armand and Amalia are horrified to see the destruction that the creatures have wrought in their kingdom. But that's only the start of the troubles that Yugo and his friends will soon be drawn into. Elsewhere, the Sadlygrove family receives a most unusual visit.

4.title: FR - Wakfu - S04E06 - RotalStröm
4.plot: Amalia and Yugo, confronted with a new wave of Necros in the Sadida Kingdom, try to repel the assault. Meanwhile, on Albuera Island, another attack is underway, led by an enormous Necro Dragon. The monsters are getting dangerously close to shore.

4.title: FR - Wakfu - S04E07 - Toross Mordal
4.plot: Evangelyne takes the time to listen to Madagaskane, despite a bit of hesitation. Meanwhile, Yugo starts negotiations with the leaders of the World of Twelve to get their help against the Necros.

4.title: FR - Wakfu - S04E08 - Traitor
4.plot: Convinced that Qilby is involved in the appearance of the Necro portals, Yugo tries to confront him. He and his friends then travel to the Necroworld where they meet a powerful being with a thirst for Wakfu.

4.title: FR - Wakfu - S04E09 - Lokus
4.plot: Yugo finds himself trapped in the Necroworld at the mercy of Toross Mordal, who has no qualms about subjecting him to various forms of vicious torture. Meanwhile, at the Eliatrope Temple, things take a rough turn for the rest of the group when Qilby disappears with the six Eliatrope Dofus.

4.title: FR - Wakfu - S04E10 - My Brother, My King
4.plot: Nora finds herself in a difficult spot as the fight between Qilby and Lokus continues in the Eliatrope Temple. Meanwhile, Yugo, still imprisoned by the Necros, is locked in a fierce battle with himself.

4.title: FR - Wakfu - S04E11 - Together
4.plot: Yugo gathers all the members of the Brotherhood of the Tofu. After reuniting with Ruel and then the Sadlygrove family, Yugo and his friends return to the Sadida Kingdom to prepare for the final assault against the Necros.

4.title: FR - Wakfu - S04E12 - Armand
4.plot: The Necros' attack on the Sadida Kingdom is imminent. The Brotherhood of the Tofu is ready to face them, together with the Eliatrope and the Sadida armies. The final battle to defend the Sadida Kingdom has begun. Yugo and his friends do everything they can to push back the Necros, but they're in for an epic battle gainst these Wakfu-devouring monsters.

4.title: FR - Wakfu - S04E13 - Consecration
4.plot: The war with Necros continues... Yugo and his friends must redouble their efforts to stop Toross Mordal and his army. Peace will never return to the World of Twelve until the invasion of the Wakfu eaters has been thwarted.

meta.plot: La travailleuse acharnée Woo Hyun Jin (Roh Jeong Eui) et le rebelle Sun Tae Hyung (Bae In Hyuk) ne se croisent normalement pas, mais leurs vies se retrouvent entremêlées quand leurs frère et sœur aînés décident de se marier. Mais trois ans plus tard, un tragique accident de voiture bouleverse tout : devenus les tuteurs de leur neveu commun Woo Joo, ils doivent apprendre à cohabiter.

1.title: FR - Our Universe [VOSTFR] - S01E01 - Episode 1

meta.plot: Cachés au cœur de Berlin, Simon et Meret, deux anciens espions, dirigent un refuge appelé « Le Nid ». Lorsqu'une menace qu'ils pensaient éliminée les rattrape, ils doivent soudainement se cacher des tueurs à gages, des agents russes, des services secrets allemands (BND), de leurs anciens amants et de toutes les personnes à qui ils ont fait du tort, tout en essayant de préserver leur mariage.

1.title: FR - Unfamiliar - S01E01 - Sixteen Years
1.plot: When Meret and Simon are called away from their daughter's birthday to receive a wounded agent in their safe house, the man immediately raises red flags.

1.title: FR - Unfamiliar - S01E02 - The Truth After
1.plot: After setting a trap to see who's after them, Meret and Simon are each confronted with a familiar face, complicating their efforts to keep their cover.

1.title: FR - Unfamiliar - S01E03 - Belarus
1.plot: Gregor's life hangs by a thread. Meret discovers another one of Simon's lies. Julika begins to suspect the presence of a mole inside the BND.

1.title: FR - Unfamiliar - S01E04 - What Have We Done?
1.plot: While Simon confides in Katya and Meret strikes out on her own to gain a new ally, Koleev doubles his efforts to draw them out in the open.

1.title: FR - Unfamiliar - S01E05 - StarFish
1.plot: Julika digs deeper into the Belarus connection. Katya arranges a meeting with Koleev, leading him right to the doorstep of Meret and Simon.

1.title: FR - Unfamiliar - S01E06 - Still Alive
1.plot: Unable to let go, Koleev descends upon the safe house with everything he's got. Meret and Simon will have to trust each other in order to survive.

meta.plot: Cinq femmes s’unissent pour sortir de la galère et braquent une banque, déguisées en hommes. Un shot d’adrénaline et 36 280 euros plus tard, ces braqueuses amatrices sont obligées de recommencer. Très vite, les politiques, la police et les voyous se lancent à leurs trousses, bien loin d’imaginer que derrière ce groupe de mercenaires se cachent des femmes ordinaires… Les Lionnes sont nées.

1.title: FR - Cash Queens - S01E01 - A Tidy Sum
1.plot: In dire need of money, best friends Rosalie and Kim decide to rob a bank. Along the way they pick up more partners in crime — and more problems.

1.title: FR - Cash Queens - S01E02 - Lethal Weapons
1.plot: With the cops and Ezéchiel determined to catch the bank thieves, Rosa's instructions not to spend any money go unheard as she tries to ditch the guns.

1.title: FR - Cash Queens - S01E03 - On the Nose
1.plot: Fresh off a second heist, Rosa fears that a trail of evidence could lead back to her. Mayor Marionnaud uses a funfair to put the squeeze on Ezéchiel.

1.title: FR - Cash Queens - S01E04 - Thirty Million Friends
1.plot: As Alex gets the gang ready for the Castel heist, Rosa starts to second-guess their plan. A fired-up Ezéchiel goes on the hunt for their getaway car.

1.title: FR - Cash Queens - S01E05 - Gone in 30 Seconds
1.plot: Sofia comes up with a genius storage solution, while her ex sees some compromising footage. Under pressure, Kim feeds Ezéchiel false information.

1.title: FR - Cash Queens - S01E06 - Mission Almost Impossible
1.plot: A lost suitcase causes even more stress for the gang. Victor's father puts Rosa to the test and Ezéchiel takes something very precious from Marionnaud.

1.title: FR - Cash Queens - S01E07 - Breathless
1.plot: The friends' getaway doesn't go as planned. As Sofia tries to throw Malik off Rosa's scent, Marionnaud pulls out the big guns and takes aim at Trévise.

1.title: FR - Cash Queens - S01E08 - The Queens' Endgame
1.plot: As the women defend Trévise like lionesses, Ezéchiel trains up his new crew and the police prepare a bust to take down the bank thieves - alive or dead.

meta.plot: Le quotidien d'un groupe d'employés de la SPA dont la vie est compliquée par le fait que les relations avec les animaux sont simples, mais pas celles avec les humains !

1.title: FR - Animal Control - S01E01 - Weasels and Ostriches
1.plot: Shred encounters a wild weasel in an attic. Frank slips his Slim Jim in Shred's back pocket as they approach a dozen ostriches.

1.title: FR - Animal Control - S01E02 - Rabbits and Pythons
1.plot: A tech geek tells Frank his rabbits got into his special chocolate bars. Frank and Shred find a python wrapped around a man's neck.

1.title: FR - Animal Control - S01E03 - Cougars and Kangaroos
1.plot: Animal Control dispatch radios with a cougar sighting. Amit squares off with a kangaroo.

1.title: FR - Animal Control - S01E04 - Dogs and Bears and Minks
1.plot: Animal Control receives a 9-1-1 call on a bear in a hot tub. Frank questions his night with Dolores.

1.title: FR - Animal Control - S01E05 - Cows and Raccoons
1.plot: Frank and Shred respond to a call of a distressed cow at a fraternity house. Patel learns a wholesome detail about Victoria's personal life.

1.title: FR - Animal Control - S01E06 - Skunks and Llamas
1.plot: Emily and Victoria assist Dr. Summers with an alpaca birth. Frank and Patel visit Frank's dad Jimmy.

1.title: FR - Animal Control - S01E07 - Peacocks and Pumas
1.plot: Frank and Victoria stakeout a squawking peacock. Emily and Patel attend to Shred.

1.title: FR - Animal Control - S01E08 - Hellhounds and Sturgeons
1.plot: Victoria and Patel encounter Fish and Game officers while on a call. Animal Control dispatch radios with a report of an aggressive attack dog on the loose.

1.title: FR - Animal Control - S01E09 - Dogs and Geese
1.plot: Animal Control dispatch radios with a goose on the loose. The precinct hosts an adoption day.

1.title: FR - Animal Control - S01E10 - Pigs and Minks
1.plot: The team welcomes back Patel even though he is still on suspension. Shred and Victoria are called into the principal's office on a school visit. Rick heads back into the field with Frank.

1.title: FR - Animal Control - S01E11 - Birds and Foxes
1.plot: Frank battles with the idea of getting older when Templeton benches him on the basketball team. Rick asks Emily out on a date, just as Shred realizes he might have a thing for her.

1.title: FR - Animal Control - S01E12 - Unicorns and Mountain Lions
1.plot: When the precinct's beloved mountain lion C-38 dies, Frank takes it especially hard. Shred tries to break up with Camilla before he ruins his chances with Emily.

2.title: FR - Animal Control - S02E01 - Raccoons and Mutts
2.plot: When Shred wallows over Emily's blossoming relationship with Rick, Frank decides to cheer him up with a special "Shred's Day" adventure. The group is shocked to learn Victoria is in a green card marriage, and her 'husband' wants a divorce. Emily spins out when she discovers that Animal Control Officers are not considered "essential workers," and Patel tries desperately to satisfy his pregnant wife's craving for movie theater popcorn.

2.title: FR - Animal Control - S02E02 - Cats and Monkeys
2.plot: Shred's on the rebound, but Frank doesn't share his newfound enthusiasm for dating. Emily enlists the team's help beating Templeton's precinct in an animal adoption competition. Patel stumbles on an investment opportunity, and Victoria waits on the world's longest phone hold to set up her citizenship test.

2.title: FR - Animal Control - S02E03 - Tortoises and Labradors
2.plot: Frank unearths an illegal animal smuggling ring while Shred's first night shift introduces him to the world of Furry parties. Victoria has a secret admirer, and Emily is hellbent on helping her figure out who it is. Patel and Templeton get stuck working together for the day.

2.title: FR - Animal Control - S02E04 - Big Dogs and Mini Horses
2.plot: Frank is frustrated when Emily, who is a stickler for rules, accompanies him on an official Animal Control ride along but she ends up being an unlikely partner in his exotic animal ring investigation. Victoria and Patel go on a call to a local baseball stadium, where they discover Victoria's unique talent could be just the thing she needs to get her immigration visa. Shred and Patel become owners of their flip house and want to celebrate by throwing a party - unfortunately they pick the worst possible day to do it.

2.title: FR - Animal Control - S02E05 - Dogs and Chickens
2.plot: When Emily hires expert dog trainer Roman Park to help with the kennel dogs, Roman ends up disrupting the office dynamics. Frank is challenged for his long-held union rep position by Patel. Shred learns Bettany doesn’t like him, so he sets out to figure out why and win her over. Emily must stand up to the neighbor who is complaining about the barking dogs.

2.title: FR - Animal Control - S02E06 - Bunnies and Veggies
2.plot: When Frank gets frustrated trying to meet women on dating apps, he asks Emily to set him up on an old-fashioned meet-in-person date. When they learn how expensive contractors are, Shred and Patel decide to start renovations on their investment property themselves and immediately run into problems.

2.title: FR - Animal Control - S02E07 - Skunks and Swans
2.plot: Frank and Shred head to a country club to take on an aggressive swan that Frank has a history with. At the golf course, Shred has a meet-cute with a mysterious woman. Emily makes a mistake that results in Victoria having very little time to prepare for her big citizenship exam. Patel enlists his father to help Victoria cram for the test.

2.title: FR - Animal Control - S02E08 - Bulls and Potbellies
2.plot: Frank and Emily get a break in their exotic animal ring case. Shred and Rick bond over their romantic woes. Victoria and Patel's father accidentally kiss.

2.title: FR - Animal Control - S02E09 - Beagles and Lemurs
2.plot: Frank's investigation reaches a thrilling conclusion, only for an unexpected twist to throw his victory into question. Emily finds herself in an awkward position when she realizes she still has feelings for Shred.

3.title: FR - Animal Control - S03E01 - Giraffes, Gorillas and Penguins
3.plot: The crew must contain a freak zoo break; Frank realizes that he needs to break up with Yasmin; Emily finds an unexpected benefactor in a celebrity businesswoman.

3.title: FR - Animal Control - S03E02 - Rattlers and Gators
3.plot: Afraid he won't play nice with her rich new benefactor, Emily tries to keep Frank away from her; Patel's newfound celebrity pushes Victoria's patience to the limit when he's chosen to throw out the first pitch at a minor league game.

3.title: FR - Animal Control - S03E03 - Goats, Snakes, and Dogs
3.plot: Frank is tasked with taking a dog to "the farm," but instead jailbreaks the pup to find it a new forever home; Victoria tries to teach Shred how to break the rules; Patel has a life-changing encounter with a therapy goat.

3.title: FR - Animal Control - S03E04 - Baby Kangaroos and Chickens
3.plot: Frank and Victoria compete to win Fiona's affections at the new kennels' fundraiser; Emily gets some very bad advice from Bettany on her speech; Patel and Shred find themselves facing the world's most charming squatter.

3.title: FR - Animal Control - S03E05 - Hot Dogs and Lobsters
3.plot: Trivia night turns wild for Animal Control when Frank and Emily team up; Victoria's sister visits from New Zealand; Patel finally garners attention when he subs in as bartender.

3.title: FR - Animal Control - S03E06 - Buffalo and Beavers
3.plot: Frank's ongoing prank war with Templeton reaches new heights; Victoria intervenes when Emily tries to get closer on her relationship with Rick; Patel's job as interim supervisor goes sideways.

3.title: FR - Animal Control - S03E07 - Ducks and Penguins
3.plot: When Emily faces mounting pressure from the head of Animal Control, Frank and Shred must finally wrangle the elusive escaped penguin Oreo; Victoria and Patel must deliver a dog across the border into Canada.

3.title: FR - Animal Control - S03E08 - Party Animals
3.plot: When Fiona breaks up with both Frank and Victoria, they throw a rager at her mansion in retaliation while Emily tries to figure out her employees’ secret relationships. Also, Patel’s vision for a quiet night in with Shred and Parker goes sideways.

3.title: FR - Animal Control - S03E09 - Retrievers and Fruit Bats
3.plot: Desperate to find a new benefactor for Emily's outdoor kennel initiative, Frank and Victoria appeal to an unlikely acquaintance; Shred and Isabelle pose as a married couple at the open house for Shred and Patel's flipped home.

3.title: FR - Animal Control - S03E10 - Strays and Lovebirds
3.plot: On the day of the new kennel’s groundbreaking ceremony, Animal Control discover that they don’t have any dogs left for adoption and must scour the city to fill the kennel in time. Also, Frank is concerned when he realizes that he hasn’t heard from his dad in a while.

meta.plot: Pour Marine, 8 ans, avoir une grande soeur comme Wendy, c'est l'occasion rêvée d'observer une "adonaissante" dans son milieu naturel, d'imiter son attitude trop classe, de lire son journal intime en cachette. Et quand Wendy le découvre, Marine peut admirer la colère noire d'une grande sister en furie. Pour Wendy, Marine est un enfer au quotidien capable de lui coller la honte devant tous ses amis. Le pire, c'est qu'elle sait se faire pardonner avec un simple sourire et des larmes dans les yeux. Ensemble, Marine et Wendy sont deux tornades toujours prêtes à exploser, capables de se faire des déclarations d'amour et de guerre dans la même seconde. Et quand les hostilités sont déclenchées, rien ne peut plus les arrêter !

meta.plot: Alors que la peste bubonique se propage en Italie, un petit groupe de nobles et de serviteurs se retranchent dans une villa, où leur séjour fastueux tourne rapidement au chaos.

1.title: FR - Le Décaméron - S01E01 - The Beautiful, Not-Infected Countryside
1.plot: As pestilence spreads through Florence, a group of self-centered nobles with secrets and hidden agendas flees to the countryside.

1.title: FR - Le Décaméron - S01E02 - Holiday State of Mind
1.plot: Filomena’s arrival threatens Licisca’s plan. Pampinea grows desperate to find Leonardo while Neifile awaits divine intervention.

1.title: FR - Le Décaméron - S01E03 - By Homer, It's a Winner's Wreath!
1.plot: Pampinea settles in as the lady of the house, Neifile and Panfilo receive unfortunate news and romance blossoms within the group.

1.title: FR - Le Décaméron - S01E04 - The Mood Is Soiled
1.plot: A new guest threatens Pampinea’s position. Neifile learns the truth about her husband. Filomena tries to reclaim her identity.

1.title: FR - Le Décaméron - S01E05 - Switcheroo
1.plot: The nobles and servants devise a plan to take back the villa from Ruggiero. While in exile, Licisca and Filomena try to reconcile their differences.

1.title: FR - Le Décaméron - S01E06 - A Stony Brook Away
1.plot: Neifile and Panfilo open up to each other. Tindaro bonds with Stratilia’s son. Licisca and Filomena encounter a group of mercenaries.

1.title: FR - Le Décaméron - S01E07 - This Is Awful, And You'll Never Recover
1.plot: Sirisco tries to rid the villa of Pampinea. Licisca comes to terms with her parentage. A new heir lays claim to the villa.

1.title: FR - Le Décaméron - S01E08 - We’ve Had a Good Cry
1.plot: The nobles and servants try to ensure their survival by making a deal with the mercenaries who are close to breaching the villa gates.

meta.plot: près une inondation dévastatrice, l'agent Joanna Marshall trouve un homme non identifié mort dans l'ascenseur d'un parking souterrain. La police suppose qu'il a été piégé par la montée des eaux, mais elle devient obsédée par la découverte de ce qui lui est arrivé.

1.title: FR - Déluge mortel - S01E01 - Underwater
1.plot: After discovering a body after a devastating flood, PC Jo Marshall begins investigating the man's possible murder - however, pursuing the killer will change everything for her.

1.title: FR - Déluge mortel - S01E02 - The Arrival
1.plot: Jo's actions bring an unwelcome visitor to Waterside, who threatens to expose her secret investigation.

1.title: FR - Déluge mortel - S01E03 - Connections
1.plot: Jo is troubled by Lee's connection to Tasha and Daniel, and Pat grows suspicious as she continues with her investigation.

1.title: FR - Déluge mortel - S01E04 - In Too Deep
1.plot: As the investigation escalates and suspicion builds around Tasha, Jo finally makes a breakthrough and Molly finds herself in danger.

1.title: FR - Déluge mortel - S01E05 - Gathering Storm
1.plot: With Pat now a part of her investigation, Jo and Tasha discover an unexpected side to Daniel's life and Jo closes in on the killer.

1.title: FR - Déluge mortel - S01E06 - Breaking Cover
1.plot: Jo finally gets the answers that she has been searching for, but the truth will change everything.

meta.plot: Hong Eun Jo est une jeune fille née d'un père noble et d'une mère esclave. Sous le nom de Hong Gil Dong, elle joue aussi au Robin des bois local, en pillant aux riches et donner au peuple miséreux de quoi subsister. Personne ne connait son identité, ni n'arrive à l'attraper.

1.title: FR - To My Beloved Thief [VOSTFR] - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Grand Prince Yi Yeol is on the trail of the righteous thief Gil Dong. One day, a mysterious woman named Eun Jo appears before him. Eun Jo, forced into an unwanted marriage, kisses the grand prince as if possessed! The two strangers, each hiding their true identities, begin to become infatuated with one another.

1.title: FR - To My Beloved Thief [VOSTFR] - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Yeol's heart sways after Eun Jo's kiss, and Eun Jo, too, is overcome with emotion. Meanwhile, Yeol encounters Gil Dong, whom he has been chasing, but the prince refuses to capture him?! The prince leaves a questioning message. What is his intention? The fate of the two becomes more deeply intertwined.

1.title: FR - To My Beloved Thief [VOSTFR] - S01E03 - Episode 3
FR - To My Beloved Thief [VOSTFR] - S01E04 - Episode 4
FR - To My Beloved Thief [VOSTFR] - S01E05 - Episode 5
FR - To My Beloved Thief [VOSTFR] - S01E06 - Episode 6
FR - To My Beloved Thief [VOSTFR] - S01E07 - Episode 7
FR - To My Beloved Thief [VOSTFR] - S01E08 - Episode 8
FR - To My Beloved Thief [VOSTFR] - S01E09 - Episode 9
FR - To My Beloved Thief [VOSTFR] - S01E10 - Episode 10
FR - To My Beloved Thief [VOSTFR] - S01E11 - Episode 11
FR - Bloody Flower [VOSTFR] - S01E01 - A Desperate Gamble
1.plot: There have been more than ten disappearances reported in Guam lately. While investigating, the police arrest Lee Woo-gyeom as a suspect. He confesses that he killed 17 people, and Prosecutor Cha Yi-yeon takes the case. The case looks simple, but Woo-gyeom claims something strange. Meanwhile, Woo-gyeom asks Attorney Park Han-jun to take his case.

1.title: FR - Bloody Flower [VOSTFR] - S01E02 - The Medical Miracle or Murderer?
1.plot: Han-jun suspects both Woo-gyeom's abilities and his intentions. However, after meeting an actual patient who was treated and cured by Woo-gyeom, Han-jun decides to take on the case and win it. Meanwhile, persuading Woo-gyeom's patients to testify in court proves to be difficult, and Woo-gyeom makes an unexpected move of his own to secure victory.

1.title: FR - Lord of the Flies [VOSTFR] - S01E01 - Piggy
1.plot: Piggy finds something that proves useful to the group but is hurt when his new friend breaks a promise.

meta.plot: Un policier d’une ville frontalière découvre un trafic de drogue lié à son ami d’enfance et à un réseau criminel britannique.

1.title: FR - The Borderline - S01E01 - Blue Beetle
1.plot: The aftermath of a stolen cocaine shipment upends many lives in a small 1000 Islands town - from criminals to cops to comic book nerds.

1.title: FR - The Borderline - S01E02 - Strange River
1.plot: Despite trying to cover his own tracks, things keep getting worse for Henry as Erica's investigation turns up more and more connections with Henry's past.

1.title: FR - The Borderline - S01E03 - No Loose Ends
1.plot: A New York Kingpin sends his top brass to the 1000 Islands to track down the missing drugs, while Ruby and Miles, and the drugs everyone is after, go into hiding.

1.title: FR - The Borderline - S01E04 - No Room at the No Tell Motel
1.plot: In the middle of the night, everyone finds themselves at The Heron Motel, where each room tells a different story of madness and mayhem.

1.title: FR - The Borderline - S01E05 - Bones
1.plot: A series of flashbacks shed light on Henry and Tommy's mysterious dark history together while in present day, more secrets are uncovered. Nothing stays at the bottom of the river forever.

1.title: FR - The Borderline - S01E06 - Long Time Running
1.plot: In the climactic conclusion, all of the secrets, lies and shady dealings finally come to a head, turning The Heron parking lot into an epic battlefield.

1.title: FR - The Best Immigrant [VOSTFR] - S01E01 - A Chance to Stay
1.plot: Roeland Peeters' far-right VPV party wins the election and wants to deport all non-natives. A TV producer offers Muna and Jamal one way out: participate in The Best Immigrant, with a residence permit as the prize.

1.title: FR - The Best Immigrant [VOSTFR] - S01E02 - The Inn
1.plot: Muna and Jamal end up at the Inn, the temporary home for those who survived the first game. While the contestants get to know each other and receive their assignments for the second show, co-host Tarik increasingly struggles with his conscience.

1.title: FR - The Best Immigrant [VOSTFR] - S01E03 - Important Visit
1.plot: As part of the show, the contestants receive a visit from their families, an emotional reunion. President Peeters comes by, but an incident at the Inn disrupts everything. Meanwhile, Tarik receives a phone call that offers him a way out.

1.title: FR - The Best Immigrant [VOSTFR] - S01E04 - Choosing is Losing
1.plot: Because the show is breaking ratings records, Lauren treats the contestants to dinner. Meanwhile, Tarik carries out a risky assignment for the resistance. In the fourth live show, a sudden, drastic rule change comes that puts everything on edge.

1.title: FR - The Best Immigrant [VOSTFR] - S01E05 - Resistance
1.plot: Jamal feels betrayed, while Muna becomes increasingly absorbed in the game. A new candidate unexpectedly appears. After a threat against the show, Lauren changes the penultimate challenge at the last minute, with dire consequences for the remaining players.

meta.plot: Deux adolescents de mondes différents utilisent leurs pouvoirs de ninjas pour défendre des dragons face à des méchants qui veulent utiliser leur force vitale à mauvais escient.

1.title: FR - LEGO Ninjago : Le soulèvement des dragons - S01E01 - The Merge (1)
1.plot: After a mysterious event known as "The Merge" shuffles the universe, an aspiring Ninja teams with a smart techie to navigate a new and unfamiliar world.

1.title: FR - LEGO Ninjago : Le soulèvement des dragons - S01E02 - The Merge (2)
1.plot: Arin and Sora develop new powers that just might help them confront the dragon hunters. Can the Green Ninja teach them how to harness their abilities?

1.title: FR - LEGO Ninjago : Le soulèvement des dragons - S01E03 - Crossroads Carnival
1.plot: On training day, Arin and Sora sneak out of the monastery to attend the Crossroads Carnival and uncover a villainous plot that tests their skills.

1.title: FR - LEGO Ninjago : Le soulèvement des dragons - S01E04 - Beyond Madness
1.plot: When the Bounty airship returns with no captain, Arin, Sora and Lloyd use clues to figure out what happened to Kai. Is it a trap... or something worse?

1.title: FR - LEGO Ninjago : Le soulèvement des dragons - S01E05 - Writers of Destiny
1.plot: To save Cloud Kingdom, the Ninja must work together to send a terrifying tentacled beast back where it came from and close the Mergequake — and fast!

1.title: FR - LEGO Ninjago : Le soulèvement des dragons - S01E06 - Return to Imperium
1.plot: When the Ninja meet their match in a Photac — an indestructible techno-beast — Sora believes that a mission to Imperium is the only way to destroy it.

1.title: FR - LEGO Ninjago : Le soulèvement des dragons - S01E07 - Mindless Beasts
1.plot: In Imperium, Arin mentors a group of eager young crimefighters. Sora confronts a villain from her past. Lloyd frees an Elemental Master from prison.

1.title: FR - LEGO Ninjago : Le soulèvement des dragons - S01E08 - I Will Be the Danger
1.plot: To bust the imprisoned dragons out of Imperium, the Ninja will need to work hard, think fast and find one big exit! Unless the Photacs get there first.

1.title: FR - LEGO Ninjago : Le soulèvement des dragons - S01E09 - The Calm Inside
1.plot: Sora hacks into the Imperium logs to find Riyu. Nya and Kai explore a mysterious passageway. Lloyd leads an epic battle against an army of Photacs.

1.title: FR - LEGO Ninjago : Le soulèvement des dragons - S01E10 - The Battle of the Second Monastery
1.plot: Ninja never quit! Nya, Kai and Zane give the battle against Imperium new hope while Lloyd uncovers a mystery hidden deep below the city.

meta.plot: Une employée de restauration sourde est appelée à aider un détective en lisant sur les lèvres les conversations de dangereux criminels.

1.title: FR - Code of Silence - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: A deaf catering worker who is struggling to make ends meet is called upon by a police detective superintendent to lip-read the conversations of criminals.

1.title: FR - Code of Silence - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Alison's vital lipreading aids the detectives in uncovering the gang's plans, but she can only conceal her meeting with Liam from them for so long.

1.title: FR - Code of Silence - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Alison's risky tactics identify the gang's target, but her deception and the gang's escalating violence threaten to unravel her relationship with Liam.

1.title: FR - Code of Silence - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Alison joins Liam on a luxury trip where she scrabbles for clues about his plans while torn between her growing feelings for him and the police's doubts.

1.title: FR - Code of Silence - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Alison discovers Liam's betrayal and races to stop the gang's heist - chaos erupts as lives are endangered and Alison is forced to confront the fallout.

1.title: FR - Code of Silence - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: Alison is reeling from Liam's betrayal and consumed with guilt over her role in the heist when her life is suddenly threatened by one of the gang.

1.title: FR - Domino Day - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Domino Day is a 24-year-old Londoner out on a date with finance bro Jason in a swanky Manchester bar. She works as a barista in a local coffee bar and also happens to be a witch. The type of witch who needs to feed...

1.title: FR - Domino Day - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Local coven leader Kat lures Domino to her HQ, where her ancestors possess Domino and reveal the dark truth about who she really is.

1.title: FR - Domino Day - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Domino struggles with the reappearance of her dangerous ex, who wants to pick up where they left off. Meanwhile, the coven grapples with the truth of who Domino is.

1.title: FR - Domino Day - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: With her powers becoming uncontrollably dangerous and having put Sammie in danger, Domino is forced to confront the monster within herself and ask the coven for help.

1.title: FR - Domino Day - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Happily free of both Silas and her power, a ‘human’ Domino enjoys a date with Leon. But a jealous Silas and tenacious Esme won’t let things lie, and her life is soon upended again.

1.title: FR - Domino Day - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: Domino regains her powers while Silas lures her into a trap using the coven. Determined to revive Leon and save her friends, Domino faces an explosive showdown with Esme.

meta.plot: Jeune sorcière dotée de pouvoirs extraordinaires, Domino cherche désespérément une communauté qui l'aiderait à comprendre qui elle est. Elle n'a pourtant pas besoin de chercher bien loin, car un coven de sorcières surveille déjà chacun de ses mouvements, convaincu qu'il faut l'arrêter avant que ses pouvoirs ne détruisent tout et tout le monde autour d'elle.
La série suit les survivants du cargo interstellaire endommagé Demeter 227 qui se sont échoués sur Vesta, une planète extraterrestre riche en faune et en flore, mais pleine de dangers.

1.title: FR - Scavengers Reign - S01E01 - The Signal
1.plot: After their deep-space freighter is damaged, the stranded crew of the Demeter must fight to survive on a beautiful yet dangerous planet.

1.title: FR - Scavengers Reign - S01E02 - The Storm
1.plot: As a storm rages, Sam and Ursula set out to find the Demeter, while Azi and Levi seek shelter. Meanwhile, Hollow helps Kamen revisit old memories.

1.title: FR - Scavengers Reign - S01E03 - The Wall
1.plot: While Ursula bears witness to a transformation, Azi struggles with Levi's ever-changing personality as she tries to survive a deadly stampede.

1.title: FR - Scavengers Reign - S01E04 - The Dream
1.plot: Alone and in pursuit of Sam, Ursula resorts to desperate measures, while Kamen continues his hunt amid Hollow's demands.

1.title: FR - Scavengers Reign - S01E05 - The Demeter
1.plot: After an encounter with another survivor, Kamen considers the weight of his actions, while Azi experiences a change of heart.

1.title: FR - Scavengers Reign - S01E06 - The Fall
1.plot: While Ursula faces an all-too familiar adversary, Azi and Levi find themselves pitted against a formidable new foe.

1.title: FR - Scavengers Reign - S01E07 - The Cure
1.plot: Facing mounting health issues, Ursula and Azi each find that they are not alone.

1.title: FR - Scavengers Reign - S01E08 - The Nest
1.plot: While Azi leads Kris, Terrence, and Barry towards her downed ship, Ursula struggles to keep up with an overzealous Sam.

1.title: FR - Scavengers Reign - S01E09 - The Mountain
1.plot: After reaching an insurmountable obstacle, Azi must learn to trust Kris and Barry. Meanwhile, rough waters test a newly reborn Sam.

1.title: FR - Scavengers Reign - S01E10 - The Decision
1.plot: In range of the wrecked Demeter, Azi confronts Kris about the ship's remaining survivors, while Sam delivers a devastating truth.

1.title: FR - Scavengers Reign - S01E11 - The Return
1.plot: As Ursula races to reach the ship, Azi fights to get free and Kamen faces a haunting new vision. Onboard the Demeter, Kris finally meets her match.

1.title: FR - Scavengers Reign - S01E12 - The Reunion
1.plot: In a bid to save the surviving crew, Azi and Ursula face-off against their greatest threat yet, while a conflicted Barry weighs an important decision.

meta.plot: Des talents plus grands. Des enjeux plus importants. Votre vote. Anthony Anderson anime en direct cette émission culte destinée à une nouvelle génération. La recherche est lancée.

1.title: FR - Star Search - S01E01 - The Search Begins
1.plot: The competition kicks off with head-to-head matchups in juniors music, dance, variety and music group. Champions from each category advance to Week 2.

1.title: FR - Star Search - S01E02 - From Challenger to Champion
1.plot: Head-to-head matchups continue in the juniors variety, comedy, variety and music solo categories. The field of champions is set for Week 2.

1.title: FR - Star Search - S01E03 - Meet Your Competition
1.plot: The search continues as returning champions in the music group, juniors music, variety and dance categories face a lineup of new challengers.

1.title: FR - Star Search - S01E04 - Vote With Your Remote
1.plot: The competition heats up. Fresh challengers step into the spotlight in the music solo, variety, comedy and juniors variety categories.

FR - Star Search - S01E09 - Episode 9

meta.plot: L’histoire d’amour tumultueuse entre John F. Kennedy Jr., chouchou de l’Amérique, et Carolyn Bessette, jeune cadre élégante et indépendante dans le milieu de la mode. Leur relation, instantanément électrique et indéniable, se fragilise peu à peu sous les regards incessants et le voyeurisme des médias, transformant leur vie privée en une obsession nationale. Comment la célébrité, un héritage familial lourd et une attention médiatique écrasante peuvent-ils mettre un couple en péril  ? D'après le livre "Once Upon a Time: The Captivating Life of Carolyn Bessette-Kennedy" d'Elizabeth Beller.

1.title: FR - Love Story : John F. Kennedy Jr. & Carolyn Bessette - S01E01 - Pilot
1.plot: The pressure of the Kennedy name weighs on John. Carolyn impresses at Calvin Klein. An unlikely connection forms at a charity event.

1.title: FR - Love Story : John F. Kennedy Jr. & Carolyn Bessette - S01E02 - The Pools Party
1.plot: John juggles his mother's waning health, his strained relationship with Daryl and his newfound feelings for Carolyn.

1.title: FR - Love Story : John F. Kennedy Jr. & Carolyn Bessette - S01E03 - America's Widow
1.plot: After a family tragedy, John seeks comfort from Carolyn.

1.title: FR - Love Story : John F. Kennedy Jr. & Carolyn Bessette - S01E04 - I Love You
1.plot: Carolyn struggles to assimilate into John's world; John discovers a secret.

1.title: FR - Love Story : John F. Kennedy Jr. & Carolyn Bessette - S01E05 - Battery Park
1.plot: John asks an important question. Carolyn and John publicly feud.

1.title: FR - Love Story : John F. Kennedy Jr. & Carolyn Bessette - S01E06 - The Wedding
1.plot: As press spreads of their altercation, John and Carolyn prepare for their big day. Ann voices her concerns.

1.title: FR - Love Story : John F. Kennedy Jr. & Carolyn Bessette - S01E07 - Obsession
1.plot: Carolyn suffers the consequences of being a public figure; tensions rise between Carolyn and John's family.

1.title: FR - Love Story : John F. Kennedy Jr. & Carolyn Bessette - S01E08 - Exit Strategy
1.plot: Tensions boil over after John and Carolyn discover devastating news.

1.title: FR - Love Story : John F. Kennedy Jr. & Carolyn Bessette - S01E09 - Search and Recovery
1.plot: John and Carolyn fight to keep their relationship intact; the world watches as tragedy strikes.

meta.plot: Un corps retrouvé au beau milieu de la ville. Une marque de luxe en pleine ascension. Un détective examine chaque détail du récit confus d'une femme. Que s'est-il vraiment passé  ?

meta.plot: Dans l'Istanbul des années 1970, l'amour interdit d'un homme pour une vendeuse se transforme en une obsession et un désir qui dureront toute sa vie.

1.title: FR - Masumiyet Müzesi - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: With Kemal and Sibel's long-awaited engagement arrangements underway, a chance encounter with a familiar face puts a new spring in Kemal's step.

1.title: FR - Masumiyet Müzesi - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Füsun's secret visits become more frequent — along with her worries — and Kemal finds himself blissfully slipping into unchartered territories.

1.title: FR - Masumiyet Müzesi - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: The mortality of love begins to reveal itself, when Kemal finds out that his father has been keeping a secret. Füsun receives a heartbreaking invitation.

1.title: FR - Masumiyet Müzesi - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Emotions run high at Sibel and Kemal's engagement party. While Sibel spends her time matchmaking her friends, Kemal learns that he can't have it all.

1.title: FR - Masumiyet Müzesi - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Lost in his melancholy, Kemal confesses the true nature of his time at the Merhamet Apartments. But is forgiveness enough to save his relationship?

1.title: FR - Masumiyet Müzesi - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: Füsun's invitation is veiled with heartbreak and longing, yet reveals itself to be nothing but an ulterior motive. Love is closer and further than ever.

1.title: FR - Masumiyet Müzesi - S01E07 - Episode 7
1.plot: A newspaper column brings Kemal's shame to light, but when he is ostracized by his own friends, he discovers that there are even more secrets to uncover.

1.title: FR - Masumiyet Müzesi - S01E08 - Episode 8
1.plot: When an opportunity presents itself, Kemal convinces his mother to make amends with her cousin. Finally true happiness seems within his grasp.

1.title: FR - Masumiyet Müzesi - S01E09 - Episode 9
1.plot: Kemal's museum of broken-hearted memories and trinkets of innocence becomes a physical dedication to the ultimate love story — a decade in the making.

meta.plot: Au château de Versailles, Belfort et Lupin, le chien préféré de Louis XIV et le loup des jardins, forment un duo aussi improbable qu'inséparable. Ensemble, les deux amis sont toujours prêts à voler à la rescousse de leurs compagnons à poils et à plumes, qu'ils soient des résidents de la Ménagerie royale ou des animaux sauvages. De découverte en sauvetage, Belfort et Lupin vivent des aventures palpitantes et riches en émotions.

1.title: FR - Belfort & Lupin - S01E01 - The Wig House
1.plot: Today, Mr. Binet, the royal wigmaker, is in a panic: the Queen's favorite wig has disappeared. Gazette, the mouse, is upset because this wig is her home.
