meta.plot: Berlin, 2004 : pour Yusuf, le match de football ne s'achève pas avec le coup de sifflet final, mais avec des menottes. L'accusation : série de braquages de banques. Alors que les enquêteurs exigent des noms, il doit faire face au choix ultime entre loyauté et liberté. Mais bien plus pressante que la menace d'emprisonnement est la question de savoir qui est le traître dans ses propres rangs. Yusuf comprend rapidement que dans ce jeu, rien n'est ce qu'il semble être.

1.title: FR - Banksters [VOSTFR] - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - Boys : entre deux mondes - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: After surviving a terrifying night lost in a forest, four mismatched teenage boys return home to find that things aren’t quite as they left them.

1.title: FR - Boys : entre deux mondes - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: The boys grapple with the discovery that they are now total strangers to their friends and families. Banding together, they try to get to the bottom of their terrifying predicament.

1.title: FR - Boys : entre deux mondes - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: The boys’ desperation to prove they still exist leads Sam to discover his doppelgänger.

1.title: FR - Boys : entre deux mondes - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Andy’s obsession with finding a rational explanation nearly comes to grief under the wheels of the school bus.

1.title: FR - Boys : entre deux mondes - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Felix discovers the other boys unwittingly possess the magic needed to fight the evil thing that is threatening them.

1.title: FR - Boys : entre deux mondes - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: Jake comes face to face with the father he never had, as Phoebe lays claim to the four boys.

1.title: FR - Boys : entre deux mondes - S01E07 - Episode 7
1.plot: Sam must face up to his flaws as the demon unleashes its most brazen attack yet - on Bremin High.

1.title: FR - Boys : entre deux mondes - S01E08 - Episode 8
1.plot: The boys discover the truth about Phoebe as the demon evolves to take on human form.

1.title: FR - Boys : entre deux mondes - S01E09 - Episode 9
1.plot: A trip back to the forest presents both a chance to return home as well as redemption for Andy.

1.title: FR - Boys : entre deux mondes - S01E10 - Episode 10
1.plot: Sam’s loyalty to the boys is tested to the limit when the demon targets his girlfriend, Mia.

1.title: FR - Boys : entre deux mondes - S01E11 - Episode 11
1.plot: The boys' problems are compounded when their parallel mothers all succumb to mysterious afflictions.

1.title: FR - Boys : entre deux mondes - S01E12 - Episode 12
1.plot: The boys are shattered to learn who is responsible for everything that’s happened to them.

1.title: FR - Boys : entre deux mondes - S01E13 - Episode 13
1.plot: The demon closes in for the kill as the boys finally work out how to return home.

2.title: FR - Boys : entre deux mondes - S02E01 - Episode 1
2.plot: Felix, Andy, Jake and Sam have returned home, but still the universe seems out of balance. Felix is concerned that Alice has followed them back and Andy hopes his new power will get Ellen to notice him.

2.title: FR - Boys : entre deux mondes - S02E02 - Episode 2
2.plot: Felix, Jake and Sam race against time to get Andy back from the storm that took him - before anyone notices he's missing again.

2.title: FR - Boys : entre deux mondes - S02E03 - Episode 3
2.plot: Pressure mounts on Felix, Jake and Sam as they are questioned by the police about Andy's disappearance. Meanwhile, Oscar tries to locate the Book of Shadows by making a connection to Alice.

2.title: FR - Boys : entre deux mondes - S02E04 - Episode 4
2.plot: After being beaten to Alice's Book of Shadows, Felix theorises that if they find another water element, they should regain their ability to use magic. So the boys go on the hunt for the new element.

2.title: FR - Boys : entre deux mondes - S02E05 - Episode 5
2.plot: With Saskia, their new water element, the boys do a spell to find Andy but it backfires landing Jake in serious trouble.

2.title: FR - Boys : entre deux mondes - S02E06 - Episode 6
2.plot: The search for Andy takes Felix, Jake, Sam and Ellen back to the alternate universe. But they have to be quick, Felix fears the restoring demon isn't far behind them.

2.title: FR - Boys : entre deux mondes - S02E07 - Episode 7
2.plot: Overwhelmed, Ellen tries to process their journey to the other universe and refuses to talk to Felix, while Jake is shocked to discover that Cop Gary has followed them through the portal.

2.title: FR - Boys : entre deux mondes - S02E08 - Episode 8
2.plot: The talisman is missing - Jake and Felix are at loggerheads as to where it is. Could Saskia be to blame? Meanwhile, Andy meets a cloaked figure while trying to find a way out of negative space.

2.title: FR - Boys : entre deux mondes - S02E09 - Episode 9
2.plot: The gang discover Andy is trapped in Negative Space due to Alice hacking Andy's spell; and Alice lures Oscar to the river and offers to cast a spell to make him walk again.

2.title: FR - Boys : entre deux mondes - S02E10 - Episode 10
2.plot: Alice has destroyed the talisman and everyone is in shock - now they have absolutely no way of getting Andy back. Whilst the gang debate this, a figure emerges from the bush...

2.title: FR - Boys : entre deux mondes - S02E11 - Episode 11
2.plot: Felix believes that there is a second talisman in their universe because the other talisman came from the alternate universe...and Sam has swapped bodies during the memory-wiping spell. Will the gang realise the truth before it's too late?

2.title: FR - Boys : entre deux mondes - S02E12 - Episode 12
2.plot: The gang have the second talisman and are set to bring Andy home, but Alice is determined to stop them. Meanwhile, Andy and Bear are running for their lives as their world collapses around them.

2.title: FR - Boys : entre deux mondes - S02E13 - Episode 13
2.plot: With the gang now powerless, Felix has devised his own plan to rescue Andy. He's going to ask Alice to swap him for Andy. Will the rest of the gang realise in time?

3.title: FR - Boys : entre deux mondes - S03E01 - The New Boy
3.plot: When people start to vanish on Luke's first day at school, he finds himself thrown together with an unlikely group of friends - the new Nowhere Boys. They must figure out how to save the town from becoming an empty wasteland.

3.title: FR - Boys : entre deux mondes - S03E02 - What Happened To Bremin?
3.plot: The Nowhere Boys comb the streets of Bremin for signs of life but find themselves under attack from a mysterious life force.

3.title: FR - Boys : entre deux mondes - S03E03 - We Are Not Alone
3.plot: The gang catch their mysterious stalker, who is just as confused by this strange and empty world, as they are.

3.title: FR - Boys : entre deux mondes - S03E04 - The Gang Find Magic
3.plot: The gang learn they can do magic & plan to cast a dimensional return spell, which requires sacrificing their heart's desire. They search for Brooklyn but are attacked by a monster, which they fend off using magic.

3.title: FR - Boys : entre deux mondes - S03E05 - Bates To The Rescue
3.plot: An unhinged Principal Bates is trying to make everything normal by pretending it is normal. He locks the gang in a classroom, but they finally escape and cast the dimensional return spell - will they get home?

3.title: FR - Boys : entre deux mondes - S03E06 - Are We Home Yet?
3.plot: The gang are home & everything is perfect, life couldn't be better, except for Nicco who questions if this really is their Bremin. Discovering they're actually suspended in a dream state the gang manage to wake themselves up.

3.title: FR - Boys : entre deux mondes - S03E07 - The Trouble With Ben
3.plot: The gang are definitely back home, but unbeknownst to them there are two Ben's [sic]! One good and one bad - will the gang learn the truth before Bad Ben sends them back to the Empty World?

3.title: FR - Boys : entre deux mondes - S03E08 - Back To The Empty World
3.plot: Ben 1 & Ben 2 are stranded in the empty world, & despite our gang successfully bringing them home; Ben 1 still wants to get rid of them. Ben 2 immobilises Ben 1.

3.title: FR - Boys : entre deux mondes - S03E09 - The Truth Spell
3.plot: The gang perform a truth spell on Ben 2 to ensure they can always tell the two Bens apart, but the spell backfires when Heath mixes up the words and our gang all have to tell the truth

3.title: FR - Boys : entre deux mondes - S03E10 - Unwanted Visitors
3.plot: The Mini Demons come to Bremin High and cause havoc. Our gang catch them and keep them in their school bags, but they exert a negative influence over the gang - can Ben 2 stop them before it's too late?

3.title: FR - Boys : entre deux mondes - S03E11 - The Search For Atridax
3.plot: The bags with the Atridax are missing and the gang want to use magic to find them, but Luke's under house arrest. Luke makes a trust deal with his father and the gang retrieve the bags only to have them stolen.

3.title: FR - Boys : entre deux mondes - S03E12 - Birth Of The Mega Demon
3.plot: The gang are on the hunt for the missing talisman. They realise Kayla has it, but it's too late, she's been tricked by bad Ben and gets sucked inside the Demon egg. Will Nicco be able to get her sister out?

3.title: FR - Boys : entre deux mondes - S03E13 - The Battle For Bremin
3.plot: People are disappearing and all is not right with Nicco's sister, Kayla. Realising she has part of the Demon inside, the gang trek to the forest to fight the Demon while it's incomplete. But Luke's parents have disappeared...

4.title: FR - Boys : entre deux mondes - S04E01 - We Are Not Alone Anymore
4.plot: The Nowhere Boys are back and Luke's attempts to convince the Gang that a new threat is imminent are dismissed – until the threat proves too big to ignore.

4.title: FR - Boys : entre deux mondes - S04E02 - Secrets, Lies and Parasites
4.plot: As the Gang fights off the latest threat, Jesse's preoccupation with a cyber bully puts their biggest secret at risk. When menacing creatures attack again, the Gang fight back by sending them out of this world – but at what cost?

4.title: FR - Boys : entre deux mondes - S04E03 - Lost In Negative Space
4.plot: Nicco jeopardises both the Gang's plan to rescue one of their own and her football ambition - but as Bates closes in, can Nicco redeem herself and save the day?

4.title: FR - Boys : entre deux mondes - S04E04 - The Cool Guy
4.plot: Bates is on the warpath. Convinced he is close to exposing a conspiracy gripping Bremin High, he interrogates the Gang. Will one of them crack under the pressure? Meanwhile, the arrival of a stranger puts Heath under the spotlight.

4.title: FR - Boys : entre deux mondes - S04E05 - Stranger Danger
4.plot: Desperate to get Felix's book back, the Gang search for Zeb, the mysterious stranger. But when Luke is kidnapped, they all find themselves drawn into a dangerous trap.

4.title: FR - Boys : entre deux mondes - S04E06 - Mistaken Id-Entity
4.plot: When a friend suddenly becomes an enemy the Gang are left shaken. Meanwhile Jesse confronts his cyber bully and scores an unexpected win.

4.title: FR - Boys : entre deux mondes - S04E07 - Keep Your Friends Close
4.plot: While the gang do battle with one of their own, they're forced to face some home truths. But that's not all they learn – did they have Zeb all wrong?

4.title: FR - Boys : entre deux mondes - S04E08 - Off the Map
4.plot: The Nowhere Boys take a wrong turn in their quest to find Zeb, landing them in danger and on the run. Meanwhile Ben and Ellen decode clues left by Zeb and try to find a way to bring them home.

4.title: FR - Boys : entre deux mondes - S04E09 - Doubles Trouble
4.plot: Captured, Nicco and Luke are interrogated and forced to confront alternate versions of themselves. Heath and Jesse learn that their friends are imprisoned in a high-security facility and plan a breakout.

4.title: FR - Boys : entre deux mondes - S04E10 - Attack of the Nematodes
4.plot: The Gang and their doubles join forces to try and escape their captors amidst increasing Nematode attacks, but can they repair the Talisman in time to avert tragedy and find their way home?

4.title: FR - Boys : entre deux mondes - S04E11 - The Chosen One
4.plot: The Gang contact Zeb and learn that one of them is the all-powerful Guardian of the multiverse and must travel to Negative Space to save theirs and all worlds from the Entity, the most powerful enemy they've ever faced. But who really is the Guardian.

4.title: FR - Boys : entre deux mondes - S04E12 - The Alternate World is Here
4.plot: With the Guardian in Negative Space, the Gang believe they have saved the multiverse until a catastrophic event at Bremin High suggests otherwise. Will the Gang be forced to expose their powers and magic in order to save the school?

4.title: FR - Boys : entre deux mondes - S04E13 - The Entity Face Off
4.plot: The gang arrive in Negative Space for a final showdown with the Entity – the fate of the multiverse is in their hands. If only the Guardian could rembember the plan.

meta.plot: Lors d'une sortie découverte avec le lycée, quatre lycéens se perdent en forêt et passent la nuit dans les bois. Lorsqu'ils rentrent enfin chez eux, le lendemain, leur famille ne les reconnaît plus. Que s'est-il passé dans cette forêt, cette nuit-là ? Entre incompréhension et stupeur, les quatre adolescents décident de mener leur propre enquête.

L'industrie norvégienne de l'armement est en pleine phase d'introduction de l'intelligence artificielle. Bjørn se voit confier la responsabilité d'un important contrat d'armement. Qui sera le bouc émissaire si des innocents sont tués avec ces armes ?

1.title: FR - Ammo [VOSTFR] - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - Ammo [VOSTFR] - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR - Ammo [VOSTFR] - S01E03 - Episode 3
FR - Ammo [VOSTFR] - S01E04 - Episode 4
FR - Ammo [VOSTFR] - S01E05 - Episode 5
FR - Ammo [VOSTFR] - S01E06 - Episode 6

meta.plot: Lorsqu'une jeune médecin découvre que des enfants vivant près d'une fonderie souffrent de saturnisme, elle met en péril sa carrière et sa propre sécurité pour les sauver.

1.title: FR - Les Enfants de plomb - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: As city officials prepare for a visit from General Secretary Brezhnev, they are troubled by a doctor looking into cases of anemia among local children.

1.title: FR - Les Enfants de plomb - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: As the extent of the epidemic dawns on her, Jolanta cautiously starts bringing allies to her cause — but one of them isn't being truthful with her.

1.title: FR - Les Enfants de plomb - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: After sending her family away, Jolanta goes on a tour of the smelting plant. Insinuating himself into Jolanta's life, Niedziela sets a trap for her.

1.title: FR - Les Enfants de plomb - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Much to his frustration, Niedziela's attempts to intimidate Jolanta only strengthen her resolve to move the children away from the plant.

1.title: FR - Les Enfants de plomb - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: General Secretary Brezhnev's visit sets everyone on edge. A new discovery helps Jolanta to convince parents that their children are in real danger.

1.title: FR - Les Enfants de plomb - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: When Jolanta succeeds in turning the tide against the city officials, Niedziela demands extraordinary measures to stop her.

meta.plot: J.D. et Turk travaillent ensemble pour la première fois depuis longtemps. La médecine a changé, les internes ont changé, mais leur amitié a résisté à l'épreuve du temps. Les personnages, anciens et nouveaux, naviguent dans les eaux du Sacred Heart avec humour, émotion et quelques surprises en cours de route.

1.title: FR - Scrubs [VOSTFR] - S01E01 - My Return
1.plot: John "J.D." Dorian unexpectedly finds himself back at Sacred Heart, reuniting him with new and old faces.

1.title: FR - Scrubs [VOSTFR] - S01E02 - My 2nd First Day
1.plot: J.D. navigates a new normal; Elliot and Turk clash over the budget.

1.title: FR - Scrubs [VOSTFR] - S01E03 - My Rom-Com
1.plot: Elliot faces a dilemma with a stubborn patient, while J.D. discovers online doctor reviews. Meanwhile, Turk teaches his interns about new surgical technology and unexpected life lessons.

meta.plot: Marseille, aujourd’hui. Pris dans l’effondrement d’un immeuble, Malik, un jeune Comorien, réussit à s’en sortir mais est arrêté pour possession de drogue. En prison où la guerre des clans fait rage, il doit vite trouver des alliés. Massoud, un promoteur immobilier aux activités plus ou moins légales, lui propose sa protection en échange de sa loyauté. Mais Malik se rend vite compte qu'il n'est qu'un pion dans le jeu de Massoud et qu’il devra s’emparer du pouvoir pour survivre.

1.title: FR - Un prophète - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - Un prophète - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR - Un prophète - S01E03 - Episode 3
FR - Un prophète - S01E04 - Episode 4
FR - Un prophète - S01E05 - Episode 5
FR - Un prophète - S01E06 - Episode 6
FR - Un prophète - S01E07 - Episode 7
FR - Un prophète - S01E08 - Episode 8
1.plot: In a tight spot, Malik feels the trap closing in on him, leaving him with no way out. Just as he thinks it’s all over for him, a surprise attack thwarts the plans of both Lattrache and his enemies...

meta.plot: À la fin du premier millénaire, les guerriers les plus forts et les plus cruels de leur temps se sont répandus à travers le monde entier : les Vikings. Thorfinn, le fils de l’homme réputé comme étant le plus fort des guerriers, décide de passer sa vie sur les champs de batailles malgré son jeune âge tout en rêvant d’atteindre le légendaire continent que l’on appelle « Vinland ». Dans le tourbillon d’une époque troublée, la saga d’un vrai guerrier commence.

1.title: FR - Vinland Saga - S01E01 - Somewhere Not Here
1.plot: Thorfinn, a boy living in Iceland, longs for adventure and is eager to know more about the world. He dreams of a land of paradise called Vinland that he hears about from the adventurer Leif, while he leads his peaceful life with this father Thors, a former warrior. One day, Thors saves a runaway slave and sets a series of events in motion. This is the story of a true warrior in an age of turmoil.

1.title: FR - Vinland Saga - S01E02 - Sword
1.plot: In the year 1002, the war between England and Denmark was intensifying. One day, the Jomsvikings pay a visit to Thorfinn's village in order to bring back Thors, their former commander, to prepare for the impending battle. Thors is forced to join the war in order to protect the villagers from being taken hostage, and must face his accursed past in order to save his family and his village.

1.title: FR - Vinland Saga - S01E03 - Troll
1.plot: Askeladd, the leader of a Viking army of a hundred men, receives orders from Floki of the Jomsvikings to kill Thors, who was once known as the Troll of Jom. However, the villagers, completely unaware of the order, buzz with excitement as they prepare for their first battle. Thorfinn also joins in the excitement. Thors and his men are about to embark on a difficult sea journey to England.

1.title: FR - Vinland Saga - S01E04 - A True Warrior
1.plot: Thors and his men fall for Askeladd's trap and faces a dangerous situation, but Thors defeats many of Askeladd's men with his overpowering strength. However, Thors knows that it will be difficult to save everyone, including his son, who've been living in a peaceful village their entire lives, and makes a tough decision.

1.title: FR - Vinland Saga - S01E05 - The Troll's Son
1.plot: After Askeladd kills Thorfinn's father Thors, Thorfinn hides inside Thor's ship and bides his time until the opportunity to take revenge. However, life on the ship is harsh without any food or water, and Thorfinn grows weaker day by day. One day, Thorfinn, armed with his sword, attempt to attack Askeladd in his sleep...

1.title: FR - Vinland Saga - S01E06 - The Journey Begins
1.plot: Thorfinn kills his first man. As more time goes on Thorfinn kills more men and becomes more skilled. One day when Thorfinn is in battle he gets shot with an arrow and ends up unconscious. An English woman and her daughter help him recover.

1.title: FR - Vinland Saga - S01E07 - Normanni
1.plot: Askeladd withdraws temporarily from the war against England. While searching for a new source of income, he encounters a skirmish among the Franks and hatches a plot to steal their treasure. Askeladd sends 16 years old Thorfinn, who has grown up into a cold-hearted Viking, ahead as a messenger.

1.title: FR - Vinland Saga - S01E08 - Beyond the Edge of the Sea
1.plot: After capturing the treasure from the Franks, Askeladd's men return to the village of Gorm on the Jutland Peninsula in Denmark to pass the winter. Thorfinn challenges Askeladd to a duel as a reward for bringing him the head of the captain of the clan of Franks. Even though Thorfinn has grown in skill through his experience in battle, he is still no match for Askeladd.

1.title: FR - Vinland Saga - S01E09 - The Battle of London Bridge
1.plot: In October 1013, King Sweyn leads a fleet of Danish and Viking ships in an attempt to take London Bridge of England. Askeladd's army, hired by the army of Denmark, was among them. However, after the betrayal of Thorkell the Tall, a Viking known for his overpowering strength, London Bridge has become impregnable. Askeladd tells Thorfinn he'll reward him with a duel if he's able to kill Thorkell.

1.title: FR - Vinland Saga - S01E10 - Ragnarok
1.plot: Askeladd's army separates from the army of Denmark and attacks a village 100 km to the west. Thorfinn leaves the soldiers behind in disgust and climbs up a hill overlooking the village, where he pledges revenge for his father. However, he encounters Askeladd sitting in the darkness, who tells him about "Britannia", the aging of the world, and Ragnarok, the final battle.

1.title: FR - Vinland Saga - S01E11 - A Gamble
1.plot: Thorkell takes Canute hostage and follows after the main army of Denmark. Ragnar objects to Thorkell’s plan to take on the entire army of Denmark, boasting 16,000 soldiers, with only 500 men. Thorkell then begins to tell Ragnar the story of Valhalla, the pride of Normans, a place where only those who die in battle can go.

1.title: FR - Vinland Saga - S01E12 - The Land on the Far Bank
1.plot: Askeladd and his men continue their march to escape from Thorkell. However, their march comes to a halt at the Severn River. Askeladd hands a letter to an old man operating a ferry across the river and tells him to deliver the letter to the other side immediately. As soon as he hears the addressee’s name, the old man sets off in his boat.

1.title: FR - Vinland Saga - S01E13 - Child of a Hero
1.plot: Askeladd crosses the river and escapes from Thorkell into Wales with Canute. However, Askeladd’s men are ambushed by a group of soldiers hiding behind the boulders at the border of the kingdom of Brycheiniog. Askeladd attempts to negotiate with their messenger and reveals his plan.

1.title: FR - Vinland Saga - S01E14 - The Light of Dawn
1.plot: Askeladd and his men change course and decide to return to Gainsborough, by crossing through the Earldom of Mercia in the midst of a harsh snowstorm, where the main army of Denmark awaits. The men spot a small village in the blizzard and make their move.

1.title: FR - Vinland Saga - S01E15 - After Yule
1.plot: After losing Canute, Thorkell decides to halt his advance in central England. Thorkell hears that the end of the war between Denmark and England is near, and bemoans the end of the war. However, he later gets wind of an interesting piece of news.

1.title: FR - Vinland Saga - S01E16 - History of Beasts
1.plot: Askeladd and his men are attacked by the English army in the village where they had planned to camp during the winter. Askeladd captures their captain and interrogates him to find out how the English knew where they were, and discovers that Thorkell is fast approaching. The news of Thorkell's arrival sends waves of shock among Askeladd's followers.

1.title: FR - Vinland Saga - S01E17 - Servant
1.plot: Askeladd's men continued their march to escape Thorkell. However, Torgrim and his friends were hatching a plot to switch sides and join Thorkell, taking Canute with them. Torgrim finally launches his rebellion and corners Askeladd, negotiating with him to hand over Canute, then Thorkell arrives in the midst of the confusion.

1.title: FR - Vinland Saga - S01E18 - Out of the Cradle
1.plot: Thorfinn and Thorkell agree to have a duel over the fate of Askeladd. Thorkell looks forward to facing off against Thors’s son, Thorfinn, and asks him what a true warrior really is. Meanwhile, Canute is suddenly ambushed while he attempts to escape, and has a dream about a certain individual.

1.title: FR - Vinland Saga - S01E19 - United Front
1.plot: Thorfinn suffers a serious injury in his fight against Thorkell. Thorfinn is told to think about what he has to do to beat Thorkell. Askeladd treats Thorfinn’s wounds so that he may fight again someday, and proposes a joint strategy to help the two of them survive longer.

1.title: FR - Vinland Saga - S01E20 - Crown
1.plot: Thorfinn suffers a serious injury in his fight against Thorkell. Thorfinn is told to think about what he has to do to beat Thorkell. Askeladd treats Thorfinn’s wounds so that he may fight again someday, and proposes a joint strategy to help the two of them survive longer.

1.title: FR - Vinland Saga - S01E21 - Reunion
1.plot: Canute’s party arrives in York to attend the Imperial Council. Although Canute had wanted to strike out against King Sweyn, the King was being guarded by the most powerful Jomsviking unit in the Northern Sea while keeping a close eye on Canute. With the situation strained to the breaking point, Askeladd comes up with a plan. Meanwhile, Thorfinn is reunited with a person who knew his former self.

1.title: FR - Vinland Saga - S01E22 - Lone Wolf
1.plot: Thorfinn begins his duel against Askeladd with Canute and Thorkell as witnesses. However, Thorfinn is unable to strike as he stands overwhelmed by the extraordinary mood that overtakes Askeladd after Bjorn's departure. Having noticed Thorfinn's hesitation, Askeladd lays down his sword and provokes Thorfinn into an unarmed fight, which incites Thorfinn's fury.

1.title: FR - Vinland Saga - S01E23 - Miscalculation
1.plot: After the assassination attempt on Canute’s life, rumors spread through York saying that the king is trying to kill Canute. As a result, the king is unable to issue any orders that would put Canute in harm, and Askeladd is pleased that everything is proceeding as planned. However, the tables turn when King Sweyn speaks. Meanwhile, Thorfinn is sent to prison as punishment for disturbing the peace.

1.title: FR - Vinland Saga - S01E24 - End of the Prologue
1.plot: Askeladd comes forth before King Sweyn and implores him to halt his invasion of Wales. Meanwhile, Thorfinn decides to return home at Leif’s urging. However, the moment before he boards the ship, Thorfinn catches a glimpse of a single tern taking off into the sky...

2.title: FR - Vinland Saga - S02E01 - Slave
2.plot: Einar lives peacefully in northern England with his mother and sister, but then one day, their village comes under attack.

2.title: FR - Vinland Saga - S02E02 - Ketil's Farm
2.plot: Einar and Thorfinn are told to convert a wild forest into a wheat field; and if they succeed, they will have the chance to buy their own freedom.

2.title: FR - Vinland Saga - S02E03 - Snake
2.plot: The farm guards convince Ketil’s 17-year-old son that he needs to make his first killing to become a man.

2.title: FR - Vinland Saga - S02E04 - Awakening
2.plot: After everything that happened, Einar asks Thorfinn if he's ever fought in a war — and if he's ever killed a man.

2.title: FR - Vinland Saga - S02E05 - Path of Blood
2.plot: After the sudden turn of events, young Canute must rise up to claim the throne to a kingdom much reduced and under attack.

2.title: FR - Vinland Saga - S02E06 - We Need a Horse
2.plot: Thorfinn and Einar are working themselves to the bone to clear the forest, but there's only so much they can do without the help of horses.

2.title: FR - Vinland Saga - S02E07 - Iron Fist Ketil
2.plot: Thieves have been stealing food from Ketil's farm. Meanwhile, Ketil's eldest son Thorgil returns home.

2.title: FR - Vinland Saga - S02E08 - An Empty Man
2.plot: Thorfinn has nightmares almost every night, but he can never remember what he dreamed about — and that bothers him.

2.title: FR - Vinland Saga - S02E09 - Oath
2.plot: Thorfinn wakes up in a peaceful place and he sees his father again. But then things quickly turn dark, and Thorfinn must face his painful past.

2.title: FR - Vinland Saga - S02E10 - The Cursed Head
2.plot: Finally, after three long years, Einar and Thorfinn chop down the final tree in the forest. With hope in their hearts, they talk about the future.

2.title: FR - Vinland Saga - S02E11 - Kings and Swords
2.plot: While in Jelling, Ketil, Thorgil and Olmar meet a man named Leif Erikson who is searching for Thorfinn, the son of his close friend.

2.title: FR - Vinland Saga - S02E12 - For Lost Love
2.plot: Olmar feels insulted by Canute's messenger and, encouraged by his older brother Thorgil, takes matters into his own hands.

2.title: FR - Vinland Saga - S02E13 - Dark Clouds
2.plot: Einar says that even if he gains his freedom, he wants to stay near Arnheid. Snake hears news of a slave who killed his owners, and is now on the run.

2.title: FR - Vinland Saga - S02E14 - Freedom
2.plot: A runaway slave appears on Ketil's farm, claiming to be Arnheid's husband. But before he can free her, he's confronted by Snake.

2.title: FR - Vinland Saga - S02E15 - Storm
2.plot: Arnheid comes to the fortress where Gardar is imprisoned. She wants to see her husband and treat his injuries.

2.title: FR - Vinland Saga - S02E16 - Great Purpose
2.plot: As Snake intensifies his search, Arnheid tells Einar and Thorfinn everything she's done. Knowing the risks, Einar and Thorfinn offer to help her.

2.title: FR - Vinland Saga - S02E17 - The Road Home
2.plot: Snake strikes quickly, surprising Thorfinn with his speed and agility. As he lies wounded, Gardar thinks back on the life he shared with Arnheid.

2.title: FR - Vinland Saga - S02E18 - The First Method
2.plot: After returning home to his farm, an exhausted Ketil starts searching for Arnheid, only to find out what happened in his absence.

2.title: FR - Vinland Saga - S02E19 - The Battle of Ketil's Farm
2.plot: Amidst the confusion of a peasant uprising, Thorfinn and the others try to escape, carrying a severely injured and pregnant Arnheid.

2.title: FR - Vinland Saga - S02E20 - Pain
2.plot: As Thorfinn and Einar head for their escape, Arnheid regains consciousness and asks where they are going — and if there are slaves and wars there, too.

2.title: FR - Vinland Saga - S02E21 - Courage
2.plot: The battle has left heartbreaking casualties in its wake. Though Thorgil and Ketil's wife want to continue the fight, Canute demands their surrender.

2.title: FR - Vinland Saga - S02E22 - The King of Rebellion
2.plot: Snake tries to put a stop to it, but Thorfinn insists on receiving all 100 blows from Canute's brutish guard Drott, shocking the rowdy onlookers.

2.title: FR - Vinland Saga - S02E23 - Two Paths
2.plot: Thorfinn and Einar have said their piece, but Canute stubbornly refuses to give up Ketil's Farm. Then, Thorfinn breaks the standoff with a decision.

2.title: FR - Vinland Saga - S02E24 - Home
2.plot: At long last, Thorfinn returns to Iceland and finds a moment of happiness, reunited with his loved ones. But soon, he opens up about his next journey.

meta.plot: Franck et ses amis passent leurs weekends à chasser ensemble. Ils se retrouvent un jour face à un groupe de chasseurs qui les prend pour cible sans raisons apparentes. L’un d’entre eux est touché. Franck et ses amis répliquent puis réussissent à s’échapper de justesse. Ils décident de garder l'incident secret, et Franck tente de reprendre une vie normale aux côtés de sa femme Krystel. Mais très vite, le groupe se sent observé, et pire, traqué par ces hommes qui semblent prêts à tout pour se venger...

1.title: FR - Traqués - S01E01 - Day of Hunting
1.plot: A hunting accident escalates into deadly violence, forcing Franck and his friends to cover their tracks.

1.title: FR - Traqués - S01E02 - The Return
1.plot: Anxiety mounts as the group receives threats from unseen enemies. Franck comes up with a new plan to level the playing field.

1.title: FR - Traqués - S01E03 - Collateral Damage
1.plot: A spike in violence has the valley on edge. Franck's loved ones begin to face the consequences of his secrets.

1.title: FR - Traqués - S01E04 - Mountain Law
1.plot: Franck and the group make a desperate deal to save one of their own.

1.title: FR - Traqués - S01E05 - Positional Warfare
1.plot: As the group braces for retaliation, Franck tries to reason with their enemies. Aya winds up in a life-or-death situation.

1.title: FR - Traqués - S01E06 - The Assault
1.plot: With no room left for negotiation, the two sides finally collide in an explosive showdown.

meta.plot: Lucas alias Lux, 18 ans, geek surdoué du code, se fait humilier par d’autres étudiants à peine arrivé dans sa prestigieuse école d’ingénieurs. Pour se venger, il va utiliser un de ses talents, « stalker », à savoir pénétrer leurs téléphones et ordis, y compris celui d’Alma, objet de tous ses fantasmes. Lux devient celui qu’il a toujours rêvé d’être, avant qu’il ne soit pris à son propre jeu.

1.title: FR - Stalk - S01E01 - Wei or die
FR - Stalk - S01E02 - Let’s stalk
FR - Stalk - S01E03 - Xmas party
FR - Stalk - S01E04 - Fifty shades of stalk
FR - Stalk - S01E05 - Stalke-me
FR - Stalk - S01E06 - The perfect meme
FR - Stalk - S01E07 - To stalk, stalk, stalk
FR - Stalk - S01E08 - It-girl
FR - Stalk - S01E09 - Ensi is watching you
FR - Stalk - S01E10 - Stalk of shame

FR - Stalk - S02E02 - Episode 2

1.title: FR - Marshals - S01E01 - Piya Wiconi
1.plot: Kayce Dutton reunites with an old SEAL teammate and aids his Marshal unit in hunting down a bomber targeting Broken Rock Reservation. The trail leads to a dangerous encounter with an armed anti-government militia.

1.title: FR - Marshals - S01E02 - Zone of Death
1.plot: As Kayce tries to embrace his new beginning, a Marshals op to stop a domestic terror attack lands him in a valley of buried Dutton family skeletons. While confronting his past, he must also learn to ingratiate himself with his new Marshals teammates.

1.title: FR - Marshals - S01E03 - Road to Nowhere
1.plot: When a standoff between Broken Rock and local ranchers over a mine groundbreaking turns violent, the Marshals launch a manhunt to find the shooters.

1.title: FR - Marshals - S01E04 - The Gathering Storm
1.plot: Kayce and Cal search for survivors of a helicopter crash while the rest of the team tries to clear Kayce's name in a use of force complaint.

1.title: FR - Marshals - S01E05 - Lost Girls (1)
1.plot: When Kayce and Tate cross paths with an old friend of Tate's from the rez, Hayley, who exhibits behavior consistent with a trafficking victim, Kayce throws himself into tracking her down rather than committing to commemorating Monica.

1.title: FR - Marshals - S01E06 - Out of the Shadows (2)
1.plot: After losing the trail of teen trafficking victims, Kayce must tell Tate that his friend may be gone for good. When the Marshals learn the girls are in the hands of a violent motorcycle gang, they launch a dangerous op to infiltrate the gang.

1.title: FR - Marshals - S01E07 - Family Business
1.plot: When a federal judge and her family are the targets of a car bomb, the Marshals are assigned to guard them. Family secrets start to surface as the Marshals start to look into why someone would want this family dead.

1.title: FR - Marshals - S01E08 - Blowback
1.plot: The Marshals go manhunting after receiving a tip that a dangerous fugitive is on the loose. Kayce and Cal struggle to reckon with their time at war when a former SEAL brother, Garrett, drifts back into their lives as they hunt a vicious enemy.

meta.plot: Le ranch du Yellowstone derrière lui, Kayce Dutton rejoint une unité des U.S. Marhals. Cowboy et ancien Navy SEAL, il apporte la justice dans le Montana. Lui et ses coéquipiers sont le dernier rempart de la région dans la guerre contre la violence.
Un agent israélien sort de sa retraite pour traquer un militant palestinien qu'il pensait avoir tué, ce qui déclenche une série d'événements chaotiques.

1.title: FR - Fauda - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Discovering that Abu Ahmed will attend his brother's wedding, Doron joins his old team for a covert strike, but the plan quickly goes off the rails.

1.title: FR - Fauda - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Having tasted action again, Doron pleads with Moreno to rejoin the squad. Meanwhile, Amal determines to martyr herself to avenge her husband.

1.title: FR - Fauda - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Abu Ahmed leans on Walid to organize an immediate retaliatory attack, and Doron and Nurit go undercover to close in on their quarry.

1.title: FR - Fauda - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Doron sets his sights on recruiting Shirin to his cause. Abu Ahmed risks his life to see his wife, and Moreno sends the team on a daring daytime raid.

1.title: FR - Fauda - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: A senior Israeli officer tries to smoke Abu Ahmed out of hiding. Ali fights suspicions of duplicity, and Boaz joins the squad on a risky ambush.

1.title: FR - Fauda - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: Blamed for the disastrous ambush, Doron takes matters into his own hands and asks the team to join him on a mission to set things right.

1.title: FR - Fauda - S01E07 - Episode 7
1.plot: While Moreno tries to track down the rogue team, Doron sinks his hooks deeper into Shirin and takes drastic measures to make a prisoner exchange.

1.title: FR - Fauda - S01E08 - Episode 8
1.plot: In the wake of the prisoner exchange, Doron disappears. Walid confronts Abu Ahmed about his tactics, and Moreno's boss threatens to dissolve the team.

1.title: FR - Fauda - S01E09 - Episode 9
1.plot: While suspicions grow between Abu Ahmed and his inner circle, Doron poses as a would-be suicide bomber to get perilously close to his target.

1.title: FR - Fauda - S01E10 - Episode 10
1.plot: Doron gets a surprise visitor while waiting to learn his fate. Abu Ahmed lays out his master plan that could change the region's balance of power.

1.title: FR - Fauda - S01E11 - Episode 11
1.plot: Doron's bosses give him the go-ahead to carry out his plan, but he discovers the toll his family has paid for his obsession with Abu Ahmed.

1.title: FR - Fauda - S01E12 - Episode 12
1.plot: While the team scrambles to give Doron backup on his mission into the lion's den, Walid makes a decision that could change everything.

2.title: FR - Fauda - S02E01 - Episode 1
2.plot: Doron joins his old team for an operation to take out the mastermind behind a bombing attack -- and who also wants revenge against Doron himself.

2.title: FR - Fauda - S02E02 - Episode 2
2.plot: Tensions rise on both sides as Doron's team intensifies its hunt and Abu Samara hands Al Makdasi an ultimatum. Shirin faces tough questions.

2.title: FR - Fauda - S02E03 - Episode 3
2.plot: Rebuked by Walid, Al Makdasi doubles down on his renegade plan to exact revenge. Doron goes rogue during an operation to offer Shirin a way out.

2.title: FR - Fauda - S02E04 - Episode 4
2.plot: Nidal's plan takes an unexpected lethal turn and backs him into a corner. Shirin reaches out to Doron, putting them both at risk.

2.title: FR - Fauda - S02E05 - Episode 5
2.plot: Doron scrambles to protect his family when Nidal gets too close. Shirin puts a dangerous plan in motion. Walid learns some distressing news.

2.title: FR - Fauda - S02E06 - Episode 6
2.plot: Sensing a chance to strike, Nidal regroups and leads a nighttime raid. While Walid faces interrogation, Doron takes Shirin under his wing.

2.title: FR - Fauda - S02E07 - Episode 7
2.plot: Nidal defends his new allegiance to Samir. Captain Ayub blackmails Abu Samara into helping him lay a trap. Sagi's nerves jeopardize a mission.

2.title: FR - Fauda - S02E08 - Episode 8
2.plot: After discovering Nidal's true loyalties, Abu Maher joins in the effort to track him down. Captain Ayub and Naor escalate their plan to break Walid.

2.title: FR - Fauda - S02E09 - Episode 9
2.plot: With Doron grieving a loss, Shirin faces tough questions and the team carries out a rogue operation to get answers. Nidal sends Maher on a mission.

2.title: FR - Fauda - S02E10 - Episode 10
2.plot: Worried that Doron is sinking into despair, the team rallies to galvanize him to action. Samir confronts Nidal. Abu Maher makes a discovery.

2.title: FR - Fauda - S02E11 - Episode 11
2.plot: An operation to bring down Nidal backs the team into a lethal corner. Abu Maher makes a heartrending decision, and Captain Ayub learns critical intel.

2.title: FR - Fauda - S02E12 - Episode 12
2.plot: Doron faces a fresh threat as the scope of Nidal's unfolding plan becomes clear, while the team and Abu Samara move to intervene before time runs out.

3.title: FR - Fauda - S03E01 - Episode 1
3.plot: Doron goes undercover in a risky, months-long operation, but his mission takes a sharp turn when surprise intel points to an imminent attack.

3.title: FR - Fauda - S03E02 - Episode 2
3.plot: The search for Fauzi intensifies in the wake of the attack. Doron goes back undercover but faces heightened suspicion and scrutiny.

3.title: FR - Fauda - S03E03 - Episode 3
3.plot: Abu Mohammed gives Jihad a menacing ultimatum. A raid turns unexpectedly lethal. Doron pushes to extract Bashar to safety as the walls close in.

3.title: FR - Fauda - S03E04 - Episode 4
3.plot: Jihad and Nasser act when an impulsive decision sends Bashar deeper into jeopardy. Avihai faces tough questions about the raid. Hila opens up to Doron.

3.title: FR - Fauda - S03E05 - Episode 5
3.plot: With Doron and his team close on their heels, an increasingly desperate Bashar and Jihad follow an audacious plan to elude capture.

3.title: FR - Fauda - S03E06 - Episode 6
3.plot: As the search for the hostages intensifies, Hila turns to an old asset, and Doron's squad prepares for one of its riskiest covert operations yet.

3.title: FR - Fauda - S03E07 - Episode 7
3.plot: A hostage takes matters into his own hands, making the team's stealth mission even more urgent. Bashar learns the distressing truth about his situation.

3.title: FR - Fauda - S03E08 - Episode 8
3.plot: Saddled with a new responsibility, Jihad sees a chance to change his family's circumstances. Abu Mohammed faces fallout from the hostage debacle.

3.title: FR - Fauda - S03E09 - Episode 9
3.plot: Hila pushes the envelope after the team's operation goes sideways, forcing Eli into a fraught decision. Doron faces a dire choice of his own

3.title: FR - Fauda - S03E10 - Episode 10
3.plot: Rejoined by an old ally, the team leans on Abu Mohammed while preparing for an all-out assault. Bashar discovers a deception and makes a desperate move.

3.title: FR - Fauda - S03E11 - Episode 11
3.plot: Hardened, Bashar resolves to use Doron's own strategy against him. The team mourns a loss. Doron confronts Hila over her heat-of-the-moment decision.

3.title: FR - Fauda - S03E12 - Episode 12
3.plot: Eli sends the team back into the field with a new member, while Bashar's plan for a knockout punch races toward a jolting end.

4.title: FR - Fauda - S04E01 - Episode 1
4.plot: A robbery attempt in Jenin puts Dana on a questionable cell's trail. Gabi asks Doron, still isolated from his old team, to travel with him to Brussels.

4.title: FR - Fauda - S04E02 - Episode 2
4.plot: In the aftermath of a crisis, Eli mobilizes the unit to join Doron in Belgium. Omar's sister Maya and her husband face unexpected questions.

4.title: FR - Fauda - S04E03 - Episode 3
4.plot: The squad presses forward in their search for Gabi, leading to a high-stakes operation in a crowded apartment block. Nurit confesses a secret to Doron.

4.title: FR - Fauda - S04E04 - Episode 4
4.plot: Upon his return, Doron refuses to believe the worst. Maya begins receiving mysterious messages. Dana, hunting for Adel, puts pressure on a new source.

4.title: FR - Fauda - S04E05 - Episode 5
4.plot: In the aftermath of the attacks, Shin Bet mobilizes for revenge while Raphael pitches Doron on a new mission. Sagi reacts to unexpected news.

4.title: FR - Fauda - S04E06 - Episode 6
4.plot: Doron and Maya begin a long journey. The fallout from Sagi's unauthorized plan to lure Adel out of hiding leaves the team divided and at risk.

4.title: FR - Fauda - S04E07 - Episode 7
4.plot: When information leaks to their adversaries in Lebanon, Maya and Doron improvise to reach their destination. Omar faces a painful dilemma.

4.title: FR - Fauda - S04E08 - Episode 8
4.plot: Dana receives a crucial tip that leads Eli's team to a garage in Jenin. Maya finally reaches Aisha, but finds that her mission isn't over yet.

4.title: FR - Fauda - S04E09 - Episode 9
4.plot: A shocking revelation changes the stakes and the plan for Doron. Eli, despite his doubts, signs on for one more mission. Haj moves a valuable asset.

4.title: FR - Fauda - S04E10 - Episode 10
4.plot: Every second counts as the squad, using Omar's intelligence, races to stay ahead of Haj and recover Gabi before his captors move him out of Lebanon.

4.title: FR - Fauda - S04E11 - Episode 11
4.plot: Maya and her family gather in mourning, while Adel moves forward with a plan to strike back. Gabi struggles to process his time as a hostage.

4.title: FR - Fauda - S04E12 - Episode 12
4.plot: Omar's funeral in Jenin provides a morbid opportunity for Shin Bet as they pursue Adel, sending Doron and his teammates into danger once again.

meta.plot: Lorsqu'une professeure de lettres développe une obsession pour un séduisant nouveau collègue, son mariage et sa carrière – déjà compliqués – basculent dans le chaos.

1.title: FR - Le Délicieux Professeur V. - S01E01 - We Have Always Lived in the Castle
1.plot: As her husband faces scrutiny for his past affairs with students, M finds herself drawn to Vladimir, her captivating — and much younger — new colleague.

1.title: FR - Le Délicieux Professeur V. - S01E02 - The Awakening
1.plot: M resorts to drastic measures to get John's hearing delayed, as cocktails and campus chats deepen her bond with Vlad.

1.title: FR - Le Délicieux Professeur V. - S01E03 - Enormous Changes at the Last Minute
1.plot: M tries to ingratiate herself with Cynthia by hosting a pool party. Sid comes clean with her parents about what's really going on.

1.title: FR - Le Délicieux Professeur V. - S01E04 - Bad Behavior
1.plot: Sid joins on to support John's case. M resorts to desperate measures to delay a hearing and has a surprisingly frank conversation with Cynthia.

1.title: FR - Le Délicieux Professeur V. - S01E05 - Play It as It Lays
1.plot: M ponders an ambiguous emoji and plots a meeting with an ulterior motive. Sid's attempt to defuse Lila's testimony quickly goes south.

1.title: FR - Le Délicieux Professeur V. - S01E06 - Because It Is Bitter and Because It Is My Heart
1.plot: Facing fallout from John's indiscretions and the cold shoulder from her colleagues, M takes her case directly to the student body.

1.title: FR - Le Délicieux Professeur V. - S01E07 - Everything That Rises Must Converge
1.plot: M finally gets her chance to be alone with Vlad — and finds herself in over her head when she doesn't want their lunch date to end.

1.title: FR - Le Délicieux Professeur V. - S01E08 - Against Interpretation
1.plot: A retreat to the countryside gets complicated as M and Vlad contemplate their writing, their marriages and their wildly uncertain futures.

meta.plot: Cette série de téléréalité suit les aventures immobilières de la famille Kretz, qui aide ses clients à acheter et vendre de superbes maisons en France et à l'étranger.

1.title: FR - L'Agence - L'immobilier de luxe en famille - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Olivier and his sons visit a splendid castle designed by the acclaimed Jacques Garcia. Later, Valentin shows a modern marvel accessible via speedboat.

1.title: FR - L'Agence - L'immobilier de luxe en famille - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: The Kretzes work on their family goals with a team-building coach. In Ibiza, Valentin gets resourceful when a property tour is abruptly canceled.

1.title: FR - L'Agence - L'immobilier de luxe en famille - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Sandrine shows her savoir faire as she copes with challenging specs. A busy Valentin must dash from Paris to idyllic Île de Ré for Martin's big day.

1.title: FR - L'Agence - L'immobilier de luxe en famille - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: New to sales, Louis strives to prove himself. Sandrine helps a scout find a gem of a location for a luxury event. Martin and Ève ponder a big move.

1.title: FR - L'Agence - L'immobilier de luxe en famille - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Sandrine and Valentin race to find a sunny west Paris home for a large family. Grappling with Martin's news, the Kretzes plan Olivier's birthday bash.

2.title: FR - L'Agence - L'immobilier de luxe en famille - S02E01 - Episode 1
