5.title: FR - L'Agence - L'immobilier de luxe en famille - S05E01 - Episode 1
5.plot: Martin visits two stunning villas on Lake Como. As Valentin and Charina prepare to leave New York, Raphaël impresses Olivier with his newfound skills.

5.title: FR - L'Agence - L'immobilier de luxe en famille - S05E02 - Episode 2
5.plot: The Kretzes aim to land the priciest property in France. Raphaël confides in Majo and iconic street artist, Mr. Brainwash, seeks a Parisian pied-à-terre.

5.title: FR - L'Agence - L'immobilier de luxe en famille - S05E03 - Episode 3
5.plot: Louis gets close to nature outside Madrid as Valentin views a château in Cognac with Tony Parker. Alexandre's business advice doesn't please everyone.

5.title: FR - L'Agence - L'immobilier de luxe en famille - S05E04 - Episode 4
5.plot: As Sandrine and Olivier jet off to Brazil, Valentin and Raphaël hit the red carpet in Cannes. Later, Martin's brothers and friends prepare a surprise.

5.title: FR - L'Agence - L'immobilier de luxe en famille - S05E05 - Episode 5
5.plot: After enjoying courtside seats at Roland Garros, Valentin mixes business with pleasure in the Philippines. Back in Paris, Martin does his job too well.

5.title: FR - L'Agence - L'immobilier de luxe en famille - S05E06 - Episode 6
5.plot: Raphaël visits a private island in Brittany with world-renowned cellist Camille Thomas. Majo is in her element on set as she films her first big role.

5.title: FR - L'Agence - L'immobilier de luxe en famille - S05E07 - Episode 7
5.plot: As the agency pulls out all the stops for an exclusive property on Faubourg St. Honoré, Martin searches for a charming seaside hotel for an Italian chef.

5.title: FR - L'Agence - L'immobilier de luxe en famille - S05E08 - Episode 8
5.plot: DJ Myd sets Raphaël a near-impossible challenge. As Olivier and Sandrine mark their 40th anniversary in Granada, Alexandre makes a daring proposition.

meta.plot: Lorsqu'un corps non identifié est retrouvé dans l'appartement luxueux d'Oliver Kennedy et de sa petite amie Ciara Wyse, les inspecteurs Lee Reardon et Karl Connolly retracent la liaison fatale du couple au cours des 56 derniers jours.

1.title: FR - 56 jours - S01E01 - Chapter 1
1.plot: Working class Ciara begins to fall for rich, handsome Oliver after a chance encounter. 56 days later, Detectives Lee and Karl encounter a gruesome homicide. Did Ciara and Oliver's highly-charged romance end in murder?

1.title: FR - 56 jours - S01E02 - Chapter 2
1.plot: Oliver rushes headlong into a romance with Ciara despite red flags on both sides. Karl spots Lee in a mysterious encounter with a suspect while they work to investigate the identity of both the victim and the killer.

1.title: FR - 56 jours - S01E03 - Chapter 3
1.plot: Oliver's paranoia grows when Ciara moves into his upscale apartment. Lee keeps a secret from Karl, but makes a key discovery in the search for the killer.

1.title: FR - 56 jours - S01E04 - Chapter 4
1.plot: Oliver and Ciara's twisted romance intensifies as she gets closer to accessing his multi-million dollar fortune. Lee admits the truth about Linus Finch while she and Karl track down a stalker.

1.title: FR - 56 jours - S01E05 - Chapter 5
1.plot: In the midst of a city-wide holiday celebration, altered states and a prying journalist push Oliver and Ciara to their breaking point. Lee and Karl circle a new suspect as they close in on the identity of the body in the bathtub.

1.title: FR - 56 jours - S01E06 - Chapter 6
1.plot: Oliver spirals as Shyla forces Ciara to make a hard decision. Karl and Lee confront personal demons that threaten their partnership.

1.title: FR - 56 jours - S01E07 - Chapter 7
1.plot: The incident at Narrow River sends shockwaves through Oliver and Ciara's lives. Lee and Karl discover the truth, but face brutal consequences.

1.title: FR - 56 jours - S01E08 - Chapter 8
1.plot: Karl and Lee put together some final pieces to truly understand everything about Oliver and Ciara's intense, charged and fatal love affair.

meta.plot: Baki et les maîtres de l'arène souterraine se retrouvent face à une menace d'envergure historique : le plus grand samouraï du Japon, Musashi Miyamoto, a été ramené à la vie.

1.title: FR - BAKI-DOU : Le samouraï invincible - S01E01 - The Unstoppable Yawn
1.plot: With the greatest father-son battle on earth concluded, Baki experiences overwhelming boredom. Meanwhile, Tokugawa advances his unprecedented experiment.

1.title: FR - BAKI-DOU : Le samouraï invincible - S01E02 - THE BEAT
1.plot: As the other martial artists battle restlessness, Kaoru Hanayama asks Tokugawa for a favor. Deep underground, the cloning project enters its final phase.

1.title: FR - BAKI-DOU : Le samouraï invincible - S01E03 - The Countenance of Musashi
1.plot: As Professor John accepts Sabuko's arcane methods against scientific reasoning, Hanayama gears up for an all-out fistfight with Yujiro on Tokyo's streets.

1.title: FR - BAKI-DOU : Le samouraï invincible - S01E04 - Boy
1.plot: After facing Japan's greatest modern swordsman, the peerless Musashi Miyamoto demands the most skilled fighters in the country. Baki steps forward.

1.title: FR - BAKI-DOU : Le samouraï invincible - S01E05 - Otherworldly Strength
1.plot: Baki unleashes his fastest strike — but the samurai is faster. Later, as Musashi roams the city, his actions catch the attention of other martial artists.

1.title: FR - BAKI-DOU : Le samouraï invincible - S01E06 - Real Sword
1.plot: The first to move is Doppo Orochi. After a brief tussle, he asks Musashi to use a real blade. How will God's Hand fare against the sword saint's steel?

1.title: FR - BAKI-DOU : Le samouraï invincible - S01E07 - Feather
1.plot: Sea King Retsu arrives to face Musashi and trains intensively under the watchful eye of Sea Emperor Kaku to master the secret technique: Xiaoli.

1.title: FR - BAKI-DOU : Le samouraï invincible - S01E08 - You Are Defeated!
1.plot: The battle between kenpo master Retsu and sword master Musashi Miyamoto begins! While Retsu unleashes long-range weapon attacks, Musashi closes in!?

1.title: FR - BAKI-DOU : Le samouraï invincible - S01E09 - Sea King Retsu
1.plot: Barely standing after Musashi's barrage of brutal attacks, Retsu forces his broken body forward and adopts a familiar stance. Can he turn the tide?

1.title: FR - BAKI-DOU : Le samouraï invincible - S01E10 - Sekigahara
1.plot: The deathmatch between Retsu and Musashi comes to a devastatingly brutal conclusion. Baki visits Izo Motobe for guidance and flies into a rage.

1.title: FR - BAKI-DOU : Le samouraï invincible - S01E11 - Buddy
1.plot: After defeating Japan's kendo champ, Musashi faces jujutsu master Goki Shibukawa, who greets the samurai with a firm handshake — and a punch to the face.

1.title: FR - BAKI-DOU : Le samouraï invincible - S01E12 - Tough Body
1.plot: The strongest being on Earth clashes with the strongest samurai in history at the Tokugawa estate! Yujiro demands Musashi face him with two swords.

1.title: FR - BAKI-DOU : Le samouraï invincible - S01E13 - Practical Fighter
1.plot: Jack Hammer arrives at the Tokugawa estate hoping to fight Musashi, but first must defeat Motobe, who's determined to be the next to take on the samurai.

1.title: FR - Jojo's Bizarre Adventure: Steel Ball Run - S01E01 -

meta.plot: Sur un campus universitaire, un auteur gère une relation complexe avec sa fille.

1.title: FR - Rooster - S01E01 - Release the Brown Fat
1.plot: Writer Greg Russo arrives at Ludlow College to support his daughter Katie as her marriage begins to implode.

1.title: FR - Rooster - S01E02 - Trousers
1.plot: When Katie's future at Ludlow is thrown into question, Walt offers Greg a deal to keep them both on campus.

1.title: FR - Rooster - S01E03 - White Whale
1.plot: While Greg endures his first day of teaching at Ludlow, Katie struggles with her suspension. Later, Archie decides to help Sunny find a suitable advisor, and Dylan is presented with an unexpected new opportunity.

1.title: FR - Rooster - S01E04 - Angry, Like An Angry Person
1.plot: To avoid Walt's party, Greg throws himself into helping a student. With her suspension lifted, Katie contemplates casual dating.

1.title: FR - Rooster - S01E05 - Mr. Razzles
1.plot: When his ex-wife Beth shows up for a dedication ceremony on campus, Greg starts to backslide into old habits. Later, Katie reconnects with Archie, and Dylan finds herself flourishing in her new role.

1.title: FR - Rooster - S01E06 - Cop Hawk
1.plot: While relishing in his new fling, Greg offers a struggling Tommy a place to crash. Later, Katie confronts the student behind some personal campus graffiti, Dylan impresses Walt in her new role, and Sunny wrestles with a prestigious job offer.

1.title: FR - Rooster - S01E07 - All the Dogs' Names
1.plot: Greg, Cristle, and Tommy attempt a return to normalcy after an embarrassing mishap. Meanwhile, Archie meets Sunny's father, Walt offers Dylan a new position following Dean Riggs' return, and Katie deals with her evolving feelings for Archie.

1.title: FR - DTF St. Louis - S01E01 - Cornhole
1.plot: When Clark and Floyd learn that both their marriages have stalled, they begin to explore a new dating app for extramarital affairs.

1.title: FR - DTF St. Louis - S01E02 - Snag It
1.plot: After meeting at the cornhole party, Clark quickly hits it off with Floyd's wife Carol. Later, detectives Homer and Plumb dig deeper into Clark's relationship with Carol – and Floyd's time on the DTF app.

1.title: FR - DTF St. Louis - S01E03 - The Go Getter
1.plot: When Detective Plumb discovers that Carol has lied about key details of her affair, she presses Homer to let her question Clark. Once in the hot seat, unsettling truths about Clark's relationships with both Floyd and Carol begin to come to light.

1.title: FR - DTF St. Louis - S01E04 - Missouri Mutual Life & Health Insurance Company
1.plot: Eager to please, Clark ramps up his support for Floyd's health and financial wellness, while Carol makes her lover swear to secrecy.

meta.plot: Dans cette série à l'humour noir, un triangle amoureux entre trois adultes en proie au mal-être de la quarantaine conduit à la mort de l'un d'eux.

1.title: FR - Colosio: Assassinats Politiques [VOSTFR] - S01E01 - Episode 1

meta.plot: Cette série documentaire se penche sur l'un des événements politiques les plus controversés du Mexique : l'assassinat, en 1994, du candidat à la présidence Luis Donaldo Colosio. Elle explore l'enquête, les contradictions et les questions restées sans réponse qui entourent cette affaire.

1.title: FR - R.J. Decker [VOSTFR] - S01E01 - Pilot
1.plot: After a stint in prison, disgraced photographer RJ Decker returns to South Florida to reinvent himself as a private investigator. His first case pulls him into the eccentric and corrupt world of professional bass fishing, where he must navigate local conspiracies with the help of his journalist ex-wife and a mysterious Everglades hermit.

1.title: FR - R.J. Decker [VOSTFR] - S01E02 - Twenty Pounds of Clem in a Ten-Pound Bag
1.plot: Wish enlists RJ's help on a bizarre case when his late cellmate's son is wrongly accused of murder.

1.title: FR - R.J. Decker [VOSTFR] - S01E03 - The Needle and the Damage Done
1.plot: R.J. is recruited by Emi to investigate the disappearance of a wealthy rehab tycoon's son; Mel and Catherine discover they have different views on parenting and finances.

1.title: FR - R.J. Decker [VOSTFR] - S01E04 - In Vanity Veritas
1.plot: R.J. finds himself at the center of a suburban housewife murder mystery; Catherine worries that R.J. is getting too close to Emi.

meta.plot: RJ Decker, photographe de presse et ancien détenu tombé en disgrâce, se lance en tant que détective privé dans le milieu criminel haut en couleur du sud de la Floride. Il s'attaque à des affaires aussi étranges que bizarres, avec l'aide de son ex journaliste, de sa femme, inspectrice de police, et d'une mystérieuse nouvelle bienfaitrice, une femme de son passé qui pourrait bien être sa plus grande alliée… ou son aller simple pour la prison.
En 1981, à Birmingham, un groupe de jeunes se bat pour choisir sa propre voie, chacun ayant besoin de la seconde chance que leur offre la musique.

1.title: FR - This Town [VOSTFR] - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: 1981, and Birmingham explodes. Dante, in love, wanders into a riot. He finds himself in a new world, surprising, dangerous, but full of opportunity.

1.title: FR - This Town [VOSTFR] - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: A funeral brings together different sides of Dante’s family – Irish rebels and Jamaicans – and reunites him with his cousin Bardon, who can sing.

1.title: FR - This Town [VOSTFR] - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: There's no escape from the past. Skinhead Tyro seeks out Dante to avenge his beating, and Special Branch target Bardon and see an opportunity to use Gregory.

1.title: FR - This Town [VOSTFR] - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Jeannie finds a warehouse where the band start to rehearse and forge an identity. Gregory schemes to keep his brother and Bardon safe.

1.title: FR - This Town [VOSTFR] - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Dante seeks out new experiences to fuel his songwriting, embracing danger as he exposes himself to feelings and risks. Eamonn threatens to drag Bardon back into his dark world.

1.title: FR - This Town [VOSTFR] - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: The pressures that formed the band threaten to destroy it before it gets on stage, bedevilled by their inner demons as much as by outside forces.

1.title: FR - L'École des licornes : Révélations - S01E01 - Un-Welcome Back
1.plot: Back at the academy, Sophia wrestles with her guilt about the past as a dazzling Fairy Tiara sparks a quest for six gems to defend the island.

1.title: FR - L'École des licornes : Révélations - S01E02 - The Fairy Gemstones
1.plot: Valentina tells the tale of how unicorn magic began as the crew finds a map showing where the gems are, pointing to Whispering Willows and Prism Beach.

1.title: FR - L'École des licornes : Révélations - S01E03 - Sneaky Snookers
1.plot: With the next Fairy Gemstone on the line, an intense training game against the Rubies turns dangerous — and the Sapphires test how far they'll go to win.

1.title: FR - L'École des licornes : Révélations - S01E04 - Sick and Fired
1.plot: While Val's sick in bed, the crew sets out on a swashbuckling quest up Mount Equus that brings grim illusions, forcing the Sapphires to trust each other.

1.title: FR - L'École des licornes : Révélations - S01E05 - The Grirnorian Gambit
1.plot: Drawn into Grimoria in search of the final gem, the Sapphires face dark enchantments and a leadership clash that puts their unicoms and mission at risk.

1.title: FR - L'École des licornes : Révélations - S01E06 - Big Trouble
1.plot: Wildstars brush with grim magic brings a healer with a familiar face, while a hurtful betrayal leaves Sophia with a choice that could change everything.

1.title: FR - L'École des licornes : Révélations - S01E07 - The Solaira Festival
1.plot: With the Solaira Festival afoot, Sophia braves dark magic and a secret alliance to save her friends as Serena's spellbinding show puts everyone in peril.

1.title: FR - L'École des licornes : Révélations - S01E08 - The Fairy Tiara
1.plot: While Serena and Ravenzella battle for the Fairy Tiara, the Sapphires leam its true power. Is their bond the key to restoring Unicorn Island's magic?

meta.plot: Une nouvelle année apporte son lot de mystères magiques, et une aventure audacieuse met le courage des Saphirs à l'épreuve. C'est la rentrée à l'École des licornes!

1.title: FR - One Piece : Les bonus - S01E01 -
FR - One Piece : Les bonus - S01E02 -
FR - One Piece : Les bonus - S01E03 -
FR - One Piece : Les bonus - S01E04 -
FR - One Piece : Les bonus - S01E05 -

meta.plot: Les histoires troublantes de Québécois confrontés à de véritables cauchemars à l'étranger.

1.title: FR - Victimes à l'étranger - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - Victimes à l'étranger - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR - Peaky Blinders - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Birmingham, 1919. Thomas Shelby controls the Peaky Blinders, one of the city's most feared criminal organisations, but his ambitions go beyond running the streets. When a crate of guns goes missing, Thomas recognises an opportunity to move up in the world.

1.title: FR - Peaky Blinders - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Thomas fixes a horserace, provoking the ire of local kingpin Billy Kimber. He also starts a war with gypsy family the Lees. Meanwhile, Inspector Campbell carries out a vicious raid of Small Heath in search of the stolen guns.

1.title: FR - Peaky Blinders - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Thomas Shelby plans to go to Cheltenham races in order to get closer to Billy Kimber. Knowing the gangster's appetite for beautiful women, Thomas invites Grace to accompany him. Meanwhile some IRA sympathisers approach Thomas with an offer to buy the stolen guns.

1.title: FR - Peaky Blinders - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Thomas Shelby's war with the Lee family of gypsies escalates, and Campbell puts further pressure on him to deliver the stolen guns. Meanwhile Thomas's brother John plans to marry a former prostitute, but Thomas suspects that she's still on the game.

1.title: FR - Peaky Blinders - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Thomas Shelby has to deal with an IRA chief who has come to Small Heath to avenge his cousin's death. Meanwhile Campbell gets closer to the stolen guns, and Grace has to decide whether her loyalties lie with him or with Thomas.

1.title: FR - Peaky Blinders - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: As Thomas Shelby prepares to oust Billy Kimber, hidden secrets are revealed and the family have to face up to the problems that have divided them. Meanwhile, Campbell, obsessed with taking down the Peaky Blinders, unleashes one last plan to destroy them.

2.title: FR - Peaky Blinders - S02E01 - Episode 1
2.plot: Business is booming for the Peaky Blinders, as Shelby starts expanding both his legal and illegal operations. He plans for the future, looking at managing a race track in the South. He soon comes across some new adversaries, testing him in very different ways. Back in Birmingham, Shelby's home town is challenged by members of his family reacting to the upturn in their fortunes. A enemy from his past also returns hoping to exact their plan of revenge of biblical proportions.

2.title: FR - Peaky Blinders - S02E02 - Episode 2
2.plot: Tommy offers to help Polly by searching for her children, who long ago were taken from her. In London, Tommy risks his life by meeting enigmatic leader Alfie Solomons. Meanwhile Arthur continues to feel the devastating effects of the Great War.

2.title: FR - Peaky Blinders - S02E03 - Episode 3
2.plot: Tommy hatches a plan to take control of the southern racecourses. He also meets the aristocratic May Carleton, and sees an opportunity to move up in the world. Meanwhile both Major Campbell and London gangster Darby Sabini plan Tommy's downfall.

2.title: FR - Peaky Blinders - S02E04 - Episode 4
2.plot: Arthur leads the Peaky Blinders takeover of London's Eden Club. Sabini decides to put old feuds to one side, convincing Alfie to one side to get rid of the Peaky Blinders. Tommy hires May Carleton to train his race horse, and the pair become fast friends. In Birmingham, Michael joins the family firm, hoping to help Tommy's businesses become more legitimate. Whilst Tommy's insecurities are intensified as he discovers what Major Campbell wants him to do.

2.title: FR - Peaky Blinders - S02E05 - Episode 5
2.plot: Arthur and Michael both end up arrested and imprisoned. As Tommy's base in London is obliterated. Major Campbell has Tommy and his family under his thumb. Polly compromises herself hoping to secure Michael's freedom, but their relationship may be beyond repair at this point. Someone from Tommy's past pays him a visit, opening old wounds and leaving him to make a impossible decision.

2.title: FR - Peaky Blinders - S02E06 - Episode 6
2.plot: As derby day arrives, Tommy is faced with impossible decisions as he plans to strike back at his enemies and take the family business to another level. Meanwhile, Major Campbell has one final card to play - one that he is certain will bring about Tommy's demise.

3.title: FR - Peaky Blinders - S03E01 - Episode 1
3.plot: Thomas Shelby’s wedding day has arrived at last, but while his guests enjoy the celebrations he has important business to conduct, as a mysterious stranger makes their presence known.

3.title: FR - Peaky Blinders - S03E02 - Episode 2
3.plot: Tommy goes to London to meet the wildly eccentric and volatile Duke Leon and soon discovers the extreme lengths his new paymasters are willing to go to in their quest for power. In Birmingham a personal dispute with the Italians threatens to explode into a devastating war.

3.title: FR - Peaky Blinders - S03E03 - Episode 3
3.plot: Responding to the Italians’ actions, Tommy is set on a path of deadly vengeance that could take him to his darkest place yet, and threatens to splinter the family. As Arthur struggles with his conscience, Linda implores him to stop his illicit work with the Peaky Blinders.

3.title: FR - Peaky Blinders - S03E04 - Episode 4
3.plot: Tommy takes his brothers on a hunting expedition and shares some  important family news. He also outlines his intentions for the most  daring criminal act the Peaky Blinders have ever undertaken.

3.title: FR - Peaky Blinders - S03E05 - Episode 5
3.plot: As the Russians test the Peaky Blinders men in their own distinctive and  debauched way, Tommy realises that he is being seriously outmanoeuvred.  Desperate for help, he rekindles a business relationship with a  dangerous former acquaintance.

3.title: FR - Peaky Blinders - S03E06 - Episode 6
3.plot: As Tommy prepares to commit the most audacious crime  of his career, an unexpected blow is struck, putting him under  unbearable pressure. As he faces his worst fears he needs help more than ever, but is increasingly uncertain about whom he can trust. In a nerve-shredding race against time, Tommy is forced to confront  hard truths about himself and his family that could change the Peaky  Blinders forever.

4.title: FR - Peaky Blinders - S04E01 - The Noose
4.plot: December 1925. When Tommy receives a mysterious letter on Christmas Eve, he realises that the Shelbys are in danger of annihilation.

4.title: FR - Peaky Blinders - S04E02 - Heathens
4.plot: As the Shelbys come to terms with the shocking events of Christmas Day, Tommy endeavours to unite his family and a bold new enemy makes his move.

4.title: FR - Peaky Blinders - S04E03 - Blackbird
4.plot: Tradition weighs upon Arthur as Changretta finds a chink in the Shelby armour and Changretta continues to plan ways to continue the vendetta in the most devastating way possible.

4.title: FR - Peaky Blinders - S04E04 - Dangerous
4.plot: The Peaky Blinders are lured by the Italians into a cat-and-mouse chase on the streets of Birmingham.  As his factory lies idle, Tommy confronts the possibility that the Communists might win and he will be deemed a traitor to his class.

4.title: FR - Peaky Blinders - S04E05 - The Duel
4.plot: Tommy finds himself engaged in bloody battle with Luca Changretta and his gang. Lizzie has even greater news to break. Meanwhile, an army colonel has questions for Ada about her past as a communist, and Jessie Eden confirms just how far she is prepared to go in pursuit of her cause.

4.title: FR - Peaky Blinders - S04E06 - The Company
4.plot: It is the night of the big fight - Bonnie Gold versus Goliath. But as the bell rings and the crowd goes wild, dangers lurk in the shadows for Tommy Shelby and his family. When Changretta plays his final ace, he sets in motion a series of events that will change the Peaky Blinders forever.

5.title: FR - Peaky Blinders - S05E01 - Black Tuesday
5.plot: 1929 – While his family deals with the repercussions of the Wall Street Crash, Tommy Shelby MP faces new dangers from unexpected quarters.

5.title: FR - Peaky Blinders - S05E02 - Black Cats
5.plot: The Peaky Blinders come under fire when Tommy finds danger on his doorstep and a friend is brutally attacked. Could there be a traitor in the Shelby family’s midst?

5.title: FR - Peaky Blinders - S05E03 - Strategy
5.plot: As the charismatic Mosley shows his hand, Tommy prepares to make a treacherous new alliance.

5.title: FR - Peaky Blinders - S05E04 - The Loop
5.plot: Tommy agrees to dangerous new partnerships when a golden opportunity presents itself, and a Shelby party promises fireworks.

5.title: FR - Peaky Blinders - S05E05 - The Shock
5.plot: As Tommy reveals his intentions for Mosley, someone close to the Shelbys is targeted.

5.title: FR - Peaky Blinders - S05E06 - Mr. Jones
5.plot: News of Tommy's activities have reached Winston Churchill. At a family meeting, Tommy lays out his plans for Mosley, which will take place at a rally Sir Oswald is leading. Tommy is surprised by another strategy, coming from an unexpected corner. Meanwhile, Tommy has his own secrets to reveal.

6.title: FR - Peaky Blinders - S06E01 - Black Day
6.plot: Tommy sets off to North America, where the end of Prohibition brings new opportunities. But he faces new danger from an old adversary who is finally making his move.

6.title: FR - Peaky Blinders - S06E02 - Black Shirt
6.plot: Tommy gets involved in a power game with fascists, freedom fighters and Boston gangsters. As the players plan to double cross him, Tommy visits an old ally in Camden.

6.title: FR - Peaky Blinders - S06E03 - Gold
6.plot: Faced with devastating news, Tommy goes on a quest to discover who it was that placed a curse on his family. In Birmingham, Ada takes charge, and Arthur takes on some new recruits.

6.title: FR - Peaky Blinders - S06E04 - Sapphire
6.plot: Tommy establishes a connection between crime and political power that could alter the course of history. He also receives life-changing news from an unexpected source.

6.title: FR - Peaky Blinders - S06E05 - The Road to Hell
6.plot: In the light of extraordinary personal revelations, Tommy takes a course of action that will change everything. Meanwhile, his enemies’ plans start to fall into place.

6.title: FR - Peaky Blinders - S06E06 - Lock and Key
6.plot: As the clouds of the coming storm gather, Tommy Shelby faces the consequences of his experiences and his actions.

meta.plot: A gangster family epic set in 1919 Birmingham, England and centered on a gang who sew razor blades in the peaks of their caps, and their fierce boss Tommy Shelby, who means to move up in the world.

Lucky Luke, le justicier solitaire, doit faire équipe avec Louise, jeune fille intrépide qui l'embarque à la recherche de sa mère disparue. Ensemble, ils devront braver les dangers du Far West, s'allier à d'anciens ennemis tels les Dalton ou Billy the Kid - et surtout apprendre à s'entendre ! Cette quête pourrait révéler une menace bien plus vaste et replonger Luke aux origines de sa légende.

1.title: FR - Lucky Luke - S01E01 - The Lone One
1.plot: Lucky Luke meets Louise, a fearless young girl who accuses him of kidnapping her mother.

1.title: FR - Lucky Luke - S01E02 - On Charlie’s Trail
1.plot: To reach a witness, Luke and Louise turn to an unexpected ally: Billy the Kid.

1.title: FR - Lucky Luke - S01E03 - The Amnesiac
1.plot: Luke and Louise finally find the last person who saw Charlie alive - Joe Dalton.

1.title: FR - Lucky Luke - S01E04 - Gold Fever
1.plot: Luke, Joe, and Louise search for Charlie in the maze of a no-longer-abandoned gold mine.

1.title: FR - Lucky Luke - S01E05 - The Roots
1.plot: Louise dives into the cowboy’s dreams and uncovers the roots of his legend.

1.title: FR - Lucky Luke - S01E06 - Marshal City
1.plot: Luke, Louise and Joe finally find Charlie. But she’s in Marshal City, the town you can never leave.

1.title: FR - Lucky Luke - S01E07 - The Plot
1.plot: Luke, Charlie, and Louise go undercover to foil Zee’s assassination plot at a high-society party.

1.title: FR - Lucky Luke - S01E08 - Back to the Roots
1.plot: To protect Lincoln from Zee’s clutches, Luke must face the darkest ghost of his past.

meta.plot: Barcelone, 2026. Pendant la semaine du Mobile World Congress, Ulises Albet, ancien prodige de la technologie devenu militant anti-technologie, devient le principal suspect dans une affaire de meurtre. Alors qu'il s'échappe d'une ville bouclée, il découvre le lancement imminent d'une technologie révolutionnaire qui pourrait mettre en péril l'avenir éthique de l'humanité.

1.title: FR - Day One - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: After years in isolation, Ulises returns to Barcelona when his former partner asks for help decrypting Pandora, the code behind a revolutionary technology. The reunion ends in murder, turning Ulises into the main suspect. As a video of his escape goes viral, tech mogul Damián Diskin prepares to launch Day One, and Ulises realizes that nothing - not even his friend's death - is what it seems.

1.title: FR - Day One - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: With no trace of Pandora, Ulises turns to Paula, who shows him another video revealing the killer. The only person who can clear him is Rebeca, whose social media activity puts her in Diskin's sights. Determined to protect the launch of Day One, Diskin intervenes through the technology itself, erasing evidence and sending a mercenary to silence all witnesses.

1.title: FR - Day One - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Ulises goes into hiding with Rebeca, the only witness who can prove his innocence. Together they discover where Pandora may be hidden, but Rebeca secretly activates the technology, exposing their location. Diskin sends his mercenary to close all loose ends. As violence erupts, Ulises loses everything and is forced to run once again.

1.title: FR - Day One - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Rebeca is questioned by the police while Ulises becomes the prime suspect in another murder. When they reunite, they finally access Pandora and uncover its true nature. Unaware that she is being controlled through the contact lenses, Rebeca exposes their location. Biran heads toward their location, as both the police and Diskin close in.

1.title: FR - Day One - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Ulises and Rebeca go to the Synchrotron. They need the power of the accelerator to obtain definitive proof that could stop 'Day One'. When they activate the contact lenses to infiltrate the facility, Diskin tracks them. A chase erupts inside the accelerator. Separated and cornered, Ulises escapes outside, where he comes face to face with Inspector Moreno, who aims... and fires.

1.title: FR - Day One - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: Ulises and Rebeca are taken to Diskin's headquarters under the threat of Inspector Moreno. Meanwhile, Beth considers betraying the magnate and seeks Salvador's help. Diskin reveals the true purpose of the lenses and asks Ulises for his collaboration. As the global launch begins, evidence of the technology's danger breaks into the live broadcast, exposing the truth.

1.title: FR - Dirty Business [VOSTFR] - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: When a Oxfordshire river turns brown, two locals ask the water company why. So begins an epic 10-year trail to the heart of one of the great corporate and regulatory scandals in our country’s history.

1.title: FR - Dirty Business [VOSTFR] - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: The drama continues. An eight-year-old girl dies after a trip to the beach. Was it the raw sewage dumped there?

meta.plot: Dans cette série documentaire captivante, les enfants de Rupert Murdoch se livrent une bataille acharnée pour prendre le contrôle de son vaste empire médiatique.

1.title: FR - Dynasty : Les Murdoch - S01E01 - The King’s Gambit
1.plot: Rupert Murdoch's media empire made him one of the richest men on Earth. One day, his children will inherit it all — if they win the battle for succession.

1.title: FR - Dynasty : Les Murdoch - S01E02 - Don’t Worry About the Boy
1.plot: The launch of Fox News in 1996 reignites the succession question. When a potential heir apparent emerges, Rupert pits them against an outside rival.

1.title: FR - Dynasty : Les Murdoch - S01E03 - The Fallout
1.plot: Rupert's bold changes to the family trust make headlines. As a hacking scandal ensnares the business, past incidents threaten to topple the empire.

1.title: FR - Dynasty : Les Murdoch - S01E04 - Endgame
1.plot: The Murdoch empire's influence is unmatched. While James and Lachlan grapple for control, Rupert makes ruthless decisions to preserve his legacy.

1.title: FR - Age of Attraction - S01E01 - Is Age Just a Number?
1.plot: Free from the judgement of the outside world, the singles arrive and start mingling. Will they make connections based on chemistry and compatibility?

1.title: FR - Age of Attraction - S01E02 - Healthy? Probably Not. Fun? Yes.
1.plot: Amid nerves, crushes and big reveals, more dates lead to meetings in the Promise Room. Heartbreak ensues when a love triangle reaches its tipping point.

1.title: FR - Age of Attraction - S01E03 - He’s The Same Age As My Parents
1.plot: A flirtation falls flat when concerns about maturity come into play. While one couple confronts red flags, others leave the Promise Room hand in hand.

1.title: FR - Age of Attraction - S01E04 - A 27 Year Old Should Be Like An Energizer Bunny
1.plot: Things get cozy — or cramped — as the couples move in together. Sparks fly for some as others see cracks in the foundation of their relationship.

1.title: FR - Age of Attraction - S01E05 - The Power Of Life and Death Is In The Tongue
1.plot: From relocating and caring for family to faith and intimacy, the couples broach big conversations. Surprising news sends shockwaves through the group.

1.title: FR - Age of Attraction - S01E06 - Family Matters
1.plot: Reality sets in as the couples face the judgement of their friends and family. While some receive encouragement, others encounter major concerns.

1.title: FR - Age of Attraction - S01E07 - Can You Tell Us His Age?
1.plot: Cold feet force the couples to contend with hard questions. Tensions flare when one person refuses to divulge their partner's age with their loved ones.

1.title: FR - Age of Attraction - S01E08 - Episode 8

meta.plot: L'âge n'est-il vraiment qu'un chiffre ? Dans cette expérience de dating hors norme, des célibataires se rapprochent – et s'engagent – sans connaître l'âge de leur partenaire.

1.title: FR -  Girl from Nowhere: The Reset [VOSTFR] - S01E01 - Sky
1.plot: Bullies ruthlessly torment Sky at school. When his attempt at revenge backfires, Nanno intervenes and shifts the balance of power.

1.title: FR -  Girl from Nowhere: The Reset [VOSTFR] - S01E02 - Panty
1.plot: Nanno joins a girls' volleyball team that is targeted by voyeurs. When the school fails to act, she pushes her teammates to protect themselves.

meta.plot: Si vous pouvez le rêver, vous pouvez le faire. Enzo Ferrari a vu sa première course automobile quand il avait dix ans à Bologne et il est immédiatement tombé amoureux de ce sport.​ La suite est une histoire que l'on croit connaître, mais que l'on découvre véritablement pour la première fois dans cette série consacrée à ce génie - très discret - de la mécanique. Enzo il commendatore, l'homme qui révolutionna l'automobile avec rigueur et entêtement.

meta.plot: Du premier dinosaure au tout dernier, cette série documentaire épique étudie les 165 millions d'années qu'ils ont passées sur Terre et les forces qui ont forgé leur évolution.

1.title: FR - Les Dinosaures - S01E01 - Rise

1.plot: A fiery mass extinction wipes out a rival, allowing dinosaurs to multiply, grow larger, develop longer necks and fend off foes with body armor.

1.title: FR - Les Dinosaures - S01E04 - Fall
1.plot: Dinosaurs rule the entire planet, with T. rex as the most deadly. But as the continents split and drift, danger lurks far away in the depths of space.

meta.plot: Ce documentaire suit la quête de vérité d’une famille après la disparition, en Espagne, d’une femme de 42 ans suite à sa rencontre avec un TikToker populaire lors d’un voyage.

meta.plot: Les dinosaures sont de retour, et cinq adolescents sont les seuls à pouvoir créer un lien avec eux. C'est à ces héros de revêtir leurs armures et de piloter leurs dinosaures pour combattre le mal et sauver le monde.

Pendant huit ans, une ville danoise a vécu dans la crainte d'un criminel en série. Une fois arrêtés, Amanda, Nichlas et Kiri ont découvert que le coupable était leur ami proche, qui avait commis des agressions, des enlèvements et un meurtre alors qu'il passait du temps avec eux.

1.title: FR - Une histoire de meurtre et d'amitié - S01E01 - Amanda
1.plot: A 17-year old girl's disappearance in 2016 shakes the small town of Korsør to its core, igniting a desperate search — and fear among its residents.

1.title: FR - Une histoire de meurtre et d'amitié - S01E02 - Kiri
1.plot: After several wrong turns in the investigation, the trail seems to grow cold. Until a final, brutal crime leads the police to the perpetrator's door.

1.title: FR - Une histoire de meurtre et d'amitié - S01E03 - Nichlas
1.plot: The suspect's friends are left reeling at the shocking arrest — and are forced to reassess their feelings towards the person they thought they knew.

1.title: FR - Ami ou Assassin ? - S01E01 - Killer on Campus
1.plot: A gunman kills a University of Kentucky football player at his birthday party. Despite a house full of witnesses, no one saw the shooter. But as police investigate, suspicion closes in on his closest friends who were there that night.

1.title: FR - Ami ou Assassin ? - S01E02 - Your Smiles and Your Lies
1.plot: A mysterious killer murders the star of a community theater production of "Fiddler on the Roof" the day after a cast party. As the town grieves young artist Jessie Blodgett, her friends grow concerned that the culprit is someone within their inner circle.

1.title: FR - Ami ou Assassin ? - S01E03 - Devil in the Hallways
1.plot: When a California teen disappears, the whole town feels on edge; as suspicion turns inward, her closest friends begin to wonder if the danger has been beside them all along, hidden in the familiar faces of classmates with something dark to hide.

1.title: FR - Ami ou Assassin ? - S01E04 - She's No Runaway
1.plot: When a middle schooler vanishes without a trace, suspicion quickly falls on the new circle of older friends she's been spending time with. As family and friends dig deeper, secrets unravel, and the line between loyalty and betrayal starts to blur.

1.title: FR - Ami ou Assassin ? - S01E05 - Secrets to Reveal
1.plot: Best friends take a girl's trip before applying to grad school. When one of them doesn't make it home, everyone wonders what happened in Vegas? As the stakes continue to rise, sharing long-hidden secrets may be the only chance at justice.

1.title: FR - Ami ou Assassin ? - S01E06 - Friendship in Disguise
1.plot: A killer stabs a UCLA student to death in a train tunnel known for its connection to the Manson murders. Occult rumors then begin to spread until another missing friend redirects suspicion to the victim's inner circle.

meta.plot: Le meurtre de l'un des leurs bouleverse à jamais des groupes d'amis. La perte tragique d'un membre de leur cercle intime — et leur terrifiante proximité avec le meurtrier — les hantent tandis qu'ils découvrent des secrets et se confrontent à une vérité douloureuse.

1.title: FR - Film Club - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Evie's still reeling from the message she saw on Noa's phone. But when the two are left alone together, something extraordinary happens. Is it the start of a new journey for Evie?

1.title: FR - Film Club - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: While Evie throws herself headlong at life, Suz and Josh worry it's too much, too soon. Meanwhile, Noa realises he has to face up to his feelings...

meta.plot: Tous les jeudis à 21 heures, Tom et Evie regardent un film ensemble dans son garage. Evie décore l'espace avec amour pour qu'il corresponde au film de la semaine. Ils partagent le même amour pour le cinéma. Secrètement, l'un et l'autre sont amoureux mais n'osent pas se déclarer.
Une jeune femme a le pressentiment qu'un terrible événement va se produire lors de son mariage. Et plus la cérémonie approche, plus son malaise grandit.

1.plot: Something very bad happens.

1.plot: Clovis and Ben recruit Manon for their restaurant project and begin searching for a wealthy investor for Casse-Gueule.

1.plot: Clovis has found a well-located, low-cost space for Casse-Gueule, but it’s run-down and right next to chef Debbie Wang’s restaurant.

1.title: FR - Casse-Gueule - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Clovis feels immense pressure as he works on the menu for the restaurant he’s dreamed of opening for so long.

meta.plot: CASSE-GUEULE suit Clovis (Émile Schneider), un talentueux chef dans la trentaine, qui lance son propre restaurant avec l’aide de Ben (Zouheir Zerhouni), son sous-chef et meilleur ami au caractère explosif, et de Manon (Mylène Mackay), sa fougueuse sommelière… et amante. À cette équipe déjà tissée serrée s’ajoute Zoé (Estelle Fournier), la fille de 18 ans de Clovis qu’il n’a jamais vraiment connue. Entre les défis financiers, les tensions en cuisine, les secrets bien gardés et les rivalités inattendues, Clovis doit apprendre à devenir plus qu’un chef : un véritable pilier pour cette brigade qu’il a réuni dans sa cuisine.

À 19 ans, Sherlock Holmes est sans expérience, quand il se retrouve embarqué par le mystère autour d'un meurtre survenu à l’Université d’Oxford. Plongeant dans sa toute première affaire avec un manque certain de discipline, le jeune homme tente de démêler une conspiration qui pourrait changer sa vie à jamais.

1.title: FR - Young Sherlock - S01E01 - The Case of the Missing Scrolls
1.plot: 1871. A wayward young Sherlock Holmes is sent to Oxford to keep out of trouble, but he soon finds himself the prime suspect in a police investigation that threatens his entire future.

1.title: FR - Young Sherlock - S01E02 - The Case of the Burnt Photograph
1.plot: Sherlock is thrown into jail. He has to clear his name or face the gallows.

1.title: FR - Young Sherlock - S01E03 - The Case of the Unarmed Man
1.plot: The game's afoot. With another murder and two professors missing, it's a race against time for Sherlock and Moriarty to find them before the killer does.

1.title: FR - Young Sherlock - S01E04 - The Case of the Missing Button
1.plot: Sherlock returns to his childhood home in search of answers.

1.title: FR - Young Sherlock - S01E05 - The Case of Young Sherlock Holmes
1.plot: Years after a tragic accident that tore the Holmes family apart, Moriarty and Sherlock come to blows as they investigate that fateful day.

1.title: FR - Young Sherlock - S01E06 - The Case of the Killing Jar
1.plot: As Sherlock digs deeper into the Oxford murders, he discovers a shocking connection.

1.title: FR - Young Sherlock - S01E07 - The Case of the Two Corners
1.plot: An impossible ultimatum challenges Sherlock's loyalties.

1.title: FR - Young Sherlock - S01E08 - The Case of Beatrice Holmes
1.plot: Family ties and friendships are tested in the Holmes family reunion from hell.

1.title: FR - Tout simplement fan - S01E01 - The biggest prank in the world!
1.plot: Boris, a fan of Eric and Ramzy, is selected to take part in Tout Simplement Fan and spends a week on the set of his idols. In Spain, he discovers an impressive Western set where a Zorro series is being prepared. But an awkward situation arises between the duo and Laurent Lafitte, who arrives unexpectedly. Boris doesn't yet know that all of this is a prank.

1.title: FR - Tout simplement fan - S01E02 - Ramzy Bedia vs. Laurent Lafitte
1.plot: As Boris and the other fans take part in games to measure their 'fan devotion,' a duel breaks out between Ramzy and Laurent Lafitte. Under Eric's direction, they take turns in front of the camera to prove who is the better actor. Tension rises, the actors involve the fans, and in the end, a very bad surprise awaits everyone

1.title: FR - Tout simplement fan - S01E03 - Who is the traitor?
1.plot: Day 3 turns explosive as a frustrated Boris hunts for the fan who betrayed Ramzy, all while fighting to win the All About That Fan challenge. At the same time, he watches Éric lead a chaotic, wildly funny shoot with Jean-Pascal Zadi, Youssef Hajdi, and Hafid F. Benamar.

1.title: FR - Tout simplement fan - S01E04 - The coup that changes the mood
1.plot: Under pressure, Éric calls in his friend, Quebec director Marc Labrèche. But instead of helping, Marc, joined by Laura Felpin and Melha Bedia, takes over the shoot. As the series spirals out of control, Boris, neck and neck with the other fan contestants, must win the final 'Prover' challenge to claim victory in the fan competition.

1.title: FR - Tout simplement fan - S01E05 - Stop the substances!
1.plot: Driven by sudden visions, Marc falls into a meditative trance and casts Boris in his first-ever role, opposite Melha Bedia and Laura Felpin. The unsuspecting fan experiences an almost dreamlike day until a shocking staged incident shatters everything. The moment of truth is fast approaching.

1.title: FR - Tout simplement fan - S01E06 - The ultimate reveal and a special bonus
1.plot: Following the shocking incident staged by Éric and Ramzy, the truth is finally revealed: Boris's week on a massive 300-person production in the Spanish desert was all an epic prank. How will he react? Plus, get an exclusive look at a never-before-seen prank that was abandoned early in the shoot.

meta.plot:
Eric et Ramzy convient 4 de leurs plus grands fans en Espagne sur le tournage de leur nouvelle série : Zorro. Pendant 5 jours, nous les suivons en train de découvrir les coulisses de ce tournage incroyable, mais aussi de s’affronter dans un jeu complètement dingue destiné à répondre à la question suivante : lequel d’entre eux est LE plus grand fan ? À la clé : 20 000€ pour le gagnant. Seul détail : tout est totalement faux, créé de toute pièce pour organiser un gigantesque prank ! Et toutes les personnes impliquées sont des comédiens… Toutes, sauf Boris. Persuadé d’assister à un tournage plus vrai que nature, Boris va vivre la semaine la plus folle de sa vie sous l’oeil de 40 caméras cachées.

Et grâce à la complicité de Laurent Lafitte, Hafid Benamar, Niels Schneider, Youssef Hajdi, Jean-Pascal Zadi, Laura Felpin, Melha Bedia et Marc Labrèche il va se retrouver plongé dans des situations aussi invraisemblables que délirantes !

1.title: FR - Bedaine - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - Bedaine - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR - Bedaine - S01E03 - Episode 3

meta.plot: Ancien superhéros brisé, Bedaine tente de retrouver un sens à sa vie dans son village natal. Entre ennemis loufoques, blessures profondes et ailes perdues, il découvrira qu’on peut être un héros autrement.

Jane Andrews, habilleuse royale, partie de rien, a gravi les échelons jusqu'aux cercles du palais avant qu'une condamnation pour meurtre ne mette fin à son conte de fées. Le procès très médiatisé a suscité un véritable engouement. Elle a été libérée de prison en 2019.

1.title: FR - The Lady [VOSTFR] - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Jane Andrews' life changes overnight when she lands a dream job in Buckingham Palace and bonds with the Duchess of York.

meta.plot: Adaptation de nouvelles chinoises centrées sur les deux aspects (l'ancien et le moderne) de la ville de Shanghai, et sur deux périodes distinctes. L'histoire d'un jeune homme en quête d'aventures dans la Chine florissante des années 1990.

1.title: FR - Blossoms Shanghai [VOSTFR] - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Mentored by the aging financial maestro Uncle Ye, the ambitious Ah Bao transforms himself into Mr. Bao, a rich, influential stock trader. Even after he’s the victim of a hit-and-run attack that nearly kills him, life goes on: on the glamorous Huanghe Road, a new luxury restaurant called the Grand Lisbon opens, run by a beautiful and mysterious owner named Li Li.

1.title: FR - Blossoms Shanghai [VOSTFR] - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Mr. Bao finds himself entangled in a stock-market fiasco that cripples many small-time traders and damages his reputation. His friends rally round him at Tokyo Nights, a small, unglamorous restaurant that Mr. Bao co-owns with the feisty Ling Zi, with whom he has an intimate history.

1.title: FR - Blossoms Shanghai [VOSTFR] - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: A provincial factory manager, Mr. Fan, wants to do business with Mr. Bao, but—dazzled by Li Li and the riches he sees at the Grand Lisbon—he tries to sweeten the deal. Mr. Bao plays hardball.

1.title: FR - Blossoms Shanghai [VOSTFR] - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: A goofy, mink-clad interloper named Mr. Wei tries to steal Mr. Fan’s business, but Mr. Bao is helped by Miss Wang, his adoring contact at the Foreign Trade Office whom many people think is his girlfriend.

1.title: FR - Blossoms Shanghai [VOSTFR] - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Mr. Bao and Mr. Fan sign a contract to distribute made-in-China San Yang shirts. This groundbreaking deal leads to Mr. Bao giving Miss Wang a thank-you gift that will come back to haunt them both.

1.title: FR - Blossoms Shanghai [VOSTFR] - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: Li Li gives an enigmatic gift to Mr. Bao, who warns her that the Grand Lisbon won’t last more than three months. Thanks to a brilliant marketing move by Mr. Bao, San Yang shirts become a smash hit at the hottest department store on Shanghai’s biggest shopping street. Over at Tokyo Nights, the opportunistic Ling Zi tries to find a way to profit from those shirts, causing problems for Mr. Bao.

1.title: FR - Blossoms Shanghai [VOSTFR] - S01E07 - Episode 7
1.plot: Li Li’s rivals on Huanghe Road’s restaurant row begin sabotaging her business. Mr. Bao has his own problems: thuggish counterfeiters have begun cranking out knockoffs of San Yang shirts, threatening to destroy sales just as they’re beginning.

1.title: FR - Blossoms Shanghai [VOSTFR] - S01E08 - Episode 8
1.plot: In a bold move, Mr. Bao drives into the industrial boondocks to cut a deal with the knockoff-selling gangsters. Fearing for his safety, Miss Wang follows him there, risking her life to make sure he’s not in danger. Her bravery gets Mr. Bao remembering how they first met at the Foreign Trade Office.

1.title: FR - Blossoms Shanghai [VOSTFR] - S01E09 - Episode 9
1.plot: Li Li remains under attack by a group of restaurant madames led by the hotheaded Mei Lin, who sponsors a coup in the Grand Lisbon’s kitchen. Li Li goes to Tokyo Nights for help from Mr. Bao, a move that earns her Ling Zi’s jealousy.

1.title: FR - Blossoms Shanghai [VOSTFR] - S01E10 - Episode 10
1.plot: With the help of Uncle Ye, Mr. Bao thwarts the attack on the Grand Lisbon so successfully that the restaurant sets Huanghe Road abuzz with talk of its famous new dishes. Mr. Bao is now at his triumphant peak. What could possibly go wrong?

1.title: FR - Privilèges - S01E01 - Do Not Disturb
1.plot: On her first shift in the Citadel's day-release program, Adèle is accused of theft -- and must accept a risky mission to keep her job.

1.title: FR - Privilèges - S01E02 - 7th floor
1.plot: The hotel buzzes as the owner's daughter Reem arrives with her fiancé Mark -- who is the target of Adèle's secretive mission from Édouard.

1.title: FR - Privilèges - S01E03 - Fish and Shark
1.plot: With a strike looming, Édouard tasks Adèle with spying on her coworkers, while learning what Mark stands to gain from his marriage to Reem.

1.title: FR - Privilèges - S01E04 - Episode 4
FR - Privilèges - S01E05 - Episode 5

meta.plot: Adèle, une jeune détenue, trouve une chance de réinsertion dans les coulisses d’un grand Palace parisien, avec le soutien de son tout-puissant directeur Édouard Galzain. Mais quand elle découvre que sa liberté a un prix, une lutte dangereuse pour sa survie commence, entre manipulation, jeux de pouvoir et trahisons.

Suivez Gordon Ramsay pendant les 9 mois qui précèdent son plus grand projet de restauration à ce jour : l’ouverture de 5 expériences culinaires au 22 Bishopsgate, le plus haut bâtiment de la City de Londres.

1.title: FR - L'Appétit dévorant de Gordon Ramsay - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: With just 22 weeks until the big opening, Gordon stirs up plans for a bold pre-launch party. At home, his daughter Tilly prepares for a dream prospect.

1.title: FR - L'Appétit dévorant de Gordon Ramsay - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Gordon flies to Las Vegas to land a pulse-racing contract. In London, Holly makes an exciting announcement — but 22 Bishopsgate hits a major roadblock.

1.title: FR - L'Appétit dévorant de Gordon Ramsay - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: As the reality of a recent setback sinks in, pressures mount on the success of RGR High. Gordon carves out some tender family time with Tana and the kids.

1.title: FR - L'Appétit dévorant de Gordon Ramsay - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: With three weeks till launch, Gordon goes to extremes to promote 22 Bishopsgate. Later, he jets to the Philippines for a chaotic yet inspiring opening.

1.title: FR - L'Appétit dévorant de Gordon Ramsay - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Gordon opens up about fame and parental guilt. Meanwhile, simmering tensions between kitchen staff and builders threaten to ruin the long-awaited launch.

1.title: FR - L'Appétit dévorant de Gordon Ramsay - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: After a messy soft launch, Gordon's team have issues to fix — and just 12 hours till guests arrive. Can they turn up the heat when it matters the most?

1.title: FR - Prédictions : qui dira vrai ? [VOSTFR] - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Is fate set in stone? Can it be changed? Can it be predicted? Humanity's curiosity about it is endless. Now, a challenge to find the answers begins! Korea's top 49 Fate Readers gather for a high-stakes survival show. In "Battle of Fates," those who read destinies must put their own on the line.

1.title: FR - Prédictions : qui dira vrai ? [VOSTFR] - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: The first showdown begins: the "Battle of Intuition." Here, 49 Fate Readers must prove their intuition to survive and advance. But a series of shocking, unpredictable challenges awaits them. With a future they can't even predict for themselves, who will make it to the next round?

1.title: FR - Prédictions : qui dira vrai ? [VOSTFR] - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: 49 Fate Readers face a flood of fates. One Fate Reader delivers a perfect answer that transcends fate, leaving everyone breathless in shock and awe. From divination and tarot to saju and face reading, which Fate Reader will advance to the next stage?

1.title: FR - Prédictions : qui dira vrai ? [VOSTFR] - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Can a shaman see another shaman's fate? An unwritten rule forbids Fate Readers from reading each other's fates. But now, that taboo is broken. A one-on-one "Battle of Qi" unfolds as they fight to read their opponent's fate. Who will be the one to see through their rival's fate?

1.title: FR - Prédictions : qui dira vrai ? [VOSTFR] - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: In the "Battle of Qi," only those who can see through their opponent's fate survive. These Fate Readers unleash every skill in their arsenal, leaving viewers in awe. But when faced with an unprecedented mission, one Fate Reader breaks down in tears. Who will be the one to claim victory?

1.title: FR - Prédictions : qui dira vrai ? [VOSTFR] - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: The Fate Readers are baffled by a fate they can't foresee. They pour all their energy into reading each other's fates, but they're met with a shocking twist which leaves them all speechless.

1.title: FR - Prédictions : qui dira vrai ? [VOSTFR] - S01E07 - Episode 7
1.plot: A shaman, a tarot master, and a saju expert. They couldn't be more different, but can they work as a team? The surviving Fate Readers join forces for a competition like no other. Their first challenge: find the billionaire. Will they learn to trust each other's abilities and survive together?

1.title: FR - Prédictions : qui dira vrai ? [VOSTFR] - S01E08 - Episode 8
1.plot: Eleven married couples seek the Fate Readers. Is having a lot of kids a matter of fate? Some of the couples are childless, while others have many kids. Only the team that can correctly identify the large families will advance to the next round. But as conflicts escalate as opinions clash.

1.title: FR - Prédictions : qui dira vrai ? [VOSTFR] - S01E09 - Episode 9
1.plot: Can two Fate Readers read one person's fate at the same time? In "Battle of Fates," a celebrity sits down with two Fate Readers who simultaneously try to unravel their fate. Who will see deeper and more accurately into their fate? This ultimate mission challenges the limit of a 2-on-1 fate reading.

1.title: FR - Prédictions : qui dira vrai ? [VOSTFR] - S01E10 - Episode 10
1.plot: The final battle is here: the "Battle of Souls"! In this last showdown, the Fate Readers must heal the pain of those who've lost loved ones and comfort the souls of the deceased. Can they truly communicate with souls to bring peace? And out of the 49 Fate Readers, who will be the last one standing?

meta.plot: Notre destin est-il prédéfini ? Est-il déchiffrable ? Une compétition inédite ose tenter de le découvrir. Chamanisme, astrologie, tarot, physiognomonie… les 49 plus grands voyants de Corée du Sud mettent leur réputation en jeu. Seuls ceux qui savent décrypter le destin survivront. Qui l'emportera ?

1.title: FR - B.R.I. : La série documentaire - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - B.R.I. : La série documentaire - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR - B.R.I. : La série documentaire - S01E03 - Episode 3
FR - B.R.I. : La série documentaire - S01E04 - Episode 4

meta.plot: Des hommes et des femmes de la BRI, une unité d'élite de la police, racontent le déroulement de plusieurs opérations parmi les plus délicates.

1.title: FR - The Madison [VOSTFR] - S01E01 - Pilot
1.plot: The Clyburns uproot their lives to the wilds of Montana.

1.title: FR - The Madison [VOSTFR] - S01E02 - Let the Land Hold Me
1.plot: A neighbor's kindness guides Stacy towards a bold choice.

1.title: FR - The Madison [VOSTFR] - S01E03 - Watch Her Fall
1.plot: Stacy confronts Abigail about her future, triggering a roadside reckoning.

meta.plot: La vie d'une famille new-yorkaise s'effondre à la suite d'une tragédie. Les membres de cette famille font leur deuil lors de vacances dans le Montana rural, explorant les liens humains au milieu d'un profond chagrin.

1.title: FR - Million-Follower Detective [VOSTFR] - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: When police officer Chen Chia-jen shoots a masked gunman, the clip of the incident goes viral — and fulfills a prediction by an online fortune teller.

1.title: FR - Million-Follower Detective [VOSTFR] - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Baba the Witch's next prediction comes true when another influencer's body is discovered. Ting-yu steals a crucial piece of evidence.

1.title: FR - Million-Follower Detective [VOSTFR] - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: While Chia-jen and Ting-yu unexpectedly team up on the case, Hsin-ping follows her instincts about a suspect — and the killer strikes again.

1.title: FR - Million-Follower Detective [VOSTFR] - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Ting-yu finds himself in a precarious situation and Chia-jen rushes to help. The public turns on Baba the Witch, believing she is behind all the murders.

1.title: FR - Million-Follower Detective [VOSTFR] - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: As Baba announces her latest prediction, the police scramble to prevent another murder. A visit to Yu-chieh's apartment reveals a shocking truth.

1.title: FR - Million-Follower Detective [VOSTFR] - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: New video evidence leads Chia-jen to a key suspect. Meanwhile, Hsin-ping bypasses authority to further the investigation — no matter the consequences.

1.title: FR - Million-Follower Detective [VOSTFR] - S01E07 - Episode 7
1.plot: At an influencer event, Baba's next target makes a confession to the crowd while a hidden threat lurks nearby. Chia-jen gets closer to finding Yu-chieh.

1.title: FR - Million-Follower Detective [VOSTFR] - S01E08 - Episode 8
1.plot: As Chia-jen keeps his suspicions private, the influencers devise a plan to expose the truth. Will they unmask the mastermind, or will the secrets endure?

meta.plot: Dans ce thriller policier, le détective Chen Chia-jen se lance dans une course contre la montre pour démasquer Baba la sorcière, la voyante virale qui prédit avec précision la mort d'influenceurs.

1.title: FR - Scream : Meurtre au lycée [VOSTFR] - S01E01 - Alone in a Big, Dark House
1.plot: 16-year-old Cassie Stoddart is brutally stabbed to death and two unlikely suspects emerge.

1.title: FR - Scream : Meurtre au lycée [VOSTFR] - S01E02 - Just Like Scream
1.plot: Two teens are accused of murder: A shocking video reveals the truth. Their trials begin.

1.title: FR - Scream : Meurtre au lycée [VOSTFR] - S01E03 - Life Is Cruel
1.plot: Brian and Torey are sentenced to life without parole for Cassie's murder. Is justice served?

meta.plot: Série documentaire sur le meurtre brutal d'une ado dont les meurtriers ont tout avoué en vidéo.

1.title: FR - CIA [VOSTFR] - S01E01 - Directed Energy
1.plot: When a top-secret weapon is stolen from a U.S. defense contractor, CIA agent Colin Glass is paired with FBI agent Bill Goodman to investigate. Their partnership gets off to a rocky start, but they soon realize their opposing viewpoints may be their greatest asset.

1.title: FR - CIA [VOSTFR] - S01E02 - Fatal Defect
1.plot: When a known smuggler is flagged at the New York border with unidentified cargo, Colin and Bill head upstate to track. To find this smuggler, they must enlist the help of a foreign intelligence officer looking to defect.

1.title: FR - CIA [VOSTFR] - S01E03 - Bridge of Lies
1.plot: When a deeply embedded U.S. intelligence officer is detained in Hong Kong, Nikki insists on traveling there to bring him home but her cover is blown.

1.title: FR - CIA [VOSTFR] - S01E04 - Forced Labor
1.plot: When a wanted Belarusian national is discovered posing as an expecting father, Colin and Bill work to expose an international illegal baby smuggling ring.

1.title: FR - CIA [VOSTFR] - S01E05 - Deep Cover
1.plot: After a cyber engineer and her family are killed in a targeted attack, Colin and Bill rush to stop the culprits before they strike again.

1.title: FR - CIA [VOSTFR] - S01E06 - Pledge of Allegiance
1.plot: After Colin receives a tip on an upcoming terror plot, the team recovers a young man who was kidnapped nine years ago in Turkey and dig into his time in captivity to help stop the attack. Meanwhile, Bill looks into someone very close to Colin.

meta.plot: Lorsque deux partenaires improbables - un agent de la CIA à la langue bien pendue et qui ne respecte pas les règles, et un agent du FBI expérimenté et intelligent qui croit en l'État de droit - sont affectés au poste de la CIA à New York, ils doivent apprendre à travailler ensemble pour enquêter sur les affaires et les criminels qui représentent une menace sur le sol américain, et découvrir que leurs différences peuvent en fait être leur force.

1.title: FR - Le baiser de la sirène - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Tenacious insurance fraud investigator Cha Woo-seok gets a tip on an insurance murder, but the caller dies. Death seems to follow Han Seol-ah.

1.title: FR - Le baiser de la sirène - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Woo-seok and detectives dig into Seol-ah's past to expose insurance murders, finding an odd pattern among her lovers. Amid doubt, his tenacity grows.

1.title: FR - Le baiser de la sirène - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Chair Kim offers conditional succession. Seol-ah gets entangled with Jun-beom, Woo-seok nears her, and wine arrives in a dead man's name.

1.title: FR - Le baiser de la sirène - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Hearing a recording of Seol-ah, Woo-seok feels pity and grows curious. The police arrest Seol-ah at the auction, and she resolves to end everything.

1.title: FR - Le baiser de la sirène - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Woo-seok suggests posing as lovers, and Seol-ah agrees. Jun-beom consigns a painting to her, tension grows, and Woo-seok faces a shocking truth.

1.title: FR - Le baiser de la sirène - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: Seol-ah receives a threat and faces danger. Saved by Woo-seok, the two trace links between Paek Jun-beom and Lee Su-ho as Woo-seok is pursued.

1.title: FR - Le baiser de la sirène - S01E07 - Episode 7
1.plot: Seol-ah traces the artwork fire incident to Chair Kim, learns of Woo-seok's wound, and confronts Jun-beom as Woo-seok probes Jun-beom and Su-ho.

1.title: FR - Le baiser de la sirène - S01E08 - Episode 8
1.plot: Woo-seok spots links between the artwork fire incident and his sister's accident. Seol-ah follows Jun-beom to his villa, and the truth is revealed.

1.title: FR - Le baiser de la sirène - S01E09 - Episode 9
1.plot: An unexpected death shakes everyone. Afraid of losing Woo-seok, Seol-ah pushes him away. Back at the auction, she hastens plans against Chair Kim.

1.title: FR - Le baiser de la sirène - S01E10 - Episode 10
1.plot: Woo-seok and Seol-ah find a lead, but a painting raises her suspicion again. She prepares a final strike and enters the secret vault with Woo-seok.

1.title: FR - Le baiser de la sirène - S01E11 - Episode 11
1.plot: Seol-ah steps onto the final auction. She and Woo-seok seem to succeed in revenge, but its pain lingers. Another death warns the tragedy isn't over.

meta.plot: "L'aimer, c'est mourir." Cha Woo-seok, un enquêteur d'assurances, s'intéresse à des morts liées à Han Seol-ah, une commissaire-priseuse. Après la mort d'une collègue et de plusieurs anciens amants de Han Seol-ah, il la soupçonne d'être une victime. Se faisant passer pour un couple afin de découvrir la vérité, ils basculent dans un monde de contrefaçons, de fraudes et de meurtres cupides.

1.title: FR - Small Prophets [VOSTFR] - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Since his partner Clea went missing seven years ago, Michael Sleep's life has been on hold. But a mystical recipe in an old journal promises answers he’s been longing for.

meta.plot: Depuis la disparition inexpliquée de sa petite amie Clea il y a sept ans, Michael dérive. Lorsque son père déterre une ancienne recette alchimique, Michael tente le tout pour le tout : créer des esprits capables de prédire l’avenir. Aidé de son amie Kacey, il cultive ces créatures dans sa remise, espérant qu’elles répondront à son unique obsession : reverra-t-il Clea ? Mais en s’éveillant, les esprits déclenchent une série d’événements étranges.

1.title: FR - Coupable à 2 ans ? - S01E01 - Mishap or Murder?
1.plot: Tracyraquel Berns untangles the web of lies that obscured the truth about her baby brother's death.

1.title: FR - Coupable à 2 ans ? - S01E02 - A Case for Justice
1.plot: The exhumation of infant Matthew's body leads to his stepfather being put on trial for murder.

1.title: FR - Coupable à 2 ans ? - S01E03 - The Final Reckoning
1.plot: The arduous trial of Jan Sandlin ends, but Tracyraquel Berns' quest for justice is far from over.

meta.plot: Le combat de Tracy Raquel Berns, désignée comme coupable, à l'âge de deux ans, de la mort de son petit frère, afin d'identifier le véritable meurtrier.

1.title: FR - Blind Sherlock - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - Blind Sherlock - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR - Blind Sherlock - S01E03 - Episode 3
FR - Blind Sherlock - S01E04 - Episode 4
FR - Blind Sherlock - S01E05 - Episode 5
FR - Blind Sherlock - S01E06 - Episode 6

meta.plot: Doté d'une ouïe exceptionnelle, l'aveugle Roman Mertens décroche l'emploi de ses rêves dans l'unité d'écoutes téléphoniques de la police locale — un emploi plus dangereux qu'il ne l'avait imaginé.
Décidée à se battre pour celles qui ne le peuvent pas, Sayuri Herrera Román devient la première directrice du Bureau des féminicides et apporte l'espoir aux femmes du Mexique.

1.title: FR - La fiscal : Une magistrate contre les féminicides - S01E01 - Entering the System
1.plot: In her role as a femicide prosecutor, activist and lawyer Sayuri Herrera Román does everything in her power to recover the remains of Joana Esmeralda.

1.title: FR - La fiscal : Une magistrate contre les féminicides - S01E02 - The Best Therapy
1.plot: Long days and nights take a toll on Sayuri and her team. Meanwhile, a lawyer kills his wife inside a restaurant, and a dentistry student goes missing.

1.title: FR - La fiscal : Une magistrate contre les féminicides - S01E03 - The Limit
1.plot: Political pressure and corruption delay the investigation in the case of Ariadna Fernanda. Sayuri faces a shift in her priorities and takes on a new challenge.

1.title: FR - Coupez ! - S01E01 - BLATANT, NOT SUBTLE
1.plot: Shah blows the audition of a lifetime. Desperate times call for desperate measures...but at what cost?

1.title: FR - Coupez ! - S01E02 - TO TROLL, TO PROVOKE
1.plot: Shah has another shot at greatness. Time to prove to the world he has what it takes.

1.title: FR - Coupez ! - S01E03 - HOUSE OR HOME
1.plot: It's Eid. Shah needs to shut out all the noise and drama... and focus on family.

1.title: FR - Coupez ! - S01E04 - LOYALTY, ALLEGIANCE
1.plot: Shah needs a friend. In absence of that, an ex who publicly stabbed him in the back will do.

1.title: FR - Coupez ! - S01E05 - LURE, PART OF A TRAP
1.plot: Where is everyone? Who can you trust to help? Enemies turn to allies and nothing is as it seems.

1.title: FR - Coupez ! - S01E06 - THE SUBTLE ONE
1.plot: What's in a name? The clock is ticking as the big audition draws near, and Shah scrambles to find his family, and himself.

meta.plot: On y suit Shah Latif, un acteur en galère qui joue sa dernière carte lors de l'audition de sa vie. En quatre jours mouvementés, sa famille, son ex et le monde entier se mêlent de son destin : est-il vraiment l'homme de la situation ? Un compte à rebours hilarant où sa vie part totalement en vrille.

1.title: FR - Climax [VOSTFR] - S01E01 - A Dangerous Deal
1.plot: Prosecutor Bang Tae Seop sets an ambitious plan in motion to expose Mayor Nam Hye Hun and use the scandal as his steppingstone into politics.

1.title: FR - Climax [VOSTFR] - S01E02 - A Calculated Move
1.plot: With damaging evidence in hand, Tae Seop approaches Yang Mi, ready to play his cards. However, he soon learns disturbing news about Sang Ah that could become a serious problem.

1.title: FR - Climax [VOSTFR] - S01E03 - The Recording
1.plot: Tae Seop meets Kwon Se Myeong's eldest son and the members of the Creation Party to secure a nomination. After that, he steps down from his position as a prosecutor.

1.title: FR - Climax [VOSTFR] - S01E04 - The Real Murderer
1.plot: Seven years ago, a case occurred in which famous film producer Oh Gwang-jae was murdered by Park Jae-sang, Sang-ah's bodyguard. Tae-seop, the prosecutor in charge of the case, learns the truth but keeps it hidden.

1.title: FR - Climax [VOSTFR] - S01E05 - A Kindred-Spirited Ally
1.plot: Sang Ah discovers that Jung Won has been working for Tae Seop, and Jung Won shares how she came to know him and reveals her past. Meanwhile, Tae Seop presents a long-kept secret weapon to Chairman Kwon.

1.title: FR - Climax [VOSTFR] - S01E06 - Regaining Momentum
1.plot: Sang Ah finds Jae Sang and begs him to get rid of the recording. Jae Sang refuses and decides to do a live stream to expose Sang Ah. Seeing no hope, Sang Ah decides to end her life and leaves a note to Jung Won.

meta.plot: L'histoire d'un couple aux désirs infinis qui se piétinent pour atteindre le sommet, avec pour toile de fond les énormes industries des affaires et du divertissement qui dirigent la République de Corée.

1.title: FR - Mira: Life After Divorce [VOSTFR] - S01E01 - From Sadness
1.plot: Following her husband's request to divorce, Mira scrambles to find a new purpose...and spontaneously adopts a dog.

1.title: FR - Mira: Life After Divorce [VOSTFR] - S01E02 - Oh, Those 90s!
1.plot: To help pay rent, Mira takes a job on the set of her sister's TV show, but also must navigate a lawsuit over her adopted dog.

meta.plot: Lorsque son mari lui annonce à l'improviste qu'il veut divorcer, Mira décide de reconstruire sa vie comme elle l'entend.
