meta.plot: Trois policiers mènent l’enquête sur un accident d’autobus tragique avec au centre de chaque épisode le témoignage d’une personne différente permettant de reconstituer l’enchaînement des événements qui ont abouti à la catastrophe.

1.title: FR - Histoires d'amour et d'autisme - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Dani dreams of a man with a passion for animation. James gets dating advice from family but just wants to be himself. Abbey meets a match at the zoo.

1.title: FR - Histoires d'amour et d'autisme - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Unimpressed with the men on the apps, Kaelynn tries speed dating. Dani plans to move slower with Solomon after their encounter ends with a kiss.

1.title: FR - Histoires d'amour et d'autisme - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Steve sets up an online profile, and Subodh has a practice date ahead of his first real one. After a dreamy outing with Solomon, Dani makes a decision.

1.title: FR - Histoires d'amour et d'autisme - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Abbey and David visit a wildlife sanctuary. Steve displays his wit over tea. Kaelynn recalls a bad experience when she shared her diagnosis on a date.

1.title: FR - Histoires d'amour et d'autisme - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Kaelynn looks up topics to talk about ahead of her second meetup with Peter. Elsewhere, James spends a memorable day at a Renaissance fair with Emma.

1.title: FR - Histoires d'amour et d'autisme - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: Steve impresses during a waterside date. Dani pursues a speed dating match who loves animation while Subodh prepares for a big day with Rachel.

2.title: FR - Histoires d'amour et d'autisme - S02E01 - Episode 1
2.plot: James and Dani continue their search for love. David plans a sweet surprise for Abbey. Newbie Connor brings an open mind to his first speed-dating event.

2.title: FR - Histoires d'amour et d'autisme - S02E02 - Episode 2
2.plot: James goes out with an Instagram admirer. Connor has a pleasant reunion with a former coworker. First-timer Tanner gets dating advice from Jennifer.

2.title: FR - Histoires d'amour et d'autisme - S02E03 - Episode 3
2.plot: Tanner gets to know Kate with a series of questions. A daring Dani catches Jake off guard. Connor works through big feelings before his first date.

2.title: FR - Histoires d'amour et d'autisme - S02E04 - Episode 4
2.plot: Newcomer Journey prepares for her first date. James receives tips from his father. Abbey and David look for lions as Tanner gives Kate a tour of the zoo.

2.title: FR - Histoires d'amour et d'autisme - S02E05 - Episode 5
2.plot: Steve embarks on his first date in a year. Abbey's dream comes true. Connor rethinks a past decision. Dani attends a comic-con with an old flame.

2.title: FR - Histoires d'amour et d'autisme - S02E06 - Episode 6
2.plot: Dani wonders how to approach a sensitive subject with Adan. A connection blossoms during Journey's second date. Connor and Emily find a lot in common.

2.title: FR - Histoires d'amour et d'autisme - S02E07 - Episode 7
2.plot: Dani gives kissing lessons using a sweet treat. During a doggy playdate, Connor takes a big step with Emily. In Africa, Abbey and David feel the love.

3.title: FR - Histoires d'amour et d'autisme - S03E01 - Episode 1
3.plot: Bursting with confidence, Connor goes out with a fan. Will the third time be the charm for James? Newcomer Madison seeks dating tips from her besties.

3.title: FR - Histoires d'amour et d'autisme - S03E02 - Episode 2
3.plot: A noisy restaurant complicates Madison's first date. Tanner dreams of meeting a perky party animal. Dani thinks it's time she and Adan "do the deed."

3.title: FR - Histoires d'amour et d'autisme - S03E03 - Episode 3
3.plot: Connor improves Georgie's swing. At a goat farm, Tanner does most of the talking. Meanwhile, hopeful romantic Pari rides the commuter rails in Boston.

3.title: FR - Histoires d'amour et d'autisme - S03E04 - Episode 4
3.plot: Madison lassos herself a record-spinning cowboy. Returning lovebirds Abbey and David unwind in a hot tub. Pari and Tina talk trains on their first date.

3.title: FR - Histoires d'amour et d'autisme - S03E05 - Episode 5
3.plot: Dani and Adan have a candid conversation about intimacy. Tanner woos a date with his dance skills. Madison experiences an unforgettable day at the beach.

3.title: FR - Histoires d'amour et d'autisme - S03E06 - Episode 6
3.plot: Connor meets a "demigoddess," and a surprise guest attends James' backyard birthday bash. To lift Dani's spirit, her aunt offers wisdom — and margaritas.

3.title: FR - Histoires d'amour et d'autisme - S03E07 - Episode 7
3.plot: Tyler speaks privately to Madison's parents. Abbey performs a showstopping song straight from the heart. A magical kiss transforms the sky above Atlanta.

4.title: FR - Histoires d'amour et d'autisme - S04E01 - Episode 1
4.plot: Now living in Florida, Madison spends her first Valentine's Day with Tyler. A confused Connor confides in his mom. Newbie Logan goes suit shopping.

4.title: FR - Histoires d'amour et d'autisme - S04E02 - Episode 2
4.plot: Emma showcases her romantic dreams through song. A shared love of cheesecake sweetens Logan's date. Connor speaks his heart on a picnic with Georgie.

4.title: FR - Histoires d'amour et d'autisme - S04E03 - Episode 3
4.plot: Pricey potatoes and a pesky fly can't stop James and Shelley's dinner. First-timer Dylan is eager to try dating. Emma meets a suitor at the tulip garden.

4.title: FR - Histoires d'amour et d'autisme - S04E04 - Episode 4
4.plot: Connor and Georgie spend their anniversary at the Renaissance Faire. Madison and Tyler explore Nashville. Logan and Hailey share a spooky second date.

4.title: FR - Histoires d'amour et d'autisme - S04E05 - Episode 5
4.plot: Between Logan's first kiss and Emma's crush, is love in the air? James and Shelley go house-hunting. Connor and Georgie see sights and family in England.

4.title: FR - Histoires d'amour et d'autisme - S04E06 - Episode 6
4.plot: Dylan's mom offers him sage advice before his next date. An attempt at voicing his feelings goes awry for Connor. Logan cooks for Hailey and his family.

4.title: FR - Histoires d'amour et d'autisme - S04E07 - Episode 7
4.plot: Familiar faces gather to celebrate Madison and Tyler's big news. James and Shelley spend quality time in Cape Cod. Connor finds comfort in his pals.

meta.plot: Dans cette série documentaire romantique, des personnes autistes cherchent l'amour et découvrent le monde changeant des rencontres et des relations de couple.

1.title: FR - Alkhallat plus - S01E01 - Desert Rules
FR - Alkhallat plus - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR - Alkhallat plus - S01E03 - Episode 3
FR - Alkhallat plus - S01E04 - Episode 4
FR - Death March to the Parallel World Rhapsody - S01E01 - The Catastrophe That Started with a Death March
1.plot: Suzuki Ichirou is a programmer who is working a death march to keep up with nightmare combination of unreasonable deadlines and unreliable coworkers. After crawling under his desk for some much-needed shut-eye, he awakes to find himself in a familiar, but distinct, fantasy world.

1.title: FR - Death March to the Parallel World Rhapsody - S01E02 - Exploring a City That Started with a Death March
1.plot: Satou seems to be stuck in the parallel world that looks like an amalgamation of the game projects he's worked on. And while his insider knowledge of the world's systems gives him an advantage, he still needs to find his bearings before he can start planning what to do next. To that end, he heads to the nearest city to establish a base of operations.

1.title: FR - Death March to the Parallel World Rhapsody - S01E03 - Love That Started with a Death March
1.plot: Satou is shown around the city by Zena when they encounter demi-human slaves who are being abused by a mob. But prejudice isn't the only problem when everyone suddenly finds themselves deep in a dangerous labyrinth.

1.title: FR - Death March to the Parallel World Rhapsody - S01E04 - Labyrinth Exploration That Started with a Death March
1.plot: With the aid of the slaves he was trying to help, Satou gradually starts his trek to escape the labyrinth, and rescue the other people who were trapped with him.

1.title: FR - Death March to the Parallel World Rhapsody - S01E05 - The Crazy Princess That Started with a Death March
1.plot: Satou chooses to become Tama, Pochi, and Liz's new master rather than let them return to a life of slavery. He also ends up with the strange sisters Arisa and Lulu, the younger of which seems to have a secret tied to Satou's original world...

1.title: FR - Death March to the Parallel World Rhapsody - S01E06 - City Defense That Began with a Death March
1.plot: With five girls now in his care, Satou needs to find more permanent lodging. Unfortunately his real estate ventures will have to wait, as the city comes under attack by giant insects!

1.title: FR - Death March to the Parallel World Rhapsody - S01E07 - Camping Lessons That Began with a Death March
1.plot: Satou and the gang make plans to help return the elf girl that he rescued to her home in the forest, but first they need to prepare for the long trip by learning how to rough it outdoors.

1.title: FR - Death March to the Parallel World Rhapsody - S01E08 - Immortality That Began with a Death March
1.plot: Mia has been kidnapped, and Satou is hot on the trail of the strange specter that took her. The path leads to the place she originally was rescued from, the massive tower known as the Cradle.

1.title: FR - Death March to the Parallel World Rhapsody - S01E09 - Deeply Held Attachment That Started with a Death March
1.plot: Satou reaches the top of the Cradle, but he won't be able to take Mia back before confronting a final challenge... One that will end with a surprising addition to his entourage.

1.title: FR - Death March to the Parallel World Rhapsody - S01E10 - The Hunting Song That Started with a Death March
1.plot: The journey to return Mia home begins, giving Satou a chance to experiment with the functionality of the fantasy world during the long trip.

1.title: FR - Death March to the Parallel World Rhapsody - S01E11 - The Fantasy Conspiracy That Started with a Death March
1.plot: The journey to take Mia home continues, with Satou running afoul the local nobles by disrupting their scheme involving the distribution of healing potions.

1.title: FR - Death March to the Parallel World Rhapsody - S01E12 - A Trip to the Underworld That Started with a Death March
1.plot: Satou has to deliver on an arrangement where countless factors have been twisted against him, but will that be enough to keep him from pulling through?

meta.plot: L’informaticien Ichirô Suzuki, alias Satô, se réveille à l’intérieur du jeu vidéo qu’il était en train de programmer. Comme il connaît bien toutes les fonctions et les recoins du jeu, il se révèle très à l'aise dans ce monde. Cependant, il préfère rester discret à ce sujet et tandis qu’il part à sa découverte, il tente de venir en aide aux différents personnages qu’il croise.

L'agence de protection sociale sauve la vie des patients en phase terminale en utilisant des implants cybernétiques. Ensuite, il leur apprend à tuer. Après avoir survécu au massacre de sa famille, la jeune Henrietta se réveille à l'Agence avec un corps reconstruit et sans mémoire. Avec José, qui est responsable de la transformer en l'assassin parfait, Henrietta a eu une seconde chance - mais à quel prix ?

1.title: FR - Gunslinger Girl - S01E01 - Fratello (Siblings)
1.plot: Following a gruesome night of terror, Henrietta is taken in by The Social Welfare Agency. It’s up to José to show her the ropes.

1.title: FR - Gunslinger Girl - S01E02 - Orione (Orion)
1.plot: Henrietta works to find her place at the Agency after the mistakes of her recent assignment. Feeling responsible for her shortcomings, José tries to learn what Henrietta needs to help her flourish as an assassin.

1.title: FR - Gunslinger Girl - S01E03 - Ragazzo (Boy)
1.plot: After years in a body she couldn’t move, the Social Welfare Agency gave Rico a new one. While scoping out a mission, she meets a boy who makes her question who she’s supposed to be.

1.title: FR - Gunslinger Girl - S01E04 - Bambola (Doll)
1.plot: The friction between Hilshire and Triela could jeopardize their mission of protecting Mario Bossi, a retired criminal who’s turned government witness in a case against organized crime.

1.title: FR - Gunslinger Girl - S01E05 - Promessa (Promise)
1.plot: Captain Raballo accepts a Handler job with the Agency. But when he’s teamed with Claes, he wonders if his selfish needs justify the pain he must inflict on the young assassin.

1.title: FR - Gunslinger Girl - S01E06 - Gelato (Frozen)
1.plot: José, Henrietta, and Enzo are tracking terrorist Enrico Berdini, who’s negotiating to buy an explosive device to use in an attack on Rome.

1.title: FR - Gunslinger Girl - S01E07 - Protezione (Protection)
1.plot: Jean and Rico befriend an accountant named Filippo who carries a ledger coveted by a terrorist. Unbeknownst to Filippo, his two new friends are his only protection from impending death.

1.title: FR - Gunslinger Girl - S01E08 - Il Principe del Regno della Pasta (The Prince of the Kingdom of Pasta)
1.plot: Angelina was hit by a car and left for dead. With the help of the Agency, she was reborn as Angelica - but the negative side effects of the cybernetic implants began to show.

1.title: FR - Gunslinger Girl - S01E09 - Lycoris Radiata Herb (Be Struck Off Herb)
1.plot: When Henrietta reaches out to new recruit Elsa, a cold shoulder is all she gets in return. When Elsa’s handler brings José and Henrietta in on a hit, strained tensions place the mission in jeopardy.

1.title: FR - Gunslinger Girl - S01E10 - Amare (To Love)
1.plot: After a grizzly murder, Section One attempts to get to the bottom of the cyborg problem. Jean becomes embroiled in a cover-up, and José and Henrietta are sent away for their own "safety."

1.title: FR - Gunslinger Girl - S01E11 - Febbre Alta (High Fever)
1.plot: Henrietta and José are tailed in Sicily by Section One agents. Pietro and Elenora's suspicions grow as Henrietta reveals she knows more about Elsa and Lauro’s death than anyone thought.

1.title: FR - Gunslinger Girl - S01E12 - Simbiosi (Symbiosis)
1.plot: Claes is in trouble after her mission to foil a Republican Faction kidnapping plot goes awry.

1.title: FR - Gunslinger Girl - S01E13 - Stella Cadente (Falling Star)
1.plot: The girls are excited about tonight's meteor shower, but everyone's thoughts are with hospitalized Angelica. Her time is short, and Henrietta must convince Marco to go to her side.

meta.plot: Depuis la perte de ses parents, tués par une bombe, Jonah voue aux trafiquants d’armes une haine implacable. Cet enfant soldat taciturne décide pourtant de faire un bout de chemin avec Koko Hekmatyar, une jeune vendeuse d’armes excentrique qui parcourt le monde. Il devient ainsi le neuvième de ses subordonnés et intègre malgré son jeune âge l’équipe des Jörmungand.

1.title: FR - Jormungand - S01E01 - Gunmetal Calico Road
1.plot: Jonah has just started working for the weapons dealer, Koko. On his first job, they run into some big problems delivering their merchandise. Next they have to undermine a freelance weapons dealer who wants a piece of the action… and money.

1.title: FR - Jormungand - S01E02 - Pulsar
1.plot: Koko and her group go to the border of Russia to make an easy delivery, but end up marching right into a covert war for a pipeline. Koko is eager to leave, but her client is desperate for more weaponry and will do anything to get it…

1.title: FR - Jormungand - S01E03 - Musica Ex Machina (Phase 1)
1.plot: The assassin group Orchestra is out to earn a little cash and Koko just so happens to be visiting the same town as them. Now Koko must run for her life or die by the hands of a quirky team who claim their gunfights are musical.

1.title: FR - Jormungand - S01E04 - Musica Ex Machina (Phase 2)
1.plot: The showdown between Koko’s men and Orchestra comes to a end that leaves a bad taste in the mouths of everyone involved. To make matters worse, the gunfight draws the attention of the US CIA agent, Scarecrow. So much for a nice day off.

1.title: FR - Jormungand - S01E05 - Vein
1.plot: Koko’s older brother, Kasper, pays her a visit aboard her ship. Jonah harbors ill feelings toward Kasper dating back to when they first met. Seeing the man revives some of Jonah’s darker memories that still seem to haunt the boy soldier.

1.title: FR - Jormungand - S01E06 - African Golden Butterflies (Phase 1)
1.plot: Complications begin to arise as soon as Koko reaches Africa. Dr. Miami has prioritized butterfly hunting over her appointment with Koko. Now Koko’s men must hunt her down in a snowy mountain. Meanwhile, a dangerous arms dealer asks Koko out to dinner…

1.title: FR - Jormungand - S01E07 - African Golden Butterflies (Phase 2)
1.plot: Mr. Chen invites Koko out to eat while most of her unit is searching for Dr. Miami in the mountains. He has no intention of letting Koko leave that restaurant alive. Now she must escape without her highly skilled team there to help her.

1.title: FR - Jormungand - S01E08 - Mondo Grosso
1.plot: Koko must compete against the former actress and current arms dealer Amalia Torohovsky over who may sell some unmanned aerial vehicles to a country on the brink of war. It looks like Amalia’s years of experience may be a match for the clever young Koko!

1.title: FR - Jormungand - S01E09 - Dragon Shooter (Phase 1)
1.plot: After a fun trip to the beach, Koko and her unit get back to business. On top of her usual wares, Koko must also safely deliver a group of doctors to a country in civil unrest.

1.title: FR - Jormungand - S01E10 - Dragon Shooter (Phase 2)
1.plot: Baldrag has kidnapped the chief doctor of the group of physicians Koko was supposed to transport. Before she can flee to safety, Koko must first rescue the doctor and fulfill her contractual obligations.

1.title: FR - Jormungand - S01E11 - The Hill of Ruin (Phase 1)
1.plot: Valmet has run off to Africa to seek vengeance upon the man who killed her squad back in her army days. Meanwhile, Koko is being targeted by another skilled group of assassins.

1.title: FR - Jormungand - S01E12 - The Hill of Ruin (Phase 2)
1.plot: Valmet fully intends to avenge her long deceased comrades on her own, but Jonah has other plans. Elsewhere, Koko learns a surprising secret from the group of assassins who were after her head.

meta.plot: Un petit garçon emménage tout seul dans un immeuble délabré et sympathise avec son voisin, un auteur de manga fauché.

1.title: FR - Kotaro en solo - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: A strange four-year-old boy named Kotaro moves into Shimizu Apartment all on his own. He doesn't seem to have any parents or family around.

1.title: FR - Kotaro en solo - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Karino figures out why Kotaro talks the way he does: he's copying Tonosaman, his favorite cartoon character from a show that's about to end.

1.title: FR - Kotaro en solo - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: When he sees someone handing out free balloons, Kotaro tries to collect as many as he can. But there's a reason he wants so many balloons.

1.title: FR - Kotaro en solo - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Kotaro's friend Kakeru has a maid who takes care of everything for him, so Kotaro decides to show Kakeru how to do things for himself.

1.title: FR - Kotaro en solo - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: For some reason, Kotaro is very particular about his tissues. He wants expensive, soft ones because they're "sweet." Later, Karino figures out why.

1.title: FR - Kotaro en solo - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: A man named Aota moves into the building for a month. When he asks Kotaro to be his friend, Karino gets suspicious — and a little jealous.

1.title: FR - Kotaro en solo - S01E07 - Episode 7
1.plot: A girl named Kana starts coming over to Kotaro's house to play everyday after kindergarten, but she never seems to have fun.

1.title: FR - Kotaro en solo - S01E08 - Episode 8
1.plot: Karino brings Kotaro and all his friends to the movies. Kotaro wants to see the new Tonosaman film, but the other kids want to watch something else.

1.title: FR - Kotaro en solo - S01E09 - Episode 9
1.plot: Whenever Kotaro goes to see the neighborhood dentist, Dr. Ohba always takes the time to talk to him and ask him lots of questions.

1.title: FR - Kotaro en solo - S01E10 - Episode 10
1.plot: One day, a woman Kotaro doesn't recognize comes to pick him up from kindergarten. She says she's Karino's ex-girlfriend.

meta.plot:
L'histoire se déroule dans un monde latino assez proche du Brésil. Michiko Malandro, jeune femme de caractère, s'évade de la prison de haute sécurité de Diamandra réputée pour être une "prison dont on ne s'échappe jamais". Dans son escapade elle prend sous son aile une jeune fille surnommée Hana. Maltraitée par sa famille adoptive (composé d'un prêtre et sa famille) qui ne la garde que pour les taches ménagères et surtout l'argent qu'elle leur rapporte, Hana est loin de se douter de se qui l'attend avec cette femme au sang chaud !

Mais Michiko n'a pas prise par hasard la jeune Hatchin (surnom donné à Hana) et c'est une course poursuite qui s'engage entre les deux complices et les brigades de policiers mené par Atsuko Jackson dans le monde funky mais néanmoins dangereux du Brésil de Michiko to Hatchin !

1.title: FR - Michiko & Hatchin [VOSTFR] - S01E01 - Farewell, Cruel Paradise!
1.plot: Michiko Malandro breaks out of a high-security prison to see her long-lost love, Hiroshi. Elsewhere, Hiroshi's daughter, Hana Morenos, lives the life of Cinderella among her adoptive family, waiting for someone to come and take her away from them.

1.title: FR - Michiko & Hatchin [VOSTFR] - S01E02 - The Brown Sugar Outlaw
1.plot: Having abducted Hana from her adoptive family, Michiko is on the run from the law when she runs out of gas. Hot in pursuit is Atsuko, a police sergeant and acquaintance of Michiko's from childhood, and the one who put her in jail in the first place.

1.title: FR - Michiko & Hatchin [VOSTFR] - S01E03 - Like a Frantic Pinball
1.plot: In coastal São Cabal, Michiko consults a fortune teller to continue her search for Hiroshi. When Hatchin loses her shoes, and Michiko steals another pair to replace them, Hatchin takes on a job at a restaurant to pay for them, but gets in over her head.

1.title: FR - Michiko & Hatchin [VOSTFR] - S01E04 - Stray Cat Milky Way
1.plot: Michiko is summoned at gunpoint to see Rico, the local favela boss. Pepê Lima, a dancer at a nearby nightclub run by Rico, approaches Hatchin with information about Hiroshi. However, Pepê has an agenda of her own for meeting with Michiko and Hatchin.

1.title: FR - Michiko & Hatchin [VOSTFR] - S01E05 - The Saudade of Fools, Parte 1
1.plot: Michiko visits her old friend Ivan to ask the whereabouts of a man named Satoshi, who might know where Hiroshi is. Thinking the task ahead to be dangerous, Michiko leaves Hatchin with Zelia Bastos at the orphanage where she grew up, for her safety.

1.title: FR - Michiko & Hatchin [VOSTFR] - S01E06 - The Saudade of Fools, Parte 2
1.plot: With Hatchin missing, Michiko confronts Zelia. Ivan informs Michiko that Hatchin is likely being held by a local mob leader named Vasily at a bullfighting arena, in order to draw Michiko to them so they can take revenge for the events of 12 years ago.

1.title: FR - Michiko & Hatchin [VOSTFR] - S01E07 - The Rain That Falls in Monotone
1.plot: When Michiko's motorbike breaks down, the two are stranded for several days in a rural river settlement. While there, Michiko becomes attracted to a man named Bruno, but has second thoughts when she finds out that he is a married man.

1.title: FR - Michiko & Hatchin [VOSTFR] - S01E08 - Black Noise and a Dope Game
1.plot: Michiko and Hatchin arrive in Osso, and their bickering grows ever worse. Shinsuke, a lieutenant in the crime syndicate Monstro Preto, checks in on one of their member organizations. While out and about, Hatchin stumbles across a man named Satoshi.

1.title: FR - Michiko & Hatchin [VOSTFR] - S01E09 - The Chocolate Girl in Love
1.plot: In the town of Perna, famous for its weeping Maria statue, Hatchin is traveling alone and low on money. She befriends a young girl from the local circus named Rita, who is infatuated with her adult performing partner, and desperate to grow up.

1.title: FR - Michiko & Hatchin [VOSTFR] - S01E10 - The Carnival of Hyenas
1.plot: Satoshi tracks down Manabe, a former captain in Monstro Preto, and takes him and his family hostage. He orders Shinsuke to send the battered Michiko to him on a train, and sets about to get back at Manabe for humiliating him many years before.

1.title: FR - Michiko & Hatchin [VOSTFR] - S01E11 - Starting Line Downpour
1.plot: As Michiko hurries to catch up with the circus, Hatchin is adjusting to life without her. A former performer, coincidentally named Michiko, takes an interest in the children with the circus. However, an investigative reporter insists they are in danger.

1.title: FR - Michiko & Hatchin [VOSTFR] - S01E12 - Purgatory: 108°C Telepathy
1.plot: When Michiko takes ill, she and Hatchin check into a hotel. Worried about the costs they are incurring and the risk of going to a proper hospital, Hatchin seeks an alternative route to treat Michiko. Will her plan work out as well as she hopes?

1.title: FR - Michiko & Hatchin [VOSTFR] - S01E13 - Goldfish of the Marsh
1.plot: After being demoted, Atsuko is reassigned to Ilha Azul, a small town on the edge of the jungle. There, she befriends Vanessa Lee, a girl who reminds her of her younger self, and who, like her, wants to get out of town and move on with her life.

1.title: FR - Michiko & Hatchin [VOSTFR] - S01E14 - The Daredevil Explosive Runner
1.plot: Satoshi hires assassins to kill Michiko, Atsuko, and Shinsuke. When Shinsuke's assassin, Jair, spots Michiko first, he decides to pursue her, instead. Jair decides to challenge Michiko to a contest, to see which one of them can kill the other first.

1.title: FR - Michiko & Hatchin [VOSTFR] - S01E15 - Graffiti in Vain
1.plot: While in town, waiting on repairs to the bike, Hatchin spots an old favorite book for sale. The boy who works at the bookstore, Lenine, sees her, and starts to fuss over her. Hatchin, however, is unsure how to handle this new and unfamiliar attention.

1.title: FR - Michiko & Hatchin [VOSTFR] - S01E16 - Etude of Crimson Inconstancy
1.plot: Michiko and Hatchin reach the tomato production plant where they anticipate finding Hiroshi. Once inside, they meet Elis, the woman who appears in the photograph with him. Michiko confronts her about stealing Hiroshi, but Elis reacts unexpectedly.

1.title: FR - Michiko & Hatchin [VOSTFR] - S01E17 - Buckets of Blood! Opera That Stirs the Heart
1.plot: Michiko goes to pick up the fake I.D.s she had made, but finds that she is unable to pay for them. When Michiko fails to return, Hatchin goes out looking for her, and ends up being taken in by a kindly Chinese opera singer who offers to help find her.

1.title: FR - Michiko & Hatchin [VOSTFR] - S01E18 - The Fool's Ballistic Samba
1.plot: Michiko and Hatchin make their way into São Paraíso, and happen upon one of Hiroshi's old business associates. When Michiko becomes forlorn after finding out that Hiroshi had not mentioned her, Hatchin comes up with a plan to cheer Michiko up again.

1.title: FR - Michiko & Hatchin [VOSTFR] - S01E19 - Nettlesome Light-Blocking Butterfly
1.plot: Michiko and Hatchin hop a freight train bound for Goinia, hoping to find Hiroshi there. Satoshi is set up by one of his former subordinates, makes his escape aboard the same train. Meanwhile, Atsuko has plans of her own for both Michiko and Hatchin.

1.title: FR - Michiko & Hatchin [VOSTFR] - S01E20 - Rendezvous of Extermination
1.plot: Satoshi and Hatchin arrive in a town Satoshi left desolate ten years earlier. Satoshi calls Shinsuke, and challenges him to settle matters once and for all. While waiting for Shinsuke to arrive, Satoshi tells Hatchin more tales about Hiroshi.

1.title: FR - Michiko & Hatchin [VOSTFR] - S01E21 - Last Waltz Blooming Out of Season
1.plot: In an attempt to locate Hiroshi, Satoshi coerces a local crime boss, Juninho, to search for him. However, Juninho is already out to get Hiroshi for some outstanding debts. Michiko continues to elude police, and ends up cornered at a traveling carnival.

1.title: FR - Michiko & Hatchin [VOSTFR] - S01E22 - Run As You Are
1.plot: The local police force closes in on Michiko and Hatchin, out to frame Michiko to clear themselves of their own wrongdoing. Michiko and Hatchin have an intense standoff with the police captain. Atsuko and Ricardo arrive to take Michiko into custody.

meta.plot: La ville de Lux, construite dans les profondeurs de la Terre, est devenue « une cité abandonnée » depuis que la surface l'a oubliée. Ses habitants y vivent dans la peur et le désespoir tandis que les gangs dirigent la ville. Ceux-ci contrôlent également la « Texhnolyze », une technologie qui permet de remplacer les membres du corps humain par des prothèses cybernétiques. Le destin de ce monde va se jouer entre quatre personnages : Ohnishi, le caïd de la ville, Ran, une jeune fille aux pouvoirs de divination, Yoshi, un mystérieux visiteur et Ichise, un boxeur mutilé. La « Texhnolyze » les sauvera-t-elle ou les mènera-t-elle à leur destruction ?

1.title: FR - Texhnolyze [VOSTFR] - S01E01 - Stranger
1.plot:
Ichise is currently living his life as a fighter in an underground fighting ring. He is incredibly strong and is rewarded for his efforts with a nice whore. She goes kind of crazy and he throws her off during their 'love making'. As a result, her 'employer', Aida, calls up a member of Organ, Isshii, to punish Ichise. Isshii cuts off Ichise's right arm.

At the same time, we see our first sighting of Yoshii, a member of the Class who has come down to Lux for reasons unknown at this point. When he gets to the bottom of the stairs that connect the two worlds, he meets Ran, a girl from the nearby village of Gabe, which is situated on the outskits of Lux. Ran leads him to the Elder of Gabe where they are soon accosted by a couple members of the Alliance. Yoshii protects Ran and the Elder and fights them off.

We are also introduced to Oonishi, the leader of Organ.

1.title: FR - Texhnolyze [VOSTFR] - S01E02 - Forfeiture
1.plot:
Things just aren't going Ichise's way. In an attempt at blind rage, he gets his left leg cut off by Isshii (in addition to his right arm in the first episode). Oonishi sees his men at the warehouse and scolds Aida for not coming to him first. He then tells Ichise that he won't kill him because he still has the will to live. After this, Ichise drags himself through the streets with his severed limbs tied to his good leg. He eventually fashions a makeshift crutch, but it doesn't help him that much.

Yoshii and the Elder have a little chat. Yoshii says that he didn't come down for any particular reason. The Elder doesn't really know if Yoshii's coming is a good or a bad omen. He has Yoshii take the train to Lux with Ran. On the train, we learn that Ran comes to the city alone often and that she sells flowers at the market there. We also learn from the Elder that she has the ability to see into the near future.

1.title: FR - Texhnolyze [VOSTFR] - S01E03 - Texhnophile
1.plot:
We see some flashbacks of Ichise's childhood. His father was tortured and hanged for some crime he committed. A short time later, his mother became very ill and died. He received a vial from the hospital that contained some of her cells and he had kept it with him since. He wakes up in Doc's Lab and he freaks out that he doesn't have the vial. She tells him that she used the contents as part of a new Texhnolyze Unit that will become his new arm and leg. He freaks out, but she knocks him unconscious.

Some men from the Alliance attempt to assassinate Oonishi, but fail miserably. We learn that Kimata, the Alliance's leader, is Texhnolyzed, which is strictly against their ideals. We also see Oonishi's wife, Mana, for the first time. She is very unresponsive and almost seems to be off in her 'own world'.

1.title: FR - Texhnolyze [VOSTFR] - S01E04 - Synapse
1.plot:
Yoshii explains the politics behind Lux: At one time it was ruled by the Elder of Gabe, but in recent times the power has switched to Organ because of their military strength and efficient organization. He says that the people of Lux have lost their 'natural healing process' in their bodies. He also says that the Class built their own world to live in isolation from the people of Lux.

Doc explains all about the Texhnolyze process. Basically, is connects to the body's nervous system and transmits its own 'neural information' to the brain (hence why people with Texhnolyze have crazy vision). She also explains that the reason it all works is because of Lafia, which is mined in the Mine. Lafia basically relaxes the body's instinct to reject organs that are alien to the body and allows Texhnolyze to sync with the body.

1.title: FR - Texhnolyze [VOSTFR] - S01E05 - Loiter
1.plot: Ichise continues to struggle to adapt to his new Texhnolozyed body, what horrors lay a head. Yoshi, a mysterious visitor from the surface is gathering information concerning the gangs of Lukuss, what are his plans?

1.title: FR - Texhnolyze [VOSTFR] - S01E06 - Repetition
1.plot: Ichise finally confronts the man responsible for severing his limbs. After applying a Repetition of punches, he is retaken by the Organo.

1.title: FR - Texhnolyze [VOSTFR] - S01E07 - Plot
1.plot: With tension building between the Union and the Organo, will a war between gangs occur? What is Yoshii planning, is he the one responsible for tension between the gangs? Shinji has big plans for Lukuss, where does Ichise fit into his plans?

1.title: FR - Texhnolyze [VOSTFR] - S01E08 - Crucible
1.plot: It now appears an all out war between rival gangs is looming, who will survive the conflicts and who will be crushed?

1.title: FR - Texhnolyze [VOSTFR] - S01E09 - Wiggle
1.plot: Blood has been spilt on to the streets of Lukuss, all because of the work of Yoshii, what does he hope to gain by all of this bloodshed?  Onishi is losing his grip of power to those around him, how much longer can he remain in control.

1.title: FR - Texhnolyze [VOSTFR] - S01E10 - Conclusion
1.plot: The war for power continues, and Yoshii is helping to keep the hatred between the powers alive and well.  A top official of the Organo has come down from the hil, what if anything, will any of the warring factions do about this sudden appearance.

1.title: FR - Texhnolyze [VOSTFR] - S01E11 - Vagrant
1.plot: Those who want to take control, must now hold their ambitions in check.  Onishi is now under the protection of the higher ups in the organization, but there are those who continue to move against him.  Their ambitions might lead them to their downfall.

1.title: FR - Texhnolyze [VOSTFR] - S01E12 - Precognition
1.plot: Ran is overwhelmed by a vision of Ichise's future.

1.title: FR - Texhnolyze [VOSTFR] - S01E13 - Vista
1.plot: Gabe acquires high-quality weapons, beyond even those that the Alliance or Lakan could own and are preparing for a revolution.

1.title: FR - Texhnolyze [VOSTFR] - S01E14 - Rejection
1.plot: Ichise and Doc meet with Class.

1.title: FR - Texhnolyze [VOSTFR] - S01E15 - Shapes
1.plot: Michiko talks to Shinji behind Onishi's back.  Kohakura orders Ichise to kill Tsujinaka.

1.title: FR - Texhnolyze [VOSTFR] - S01E16 - Strain
1.plot: Ran is being discussed as a Watcher, relieving the duties her grandfather.  The invasion of Shapes has reached the city of Lakan.  A group of Salvation Alliance members discover someone is Texhnolyzed.

1.title: FR - Texhnolyze [VOSTFR] - S01E17 - Dependence
1.plot: Shapes continue the rampage as it targets Onishi, Michiko, and Ichise.  Doc reveals to Ichise what really happened to the vail containing her mother's long-dead cells.

1.title: FR - Texhnolyze [VOSTFR] - S01E18 - Throne
1.plot: Ran has a vision of the Obelisk sweeping over her.  The killings, mostly against the Organo continue.  Shinji and Onishi meet with the elders of Class.

1.title: FR - Texhnolyze [VOSTFR] - S01E19 - Encephalopathy
1.plot: Voices are creeping the underground world (the film which Doc and Ichise watched) retelling Lux's history, the surface world of Hades, and many prophetic things about Ichise.  Shinji attemps to kill everyone of the Class.  A voice sounding like Ran tells Onishi to kill the Obelisk.

1.title: FR - Texhnolyze [VOSTFR] - S01E20 - Myth
1.plot: Ichise and Kano have a showdown.  What will become or remain of the city of Lux?  More origins of the Lux is revealed.

1.title: FR - Texhnolyze [VOSTFR] - S01E21 -
FR - Texhnolyze [VOSTFR] - S01E22 -

meta.plot: Au temps de la prohibition, un quartier échappe à la loi. Ses rues sont contrôlées par la mafia et l’alcool circule librement. À une époque, Avilio a vécu dans ce district, mais depuis une sale embrouille qui a coûté la vie à sa famille, il s’est mis au vert. Jusqu’au jour où il reçoit une mystérieuse lettre qui réveille en lui son désir de vengeance et l’exhorte à retourner là-bas. Il décider alors d’infiltrer la famille Vanetti et devient proche d’un certain Nero...

1.title: FR - 91 Days [VOSTFR] - S01E01 - Night of the Murder
1.plot: After returning to the Lawless district seven years after the massacre of his family, Avilio gets reaquanted with an old friend and they both dive into a new way of life.

1.title: FR - 91 Days [VOSTFR] - S01E02 - Phantom of Falsehood
1.plot: Don Vanetti's mansion hosting a wedding between the Don's daughter Fio and a man named Ronaldo. But behind the scenes of this grand party, the family feels uneasy. Relations with the Orco family have been getting worse, and Vanno, in particular, can't restrain his anger after the death of his friend. Nero decides to form a plan to strike back at Fango - and he's recruiting Avilio to play the central role.

1.title: FR - 91 Days [VOSTFR] - S01E03 - Where the Footfalls Lead
1.plot: Avilio has taken the first step towards his revenge. But Serpente's body, which he needs to provide his cover story, has disappeared, casting suspicion on Avilio. Nero orders him to bring back Serpente's body at gunpoint. Meanwhile, Fango is also looking for Serpente. Exactly what did happen in those missing hours?

1.title: FR - 91 Days [VOSTFR] - S01E04 - Losing to Win, and What Comes After
1.plot: After the incident with Vanno and Serpente, a war between the Vanetti and Orco families is all but guaranteed. Nero goes on the run with Avilio, where the two learn a great deal about each other's personality and past. But a huge man and his hunting dog are pursuing them.

1.title: FR - 91 Days [VOSTFR] - S01E05 - Blood Will Have Blood
1.plot: Avilio and Nero shake off the Orco family's assassin and continue to lie low, until Nero's regular call to Barbero reveals a new development in the conflict: Orco wants peace with the Vanetti family. Still, Barbero suggests that it might not be best for Nero to return to Lawless immediately, and tells Nero and Avilio to meet him at "the Lodge" in two days.

1.title: FR - 91 Days [VOSTFR] - S01E06 - To Slaughter a Pig
1.plot: Frate's betrayal has left Nero on the run with the Vanetti family in pursuit. To save the badly injured Tigre, Nero seeks the aid of Fango, who is currently holed up on the Island. In exchange for his help, Nero agrees to bring Don Orco to Fango alive. To that end, Avilio and Nero head for Orco's base of operations, Ottimo Orco.

1.title: FR - 91 Days [VOSTFR] - S01E07 - A Poor Player
1.plot: The Fango family has taken the place of the Orco family. Fango is grateful to Nero and Avilio for their hard work, and asks them to continue to work with him. But Nero is worried that Fango is going to use him and then kill him. It's then that Frate declares war on his brother, and things get to where there's no turning back. Nevertheless, Fio asks Ronaldo to make peace with Nero.

1.title: FR - 91 Days [VOSTFR] - S01E08 - Behind the Curtain
1.plot: A hard-nosed prohibition agent, Delphy, is installed in Lawless. He claims he will cut out the mafia's power in the city, and begins clamping down on bars that sell bootleg liquor. Naturally, the Vanetti family considers him an unwelcome presence. While keeping one eye on Fango, Nero comes down hard against Defphy, and Avilio stands with him. But another man watches them with complicated feelings about the situation.

1.title: FR - 91 Days [VOSTFR] - S01E09 - Black and Deep Desires
1.plot: The identity of the traitor who leaked information to Fango and tried to kill Nero has been revealed. With Corteo taken into custody, the Vanetti family has been thrown into an uproar. But Corteo stubbornly refuses to confess anything, a fact which will likely lead to his death. Though he won't admit to it, Avilio is unusually shaken by this. And then Cerotto pays him a visit.

1.title: FR - 91 Days [VOSTFR] - S01E10 - Proof of Good Faith
1.plot: Having succeeded Don Vanetti, Nero decides to send a shipment of Lawless Heaven to Don Galassia to make way for the family's expansion. While the rest of the family searches for Corteo, Nero assigns Avilio to the task. He boards a boat to Chicago with his trunk. But where is Corteo? And what was the motivation behind the one who sent him the letter?

1.title: FR - 91 Days [VOSTFR] - S01E11 - All for Nothing
1.plot: Vincent's dream, the Vanetti playhouse, is now complete. Don Galassia and his nephew Strega, have been invited. In public, they are friendly with Nero, but they are the large family that controls Chicago. The playhouse's opening the next day is wreathed in tension. And at last, the day Avilio's been waiting for has arrived.

1.title: FR - 91 Days [VOSTFR] - S01E12 - Slipping Through the Dirty Sky
1.plot: A violent gunfight erupts at the playhouse. Black smoke arises from explosions on the Island. The Vanetti family is on the brink of destruction, and Avilio has accomplished his revenge. Where does he go from here? And what will Nero do, having lost everything at Avilio's hands?

1.title: FR - 91 Days [VOSTFR] - S01E13 -

meta.plot: Gojô Wakana est un jeune lycéen qui rêve de fabriquer des poupées traditionnelles japonaises. Obnubilé par sa passion, il ne se tient pas au courant des dernières tendances et a donc du mal à s'intégrer dans sa classe. Pour lui, Kitagawa Marine, qui est toujours au centre de l'attention, vit dans un autre monde que lui. Mais un beau jour, grâce à un heureux hasard, il va se retrouver à partager un secret avec Marine ?! Deux mondes qui n'auraient jamais dû se croiser vont s'entremêler !

1.title: FR - MY DRESS-UP DARLING - S01E01 - Someone Who Lives in the Exact Opposite World as Me
1.plot: Wakana Gojo is a high school student who dreams of becoming a kashirashi for hina dolls one day. Because his life is all about making hina dolls, he has a hard time fitting into his class because his interests are so different than anyone else’s. His classmate, Marin Kitagawa, is always at the center of attention and from another world. One day, they both end up on classroom cleaning duty and…

1.title: FR - MY DRESS-UP DARLING - S01E02 - Wanna Hurry Up, and Do It?
1.plot: After seeing how passionate Marin is about the things she loves, Wakana decides to help her with making outfits. He decides to help her out in making a cosplay for Shizuku Kuroe-tan from the game "Slippery Girls 2." They had planned to reconvene later to get the measurements started, but Marin couldn't wait and ends up coming to Wakana's house over the weekend.

1.title: FR - MY DRESS-UP DARLING - S01E03 - Then Why Don't We?
1.plot: Marin and Wakana start to grow closer as he helps her create her cosplay. Though he's happy about the fact that Marin treats him the same way at school as anywhere else, he also starts to worry about the fact that other people think it's weird that they're hanging out. Despite that, Marin takes Wakana shopping so they can look for materials needed for her cosplay.

1.title: FR - MY DRESS-UP DARLING - S01E04 - Are These Your Girlfriend's?
1.plot: Wakana felt relieved just for a moment after they got all of the materials they needed for Marin's cosplay, but then he's shocked to find out that he needs to finish the cosplay in two weeks. On top of that, his grandfather, Kaoru, hurts his back, so Wakana has to run the shop and he also has midterms. Wakana feels overwhelmed and gets depressed, wondering if he'll ever actually become a kashirashi at this point.

1.title: FR - MY DRESS-UP DARLING - S01E05 - It's Probably Because This Is the Best Boob Bag Here
1.plot: Wakana finally completes the Shizuku cosplay. Marin is super excited that she gets to dress as her beloved Shizuku-tan and suggests that the two of them go to a cosplay event the next day. Even though it's her first time at a cosplay event, Marin gets requests for photos left and right. Wakana is overwhelmed with feelings as he watches over Marin, but...

1.title: FR - MY DRESS-UP DARLING - S01E06 - For Real?!
1.plot: Marin and Wakana have a successful first cosplay event. Because of something Wakana said, Marin's mental and emotional state starts to change a little. Even though she was just spending time at the Gojos' home with Wakana and Kaoru to wash her outfit, she can't seem to calm down. Meanwhile, a certain person comes to Gojo Dolls after seeing the photos Marin posted onto social media of her Shizuku cosplay.

1.title: FR - MY DRESS-UP DARLING - S01E07 - A Home Date With the Guy I Wuv Is the Best
1.plot: Marin is going to do a group cosplay with her idol, the cosplayer "Juju," whose real name is Sajuna Inui, and they're going to cosplay as Black Lobelia and Black Lily from the magical girl anime "Flower Girl Blaze!!". Wakana heads over to Marin's home so that he can borrow the "Blaze!!" DVDs for research to make the outfits for them.

1.title: FR - MY DRESS-UP DARLING - S01E08 - Backlighting Is the Best
1.plot: Juju's photographer and younger sister, Shinju Inui, meets Wakana and Marin for the first time. They're shocked at how opposite her appearance is to Sajuna, but they quickly become closer when they excitedly talk about cameras. Later on, Sajuna suggests that they check out the abandoned hospital that they'll be using for their group cosplay but...

1.title: FR - MY DRESS-UP DARLING - S01E09 - A Lot Happened After I Saw That Photo
1.plot: Gojo is able to complete the Black Lobelia and Black Lily cosplays thanks to Marin's help. Both Marin and Sajuna try on their cosplays and they're both excited about how nicely they turned out, and Marin is even more excited about their upcoming group cosplay. When the day finally arrives, Marin and Sajuna get an unexpected visitor.

1.title: FR - MY DRESS-UP DARLING - S01E10 - We've All Got Struggles
1.plot: Wakana and Shinju's secret plan was a success, which added to the success of their first group cosplay photoshoot. As Juju and Shinju look through the photos from the photoshoot, the sisters find out how they both feel. Meanwhile, Marin and Wakana are enjoying their summer vacation. They were preparing Marin's cosplay for a fighting game character named Veronica-tya, but then a problem arises...

1.title: FR - MY DRESS-UP DARLING - S01E11 - I Am Currently at a Love Hotel
1.plot: ﻿Liz is a succubus who appears in one of Marin's favorite slice of life series, "SuccIDK." Marin had some interest in cosplaying Liz-kyun but didn't think she could pull it off until Wakana gave her a little push. With the cosplay ready, they head to a studio for a photoshoot, but the studio happened to be a rather unexpected location.

1.title: FR - MY DRESS-UP DARLING - S01E12 - My Dress-Up Darling
1.plot: Summer vacation is coming to a close. Wakana received an SOS from Marin, who hadn't finished her homework, so he ended up helping her study at her house. They later realize that Marin had forgotten some math drills at school, so they go to get them. While alone at the school, Marin and Wakana make plans to go to a summer festival together. And when that day finally arrived...

2.title: FR - MY DRESS-UP DARLING - S02E13 -
FR - MY DRESS-UP DARLING - S02E14 -
FR - MY DRESS-UP DARLING - S02E15 -
FR - MY DRESS-UP DARLING - S02E16 -

meta.plot: Basée sur des œuvres d'Edgar Allan Poe, cette série malfaisante suit une dynastie familiale qui s'effondre lorsque ses héritiers commencent mystérieusement à mourir.

1.title: FR - La Chute de la maison Usher - S01E01 - A Midnight Dreary
1.plot: A wealthy CEO faces a criminal investigation amid tragedy, trauma — and a supernatural threat. The Usher family learns an informant lurks among them.

1.title: FR - La Chute de la maison Usher - S01E02 - The Masque of the Red Death
1.plot: Motivated by money and revenge, Perry hosts an exclusive masque-rave that takes a twisted turn. A young Roderick pitches a revolutionary new opioid.

1.title: FR - La Chute de la maison Usher - S01E03 - Murder in the Rue Morgue
1.plot: In charge of the Ushers' publicity, Camille conspires to spin controversy in her family's favor and expose the grim details of her sister's experiments.

1.title: FR - La Chute de la maison Usher - S01E04 - The Black Cat
1.plot: Leo adopts a black cat who soon brings evil — and a mysterious woman — into his home, while Roderick struggles with terrifying hallucinations.

1.title: FR - La Chute de la maison Usher - S01E05 - The Tell-Tale Heart
1.plot: Victorine inches closer to testing her heart technology on a patient until tensions erupt between her and Alessandra. Dupin makes a chilling confession.

1.title: FR - La Chute de la maison Usher - S01E06 - Goldbug
1.plot: Pym digs up disturbing information on Verna. With her marriage on the decline, Tamerlane hosts a turbulent product launch that shatters expectations.

1.title: FR - La Chute de la maison Usher - S01E07 - The Pit and the Pendulum
1.plot: A furious Frederick sets out to handle unfinished business. Madeline receives an ominous message at an old haunt. Dupin grows wary of Roderick's motives.

1.title: FR - La Chute de la maison Usher - S01E08 - The Raven
1.plot: In 1980, Roderick and Madeline seize a chance to cement their fortune — for a price. Decades later, the remaining Ushers reckon with the consequences.

meta.plot: Kay Scarpetta, médecin légiste de renom, reprend son ancien poste à la tête de l'institut médico-légal de Virginie, où elle enquête sur un meurtre troublant qui lui rappelle étrangement sa première grande affaire, il y a de ça plusieurs décennies. En 1998, Scarpetta enquête aux côtés du Sergent Pete Marino et de l'agent du FBI Benton Wesley sur une série de meurtres par strangulation.

1.title: FR - Scarpetta - S01E01 - Bridge of Time (1)
1.plot: After returning to her former position as Virginia's Chief Medical Examiner, renowned forensic pathologist Dr. Kay Scarpetta investigates a sinister and mysterious murder that eerily resembles her first big case from 28 years prior.

1.title: FR - Scarpetta - S01E02 - Kay
1.plot: In present day, Scarpetta and Marino enlist Lucy to track down their former prime suspect from 28 years ago, Matt Petersen, due to a possible link between the cases; while in the past, the two investigate Petersen's potential involvement in his wife's murder.

1.title: FR - Scarpetta - S01E03 - Dot
1.plot: Present Scarpetta and Marino visit Matt Petersen at his Compound while Lucy and Officer Blaise Fruge team up to search for the murder victim's boyfriend. The past investigation takes a turn when Scarpetta is called into the Health Commissioner's office regarding leaks to the press.

1.title: FR - Scarpetta - S01E04 - Pete
1.plot: Present Scarpetta and Marino uncover troubling similarities between their murder victim and the 'accidental' death of a jogger six months earlier; while in the past, Scarpetta suspects that someone from within her own office is attempting to sabotage her, and she makes a huge discovery in the case.

1.title: FR - Scarpetta - S01E05 - Hello from space, my Dear
1.plot: In the present, Scarpetta and Benton's marriage is put to the test when Kay is called in by the FBI to perform autopsies on two dead astronauts found at a crash site that might connect to the murder victim. In the past, it's Friday night and the killer could strike at any moment.

1.title: FR - Scarpetta - S01E06 - Benton
1.plot: Past Scarpetta and Benton devise a risky plan to bait the serial killer out of hiding. In the present, Scarpetta orders the exhumation of the dead jogger's body, convinced that there's a connection between the jogger's death and the murder victim. At home, Kay and Benton's mounting secrets and lies come to a boiling point.

1.title: FR - Scarpetta - S01E07 - L + J
1.plot: After confirming a connection between the two deaths in the present, Scarpetta faces mounting professional and personal crises. In the past, she makes a breakthrough in the case.

1.title: FR - Scarpetta - S01E08 - Bridge of Time (2)
1.plot: In the past, Scarpetta and Marino wrestle with the lie that bonds them forever. In the present, with her family, career, and marriage now fractured, Scarpetta finds herself all alone while a killer is still on the loose...

meta.plot: Contraints à la suite d'un chantage d'œuvrer pour des individus très dangereux, un frère et une sœur complètement bras cassés deviennent le duo le plus loufoque du crime organisé.

1.title: FR - Big Mistakes - S01E01 - Get Your Nonna a Necklace
1.plot: Tasked with buying a sentimental gift for their dying grandmother, bickering siblings Nicky and Morgan commit a minor crime with major consequences.

1.title: FR - Big Mistakes - S01E02 - I Will Do ANYTHING To Survive
1.plot: A dangerous ultimatum from Yusuf forces Morgan and Nicky to run interference at an already chaotic family funeral.

1.title: FR - Big Mistakes - S01E03 - Show Me The Money
1.plot: Nicky and Morgan's success is short-lived when they're coerced into a "friendship" with Yusuf's boss. Linda reconsiders her run for mayor.

1.title: FR - Big Mistakes - S01E04 - Weakness Always Exposes Itself
1.plot: Nicky and Tareq share their feelings, while Morgan and Max get personal at couple's therapy. A surprise guest adds extra spice to a family dinner.

1.title: FR - Big Mistakes - S01E05 - James 4:17
1.plot: When a job at a cattle auction goes sideways, Nicky must leverage his job to prove his worth. Linda's campaign gets a boost from a political scandal.

1.title: FR - Big Mistakes - S01E06 - You F-ck With My Family, You F-ck With Me
1.plot: A fed-up Nicky tries to cut ties with Ivan — and his sister — as he prepares to come clean about Tareq. Morgan attends an uncomfortable baby shower.

1.title: FR - Big Mistakes - S01E07 - I’ve Really Enjoyed My Time With You
1.plot: Anxious to impress an important partner, Ivan splashes out on a trip to Miami. Nicky and Morgan connect on a new level after a stimulating dinner.

1.title: FR - Big Mistakes - S01E08 - Rock, Paper, Scissors
1.plot: Morgan and Nicky brace for blowback from the Miami operation as their family, friends and some unwelcome faces converge around the election results.

meta.plot: À la suite de la mort de leur mère, leur pilier et leur repère, onze frères et sœurs âgés de 7 à 23 ans tentent de rester unis face à l’adversité. Mais pour certains d’entre eux, le trafic de drogue semble être la seule issue pour survivre. Une décision loin de faire l’unanimité et qui met à rude épreuve la solidité de leurs liens familiaux.

1.title: FR - Bandi - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - Bandi - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR - Bandi - S01E03 - Episode 3
FR - Bandi - S01E04 - Episode 4
FR - Bandi - S01E05 - Episode 5
FR - Bandi - S01E06 - Episode 6
FR - Bandi - S01E07 - Episode 7
FR - Bandi - S01E08 - Episode 8

meta.plot: Après s'être isolé de sa famille avec sa fille pendant plus de dix ans, Malcolm se retrouve entraîné de nouveau dans leur sillage lorsque Hal et Lois exigent qu'il soit présent à la fête de leur 40e anniversaire de mariage.

1.title: FR - Malcolm : Rien n'a changé - S01E01 - Episode One
1.plot: "Hey, I remember him! That freaky kid genius with the weird family. And look, he's happy and successful and even has a nice daughter. I'm glad everything worked out for him. Wait... Oh. Wow, I did not see that coming."

1.title: FR - Malcolm : Rien n'a changé - S01E02 - Episode Two
1.plot: "How does someone who's supposed to be so smart ruin everything so quickly? He's even fighting with his daughter, how's he going to fix that? I bet his dad can help… Jeez, never mind."

1.title: FR - Malcolm : Rien n'a changé - S01E03 - Episode Three
1.plot: "Dude, this one is crazy. Fistfights, young love, revenge, dark secrets, acrobatics, a birth and a kidnapping.... Sorry, I'll stop before I spoil it."

1.title: FR - Malcolm : Rien n'a changé - S01E04 - Episode Four
1.plot: "They've really created a mess. And they think that many people with that many different problems can be solved in one episode? There's no possible way. I'd like to see them try."

meta.plot: Après la Guerre des Clones, Maul projette de reconstruire son organisation criminelle sur une planète épargnée par l'Empire. Il croise la route d'un jeune Padawan désabusé, qui pourrait devenir l'apprenti qu'il cherche, et une aide précieuse dans sa quête de vengeance.

1.title: FR - Star Wars : Maul - Seigneur de l'ombre - S01E01 - Chapter 1: The Dark Revenge
1.plot: In the criminal underworld of Janix, Maul enacts a plan to consolidate his power.

1.title: FR - Star Wars : Maul - Seigneur de l'ombre - S01E02 - Chapter 2: Sinister Schemes
1.plot: Maul seeks to enlighten his new prisoners while Lawson pursues him.

1.title: FR - Star Wars : Maul - Seigneur de l'ombre - S01E03 - Chapter 3: Whispers in the Unknown
FR - Star Wars : Maul - Seigneur de l'ombre - S01E04 - Chapter 4: Pride and Vengeance
1.plot: A confrontation between Lawson and Maul threatens everyone.

1.title: FR - Star Wars : Maul - Seigneur de l'ombre - S01E05 - Chapter 5: Inquisition
FR - Star Wars : Maul - Seigneur de l'ombre - S01E06 - Chapter 6: Night of the Hunted
FR - Star Wars : Maul - Seigneur de l'ombre - S01E07 - Chapter 7: Call to the Oblivion
1.plot: As enemies close in, Maul is forced to make a stand.

1.title: FR - Star Wars : Maul - Seigneur de l'ombre - S01E08 - Chapter 8: The Creeping Fear
1.plot: As enemies close in, Maul is forced to make a stand.

meta.plot: Dans une monarchie constitutionnelle du XXIe siècle, une femme qui a tout pour elle mais reste une roturière croise le chemin d’un prince qui, malgré sa lignée royale, se sent impuissant — donnant naissance à un amour qui défie les barrières sociales.

1.title: FR - Perfect Crown [VOSTFR] - S01E01 - Who Says I'm Marrying Into Royalty?
1.plot: Heiress Seong Hui-ju is dismissed as a commoner. Under pressure to marry, an encounter with Prince Yi an sparks an idea. Why not marry into royalty?

1.title: FR - Perfect Crown [VOSTFR] - S01E02 - A Title In Exchange For Marriage
1.plot: Everyone is determined to play matchmaker. Queen Mother plots to secure Yi An a bride. He must decide whether to partake in Hui-ju’s scheme.

meta.plot: Un accident technologique pousse un couple marié à remettre en question l'équilibre de pouvoir dans leur relation. Ce qui commence comme une remise en question tourne vite à l'affrontement alors que chacun tente de reprendre le contrôle sur leur mariage.

1.title: FR - The Miniature Wife - S01E01 - Lady Tomato and Mr F Tomato-Head
1.plot: Lindy Littlejohn is shrunk to a height of six inches in a technological mishap and is forced to re-evaluate her relationship with husband Les. leading to battle for power.

1.title: FR - The Miniature Wife - S01E02 - Merry Christmas, Lindy!
1.plot: Lindy adjusts to life by exploring Lulu's doll's house, while Les works to find a way to make her big again, but neither are prepared to face their biggest obstacle of corporate red tape.

1.title: FR - The Miniature Wife - S01E03 - What Category Is Shrinking Your Wife?
1.plot: While Les devises ways to test his regrowth formula, his colleague has other plans to rescue Lindy. The couple's daughter's untimely arrival home from college for the holidays leaves Les scrambling to come up with an excuse for Lindy's absence.

1.title: FR - The Miniature Wife - S01E04 - Don't Freak Out!
1.plot: RPW takes Lindy on a romantic date to show her he is truly there for her, but her plagiarism scandal looms in the background; back from college, Lulu gets a glimpse at what life would be like back in her hometown.

meta.plot: Depuis les temps mythologiques, la déesse Athéna et le seigneur des Enfers Hadès s'affrontent lors de "Guerres Saintes". Notre histoire se déroule au 18e siècle, bien avant les événements de Saint Seiya (Les Chevaliers du Zodiaque) durant lesquels Seiyar et ses compagnons ont combattu Hadès aux côtés d'Athéna.  Le rideau se lève sur une aventure inédite où s'entremêlent les destins du Chevalier Pégase, du seigneur des Enfers Hadès, et de la déesse Athéna de l'époque, sur fond de Guerre Sainte !

1.title: FR - Saint Seiya - The Lost Canvas - S01E01 - Promise
1.plot: The Crusades. The battles that take place every 200 or so years between the Goddess Athena and Hades, the Lord of the Underworld. In an 18th century European country town, just as the Crusade is dawning, live Tenma and Alone. They have completely different personalities but are the best of friends. One day, Alone meets a woman named Pandora. From that day, the cogs of fate are set into motion.

1.title: FR - Saint Seiya - The Lost Canvas - S01E02 - The Awakening of Hades
1.plot: Golden Saints gather around the Goddess Athena, in preparation for the new Crusade against the Underworld warriors. Around this time, as Tenma undergoes training to become a Saintly Warrior, he is reunited with Alone's little sister, Sasha, and learns that she has transformed into Athena. Meanwhile, thinking of his dear and far off friend Tenma, Alone feels lonely and falls into despair.

1.title: FR - Saint Seiya - The Lost Canvas - S01E03 - The Holy War Begins
1.plot: Tenma and the other Saintly Warriors head towards an Italian town where the warriors of the Underworld are gathered. Tenma realizes it is his hometown, and worries about Tenma's fate. However, Alone appears amongst the burning ruins of the town as the reincarnation of Lord Hades. Tenma - shocked by the evil transformation of his dear friend - is mercilessly attacked by Alone.

1.title: FR - Saint Seiya - The Lost Canvas - S01E04 - The Prayer Wreaths
1.plot: Though she learns of the death of Tenma, and of her brother Alone's reincarnation as Hades, Sasha pushes away her sadness and steadfastly fulfills her role as Athena. Meanwhile, while carrying Tenma's body, the Silver Saint Yato is visited by the Goddess Yuzuriha, who brings him to Jamir. The Chief of Jamir, Hakurei, tells him Tenma is not completely dead.

1.title: FR - Saint Seiya - The Lost Canvas - S01E05 - The Poison Rose
1.plot: One of the three strongest Specters, Minos, uses invisible puppet strings to invade the supposedly impenetrable Sanctuary, killing Saints off one after the other. However, a poisonous rose garden appears between Minos and the Sanctuary, and Pisces Golden Saint Albafica appears. Albafica is immune to the rose's poison, and uses his own blood to kill the Specter Niobe, however...

1.title: FR - Saint Seiya - The Lost Canvas - S01E06 - Floral Funeral Procession
1.plot: Albafica fights against Minos with all his might, releasing the "crimson zone." However even that is deflected by the Specter's armor, causing Albafica to finally fall. Minos then heads towards the village outside of the Sanctuary that Albafica was trying to protect. The village is destroyed, and even Agasya, a young girl mourning Albafica, is targeted by Minos.

1.title: FR - Saint Seiya - The Lost Canvas - S01E07 - Golden Rain
1.plot: Tenma and the others learn the immortal Specters can be destroyed using berries from the Goldenrain tree that grows in the Underworld. When they reach the tree, the Gemini Golden Saint Asmita appears. Asmita has been studying meditation in his own world, void of light, and so criticizes Tenma's fighting ability, releasing the "Tenmaihourin" - which takes away a person's five senses.

1.title: FR - Saint Seiya - The Lost Canvas - S01E08 - A Favorable Wind
1.plot: Tenma bears the full force of Asmita's attack. When suddenly the Goldenrain reacts to Tenma's rising cosmos and bears fruit. Asmita disappears, and Tenma and the others gather the berries and flee from the Underworld. However, even Jamir feels the evil reach of new Specters. Who should appear before them but Asmita.

1.title: FR - Saint Seiya - The Lost Canvas - S01E09 - Giant Star
1.plot: The Taurus Golden Saint Aldebaran uses his amazing strength to defeat the Specters as they attempt to close in on the Sanctuary. Then, full of hostility, Heavenly Violent Star Vennu Kagaho comes down, ready to fight. They are equally matched in this breathtaking battle, when Kagaho, affected by Aldebaran's words, binds Aldebaran with his flames and releases a series of major attacks.

1.title: FR - Saint Seiya - The Lost Canvas - S01E10 - The Avent
1.plot: Aldebaran bears Kagaho's powerful attack, and defeats him with the "Titan's Nova," a move so powerful it breaks the earth. However, Aldebaran feels Kagaho is not a threat, and does not finish him off. The hurt Kagaho flies away into the twilight sky. Later at the Sanctuary, Athena's protective spell is violently torn by a giant cosmos. Lord Hades appears before Sasha!

1.title: FR - Saint Seiya - The Lost Canvas - S01E11 - Unreachable
1.plot: Tenma finally returns to the Sanctuary, and challenges Alone to a fight, only to have the tables turned. Then, the Pope arrives and uses an amulet from a previous incarnation of Athena to release the "Talisman Cage" and weaken Hades' power. He tries to seal Hades in the Sanctuary using Athena's cosmos. However, Pandora rushes over...

1.title: FR - Saint Seiya - The Lost Canvas - S01E12 - Relentless Sacrifice
1.plot: The painting covering the whole sky, "The Lost Canvas," is said to destroy everyone on earth when completed. Tenma hears to his dismay that the once kind Alone is now trying to destroy all of humanity as Hades. Meanwhile, Pandora desperately realizes that the reincarnation of Hades is incomplete, and sends an assassin to kill Tenma, who is stopping the completion of the reincarnation.

1.title: FR - Saint Seiya - The Lost Canvas - S01E13 - The Departure
1.plot: Tenma leaves the Sanctuary and has resolved to fight on his own. However, on orders from the Pope, he is stopped by the Cancer Golden Saint Manigold and locked in a cell. Back at the Hades palace, so as to fully awaken Hades, who's full reincarnation is prevented by Alone's memories, Hypnos and Thanatos encourage Pandora to trap Hades into an atrium.

meta.plot: Tandis qu’il rentrait chez lui après l'école, Usato a été transporté dans un autre monde avec deux autres élèves. Cependant, il comprend vite que lui est arrivé là par erreur ! Mais les choses changent lorsqu'il se découvre une aptitude unique pour la magie curative. Désormais, il s'entraîne au-delà des limites, utilisant ses capacités d'auto-guérison pour acquérir une force énorme et une endurance inégalée.

1.title: FR - The Wrong Way to Use Healing Magic - S01E01 - Dragged into Another World!
1.plot: Ordinary high school student Usato is mistakenly suddenly summoned to another world along with his classmates and student council members Suzune and Kazuki.

1.title: FR - The Wrong Way to Use Healing Magic - S01E02 - The Training from Hell Begins!
1.plot: Following the discovery of his unique power, Usato has been recruited/abducted into the kingdom's Rescue Team. And he has no idea the hellacious training he's in for!

1.title: FR - The Wrong Way to Use Healing Magic - S01E03 - Brutal! The Darkness of Llinger!
1.plot: Usato is quite literally thrown into his next training assignment: surviving the wild woods known as the Darkness of Llinger until he can slay its most fearsome inhabitant.

1.title: FR - The Wrong Way to Use Healing Magic - S01E04 - Rescue Team Member Usato!
1.plot: As the demon threat looms over the kingdom, Captain Rose decides it's high time for Usato to get a taste of what a healer's job is like on the battlefield. She tests his resolve, both mentally and physically.

1.title: FR - The Wrong Way to Use Healing Magic - S01E05 - Usato, Back in the Forest!
1.plot: Usato gets drafted to help Inukami on a training expedition outside the castle to get some real combat experience. He's only supposed to be there in case things go wrong, but things definitely go wrong!

1.title: FR - The Wrong Way to Use Healing Magic - S01E06 - Impending Danger...!
1.plot: Captain Rose receives grim news from the king: invasion is imminent. Can she rally her small team before all hell breaks loose? Moreover, is Usato even ready for war?

1.title: FR - The Wrong Way to Use Healing Magic - S01E07 - A Night of Decisions!
1.plot: Now that Usato, Kazuki, and Suzune all know that war is upon them, they must each steel themselves to face the battle ahead—because the invasion is coming, ready or not!

1.title: FR - The Wrong Way to Use Healing Magic - S01E08 - Battalion Commander Rose
1.plot: A look back into Rose's past as a new battalion commander and her relationship with her old team. Just who were they? And where did things go wrong...?

1.title: FR - The Wrong Way to Use Healing Magic - S01E09 - The End and the Beginning
1.plot: Resolve bridges Rose's tragic past into her future as she and the rest of the Rescue Team make their way to the battlefield where they're fated to cross with the demons.

1.title: FR - The Wrong Way to Use Healing Magic - S01E10 - Unhinged?! The Black Knight Appears!
1.plot: Usato, Kazuki, and Suzune finally set foot on their first battlefield. The conflict is harrowing enough as it is for all of them, but reports of a terrifying foe among the demon army have Usato in particular shaking in his boots...

1.title: FR - The Wrong Way to Use Healing Magic - S01E11 - Wham! Ultimate Healing Punch!
1.plot: Usato's first battle quickly turns into a waking nightmare when he realizes his friends are tangling with their fated foe, the Black Knight. Can he make it in time to save them?

1.title: FR - The Wrong Way to Use Healing Magic - S01E12 - The True Face of the Black Knight!
1.plot: Now that Usato's first clash with the Demon Lord's army is over, he's going to have to deal with the aftermath—including a prisoner of war.

1.title: FR - The Wrong Way to Use Healing Magic - S01E13 - The Journey Begins!
1.plot: With Usato's first battle behind him, it's time to face the path ahead. He receives a special diplomatic quest from the king as well as a personal request from the mysterious fox girl, both of which will take him on a winding journey to new lands.

meta.plot: Cette série retrace la vie et la carrière de la star brésilienne du football Ronaldinho, de jeune prodige à icône mondiale du sport.

1.title: FR - Ronaldinho : le seul et l'unique - S01E01 - Everything Was Part of a Plan
1.plot: Raised in a soccer household with a talented brother, Ronaldinho finds passion that changes his life — and sets him on a path straight to the World Cup.

1.title: FR - Ronaldinho : le seul et l'unique - S01E02 - The Best in the World
1.plot: After the 2002 World Cup, Ronaldinho ascends to global superstardom — but his lifestyle doesn't sit well with everyone.

1.title: FR - Ronaldinho : le seul et l'unique - S01E03 - Who Said I Was Finished?
1.plot: Ronaldinho returns to Brazil to achieve a final goal in his career and reconnect with his roots. He finds unprecedented support during difficult times.

meta.plot: Dans cette série dramatique inspirée de faits réels, un inspecteur et son équipe se lancent dans une enquête acharnée pour découvrir la vérité sur la disparition d'un adolescent.

1.title: FR - Quelqu'un doit savoir [VOSTFR] - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - Quelqu'un doit savoir [VOSTFR] - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR - Quelqu'un doit savoir [VOSTFR] - S01E03 - Episode 3

meta.plot: Un nouveau gros joueur est apparu sur le fameux VRMMO NewWorld Online ! Aucune attaque ne peut l’atteindre, et grâce à son talent de poison létal, les monstres comme les autres joueurs se font tous démolir ! Qui se cache derrière ce personnage qui, de par son style de combat original, se fait surnommer « la forteresse vivante » ou encore « le boss final » ? Une jeune fille débutante ! Maple commence à peine le jeu, sur les conseils de son amie Sally. N’y connaissant pas grand-chose, elle a mis tous ses premiers points de compétence en VIT (défense).

1.title: FR - BOFURI : Je suis pas venue ici pour souffrir alors j'ai tout mis en défense [VOSTFR] - S01E01 - Defense and First Battle
1.plot: Convinced by her friend Risa to try "NewWorld Online", Kaede begins her VRMMO adventure by going all-in on defense because she doesn't want to get hurt.

1.title: FR - BOFURI : Je suis pas venue ici pour souffrir alors j'ai tout mis en défense [VOSTFR] - S01E02 - Defense and Friends
1.plot: Maple enters a battle royal and is hunted down by a horde of players. Risa uses her swimming talent to explore an underwater cave with her character Sally.

1.title: FR - BOFURI : Je suis pas venue ici pour souffrir alors j'ai tout mis en défense [VOSTFR] - S01E03 - Defense and Reaching Second Level
1.plot: After Maple gets nerfed, her and Sally do some exploring before challenging the dungeon that leads to the second level. Can they clear it in time for the second event?

1.title: FR - BOFURI : Je suis pas venue ici pour souffrir alors j'ai tout mis en défense [VOSTFR] - S01E04 - Defense and Second Event
1.plot: Though Maple and Sally get off to a clumsy start in the second event, their tenacity and teamwork is rewarded in more ways than one.

1.title: FR - BOFURI : Je suis pas venue ici pour souffrir alors j'ai tout mis en défense [VOSTFR] - S01E05 - Defense and Spoils of War
1.plot: Maple and Sally make new friends and fall into more trouble as the second event winds down. But to reach their goal of 20 medals, they may have to resort to PvP.

1.title: FR - BOFURI : Je suis pas venue ici pour souffrir alors j'ai tout mis en défense [VOSTFR] - S01E06 - Defense and Reinforcements
1.plot: Maple leaps at the chance to create a guild and searches for a place to call home. But to compete in the upcoming event, they'll need to recruit more help.

1.title: FR - BOFURI : Je suis pas venue ici pour souffrir alors j'ai tout mis en défense [VOSTFR] - S01E07 - Defense and Upgrades
1.plot: Everyone in the guild is hard at work leveling up and preparing for what's to come. Maple manages to "cheese" her way through a quest to help a sick NPC.

1.title: FR - BOFURI : Je suis pas venue ici pour souffrir alors j'ai tout mis en défense [VOSTFR] - S01E08 - Defense and Third Event
1.plot: The third event is packed with people making it hard to compete for cowbells. Following the event, Maple gets into gear to explore new content on the third level.

1.title: FR - BOFURI : Je suis pas venue ici pour souffrir alors j'ai tout mis en défense [VOSTFR] - S01E09 - Defense and Fourth Event
1.plot: Guilds prepare for all-out war as the big competition finally begins. But sneaky Sally has some tricks up her sleeve that hopefully gives them the upper hand.

1.title: FR - BOFURI : Je suis pas venue ici pour souffrir alors j'ai tout mis en défense [VOSTFR] - S01E10 - Defense and Attack
1.plot: Sally faces certain death and there's trouble back at the base. Despite having a good start, if the guild hopes to place top ten, Maple Tree must go on the attack.

1.title: FR - BOFURI : Je suis pas venue ici pour souffrir alors j'ai tout mis en défense [VOSTFR] - S01E11 - Defense and Mighty Foe
1.plot: Maple Tree is vastly outnumbered and struggles to stay on the board. As guilds get wiped out left and right, they must face a mighty foe that may be their undoing.

1.title: FR - BOFURI : Je suis pas venue ici pour souffrir alors j'ai tout mis en défense [VOSTFR] - S01E12 - Defense and Bonds
1.plot: Maple may have maxed out her defense, but can she protect her friends and base from a legendary player? This time, Maple may have met her match.

2.title: FR - BOFURI : Je suis pas venue ici pour souffrir alors j'ai tout mis en défense [VOSTFR] - S02E01 - Maxing Defense and Christmas
2.plot: As Christmas draws near, New World Online finally releases Level 4 concurrently with a special holiday event in which rare and exclusive items are at stake.

2.title: FR - BOFURI : Je suis pas venue ici pour souffrir alors j'ai tout mis en défense [VOSTFR] - S02E02 - Maxing Defense, Level 5, and Level 6
2.plot: Maple's guildmates must explore Level 5 without her while she recovers from a cold. Right after Maple finally gets a chance to see Level 5, the gang finds out that Level 6 is already on the way, but this time it's Sally who can't seem to go in...

2.title: FR - BOFURI : Je suis pas venue ici pour souffrir alors j'ai tout mis en défense [VOSTFR] - S02E03 - Maxing Defense and the Seventh Event
2.plot: New World Online's seventh event begins, and it's a battle tower event with multiple difficulty levels. Maple and Sally team up to take on the highest difficulty level, giving the game's admins more than they bargained for...

2.title: FR - BOFURI : Je suis pas venue ici pour souffrir alors j'ai tout mis en défense [VOSTFR] - S02E04 - Maxing Defense and Tower Conquest
2.plot: Maple and Sally continue to work their way up the ten floors of the tower as they attempt to complete the event before anyone else.

2.title: FR - BOFURI : Je suis pas venue ici pour souffrir alors j'ai tout mis en défense [VOSTFR] - S02E05 - Maxing Defense and Tentacles
2.plot: Level 7 has been released, and it introduces a new feature: players can now tame monsters. The members of Maple Tree explore the new level in search of their ideal companions.

2.title: FR - BOFURI : Je suis pas venue ici pour souffrir alors j'ai tout mis en défense [VOSTFR] - S02E06 - Maxing Defense and Tame Monsters
2.plot: The members of Maple Tree continue their searches for monster companions. Iz's search leads her on a quest to find rare materials in challenging areas, so she asks Maple and Mii for help.

2.title: FR - BOFURI : Je suis pas venue ici pour souffrir alors j'ai tout mis en défense [VOSTFR] - S02E07 - Maxing Defense and Hunting for Crystals
2.plot: With the eighth event about to start, Maple and Sally decide to leisurely explore Level 7. Their plans quickly change when they stumble upon a strange crystal...

2.title: FR - BOFURI : Je suis pas venue ici pour souffrir alors j'ai tout mis en défense [VOSTFR] - S02E08 - Maxing Defense and the Eighth Event
2.plot: The preliminary round of the eighth event finally begins. The members of Maple Tree fight their hardest, making the most of their new monster companions, in hopes of ranking high for the main event.

2.title: FR - BOFURI : Je suis pas venue ici pour souffrir alors j'ai tout mis en défense [VOSTFR] - S02E09 - Maxing Defense and Setting Up a Base
2.plot: The main portion of the eighth event begins. The members of Maple Tree work as two teams to try to acquire medals, then come back together to set up a base for protection against the stronger monsters that come out at night.

2.title: FR - BOFURI : Je suis pas venue ici pour souffrir alors j'ai tout mis en défense [VOSTFR] - S02E10 - Maxing Defense and New Teams
2.plot: The second day of the eighth event begins with forced teleports that send players in all directions, a dark void that swallows up some parties' bases, and the disabling of maps.
