On top of all this, those who survived the first night are left to fight either alone or with members of rival guilds.

2.title: FR - BOFURI : Je suis pas venue ici pour souffrir alors j'ai tout mis en défense [VOSTFR] - S02E11 - Maxing Defense and New Parties
2.plot: Maple Tree, Order of the Holy Sword, and Flame Emperors have all come together in Maple Tree's base. Assorted members from all three guilds form parties to head out and fight monsters so they can earn more medals during the second night of the event.

2.title: FR - BOFURI : Je suis pas venue ici pour souffrir alors j'ai tout mis en défense [VOSTFR] - S02E12 - Maxing Defense and the Big Final Battle
2.plot: The third and final day of the eighth event brings the strongest monsters yet. Maple Tree, Flame Emperors, and Order of the Holy Sword work together to fight off the final onslaught. The goal is to make it to the end of the event alive...

1.title: FR - We Are All Trying Here [VOSTFR] - S01E01 - Please Show Me the Script
1.plot: After 20 years trying to make his debut film, Hwang Dong-man flails through life, irritating his director friends — until one day he meets Byeon Eun-a.

1.title: FR - We Are All Trying Here [VOSTFR] - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: While Dong-man deals with rock bottom, Ko Hye-jin delivers devastating news. Meanwhile, Eun-a seeks counseling as she struggles at work.

1.title: FR - American Gladiators [VOSTFR] - S01E01 - Heat 1
1.plot: A new generation of Contenders step into the Gladiator Arena to take on 16 fierce new Gladiators in Whiplash, Powerball, Joust, and The Eliminator.

1.title: FR - American Gladiators [VOSTFR] - S01E02 - Heat 2
1.plot: New contenders clash with the Gladiators in Collision, The Ring, Hang Tough, and The Eliminator.

1.title: FR - American Gladiators [VOSTFR] - S01E03 - Heat 3
1.plot: Four new contenders take on The Wall, The Gauntlet, The Edge, and The Eliminator in a night packed with surprises.

meta.plot:
Rainbow Johnson raconte aux siens son expérience d'avoir grandi au sein d'une famille multiraciale dans les années 1980. Les parents de Bow, Paul et Alicia, sont contraints de quitter la communauté hippie, dans laquelle ils étaient jusqu'alors établis. Leur installation en banlieue leur permettra-t-elle d'offrir à leurs enfants un cadre plus propice à leur épanouissement ? Une chose est sûre : le choc de ce changement de vie est terrible pour la petite tribu. Inscrits dans une école publique, Bow, son frère et sa soeur doivent trouver leurs marques dans cette nouvelle vie, dans laquelle ils ne sont perçus ni comme noirs ni comme blancs. Les épreuves de cette famille illustrent les défis, les dilemmes et les difficultés de parvenir à se construire quand on ne rentre pas dans le moule.

Spin-off de Black-ish centré sur les jeunes années de Rainbow Johnson (Tracee Ellis Ross).

1.title: FR - mixed•ish - S01E01 - Becoming Bow
1.plot: Rainbow Johnson’s parents decide to move from a hippie commune to the suburbs to better provide for their family. As her parents struggle with the challenges of their new life, Bow and her siblings navigate a mainstream school in which they’re perceived as neither black nor white.

1.title: FR - mixed•ish - S01E02 - The Warrior
1.plot: For Rainbow and Alicia, fitting in at school and standing out at work are hard enough; but with the added pressure from stay-at-home-dad Paul to make the world a little better every day, it might just be impossible.

1.title: FR - mixed•ish - S01E03 - Let Your Hair Down
1.plot: After a teacher tells Rainbow to make sure her hair is “neat” for picture day, she becomes self-conscious and begins a complicated relationship with her hair. Meanwhile, Johan and Santamonica struggle with their own hair identity.

1.title: FR - mixed•ish - S01E04 - Love Is a Battlefield
1.plot: When Rainbow is tasked with a school assignment that requires her to trace her roots, she learns that history is more complicated for her mom’s side of the family than it is for her dad’s. Meanwhile, Johan struggles to balance his new love of ice hockey with what his friends think is cool.

1.title: FR - mixed•ish - S01E05 - All She Wants to Do Is Dance
1.plot: It’s time for the Johnson kids’ first school dance, but before Bow can dance the night away, she’ll have to consider the social impact of her date choice. Johan finds an outfit for the dance and discovers his love of fashion, while Santamonica spends some time with Harrison.

1.title: FR - mixed•ish - S01E06 - Girls Just Want to Have Fun
1.plot: The popular girls at school ask Rainbow to join their group Halloween costume as Tootie from “The Facts of Life.” She thinks this is finally her opportunity to fit in, but Denise views the situation differently. Meanwhile, Alicia doesn’t want the kids to go trick-or-treating after Harrison and his colleagues tell her about all the dangerous things that can happen.

1.title: FR - mixed•ish - S01E07 - Puttin' On the Ritz
1.plot: The kids are excited to learn more about their grandad after Harrison invites the crew to family day at his country club. Although Paul thinks it’s a bad idea, he is eventually overruled. Meanwhile, Alicia attempts to fit in at the country club but ends up fighting with Denise about keeping it real.

1.title: FR - mixed•ish - S01E08 - Weird Science
1.plot: Rainbow’s passion for science deflates when her peers convince her that science isn’t cool. During Career Day, Rainbow code-switches and pursues journalism in order to fit in, only to find that the local news anchor attending the fair has also been hiding a part of herself. Meanwhile, Harrison works to mold a testimony from Denise who struggles to be anyone but herself, and Santamonica tries to steal the spotlight back after Johan suffers an injury.

1.title: FR - mixed•ish - S01E09 - Papa Don't Preach
1.plot: Paul struggles when Rainbow and Santamonica want to participate in a beauty pageant. Meanwhile, Johan gets teased for crying after a martial arts tournament, and Alicia and Harrison struggle with the best way for him to fight back.

1.title: FR - mixed•ish - S01E10 - Do They Know It's Christmas?
1.plot: Alicia and Paul strive to maintain their “Winter Solstice” traditions from the commune, but their parents want to have a more traditional Christmas with the kids. Meanwhile, Alicia’s dad, Lynwood, competes with Harrison to be the kids’ favorite Grandad.

1.title: FR - mixed•ish - S01E11 - When Doves Cry
1.plot: In the wake of the Challenger tragedy, Rainbow and her family handle their grief in different ways. Denise realizes that life is too short, so she vows to right all the wrongs she’s done in her life (and she’s done a lot of bad).

1.title: FR - mixed•ish - S01E12 - It's Tricky
1.plot: Rainbow wants to battle stereotypes at school after she joins the track team and feels like her friends only see her skin color. Meanwhile, Alicia and Paul battle stereotypes of their own, and Santamonica tries to be cool enough to hang out with Rainbow’s friends.

1.title: FR - mixed•ish - S01E13 - Pride (In the Name of Love)
1.plot: It’s the first-ever nationally recognized Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. Day and Paul is speaking at the school assembly about his personal experiences with him. Johan and Santamonica think Paul is going to embarrass them; and being ashamed of her father had never occurred to Rainbow, so they decide to ditch. Meanwhile, Alicia thought she had convinced Harrison to take pro bono civil rights cases on MLK Day to honor him, but he plans to go golfing instead, so Denise steps in to help.

1.title: FR - mixed•ish - S01E14 - True Colors
1.plot: Paul is shocked to hear from his estranged mother who wants to visit for Rainbow’s 13th birthday and soon learns more about why she abandoned him. Meanwhile, Rainbow sees turning 13 as a huge turning point in her life and wants a big birthday party, but Alicia wants to celebrate all the things Rainbow missed out on over the years while on the commune.

1.title: FR - mixed•ish - S01E15 - This Charming Man
1.plot: Rainbow is excited to go on her first real date with Bryce for Valentine’s Day, but when her friends weigh in on the rules and expectations, she becomes very nervous. Alicia is wary to let Rainbow start dating and invites Bryce’s parents over for dinner to cross-examine them; and Paul gets into a fight with Bryce’s dad over politics.

1.title: FR - mixed•ish - S01E16 - She Works Hard for the Money
1.plot: Alicia gets a bonus after winning a big case and wants to buy a nice car, but having been raised on the “fifty-cent principal,” Denise wants her to buy two cars in lesser condition so she can have one. Meanwhile, Paul tries to teach Rainbow, Johan and Santamonica about the value of money.

1.title: FR - mixed•ish - S01E17 - Say Hello, Wave Goodbye
1.plot: The Johnsons welcome an African American family that has just moved into their mostly white neighborhood. Santamonica doesn’t get along with the new neighbor’s daughter, until she gives Santamonica attitude. Meanwhile, Rainbow is excited to celebrate her one-month anniversary with Bryce, but he tells her some devastating news.

1.title: FR - mixed•ish - S01E18 - Parents Just Don’t Understand
1.plot: Rainbow clashes with her parents over her love for rap music. Plus, Harrison steps in to take Denise to a charity benefit and helps her realize she deserves better men in her love life.

1.title: FR - mixed•ish - S01E19 - Doctor! Doctor!
1.plot: Rainbow’s friend Rebecca gets mono (“the kissing disease”), and after helping her out, she becomes interested in the medical field. Alicia fibs to Paul about getting a flu shot, and when Denise gets sick, their distrust of the medical community comes to light. Meanwhile, Johan and Santamonica go to live with Harrison while Denise is sick and start to enjoy his lavish lifestyle.

1.title: FR - mixed•ish - S01E20 - Bad Boys
1.plot: Alicia and Paul try to deflect Johan’s interest in going to cop camp and one day becoming a police officer. Meanwhile, Rainbow gets her first role as a school safety patrol and quickly realizes that with great power comes great responsibility.

1.title: FR - mixed•ish - S01E21 - Nothing’s Gonna Stop Us Now
1.plot: After learning that scientists predict the ozone layer will be depleted in 20 years, Rainbow panics and tries to implement Earth Day at school to influence some change. To her surprise, she is met with resistance, forcing her to takes matters into her own hands to fight for the cause.

1.title: FR - mixed•ish - S01E22 - Every Little Step
1.plot: The kids meet a homeless man in their neighborhood, and Paul and Alicia try to have an honest conversation with them about the homelessness crisis. Paul and Rainbow try to help by starting a soup kitchen at Rainbow’s school. Meanwhile, Denise has a new boyfriend and Alicia doesn’t think they’re a match.

1.title: FR - mixed•ish - S01E23 - You Got It All
1.plot: Alicia and Paul are both offered jobs to work on Jesse Jackson’s presidential campaign, but Alicia’s law firm makes her an enticing offer to stay. Rainbow struggles to define her racial identity as “mixed” when she’s given a form to answer “black” or “white.”

2.title: FR - mixed•ish - S02E01 - Sweet Child O’ Mine
2.plot: After finding out Johan has been pretending to be a different race, Rainbow gets mad, and Alicia and Paul try to find a way to encourage Johan to be proud of being Black.

2.title: FR - mixed•ish - S02E02 - Brand New Funk
2.plot: Alicia and Denise bicker over who is the stronger Black woman, and Paul and Harrison come up with a new way of showing affection. Meanwhile, Rainbow is put in charge of Johan and Santamonica and she struggles to maintain control over them.

2.title: FR - mixed•ish - S02E03 - On My Own
2.plot: Paul surprises the family by inviting one of his students to live with them, and Paul and Alicia compete to be his mentor. Meanwhile, Rainbow has a crush on their new house guest.

2.title: FR - mixed•ish - S02E04 - Livin’ on a Prayer
2.plot: Bow takes an interest in going to church with her friends, much to her parents’ dismay. Meanwhile, Santi and Jonah try to prepare for hell.

2.title: FR - mixed•ish - S02E05 - My Prerogative
2.plot: It’s not all fun and games when Paul wants to crash Denise and Alicia’s neighborhood Spades match, so they teach him about the cultural and racial significance of the game. Meanwhile, Santi, Johan and Bow learn about divorce after watching a movie, so Harrison tries to teach them that divorce can be cool.

2.title: FR - mixed•ish - S02E06 - Just the Two of Us
2.plot: Alicia and Denise realize they've been boxed into Black women stereotypes at the law firm, and Harrison's attempts to help ends up causing more harm. Meanwhile, Paul worries his new job is taking time away from spending time with the kids, so he makes an overzealous effort to connect with each one individually.

2.title: FR - mixed•ish - S02E07 - You Give Love a Bad Name
2.plot: Paul and Alicia encourage sex-positive conversations with Bow until she invites her crush over to their house and they worry about what's happening behind closed doors. Meanwhile, Johan and Alvin are looking at advertisements, magazines and even the constellations to see if they can see boobs.

2.title: FR - mixed•ish - S02E08 - She's a Bad Mama Jama
2.plot: Alicia's mom, Grandma Shireen, stays with the Johnson's after her surgery, but taking care of grandma becomes a full-time job. Meanwhile, Denise tests each of the kids to see who is best fit to take care of her when she gets old one day.

2.title: FR - mixed•ish - S02E09 - Material Girl
2.plot: Alicia treats herself to a new Louis Vuitton bag; but when Paul finds out, he demands that she return it and Alicia ends up sneaking around with the bag behind his back. Meanwhile, Bow bribes Alicia to buy her a Jansport backpack so she can impress her friends at school.

2.title: FR - mixed•ish - S02E10 - You Dropped a Bomb on Me
2.plot: Rainbow's best friend, Tamika, asks her to plan her 14th birthday party, so Bow goes out of her way to make sure it's the coolest birthday party ever. Meanwhile, Paul and Alicia battle it out for who is the "coolest," and Harrison takes Santi and Johan on a trip to Mexico for some quality time.

2.title: FR - mixed•ish - S02E11 - Tainted Love
2.plot: After the Johnson family discovers Harrison on a date, Paul decides to give Harrison some dating advice; Alicia feels a little insecure after finding out all of her children go to Aunt Denise for advice.

2.title: FR - mixed•ish - S02E12 - Walk This Way
2.plot: Paul tries to become better friends with Denise so he uses his white privilege to help her out with her errands. Meanwhile, Rainbow, Jonah and Santi are selling chocolate bars for their school fundraiser but they pick up some questionable sales tactics.

2.title: FR - mixed•ish - S02E13 - Forever Young
2.plot: Rainbow Johnson recounts her experience growing up in a mixed-race family in the '80s and the constant dilemmas she and the family members had to face over whether to assimilate or stay true to themselves.

meta.plot: Lorsqu'une série de meurtres rituels frappe Oslo, un inspecteur talentueux doit naviguer entre des indices déconcertants, la corruption et ses propres démons pour arrêter le tueur.

1.title: FR - Harry Hole - S01E01 - 36 Seconds
1.plot: Five years after a traumatic incident, Detective Harry Hole buries himself in case work when a weapons seizure points to a shocking suspect.

1.title: FR - Harry Hole - S01E02 - Ghosts
1.plot: As a gruesome and perplexing murder strikes Oslo, a personal tragedy drags Harry back into bad habits and an obsessive search for answers.

1.title: FR - Harry Hole - S01E03 - To Silence the Voices
1.plot: After crossing one line too many, Harry is reassigned to a missing persons case that raises his suspicions. Waaler sets a trap with lethal consequences.

1.title: FR - Harry Hole - S01E04 - After They Are Dead, Before They Are Cold
1.plot: The police must call on Harry’s expertise after a chilling package arrives by post. But with Waaler leading the case, his return comes at a price.

1.title: FR - Harry Hole - S01E05 - The Devil's Star
1.plot: With evidence suggesting they're dealing with a serial killer, the police shift tactics and chase a promising lead as gang violence escalates across Oslo.

1.title: FR - Harry Hole - S01E06 - Five
1.plot: Unable to find a logical connection between the symbolism, locations and victims, Harry attempts a mind-bending method to crack the serial killer’s code.

1.title: FR - Harry Hole - S01E07 - Joseph's Blessing
1.plot: Patterns and riddles point Harry in the direction of the next possible murder. But is he finally one step ahead, or still chasing the killer’s tail?

1.title: FR - Harry Hole - S01E08 - The Woman in the Water
1.plot: Hunted by his own, Harry goes underground with his captive to prove a theory — only to uncover another deceptive layer separating him from the truth.

1.title: FR - Harry Hole - S01E09 - Duke Ellington's Piano
1.plot: Harry closes in on the secret behind the murders, but as his worst fears surface, the cost of his relentless pursuit of justice becomes alarmingly clear.

meta.plot: Un groupe de cinq enfants est kidnappé dans une école maternelle. Parallèlement, la géologue Lena (Karolina Kominek) et son équipe de collègues se préparent pour une expédition scientifique en Antarctique. Lorsqu'il s'avère que la suspecte de l'enlèvement est Ada (Alicja Wieniawa-Narkiewicz), la fille adolescente de Lena, la mère met de côté ses projets professionnels et retourne dans sa ville natale de Wałbrzych pour retrouver sa fille, avec laquelle elle a perdu contact il y a de nombreuses années.

1.title: FR - Black Daisies - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - Black Daisies - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR - Black Daisies - S01E03 - Episode 3
FR - Black Daisies - S01E04 - Episode 4
FR - Black Daisies - S01E05 - Episode 5
FR - Black Daisies - S01E06 - Episode 6
FR - Black Daisies - S01E07 - Episode 7
FR - Black Daisies - S01E08 - Episode 8

meta.plot: Kevin Hart sillonne les États-Unis et cherche la nouvelle star du stand-up, aidé par des légendes de l'humour. La victoire se jouera en direct, à l'issue d'un vote en temps réel.

1.title: FR - Funny AF with Kevin Hart [VOSTFR] - S01E01 - Auditions: New York City
1.plot: Kevin joins Keegan-Michael Key to scout the comedy talent at New York's famous Comedy Cellar, but only the funniest will make it to callbacks.

1.title: FR - Funny AF with Kevin Hart [VOSTFR] - S01E02 - Auditions: Los Angeles
1.plot: At the Hollywood Improv, Kevin and Tom Segura face a tough choice after LA's hardest working comics put on an impressive showcase.

1.title: FR - Funny AF with Kevin Hart [VOSTFR] - S01E03 - Auditions: Chicago
1.plot: Kumail Nanjiani welcomes Kevin to Chicago's Second City for a showcase with sky-high expectations. Will these comics dazzle the crowd or fizzle onstage?

1.title: FR - Funny AF with Kevin Hart [VOSTFR] - S01E04 - The Callbacks
1.plot: Chelsea Handler joins Kevin, Keegan and Kumail to judge callbacks in LA. Who will crush their way to the final 10 — and who will wilt under pressure?

meta.plot: Lorsqu'une jeune mère membre d'une secte croise le chemin d'un mystérieux inconnu, elle se lance dans une liaison risquée qui réveille des désirs et de sombres secrets.

1.title: FR - Unchosen - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Rosie defies the Fellowship's orders to search the forest for her missing daughter — only to encounter a mysterious outsider who seems sent from above.

1.title: FR - Unchosen - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: While Rosie fights the temptation of forbidden fruit, her husband Adam must make a difficult decision to prove himself worthy of a divine opportunity.

1.title: FR - Unchosen - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Transgressions within the Fellowship lead to severe punishment. A frightening event buys Rosie unexpected bargaining power in exchange for her silence.

1.title: FR - Unchosen - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: As a fresh recruit of the Fellowship attracts unwanted attention, Rosie sets her sights on a thrilling new experience beyond the community confines.

1.title: FR - Unchosen - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Questions of loyalty, power and sin emerge in the wake of a tragic incident, sparking a big change in the community and a tense search for answers.

1.title: FR - Unchosen - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: When little Grace's safety becomes uncertain once again, Rosie's rising suspicions lead to a chilling question: who is the true devil among them?

meta.plot: Une nouvelle génération de jeunes femmes à Gilead est aux prises avec l’avenir sombre qui les attend. Pour ces jeunes femmes, grandir à Gilead est tout ce qu’elles ont jamais connu, n’ayant aucun souvenir tangible du monde extérieur avant leur endoctrinement dans cette vie. Confrontés à la perspective d’être mariées et de vivre une vie de servitude, elles seront forcées de chercher des alliés, nouveaux et anciens, pour les aider dans leur lutte pour la liberté et la vie qu’elles méritent.

1.title: FR - The Testaments - S01E01 - Precious Flowers
1.plot: In the halls of Aunt Lydia's premarital preparatory academy, the finest in Gilead, Agnes is assigned to mentor a new Pearl Girl, and a fragile alliance begins.

1.title: FR - The Testaments - S01E02 - Perfect Teeth
1.plot: As Agnes begins the rituals that mark her coming of age, she struggles with the confusing stirrings of adolescence. Meanwhile, Daisy is subjected to Gilead's system of discipline.

1.title: FR - The Testaments - S01E03 - Daisy
1.plot: An incident on a school trip spurs Daisy's memories of Toronto, revealing her past and a world shattered by violence.

1.title: FR - The Testaments - S01E04 - Green Tea
1.plot: As the Green girls gather for a tea party, Daisy struggles to keep on task, while Agnes begins to understand what being a woman in Gilead means.

1.title: FR - The Testaments - S01E05 - Ball
1.plot: At a debutante-style ball where Green girls are paraded before Commanders, the illusion of elegance begins to fray. Agnes discovers Garth's status has changed.

1.title: FR - Gone [VOSTFR] - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: When an impassive headmaster reports that his wife has gone missing to the police, her disappearance soon takes a sinister turn.

meta.plot: En liberté conditionnelle, Jonas peine à se réinsérer. Chef virtuose, il accepte un marché périlleux : diriger la cuisine d’un restaurant gastronomique et fermer les yeux sur le blanchiment d’argent auquel il sert de couverture… Une comédie noire au sang chaud, aussi vigoureuse au montage que créative dans l’assiette.

1.title: FR - Reykjavík Fusion - S01E01 - Just One
1.plot: Talented chef Jónas tries to regain his family's trust after imprisonment. Shunned by society, he accepts illicit funds to open a restaurant, leading him to money laundering. This jeopardizes his parole, life, and loved ones.

1.title: FR - Reykjavík Fusion - S01E02 - Foundation
1.plot: Jónas helps Marý make the deceased mule disappear but is compelled to lend a helping hand to the man's daughter searching for him.

1.title: FR - Reykjavík Fusion - S01E03 - Fresh Gooseberries
1.plot: Jonas pays Rosa's debt to the rival gang with Kristjan's money.

1.title: FR - Reykjavík Fusion - S01E04 - Santa Mary Gran Reserva
1.plot: As police investigate Julia's accident, Jónas pushes away those he cares for, in hopes of protecting them.

1.title: FR - Reykjavík Fusion - S01E05 - Parent
1.plot: Jónas' and Katrín's spark re-ignites whilst Skúli connects Kristján to money laundering at the restaurant.

1.title: FR - Reykjavík Fusion - S01E06 - Hard Birch Plywood
1.plot: Kristján threatens Jónas and Katrín that he will kill their children if they don't comply.

meta.plot:
Trois femmes d'expérience, attirées par des hommes plus jeunes qu'elles, se rendent sur une île paradisiaque pour trouver l'amour. Mais un matin, tout bascule : leurs cadets ont disparu, remplacés par des hommes plus âgés. Cette situation inattendue va-t-elle faire vaciller leurs certitudes ?

Avec Estefania - Sandra - Lia

1.title: FR - Cougar Island - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - Cougar Island - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR - Cougar Island - S01E03 - Episode 3
FR - Cougar Island - S01E04 - Episode 4

meta.plot: Rattrapé par la justice après une nouvelle escroquerie, Eddy, un voyou surdoué en math, se voit proposer un deal : soit il passe sept ans derrière les barreaux, soit il accepte d’infiltrer pendant trois semaines un lycée en se faisant passer pour un prof, afin d’identifier l’enfant d’un criminel.

1.title: FR - Flunked - S01E01 - Infiltrated
1.plot: When small-time crook Eddy gets caught fleeing a club raid, he's offered a choice: serve jail time or go undercover as a math teacher in a high school.

1.title: FR - Flunked - S01E02 - Hacked
1.plot: A tense safety drill and Eddy's late-night meddling send the school into chaos, putting him at the center of suspicion — and closer to Tiphaine.

1.title: FR - Flunked - S01E03 - Landed
1.plot: On a class trip to Normandy, Eddy clumsily attempts to collect DNA samples for Lucie, and a botched attempt to impress Tiphaine sparks controversy.

1.title: FR - Flunked - S01E04 - Rebellious
1.plot: While a blockade at the school brings mass media attention, Eddy attempts to uncover a mole among the teachers, leading to a politically charged protest.

1.title: FR - Flunked - S01E05 - Viral
1.plot: Professor Fish goes viral across France as Lucie attempts to strike a deal with Sagirov's contact and Eddy makes a stand on local television.

1.title: FR - Flunked - S01E06 - Mothered
1.plot: Someone from the past sheds new light and fresh doubts on the case, while Eddy sets up a parent‑teacher meeting so Lucie can hunt for clues.

1.title: FR - Flunked - S01E07 - Stuck
1.plot: After a love letter softens Tiphaine's heart, a reckless lie causes accusations to fly and Lucie pushes Eddy beyond his limits to keep the mission alive.

1.title: FR - Flunked - S01E08 - Searching
1.plot: Snipers surround the school as the students settle into the baccalaureate. As panic mounts, Eddy goes rogue to protect a student — at his own peril.

meta.plot: Hawkins, hiver 1985. Nous voilà de retour dans une ville qui regorge de secrets, où nos héros adorés affrontent de nouveaux mystères… et une nouvelle vague de phénomènes étranges.

1.title: FR - Stranger Things : Chroniques de 1985 - S01E01 - Chapter One: Welcome to Hawkins, New Kid
1.plot: A surprising new threat alters the gang's plans to shovel snow for extra cash, bringing them face to face with danger and closer to a cool new student.

1.title: FR - Stranger Things : Chroniques de 1985 - S01E02 - Chapter Two: Bad Harvest
1.plot: Nikki joins the party — and the newly formed Hawkins Investigators Club. Strange things take root at a nearby farm and shake up the Winter Festival.

1.title: FR - Stranger Things : Chroniques de 1985 - S01E03 - Chapter Three: Evolution
1.plot: The kids look for answers about the mutant creatures plaguing their town and get a helpful lesson from Mrs. Baxter, their substitute science teacher.

1.title: FR - Stranger Things : Chroniques de 1985 - S01E04 - Chapter Four: The Confession
1.plot: A worried Mike decides to come clean to Hopper, and Dustin drags Steve into the H.I.C. Nikki welcomes Will to the mosh pit. Lucas and Max hit the arcade.

1.title: FR - Stranger Things : Chroniques de 1985 - S01E05 - Chapter Five: The Weekly Watcher
1.plot: When a photo that could put El in danger gets sold to a popular tabloid, the kids pull Nancy into a heist to get it back. If they can't? It's game over.

1.title: FR - Stranger Things : Chroniques de 1985 - S01E06 - Chapter Six: A Storm is Coming
1.plot: As a blizzard bears down on Hawkins, Dustin goes on a side quest, and Max and Lucas hear a cry for help. A bold move lands some of the gang in detention.

1.title: FR - Stranger Things : Chroniques de 1985 - S01E07 - Chapter Seven: Enter the Storm
1.plot: Lucas and Max seek higher ground to call in a Code Red. Across town, Will, Mike and Nikki are snowed in at school — and El can see they're not alone.

1.title: FR - Stranger Things : Chroniques de 1985 - S01E08 - Chapter Eight: The Party
1.plot: Dustin finds danger at the Food Mart when two terrifying creatures break in. The gang gears up to go underground just in time for Nikki's birthday.

1.title: FR - Stranger Things : Chroniques de 1985 - S01E09 - Chapter Nine: The Suspect
1.plot: In the wake of a shocking revelation, the H.I.C. digs in to investigate, splitting up into teams to search for more clues and uncover the truth.

1.title: FR - Stranger Things : Chroniques de 1985 - S01E10 - Chapter Ten: Countdown
1.plot: With time running out, the party pulls together for a brave battle to stay alive. Friends have to help friends — because Hawkins' future depends on it.

meta.plot: Avant de devenir Hulk Hogan, il s'appelait Terry Bollea. Découvrez l'homme derrière la légende du catch professionnel dans ce documentaire sans concession, tourné au cours des derniers mois de sa vie et incluant son ultime interview.

1.title: FR - Hulk Hogan: Real American - S01E01 - The Rise
1.plot: Who was Terry Bollea? From his discovery of wrestling to his storied rise to fame, the larger-than-life persona of Hulk Hogan is born.

1.title: FR - Hulk Hogan: Real American - S01E02 - Hulkamania
1.plot: WrestleMania III skyrockets Hulk into superstardom. He falls in love and becomes a father, but getting everything he always wanted comes at a steep cost.

1.title: FR - Hulk Hogan: Real American - S01E03 - Hollywood Hogan
1.plot: As retirement rumors swirl, a scandal ousts Hulk from the WWE. He pivots to TV and film, but wrestling still calls — and now it needs a villain.

1.title: FR - Hulk Hogan: Real American - S01E04 - Hulk vs Terry
1.plot: Forced to branch out, Hulk finds himself mired in controversy. He emerges with outspoken views, but his death leaves the world contemplating his legacy.

meta.plot: Zach Galifianakis explore le monde du jardinage en cultivant la curiosité des enfants et en sondant des experts excentriques. Un hommage ludique et décalé à la terre nourricière.

1.title: FR - Le Jardin de Zach - S01E01 - Apples
1.plot: Zach visits a local orchard to get to the core of how to grow apples, alongside some juicy conversations with apple-loving kids.

1.title: FR - Le Jardin de Zach - S01E02 - Tomatoes
1.plot: Fruit or vegetable? Zach enlists some expert farmers to unearth the secrets behind the best tomatoes — and learns they're more than just "pre-ketchup."

1.title: FR - Le Jardin de Zach - S01E03 - Foraging
1.plot: Zach strays from the garden into the wilderness to learn the art of finding food from two French foragers, culminating in a woodland tea party.

1.title: FR - Le Jardin de Zach - S01E04 - Root Vegetables
1.plot: Zach turns his curiosity about root vegetables into a trip through kid logic, farm fields and the surprisingly wild lives of carrots and potatoes.

1.title: FR - Le Jardin de Zach - S01E05 - Corn
1.plot: Zach gathers kernels of knowledge from a corn expert and rides shotgun with farmer Murray.

1.title: FR - Le Jardin de Zach - S01E06 - Compost
1.plot: From scents to science, Zach and his kid crew dig into composting, as an expert breaks down the dos and don'ts of making healthy soil.

meta.plot: Niall et Ruben sont comme des frères. Pas de lien de sang, mais une proximité totale. L’un est fougueux et loyal, l’autre doux et réservé. Deux jeunesses qui se croisent, unies par la mort et les circonstances, ne comptant que l’un sur l’autre… Trente ans plus tard, Ruben débarque au mariage de Niall. Il est nerveux, agité, différent de d’habitude. Et bientôt, une explosion de violence secoue leur vie, des années 80 à aujourd’hui. Capturant trois décennies de ces hommes brisés, HALF MAN explore la fraternité, la violence et la fragilité intense des relations masculines. Quand tout s’effondre… ce sont parfois les liens les plus proches qui se brisent le plus fort.

1.title: FR - Half Man - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: 1987. When their households merge, Niall and Ruben form a close and unsettling bond. An intimate yet epic exploration of what it means to be a man.

1.title: FR - Feride [VOSTFR] - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: After a week of relationship drama and office battles, Feride and Pinar wrap it up with a family visit.

1.title: FR - Feride [VOSTFR] - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR - Feride [VOSTFR] - S01E03 - Episode 3
FR - Feride [VOSTFR] - S01E04 - Episode 4
FR - Feride [VOSTFR] - S01E05 - Episode 5
FR - Feride [VOSTFR] - S01E06 - Episode 6

meta.plot: Une mystérieuse application promet d'exaucer des vœux — avant de déclencher un compte à rebours vers la mort. Un groupe d'ados pris au piège doit briser l'engrenage pour survivre.

1.title: FR - If Wishes Could Kill - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: After Girigo grants Choi Hyeong-wook a wish, he introduces the app to his friends, who brush him off. But soon, his behavior grows concerning.

1.title: FR - If Wishes Could Kill - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: After a sudden tragedy, Yoo Se-ah realizes Kim Geon-woo may be next and rallies her friends to find a solution. But Girigo proves too sinister to stop.

1.title: FR - If Wishes Could Kill - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Seeking to cast out evil, Kang Ha-joon takes Se-ah to his shaman sister — sending her to a cursed space filled with fear, trauma and abandonment.

1.title: FR - If Wishes Could Kill - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Ha-joon, Se-ah and Bangwool investigate Girigo’s origins, chasing an online friend of Hyeong-wook’s. They soon discover a house that may hold clues.

1.title: FR - If Wishes Could Kill - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: After a wild night out, Lim Na-ri discovers a terrifying truth. Soon, her jealousy takes hold of her as she navigates her feelings for Geon-woo.

1.title: FR - If Wishes Could Kill - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: Born from innocence, Kwon Si-won's friendship with Do Hye-ryung — steeped in jealousy, resentment and revenge — gives rise to Girigo and the curse.

1.title: FR - If Wishes Could Kill - S01E07 - Episode 7
1.plot: Facing sabotage from spirits, the group hunts for the original phone. But as they close in on their goal, danger and darkness lurk at every turn.

1.title: FR - If Wishes Could Kill - S01E08 - Episode 8
1.plot: On the brink of defeat, Se-ah confronts the evil behind the curse. Can she stop the unending deaths once and for all?

meta.plot: Un voyage dans l’infiniment petit… à l’intérieur du corps humain où les cellules, les sels minéraux, les virus… sont personnifiés et rappellent les personnages désormais célèbres des séries. Nous découvrons le fonctionnement du corps humain avec les commentaires souvent espiègles de Maestro dont le bureau est à l’intérieur du cerveau. Les bons (comme les globules blancs) combattent les méchants (virus et bactéries prennent les traits de Nabot et Teigneux), pour garder le corps humain en bonne santé et l’aider à se développer correctement.

1.title: FR - Il était une fois… la Vie - S01E01 - The Planet Cell
1.plot: The world of cells is incredible! Activating enzymes, stopping viruses, and managing the body’s police force: it’s all in a day’s work for Teacher.

1.title: FR - Il était une fois… la Vie - S01E02 - Birth
1.plot: After the first cell is fertilized, division and diversification take place to create the 60 trillion cells of the human body.

1.title: FR - Il était une fois… la Vie - S01E03 - The Body Sentinels
1.plot: The body’s police force is taught to neutralize its enemies (microbes and viruses), which reproduce at an alarming rate! It’s a very complex task.

1.title: FR - Il était une fois… la Vie - S01E04 - The Bone Marrow
1.plot: Red blood cells, the body’s police force, are created in the bone marrow but sometimes, the factory breaks down and wayward policemen come out. Uh oh!

1.title: FR - Il était une fois… la Vie - S01E05 - The Blood
1.plot: The steadfast red blood cells have come down with the flu! Pedrito and Psi get some help from the Teacher’s antibodies to beat the enemy.

1.title: FR - Il était une fois… la Vie - S01E06 - The Tiny Platelets
1.plot: Pedrito cuts his finger with a dirty knife. While the platelets try to cure the wound, the white blood cells fight off the filthy invaders.

1.title: FR - Il était une fois… la Vie - S01E07 - The Heart
1.plot: Globus takes Hemo and Globina on a tour through the human body’s cathedral: the heart and circulatory system. It’s an impressive adventure.

1.title: FR - Il était une fois… la Vie - S01E08 - Breathing
1.plot: Air bubbles travel from the nose to the lungs. In the swampy, mucus-filled areas, they meet the red blood cells that transport them around the body.

1.title: FR - Il était une fois… la Vie - S01E09 - The Brain
1.plot: Teacher introduces Hemo and Globina to the most mysterious organ: the brain. They learn about behavior, the senses, and much more.

1.title: FR - Il était une fois… la Vie - S01E10 - The Neurones
1.plot: The body’s messengers run around sending and receiving information about feelings like hunger and cold. They work day and night and never take breaks.

1.title: FR - Il était une fois… la Vie - S01E11 - The Eye
1.plot: Eyes are magical! They break down and transmit images to the brain. What happens if a speck of dust gets into one? It’s tear enzymes to the rescue.

1.title: FR - Il était une fois… la Vie - S01E12 - The Ear
1.plot: The ear is composed of cells that sense vibrations and transmit them to the brain. Then, the brain transforms them into words and sounds.

1.title: FR - Il était une fois… la Vie - S01E13 - The Skin
1.plot: Skin is the first barrier against external aggression and helps eliminate waste. From cuts and scrapes to bug bites, it stays pretty busy.

1.title: FR - Il était une fois… la Vie - S01E14 - The Mouth and the Teeth
1.plot: Yum! Candy! But sugar strengthens the bacteria around the gums and attacks the tooth enamel, which can cause cavities.

1.title: FR - Il était une fois… la Vie - S01E15 - The Digestion
1.plot: After a tasty meal the food starts its journey to the stomach where it will be broken down depending on what properties it has. But don’t overdo it!

1.title: FR - Il était une fois… la Vie - S01E16 - The Liver Factory
1.plot: The liver is fundamental. It doesn’t weigh a lot but it uses almost as much oxygen as the heart! It makes proteins, corpuscles, and helps heal cuts.

1.title: FR - Il était une fois… la Vie - S01E17 - The Kidneys
1.plot: Toxic elements head to the kidneys where they are categorized. The good ones are salvaged but the bad ones are sent to the bladder. Have a good trip!

1.title: FR - Il était une fois… la Vie - S01E18 - The Lymphatic System
1.plot: The huge lymph network transports everything to the body’s factories. Infectious intruders beware! This place is well protected.

1.title: FR - Il était une fois… la Vie - S01E19 - The Bones and the Skeleton
1.plot: The architecture that protects the body’s organs is magnificent! However, even the slightest fracture can cause significant damage.

1.title: FR - Il était une fois… la Vie - S01E20 - The Muscles and the Fat
1.plot: Muscles account for almost half the weight of the human body. They also need a ton of energy to do their jobs correctly.

1.title: FR - Il était une fois… la Vie - S01E21 - Toxin Wars
1.plot: Combat teams act as preventative barriers and are prepared to defend the cell’s nucleus against toxic gases and contaminants.

1.title: FR - Il était une fois… la Vie - S01E22 - The Vaccination
1.plot: Vaccines bring us so many benefits! People who don’t get vaccinated run the risk of contracting a disease that is stronger than our natural defenses.

1.title: FR - Il était une fois… la Vie - S01E23 - The Hormones
1.plot: At the heart of the hypothalamus, Teacher shows us how this region sends out orders to satisfy all the body’s needs.

1.title: FR - Il était une fois… la Vie - S01E24 - The Chain Of Life
1.plot: A walk in the forest is the perfect way to learn about the extraordinary food chain that exists between the sun, vegetation, animals, and man.

1.title: FR - Il était une fois… la Vie - S01E25 - Repairs and Changes
1.plot: Pedrito is 8 years old and is tired after a long day. When he goes to bed, Teacher and his helpers observe the activity that continues during sleep.

1.title: FR - Il était une fois… la Vie - S01E26 - And life goes on...
1.plot: Pedrito wants to know why his grandpa can’t play ball anymore, so he tells Pedrito an old story about a sphinx.

meta.plot: Un policier acharné et un procureur idéaliste, anciens camarades de classe au lycée, se retrouvent alors qu'ils enquêtent sur une affaire de meurtres en série à l'échelle nationale, ce qui les entraîne à la fois dans une traque périlleuse et dans un passé personnel non résolu.

1.title: FR - The Scarecrow [VOSTFR] - S01E01 - Tae Joo’s Comeback To Kangseong
1.plot: Kang Tae Joo returns to his hometown, Kangseong, after being demoted following his chief's arrest. On the first day at the Kangseong office, he finds out from his colleagues that an ex-convict from his past case has been beaten. Although he believes he is not the culprit, the situation doesn’t go as he thinks. While investigating the case, he meets his classmate, Cha Si Yeong, who has bullied him badly. Si Yeong greets Tae Joo with a smile, but it seems Tae Joo hasn’t moved on from the memory.

1.title: FR - The Scarecrow [VOSTFR] - S01E02 - Female Reporter In Police Operation
1.plot: After an uncomfortable reunion with Si Yeong, Tae Joo resumes tracking the serial killer. Ji Won, a female reporter, also joins the operation to catch the murderer. Meanwhile, Gi Beom proposes to Sun Yeong, but soon grows uneasy after seeing her leave work in her male colleague’s car. At the same time, Tae Joo, dispatched to a college student protest, spots a male student who resembles Gi Beom and begins to grow suspicious.

meta.plot: Cette série raconte les aventures extravagantes d'une bande d'enfants dont le quartier général est un bus anglais à impériale, abandonné sur un terrain vague.

1.title: FR - L'Autobus à impériale - S01E01 - Tiger Takes Off
1.plot: Tiger accidentally goes for a trip on a hovercraft Brains created.

1.title: FR - L'Autobus à impériale - S01E02 - The Case of the Missing Doughnut
1.plot: Doughnut eats an invisibility formula Brains invented.

1.title: FR - L'Autobus à impériale - S01E03 - Get a Movie On
1.plot: The gang make a film to enter a contest.

1.title: FR - L'Autobus à impériale - S01E04 - Star-Struck
1.plot: The gang are chased around Elstree Studios, as they look for a lost dog.

1.title: FR - L'Autobus à impériale - S01E05 - Happy Haunting
1.plot: Albert takes them to a stately home for a day out.

1.title: FR - L'Autobus à impériale - S01E06 - Summer Camp
1.plot: They camp in a field with a middle aged couple who get the worst of it.

1.title: FR - L'Autobus à impériale - S01E07 - The Pop Singer
1.plot: The group try to launch The Cool Cavalier's pop career with a disco.

1.title: FR - L'Autobus à impériale - S01E08 - Scooper Strikes Out
1.plot: Scooper is knocked out by the baseball and dreams he is with Alice in Wonderland.

1.title: FR - L'Autobus à impériale - S01E09 - The Go-Karters
1.plot: A biker sabotages the group's go-kart, so Spring ends up in court after a high speed police chase.

1.title: FR - L'Autobus à impériale - S01E10 - Robbie the Robot
1.plot: Brains invents a robot which is sent to rescue Tiger's tiger from a neighbors garden.

1.title: FR - L'Autobus à impériale - S01E11 - A Helping Hound
1.plot: The gang unsuccessfully try to help a woman decorate her house, but a lost dog comes to their aid.

1.title: FR - L'Autobus à impériale - S01E12 - Invaders from Space
1.plot: Men in spacesuits are advertising a new sweet called Planet 7, but the gang think it is an alien invasion.

1.title: FR - L'Autobus à impériale - S01E13 - Barney
1.plot: Barney is a one-man band who keeps getting moved on by the police.

1.title: FR - L'Autobus à impériale - S01E14 - Man's Best Friend
1.plot: The gang put on a show with aluminium foil as an entry fee to buy a guide dog for the blind.

1.title: FR - L'Autobus à impériale - S01E15 - United We Stand
1.plot: The owner of the yard that the gang use wants to turn it into a car park, but the kids sabotage his meeting with the Mayor.

1.title: FR - L'Autobus à impériale - S01E16 - Up to Scratch
1.plot: Billie has to look after a dog named Scratch which runs off after a man with a flea circus turns up.

1.title: FR - L'Autobus à impériale - S01E17 - A Hit for a Miss
1.plot: The boys fall for substitute teacher Miss Petit, which makes Billie jealous, and help her put on a show for an old folks home.

meta.plot: Le maire d'une ville de Nouvelle-Angleterre souhaite en faire une destination touristique, malgré les avertissements sur le fait qu'elle est maudite.

1.title: FR - Widow's Bay - S01E01 - Welcome to Widow's Bay!
1.plot: We hope you enjoyed the three-hour ferry to New England's best-kept secret! Ignore the warnings about the fog. Everything's fine.

1.title: FR - Widow's Bay - S01E02 - Lodging
1.plot: Cherish the historical charm of our local inn, which Mayor Loftis will prove is safe by spending a night there alone.

meta.plot: Une jeune femme travaillant comme agent de sécurité dans un aéroport se retrouve accidentellement en possession des lingots d'or d'un réseau de contrebande. Prise dans un tourbillon chaotique de cupidité et de trahison entre les différentes parties qui se disputent l'or, elle est consumée par le désir de s'approprier tout l'or.

1.title: FR - Gold Land - S01E01 - BETTING
1.plot: Customs officer Heeju agrees to help her pilot boyfriend Dokyung with a suspicious deal.

1.title: FR - Gold Land - S01E02 - HOMECOMING
1.plot: Hiding in the one place she swore she'd never return, Heeju guards the gold from her pursuers.

meta.plot: Autrefois mercenaire des forces spéciales, réputé pour sa capacité à survivre aux situations les plus désespérées, John Creasy est aujourd'hui rongé par un syndrome de stress post-traumatique intense. Déterminé à vaincre ses démons intérieurs, il entreprend un chemin de rédemption. Mais avant même de pouvoir s'adapter à cette nouvelle vie, il se retrouve de nouveau plongé dans le feu de l'action, plus que jamais en proie à un combat acharné.

1.title: FR - Man on Fire - S01E01 - One
1.plot: Sidelined by PTSD, Special Forces veteran John Creasy gets a second chance when an old friend hires him to investigate a terrorist plot in Brazil.

1.title: FR - Man on Fire - S01E02 - Two
1.plot: As they face relentless attacks from all sides, Creasy tries to help Poe reclaim her memories — and discovers no one can really be trusted.

1.title: FR - Man on Fire - S01E03 - Three
1.plot: Creasy leverages Tiago to gain access to Osmar's hideout. Poe befriends a sensitive teen enlisted to protect her from the dangers of the favela.

1.title: FR - Man on Fire - S01E04 - Four
1.plot: The favela goes on high alert when enemies arrive with an agenda. Creasy races against time to extract information in a high-stakes hostage situation.

1.title: FR - Man on Fire - S01E05 - Five
1.plot: With a new adversary on his trail, Creasy hatches a plan to get Poe and the others out of the country. Vico offers Livro a chance at a fresh start.

1.title: FR - Man on Fire - S01E06 - Six
1.plot: Creasy stages a daring prison heist to secure an important target. Melo takes the wheel for a dangerous rescue mission.

1.title: FR - Man on Fire - S01E07 - Seven
1.plot: Cornered and exposed, Creasy sets a trap to lure his enemies into the flames — even if it means he burns alongside them.

meta.plot: D'une idylle fulgurante à un sombre aveu, ce documentaire sur un crime réel révèle comment une romance dans les Highlands écossais a mené à une périlleuse opération d'infiltration.

1.title: FR - Et pour le pire ? - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: In 2020, a Glasgow pathologist meets a Highland gamekeeper who seems perfect on paper. They're soon engaged — then a confession changes everything.

1.title: FR - Et pour le pire ? - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: As Caroline's actions give police a new lead in a cold case, she enters a terrifying double life with the McKellars — and hopes Sandy still trusts her.

1.title: FR - Et pour le pire ? - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Torn between doing the right thing and protecting the man she can't walk away from, Caroline spirals as she desperately tries to avoid the witness stand.

meta.plot: La Maison aux Esprits est une magnifique saga familiale qui raconte l’histoire épique d’une famille fière et passionnée, d’amours secrets et de révolution sanglante. Les passions, les luttes et les secrets de la famille Trueba s’étendent sur un siècle de bouleversements sociaux violents, culminant en une crise qui projette le patriarche fier et tyrannique et sa petite-fille bien-aimée dans des camps opposés.

1.title: FR - La Maison aux Esprits - S01E01 - Rosa the Beautiful
1.plot: Alba returns to her family home and discovers her grandmother Clara's diaries. As she reads, she's pulled into a luminous journey through time, uncovering the early forces that shaped Clara's destiny-and the echoes still shaping her own.

1.title: FR - La Maison aux Esprits - S01E02 - Las Tres Marías
1.plot: After the tragedy that awaited him in the city, Esteban Trueba leaves the desert and settles on the southern estate of Las Tres Marías, determined to forge an empire of his own. Meanwhile, Clara del Valle, guided by her mother Nívea and her Uncle Marcos, begins to awaken to a world of omens and hidden gifts. Two opposing paths cross, giving rise to a single family story.

1.title: FR - La Maison aux Esprits - S01E03 - Clara the Clairvoyant
1.plot: Esteban brings Clara to their new home in the capital, "the big house on the corner." After their daughter Blanca is born, the family-including Esteban's sister, Férula-travels to Las Tres Marías, where Clara uncovers her husband's dark past and realizes her fate is bound to Pancha García and her descendants.

meta.plot: Les Crues décident de réaliser un rêve : créer leur propre vin. Grâce à ce défi, elles reconnaissent l'importance de préserver leur amitié.

1.title: FR - Les Crues - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - Les Crues - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR - Les Crues - S01E03 - Episode 3
FR - Les Crues - S01E04 - Episode 4

meta.plot: 1806 - Ile de la Réunion. Après le passage d’un cyclone meurtrier, la plantation de Charles Bellevue est dévastée. Ruiné, il n’a d’autre choix que de céder ses terres. Ses esclaves redoutent d’être vendus et séparés les uns des autres. Parmi eux, un homme, Isaac, refuse d’être abandonné à son sort. Isaac vient en effet d’apprendre que Charles Bellevue n’est pas seulement son maître. C’est aussi son père.

1.title: FR - Enchaînés - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - Enchaînés - S01E02 - Episode 2

meta.plot: Documentaire en quatre parties sur la vie et les exploits de Dean Potter, grimpeur, highliner et base‑jumper considéré comme l’un des plus visionnaires mais aussi des plus controversés de son époque. Le film/mini‑série suit à la fois ses réalisations spectaculaires (ascensions en solo, traversées de slackline à grande hauteur, vols en wingsuit) et explore sa dimension introspective, ses démons intérieurs, pour « dévoiler qui Dean était vraiment » au‑delà de la légende du « Dark Wizard », en montrant comment sa quête d’absolu, de liberté et de spiritualité l’a conduit à repousser sans cesse les limites du risque.

1.title: FR - The Dark Wizard [vostfr] - S01E01 - The Death Consequence
1.plot: Dean Potter finds joy and escape through extreme climbing, forging new ascents and world records – while struggling with relationships.

1.title: FR - The Dark Wizard [vostfr] - S01E02 - Dying to Flying
1.plot: Dean struggles with inner demons but seems to find relief through death-defying feats – from free-soloing to highlining and BASE jumping – cultivating a devoted following drawn to his rebellious antihero image. But a rising climber threatens his status.

1.title: FR - The Dark Wizard [vostfr] - S01E03 - This Is Art, This Is Spirituality
1.plot: The rivalry between Dean and Alex Honnold intensifies as both climbers vie to be the first to free solo a route on the 3000 foot El Capitan. As Dean's mental state deteriorates, he alienates his inner-circle and accepts a dangerous career opportunity in China.

1.title: FR - The Dark Wizard [vostfr] - S01E04 - Transcending Human Limitations
1.plot: With a new relationship grounding him, Dean regains emotional stability and his long-held dream of flight comes to fruition when he immerses himself in the cutting-edge world of wingsuit flying.

meta.plot: Les meurtres de Whitechapel et l'enquête pour en démasquer l'auteur ont joué un rôle non négligeable dans l'essor du journalisme et des tabloïds, à la fin du XIXe siècle. Focus sur l'utilisation faite par le journal The Star de ces meurtres pour augmenter son lectorat et ses revenus.

1.title: FR - Jack l'Eventreur : Lettres de sang - S01E01 - Jack The Ripper: Written In Blood
1.plot: As Whitechapel reels from three brutal murders, Fred Best and his colleagues at the Star Newspaper spin a lone killer theory.

1.title: FR - Jack l'Eventreur : Lettres de sang - S01E02 - Leather Apron
1.plot: With Whitechapel in panic, The Star incites violent anti-Semitic clashes, while the police struggle and the real murderer strikes again and again.

1.title: FR - Jack l'Eventreur : Lettres de sang - S01E03 - From Hell
1.plot: As fear grips Whitechapel, The Star feeds off the panic, driving Fred Best to forge another letter and deepen the Ripper myth.

meta.plot: Dans les années 90, la douane britannique lance une opération secrète pour infiltrer des réseaux de drogue. Des gens ordinaires, sans formation d’espions, plongés sous couverture avec de nouvelles identités.

1.title: FR - Legends - S01E01 - Could You Offer More?
1.plot: As drug deaths surge in '90s Britain, the government turns to a veteran customs investigator to recruit a novice unit for an unprecedented covert mission.

1.title: FR - Legends - S01E02 - Alliance
1.plot: Customs recruit Guy faces tests that threaten to blow his cover. Meanwhile, the team in Liverpool chase the scent of a suspicious bakery.

1.title: FR - Legends - S01E03 - This is Liverpool
1.plot: A volatile alliance puts Guy at the heart of a high-risk smuggling deal. The Legends in Liverpool embark on a surveillance mission that ends in trouble.

1.title: FR - Legends - S01E04 - The War on Drugs
1.plot: Cracks start to appear in both gangs as tensions, pressure and paranoia run high. Kate looks to exploit a possible weakness in Carter's armour.

1.title: FR - Legends - S01E05 - Old Kings
1.plot: While Kate chases a murky trail of corruption, a potential meeting with a feared drug lord sends Guy, Bailey and Don on a dangerous overseas mission.

1.title: FR - Legends - S01E06 - Legends Never Die
1.plot: Betrayal, distrust and ambition put the entire mission — and the Legends — at risk. Can they stop an unprecedented heroin shipment from reaching Britain?

meta.plot: Une star du téléachat dévouée à son travail se retire à la campagne pour relancer son émission, jusqu'à ce qu'un fermier énigmatique vienne tout chambouler… y compris son cœur.

1.title: FR - Le Cœur aux affaires - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Dam Ye-jin's shopping host career is on the rise — until she loses her primetime slot. Determined to find a new hit item, she heads to the countryside.

1.title: FR - Le Cœur aux affaires - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Ye-jin realizes farmer Matthew Lee may be able to help her. But her efforts to persuade him prove futile, until she bumps into the perfect opportunity.

1.title: FR - Le Cœur aux affaires - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Strange phone calls keeps Matthew up at night. Meanwhile, Eric Seo and Ye-jin double down on their plans to get Matthew to work with L'Étoile again.

1.title: FR - Le Cœur aux affaires - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: When crisis hits the farm, Ye-jin improvises a way to help. Matthew starts to see Ye-jin in a different light after a surprisingly close encounter.

1.title: FR - Le Cœur aux affaires - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Matthew and Ye-jin make a pact to work together. When Matthew discovers some pressing information, Ye-jin is forced to make an important choice.

1.title: FR - Le Cœur aux affaires - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: As Ye-jin deals with the fallout of her decision, Matthew invites her to Deokpung Village to get her mind off things — and be his temporary roommate.

meta.plot: Des vacances mère-fille tournent au désastre quand Gali est arrêtée pour possession de stupéfiants. Sa mère, Orna, refuse ces accusations et risque le tout pour sa liberté, mais elle se retrouve prise au piège dans les secrets de Gali.

1.title: FR - Unconditional - S01E01 - Lucky Kid
1.plot: A vacation comes to an abrupt end when Gali is arrested at a Moscow airport, plunging her mother Orna into an unthinkable nightmare.

1.title: FR - Unconditional - S01E02 - Everyone's Daughter
1.plot: Orna follows the trail of Gali's mysterious passports and comes under pressure to abandon a crucial televised interview.

meta.plot: Twilight Sparkle est une jeune licorne qui s'intéresse plus à ses livres qu'à ses amis. Un jour, la princesse Celestia, son mentor, lui confie une mission d'une grande importance : se faire des amis. C'est ainsi qu'au village de Poneyville, elle fera connaissance de cinq poneys avec qui elle vivra des aventures amusantes et féériques, et qui lui feront découvrir que les amies, c'est magique !

1.title: FR - My Little Pony : Les Amies, c'est magique - S01E01 - Friendship is Magic (1)
1.plot: Twilight Sparkle, a reclusive student of Princess Celestia, is tasked with supervising a special event in Ponyville and to make five new friends in the process.

1.title: FR - My Little Pony : Les Amies, c'est magique - S01E02 - Friendship is Magic (2)
1.plot: The evil Nightmare Moon is free from her imprisonment, vowing to shroud the world in eternal night, and Princess Celestia has gone missing. Twilight and the her friends must find six magic stones called the Elements of Harmony, hidden in the mysterious Everfree Forest.

1.title: FR - My Little Pony : Les Amies, c'est magique - S01E03 - The Ticket Master
1.plot: Twilight receives two tickets from Princess Celestia to the Grand Galloping Gala. All five of her best friends want to go, but she can only choose one.

1.title: FR - My Little Pony : Les Amies, c'est magique - S01E04 - Applebuck Season
1.plot: With her big brother hurt, Applejack volunteers to harvest the apple crop in her family's orchard all by herself. However, she is too prideful and stubborn to accept any help from the other ponies.

1.title: FR - My Little Pony : Les Amies, c'est magique - S01E05 - Griffon the Brush-Off
1.plot: Pinkie Pie bonds with Rainbow Dash over their shared love of pranks, but when Rainbow's old friend Gilda the Griffon visits, Pinkie Pie becomes a third wheel, and notices that Gilda has a mean streak.

1.title: FR - My Little Pony : Les Amies, c'est magique - S01E06 - Boast Busters
1.plot: A new unicorn called "The Great and Powerful" Trixie arrives in Ponyville, claiming to be the greatest magical pony in Equestria. Spike believes Twilight may be the one unicorn to put the arrogant braggart in her place, but she worries that she will lose the respect of her friends if she shows her true potential.

1.title: FR - My Little Pony : Les Amies, c'est magique - S01E07 - Dragonshy
1.plot: As a sleeping dragon's smoke begins clouding Equestria's skies, Twilight Sparkle is tasked with getting it to leave. She and all her friends head to the dragon's lair, dragging along fearful Fluttershy, who must find the courage to face the giant dragon.

1.title: FR - My Little Pony : Les Amies, c'est magique - S01E08 - Look Before You Sleep
1.plot: When a thunderstorm forces Applejack and Rarity to seek shelter in her library, they're invited by Twilight Sparkle to have a slumber party. However, their clashing personalities and preferences may make it difficult for them to get along.

1.title: FR - My Little Pony : Les Amies, c'est magique - S01E09 - Bridle Gossip
1.plot: Twilight encounters the mysterious zebra Zecora, who occasionally visits Ponyville and is rumored to be a witch. When she and her friends display a range of bizarre symptoms the next day, they begin to wonder whether Zecora put a curse on them. Applejack's little sister, Apple Bloom, ventures into the Everfree Forest to find the truth.

1.title: FR - My Little Pony : Les Amies, c'est magique - S01E10 - Swarm of the Century
1.plot: Everypony is making sure things are perfect for an upcoming visit by Princess Celestia to Ponyville, especially Twilight Sparkle, but trouble arises when a swarm of parasprites, adorable insects with ravenous appetites, invades the town.

1.title: FR - My Little Pony : Les Amies, c'est magique - S01E11 - Winter Wrap Up
1.plot: As winter comes to its scheduled end, Ponyville prepares for the annual cleanup to make way for spring. Twilight Sparkle wants to help, even without her magic (to respect Ponyville's traditions), but she may find it difficult to find her place.

1.title: FR - My Little Pony : Les Amies, c'est magique - S01E12 - Call of the Cutie
1.plot: A young pony earns their cutie mark upon discovering their special talent and life's purpose. Apple Bloom's worry about her still-missing cutie mark causes her to try to earn it before a classmate's upcoming "cute-ceañera" party.

1.title: FR - My Little Pony : Les Amies, c'est magique - S01E13 - Fall Weather Friends
1.plot: Applejack and Rainbow Dash take part in a marathon event known as the Running of the Leaves, in which Dash must compete without the use of her wings. Can they both ensure a clean race without the competition getting the better of them?

1.title: FR - My Little Pony : Les Amies, c'est magique - S01E14 - Suited for Success
1.plot: Rarity makes dresses for her friends for the upcoming Grand Galloping Gala, but they don't turn out to but what her friends expected. She strains herself catering to their demands, then learns her new dresses will be put on a fashion show.

1.title: FR - My Little Pony : Les Amies, c'est magique - S01E15 - Feeling Pinkie Keen
1.plot: Twilight learns that Pinkie Pie has an unusual ability to sense happenings in the immediate future, known around Ponyville as "Pinkie Sense." Not willing to accept these predictions are anything but a mere coincidence, Twilight sets out to find the truth behind Pinkie's power.

1.title: FR - My Little Pony : Les Amies, c'est magique - S01E16 - Sonic Rainboom
1.plot: Rainbow Dash is preparing herself for an upcoming contest, with a day with the famous Wonderbolts as the grand prize, and is sure that an old move she claimed to have pulled off long ago will guarantee her a win. However, she becomes increasingly nervous that she won't succeed.

1.title: FR - My Little Pony : Les Amies, c'est magique - S01E17 - Stare Master
1.plot: Fluttershy has great experience with all kinds of animals, but it is an entirely different story when she offers to take care of Apple Bloom, Scootaloo, and Sweetie Belle for the night. Will she be able to keep them out of trouble, and what exactly is "The Stare"?

1.title: FR - My Little Pony : Les Amies, c'est magique - S01E18 - The Show Stoppers
1.plot: After entering a talent competition, the Cutie Mark Crusaders believe the event will help them discover what they are meant to do in life. They hope that winning the contest will help them get their cutie marks, if they can keep from ruining each other's work.

1.title: FR - My Little Pony : Les Amies, c'est magique - S01E19 - A Dog and Pony Show
1.plot: To create jewel-encrusted clothing at the request of a famous pony, Rarity decides to find a new lode of gems with Spike's assistance. But when a group of creatures called the Diamond Dogs abduct Rarity and force her to find gems for them, Spike and the other ponies head underground to rescue her. In the end, who will be the one that truly needs saving?

1.title: FR - My Little Pony : Les Amies, c'est magique - S01E20 - Green Isn't Your Color
1.plot: When Rarity meets a famous fashion photographer, she realizes that this is her chance to promote her newest dresses, but her idea backfires when the pony is more interested in Fluttershy, whom Rarity chose to model her dresses. Both tell Twilight they aren't happy about this but don't want the other to know, and she is faced with a dilemma of keeping their secrets.

1.title: FR - My Little Pony : Les Amies, c'est magique - S01E21 - Over a Barrel
1.plot: The ponies separate and are caught in a dispute between a western town's settler-ponies and the native buffalo herd. Both sides have claimed the land as their own, and neither side is standing down. Can they find a way to prevent the inevitable clash?

1.title: FR - My Little Pony : Les Amies, c'est magique - S01E22 - A Bird in the Hoof
1.plot: During a visit from Princess Celestia, Fluttershy sees the Equestrian royal's sick pet bird Philomena. She secrets the poor creature home and tries to take care of it, but finds that the task to be harder than it looks.

1.title: FR - My Little Pony : Les Amies, c'est magique - S01E23 - The Cutie Mark Chronicles
1.plot: Every pony with a cutie mark has a different story to tell about how they earned it. Taking a break from searching for their special talents, the Cutie Mark Crusaders decide to ask Rainbow Dash and the others about their marks, eventually discovering a surprising connection.

1.title: FR - My Little Pony : Les Amies, c'est magique - S01E24 - Owl's Well That Ends Well
1.plot: Spike meets an owl Twilight befriends to help her with their work. He soon feels threatened over the possibility that it will take his spot as the unicorn's trusted assistant. Driven by jealousy, how far will he go to make sure it doesn't happen?

1.title: FR - My Little Pony : Les Amies, c'est magique - S01E25 - Party of One
1.plot: After a successful birthday party for Gummy, her pet alligator, Pinkie Pie invites her friends for an "After Birthday" party the next day. However, they claim to have other errands to run, declining the invitations. Pinkie Pie grows suspicious and sets out to solve the mystery.

1.title: FR - My Little Pony : Les Amies, c'est magique - S01E26 - The Best Night Ever
1.plot: After much anticipation, Canterlot's Grand Galloping Gala has finally begun. As Twilight and her friends take part in the festivities, only one question remains: Is it everything the ponies imagined it to be?

2.title: FR - My Little Pony : Les Amies, c'est magique - S02E01 - The Return of Harmony (1)
2.plot: The peace of Equestria is threatened when Discord, a mischievous spirit of disharmony, escapes from his imprisonment in stone. Twilight and her friends must defeat him using the Elements of Harmony. If only they can find them!

2.title: FR - My Little Pony : Les Amies, c'est magique - S02E02 - The Return of Harmony (2)
2.plot: Twilight's friends have been corrupted by Discord, and all of Equestria is about to fall into total chaos. Twilight remembers about the riddle of finding the stolen Elements of Harmony. However, even after obtaining them, can she and her friends defeat their most powerful foe yet with almost all hope lost?

2.title: FR - My Little Pony : Les Amies, c'est magique - S02E03 - Lesson Zero
2.plot: Hyper-organized Twilight panics when she can’t find a lesson about friendship for her weekly letter to Princess Celestia.

2.title: FR - My Little Pony : Les Amies, c'est magique - S02E04 - Luna Eclipsed
2.plot: It's Nightmare Night and the macabre celebrations are in full swing when Luna herself shows up in Ponyville, determined to change her frightening public image.

2.title: FR - My Little Pony : Les Amies, c'est magique - S02E05 - Sisterhooves Social
2.plot: Sweetie Belle comes up with an idea to celebrate sisterly unity in an impromptu party with not much planning, and when Rarity decides not to be part of the celebration, Sweetie Belle becomes angry and disowns her as her sister.

2.title: FR - My Little Pony : Les Amies, c'est magique - S02E06 - The Cutie Pox
2.plot: Applebloom finally gets her Cutie Mark! But joy turns to panic as she gets a second, then a third, then a dozen cutie marks.

2.title: FR - My Little Pony : Les Amies, c'est magique - S02E07 - May the Best Pet Win!
2.plot: Rainbow Dash holds a flying race to determine who will win the honor of being her pet.

2.title: FR - My Little Pony : Les Amies, c'est magique - S02E08 - The Mysterious Mare Do Well
2.plot: A new masked avenger is stealing Rainbow Dash's thunder as Ponyville's resident hero.

2.title: FR - My Little Pony : Les Amies, c'est magique - S02E09 - Sweet and Elite
2.plot: During a successful trip to Canterlot, Rarity has to choose between the important social connections she's made in the capitol and her uncouth Ponyville friends.

2.title: FR - My Little Pony : Les Amies, c'est magique - S02E10 - Secret of My Excess
2.plot: After Spike's birthday gifts activate his greedy dragon instincts, he undergoes an outrageous growth spirt that threatens to destroy all of Ponyville, so he must find a way to stop growing and save the inhabitants of the city.

2.title: FR - My Little Pony : Les Amies, c'est magique - S02E11 - Hearth's Warming Eve
2.plot: The six friends are honored to put on Canterlot's most important play of the season, the Hearth's Warming Eve's holiday pageant, which illustrates how Unicorns, Pegasi and Earth Ponies put aside their differences and founded Equestria.

2.title: FR - My Little Pony : Les Amies, c'est magique - S02E12 - Family Appreciation Day
2.plot: Apple Bloom does everything she can think of to stop Granny Smith from speaking to her class and causing everlasting embarrassment.

2.title: FR - My Little Pony : Les Amies, c'est magique - S02E13 - Baby Cakes
2.plot: Pinkie Pie takes on the task of babysitting the Cakes' twin toddlers but is woefully unprepared for the challenge.

2.title: FR - My Little Pony : Les Amies, c'est magique - S02E14 - The Last Roundup
2.plot: The friends travel all over Equestria to track down Applejack, who has mysteriously disappeared after attending a rodeo competition in Canterlot.

2.title: FR - My Little Pony : Les Amies, c'est magique - S02E15 - The Super Speedy Cider Squeezy 6000
2.plot: The Flim Flam brothers challenge the Apples to a Cider Making Contest and the winner of the showdown gets to take Sweet Apple Acres, so with the farm in peril, the Apple ponies must come together and muster all their cider making skills.

2.title: FR - My Little Pony : Les Amies, c'est magique - S02E16 - Read It and Weep
2.plot: After mocking it as an 'egghead' pursuit, Rainbow Dash discovers the joys of reading while laid up in Ponyville Hospital. Can she finish her book before her friends discover her secret?

2.title: FR - My Little Pony : Les Amies, c'est magique - S02E17 - Hearts and Hooves Day
2.plot: The Cutie Mark Crusaders create a love potion to make Miss Cheerilee and Big Macintosh fall in love, but quickly regret their actions when they discover that serious side effects have set in.

2.title: FR - My Little Pony : Les Amies, c'est magique - S02E18 - A Friend in Deed
2.plot: When Pinkie Pie meets Cranky Doodle Donkey, she becomes flummoxed about what to do when the donkey refuses her usual offer of lifelong friendship, so she must decide what to do next about the first creature ever to do such a thing.

2.title: FR - My Little Pony : Les Amies, c'est magique - S02E19 - Putting Your Hoof Down
2.plot: When Fluttershy becomes tired of being pushed around for too long, she decides to seek some assertiveness training from self-help guru Iron Will.  With the help of her new teacher, she quickly transforms her unsure ways.

2.title: FR - My Little Pony : Les Amies, c'est magique - S02E20 - It's About Time
2.plot: When Twilight Sparkle receives a strange and vague warning about impending doom and disaster from her future self, she drives herself nearly mad in an attempt to stall a cataclysmic event, but her uncertainty makes finding answers difficult.

2.title: FR - My Little Pony : Les Amies, c'est magique - S02E21 - Dragon Quest
2.plot: Spike goes on a journey of self-discovery by joining the Great Dragon Migration. But does a rough and tumble gang of teenage dragons really hold the key to the questions Spike has about his identity?

2.title: FR - My Little Pony : Les Amies, c'est magique - S02E22 - Hurricane Fluttershy
2.plot: Fluttershy struggles to overcome her fear of public humiliation so she can help Rainbow Dash and the other pegasi create a Tornado powerful enough to lift the water required for Rainy Season up into the cloud-producing city of Cloudsdale.

2.title: FR - My Little Pony : Les Amies, c'est magique - S02E23 - Ponyville Confidential
2.plot: The Cutie Mark Crusaders adopt the name 'Gabby Gums' to become the gossip columnist for their school paper. They seem to have finally found something they're good at! But is it worth the pain they cause to other ponies with their hurtful stories?

2.title: FR - My Little Pony : Les Amies, c'est magique - S02E24 - MMMystery on the Friendship Express
2.plot: A cake Pinkie Pie is guarding for a contest is ruined on the way to Canterlot and an investigation begins.

2.title: FR - My Little Pony : Les Amies, c'est magique - S02E25 - A Canterlot Wedding (1)
2.plot: Twilight Sparkle is confused by her conflicting feelings when she finds out her brother, Shining Armor, is marrying Princess Celestia's niece, Cadance.

2.title: FR - My Little Pony : Les Amies, c'est magique - S02E26 - A Canterlot Wedding (2)
2.plot: Shining Armor and Princess Cadance are set to be married, but Twilight Sparkle has just discovered a dark secret about the bride-to-be.

3.title: FR - My Little Pony : Les Amies, c'est magique - S03E01 - The Crystal Empire (1)
3.plot: Northern Equestria's Crystal Empire has reappeared after being afflicted with a curse that made it vanish for 1,000 years. Princess Celestia asks Twilight Sparkle and her friends to protect the empire from disappearing again.

3.title: FR - My Little Pony : Les Amies, c'est magique - S03E02 - The Crystal Empire (2)
3.plot: After Princess Celestia commissions her to keep Crystal Empire from vanishing again, Twilight realizes that she must find the missing Crystal Heart in order to restore the empire's reputation and strength before it disappears again.

3.title: FR - My Little Pony : Les Amies, c'est magique - S03E03 - Too Many Pinkie Pies
3.plot: Overwhelmed with having to choose just one friend to spend time with, Pinkie Pie uses a magic mirror to clone herself.

3.title: FR - My Little Pony : Les Amies, c'est magique - S03E04 - One Bad Apple
3.plot: The Cutie Mark Crusaders are crushed when Babs Seed rejects their invitation to become a fellow Crusader and instead become a bully.

3.title: FR - My Little Pony : Les Amies, c'est magique - S03E05 - Magic Duel
3.plot: Wearing a mysterious amulet, Trixie returns to Ponyville for her "unfinished business" with Twilight Sparkle.

3.title: FR - My Little Pony : Les Amies, c'est magique - S03E06 - Sleepless in Ponyville
3.plot: Over a campfire, Rainbow Dash decides to share some imaginative and spooky tales, causing Scootaloo to have frightening, vivid nightmares; Scootaloo wants to get rid of her nightmares but doesn't want the others to think she is spineless.

3.title: FR - My Little Pony : Les Amies, c'est magique - S03E07 - Wonderbolts Academy
3.plot: Rainbow Dash receives an invitation to attend the Wonderbolt Academy but questions whether she is Wonderbolt material.

3.title: FR - My Little Pony : Les Amies, c'est magique - S03E08 - Apple Family Reunion
3.plot: Granny Smith agrees to let Applejack lead the Apple Family reunion but Applejack loses sight of what is truly important.

3.title: FR - My Little Pony : Les Amies, c'est magique - S03E09 - Spike at Your Service
3.plot: After Applejack saved Spike, he insists on fulfilling the Nobel Dragon Code by repaying her with excessive help around the farm.

3.title: FR - My Little Pony : Les Amies, c'est magique - S03E10 - Keep Calm and Flutter On
3.plot: Princess Celestia has decided that the rambunctious Discord needs to be tamed and commissions the ponies for the job; Fluttershy believes that Discord deserves a second chance but she faces opposition as the only one who thinks so.

3.title: FR - My Little Pony : Les Amies, c'est magique - S03E11 - Just for Sidekicks
3.plot: Spike finds himself in over his head after convincing Twilight and her friends to let him pet-sit all of their critters in exchange for a few gems.

3.title: FR - My Little Pony : Les Amies, c'est magique - S03E12 - Games Ponies Play
3.plot: In the hopes of proving that the Crystal Empire is more than worthy of being selected as the next venue for the upcoming Equestria Games, Princess Cadance commissions Twilight to work her magic with the deciding Games Inspector.

3.title: FR - My Little Pony : Les Amies, c'est magique - S03E13 - Magical Mystery Cure
3.plot: Twilight Sparkle wakes up one day to find that all her friends' cutie marks have been switched! Can she fix something as bad as an altered destiny?

4.title: FR - My Little Pony : Les Amies, c'est magique - S04E01 - Princess Twilight Sparkle (1)
4.plot: Now that she is a Princess, Twilight Sparkle has an important new role to play in the Summer Sun Celebration. But her plans are put on hold when Princess Luna and Princess Celestia go missing.

4.title: FR - My Little Pony : Les Amies, c'est magique - S04E02 - Princess Twilight Sparkle (2)
4.plot: The Everfree Forest is threatening to take over all of Equestria. In order to stop it, Princess Twilight and her friends must bring their Elements to the Tree of Harmony.

4.title: FR - My Little Pony : Les Amies, c'est magique - S04E03 - Castle Mane-ia
4.plot: When the ponies all end up in Luna and Celestia's old castle, they become convinced that it is haunted by the Pony of Shadows.

4.title: FR - My Little Pony : Les Amies, c'est magique - S04E04 - Daring Don't
4.plot: When the latest book in the Daring Do series is delayed, Rainbow Dash and her friends decide to offer their help to the book's author so that she can finish it. The writer does need help, but not in the ways they'd imagined.

4.title: FR - My Little Pony : Les Amies, c'est magique - S04E05 - Flight to the Finish
4.plot: The Cutie Mark Crusaders vie for the honor of carrying the Ponyville flag at the Equestria Games. Problems arise when Scootaloo becomes convinced that the best way to represent Ponyville is to fly during their routine.

4.title: FR - My Little Pony : Les Amies, c'est magique - S04E06 - Power Ponies
4.plot: When Spike and the Mane 6 end up as superheroes in a comic book world, the only way to get back home is to defeat the super-villain, The Mane-iac.

4.title: FR - My Little Pony : Les Amies, c'est magique - S04E07 - Bats!
4.plot: Vampire Fruit Bats take over Sweet Apple Acres and Applejack and her friends' efforts to get rid of them take an unexpected and frightening turn.

4.title: FR - My Little Pony : Les Amies, c'est magique - S04E08 - Rarity Takes Manehattan
4.plot: Rarity goes to Manehattan for Fashion Week and loses her sense of generosity after another designer copies her entire fashion line.

4.title: FR - My Little Pony : Les Amies, c'est magique - S04E09 - Pinkie Apple Pie
4.plot: When Pinkie Pie discovers that she might be related to the Apple family, she joins them on a road trip to visit a relative who can provide proof that she is their cousin.

4.title: FR - My Little Pony : Les Amies, c'est magique - S04E10 - Rainbow Falls
