4.plot: Rainbow Dash is headed to the Equestria Games trials with the Ponyville Relay Team, but becomes torn when she's offered the chance to join the more competitive Cloudsdale team.

4.title: FR - My Little Pony : Les Amies, c'est magique - S04E11 - Three's a Crowd
4.plot: Twilight is looking forward to some quality bonding time with Princess Cadance. But when a sick friend shows up needing Twilight's attention, it looks like her plans for a peaceful visit with her sister-in-law will have to be put on hold.

4.title: FR - My Little Pony : Les Amies, c'est magique - S04E12 - Pinkie Pride
4.plot: Pinkie Pie finds her status as "super-duper party pony" in jeopardy when the mysterious Cheese Sandwich comes to town and offers to plan an epic birthday party for Rainbow Dash. Guest voiceover by Weird Al.

4.title: FR - My Little Pony : Les Amies, c'est magique - S04E13 - Simple Ways
4.plot: Rarity has a crush on travel writer, Trenderhoof, and plans to wow him with her ideas for the upcoming Ponyville Days Festival. But Trenderhoof soon has a crush of his own, and Rarity finds herself competing with Applejack for his attention.

4.title: FR - My Little Pony : Les Amies, c'est magique - S04E14 - Filli Vanilli
4.plot: When a member of the singing group, the Ponytones, has to drop out of an important performance, Fluttershy takes drastic measures to ensure that the show goes on.

4.title: FR - My Little Pony : Les Amies, c'est magique - S04E15 - Twilight Time
4.plot: The Cutie Mark Crusaders are thrilled when Twilight offers to help them with their studies. Problems arise when the girls realize they can use their relationship with Twilight to increase their popularity.

4.title: FR - My Little Pony : Les Amies, c'est magique - S04E16 - It Ain't Easy Being Breezies
4.plot: When tiny, magical creatures called Breezies get into trouble while making their migration home, Fluttershy swoops in to save them. She soon finds herself tending to their every need, and her kindness may turn out to be more harmful than helpful.

4.title: FR - My Little Pony : Les Amies, c'est magique - S04E17 - Somepony to Watch Over Me
4.plot: Apple Bloom gets the chance to stay home alone for the day, but a series of unfortunate accidents causes Applejack to regret her decision. Apple Bloom must find a way to prove to her sister that she doesn't need her to constantly watch over her.

4.title: FR - My Little Pony : Les Amies, c'est magique - S04E18 - Maud Pie
4.plot: When Pinkie Pie's sister comes to town, the girls find her much different than Pinkie described.

4.title: FR - My Little Pony : Les Amies, c'est magique - S04E19 - For Whom the Sweetie Belle Toils
4.plot: Sweetie Belle ruins a costume for one of Rarity's clients on purpose; Luna visits her in her dreams.

4.title: FR - My Little Pony : Les Amies, c'est magique - S04E20 - Leap of Faith
4.plot: Applejack is doubtful of the Flim Flam Brothers' cure-all tonic; Granny Smith tries it and it seems to work.

4.title: FR - My Little Pony : Les Amies, c'est magique - S04E21 - Testing, Testing, 1, 2, 3
4.plot: Rainbow Dash uses unconventional methods to prepare for her test to become a member of the Wonderbolts Reserves.

4.title: FR - My Little Pony : Les Amies, c'est magique - S04E22 - Trade Ya!
4.plot: When the trip to the Rainbow Falls Traders Exchange doesn't go as planned, the girls learn just how valuable their friendship really is.

4.title: FR - My Little Pony : Les Amies, c'est magique - S04E23 - Inspiration Manifestation
4.plot: Rarity loses her creativity and Spike finds a spell to help her get it back.

4.title: FR - My Little Pony : Les Amies, c'est magique - S04E24 - Equestria Games
4.plot: Spike is in charge of lighting the torch for the opening of the Equestria Games, but his nerves get the best of him.

4.title: FR - My Little Pony : Les Amies, c'est magique - S04E25 - Twilight's Kingdom (1)
4.plot: Princess Celestia chooses Discord over Princess Twilight to help track down a villain.

4.title: FR - My Little Pony : Les Amies, c'est magique - S04E26 - Twilight's Kingdom (2)
4.plot: The other princesses transfer all of their magical power to Twilight in hopes of saving Equestria.

meta.plot: La lycéenne Yeo Eui-ju écrit secrètement des romans sur Internet la nuit. Lorsque quatre charmants nouveaux professeurs arrivent, ils lui inspirent des histoires et bouleversent son école. Une romance pleine d'esprit sur les rêves d'adolescents, les moments maladroits et le passage à l'âge adulte.

1.title: FR - La valeur absolue de l'amour - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Eui-ju is a quiet student by day and a bold romance writer by night. Her future seems uncertain as the man she wronged becomes her homeroom teacher.

1.title: FR - La valeur absolue de l'amour - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: A sweet scene between teachers ignites Eui-ju's creativity. She casts them as leads in her new novel. During PE class, Gi-jeon makes her heart skip.

1.title: FR - La valeur absolue de l'amour - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Eui-ju hides Woo-su's glasses after stepping on them by mistake. Given his demerits and tough task, she trashes them, thinking he's picking on her.

1.title: FR - La valeur absolue de l'amour - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Once she realizes the glasses were special, Eui-ju digs them out of the trash but still gets a detention. She posts her F4-inspired web novel online.

1.title: FR - La valeur absolue de l'amour - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: We Were Friends" goes viral. Riding the high, Eui-ju writes the steamiest cliffhanger yet, unaware someone is standing right behind her.

1.title: FR - La valeur absolue de l'amour - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: Woo-su demands she delete everything. Now forced to write the novel on his terms, Eui-ju hits a wall. Meanwhile, the principal has plans of her own.

1.title: FR - La valeur absolue de l'amour - S01E07 - Episode 7
1.plot: On the EBC filming day, Da-ju urges Eui-ju to film Woo-su's class secretly, but she gets caught. She collapses and Woo-su carries her to the hospital.

1.title: FR - La valeur absolue de l'amour - S01E08 - Episode 8
1.plot: Eui-ju wonders why Woo-su allows her to keep writing her novel. One offhand remark from him sets her heart racing.

meta.plot: Dans les Floride Keys, Etta rêve de vivre dans le royaume scintillant et subtropical de Miami. Lorsqu'une tragédie frappe l'affaire familiale, elle est entraînée dans les bas-fonds de Miami, où elle découvre ce dont elle est réellement capable.

1.title: FR - M.I.A. - S01E01 - Revenge
1.plot: Running drugs is a family affair for Etta until she's thrust into a life she never expected.

1.title: FR - M.I.A. - S01E02 - Orphans
1.plot: Etta must find a way to pay off a black-market surgeon who is threatening to turn her in.

1.title: FR - M.I.A. - S01E03 - American Immigrant
1.plot: Etta tracks down her estranged Aunt Carmen and makes a shocking discovery.

1.title: FR - M.I.A. - S01E04 - Can't Hardly Carlito
1.plot: Etta meets a woman connected to one of "the twelve" and schemes to lure the killer into her orbit.

1.title: FR - M.I.A. - S01E05 - Fault Lines
1.plot: Etta tracks down one of her family's killers and uncovers the Rojas cartel's base of operations.

1.title: FR - M.I.A. - S01E06 - Original Sin
1.plot: Etta makes a discovery about her employer and finds herself in a fight for her life.

1.title: FR - M.I.A. - S01E07 - Hammer Drop
1.plot: Etta is torn between revenge and helping a friend; the Rojas brothers face a dangerous venture.

1.title: FR - M.I.A. - S01E08 - Heart Matters
1.plot: As Etta plans her next strike against the men who killed her family, a tragedy hits close to home.

1.title: FR - M.I.A. - S01E09 - Aperture
1.plot: Etta balances her revenge mission and her newly forged chosen family until the Rojases strike again.

1.title: FR - Hors Limites - S01E01 - Ride a Bronco
1.plot: Juanpa and fellow social media star and close friend, Mario Ruiz, dive into cowboy culture when they travel to Texas and Oklahoma to work as ranch hands and train with a professional rodeo coach. Ultimately, both Juanpa and Mario attempt to cram a lifetime of arduous training into a 3-day adventure with the goal of accomplishing one of the most difficult and dangerous sports feats in the world: riding a bucking bronco for 8 seconds.

1.title: FR - Hors Limites - S01E02 - Mt. Rainier
1.plot: In a harrowing and dangerous adventure, Juanpa and his girlfriend, Macarena Achaga, head to just outside Seattle, Washington to attempt to climb the tallest mountain in the Cascade Mountain range.

1.title: FR - Hors Limites - S01E03 - Monster Jam
1.plot: Juanpa goes on an adventure to live out a childhood dream in the world of monster trucks. Joining him is his friend Juca Viapri, a car and truck expert. Together, they travel to Cleveland, Ohio where they take giant construction vehicles through an obstacle course, meet a monster truck superfan who builds his own behemoth machines, and ultimately train with Monster Jam champion Tom Meents, who gives Juanpa a chance to prove that he is capable of jumping a 14,000-pound monster truck.

1.title: FR - Hors Limites - S01E04 - 10Gs
1.plot: Juanpa brings his reluctant sister, Pau, along for this gravity-defying adventure. First, they get true F35 simulator training at Lockheed Martin. Then, they experience the sensation of G-forces while drifting in Lamborghinis going over 200 mph. And finally, both Juanpa and Pau find out what "aerobatics" actually feel like, as they attempt to reach a staggering 10Gs of force in sky combat planes.

1.title: FR - Hors Limites - S01E05 - Flying Trapeze
1.plot: Juanpa is joined by his brother Andres in Las Vegas, where they learn to do battle on the Ka stage before trapeze legend Renato Fernandes trains them to fly through the air...with no safety lines!

1.title: FR - Hors Limites - S01E06 - Castleton Tower
1.plot: Driven by a dream to camp out overnight on the side of a cliff in a portaledge, Juanpa enlists a professional vertical climber to initiate him into the world of climbing culture. After some brief but intense training, Juanpa and his climbing coaches attempt to scale the awe-inspiring 400-foot Castleton Tower in Castle Valley, Utah. With no family or close friends to lean on, Juanpa must marshal all of his fortitude to reach the summit.

meta.plot: Cette série documentaire suit l'équipe nationale américaine pendant les quatre années précédant la Coupe du monde 2026 en Amérique du Nord.

1.title: FR - U.S. Against the World: Four Years with the Men's National Soccer Team - S01E01 - The Golden Generation
1.plot: Head coach Gregg Berhalter guides Christian Pulisic, Tyler Adams, and a collection of emerging young American soccer stars to the 2022 World Cup in Qatar.

1.title: FR - Bon Cop, Bad Cop - S01E01 - The Reunion
1.plot: Suspended, David investigates with his daughter the disappearance of an Indigenous chief in Gaspé, amidst family and cultural tensions.

1.title: FR - Bon Cop, Bad Cop - S01E02 - Cold and hot sweats
1.plot: Pipeline, mistrust and political pressure: the team takes risks to gain the community's trust and advance the investigation.

1.title: FR - Bon Cop, Bad Cop - S01E03 - Episode 3

meta.plot: À Kingston-Falls, l’inspecteur Gabriel Serpent voit ses vacances interrompues par la découverte d’un cadavre dans une position bizarre : des fesses dépassant du sol avec une roue de vélo enfoncée dedans. Son poste de police municipal étant menacé de fermeture, Gabriel veut mener l’enquête pour prouver sa nécessité. L’arrivée de Cynthia Quinn, surnommée « le chien pisteur », enquêtrice aux méthodes douteuses et aux problèmes d’alcool, bouleverse l’harmonie de l’équipe.

1.title: FR - Bienvenue à Kingston-Falls - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - Bienvenue à Kingston-Falls - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR - Bienvenue à Kingston-Falls - S01E03 - Episode 3
FR - Bienvenue à Kingston-Falls - S01E04 - Episode 4
FR - Bienvenue à Kingston-Falls - S01E05 - Episode 5
FR - Bienvenue à Kingston-Falls - S01E06 - Episode 6

meta.plot: In a moment of despair, Ryu Narutaki finds himself saved by Korean boxer Johan Hwang. As their wounded souls draw closer, their fates cruelly intertwine.

1.title: FR - Soul Mate - S01E01 - The Gravity of Fate
1.plot: Thousands of miles away in Berlin, Ryu can't forget the moment everything changed. Later, he makes a tearful confession in a church as someone listens.

1.title: FR - Soul Mate - S01E02 - Can We Save Our Souls?
1.plot: Promoter Shim's threats haunt Johan in the ring. Later, Sua introduces him to her new friends Sumiko — and Ryu, who he spends two unforgettable days with.

1.title: FR - Soul Mate - S01E03 - Deep in the Heart's Mirror
1.plot: Back in Tokyo and Seoul, Ryu and Johan stay in touch, keeping each other updated on their lives and future plans. Johan springs a surprise visit.

1.title: FR - Soul Mate - S01E04 - Our Sandcastle
1.plot: After a peaceful time in Nasu, Johan heads back to Korea for military service. Arata finally wakes up. Ryu introduces Sumiko to Seiichi, who falls hard.

1.title: FR - Soul Mate - S01E05 - Rebirth of a Soul
1.plot: Mr. Shim's retaliation sends Johan into hiding. Unable to reach him, Ryu travels to Seoul and tries to track him down with Sua's help.

1.title: FR - Soul Mate - S01E06 - The Galactic Railroad
1.plot: Tragedy befalls the tight-knit group at their happiest moment. When Sumiko falls apart, Ryu and Johan whisk her away to Nasu. They make a bold suggestion.

1.title: FR - Soul Mate - S01E07 - Because of Love
1.plot: The three friends settle into their new life together, but everyone struggles to balance family and work. Johan gets his numbness checked out.

1.title: FR - Soul Mate - S01E08 - Soul Mate
1.plot: Years later, Ryu unearths a sketchbook left behind in his uncle's studio. Meanwhile, Johan reflects on his tough life and how Ryu changed everything.

meta.plot: Un flic de la Police de Los Angeles est déterminé à mettre hors d'état de nuire le génie criminel à l'origine d'une série de braquages audacieux. Il n'y aura qu'un vainqueur.

1.title: FR - Nemesis - S01E01 - A Long Time Coming
1.plot: When a costumed crew pulls off a brazen Halloween heist, LAPD detective Isaiah Stiles begins to suspect it's anything but a one-off crime.

1.title: FR - Nemesis - S01E02 - Breaking Protocol
1.plot: Stiles assembles a task force to investigate the recent robberies. With the LAPD on alert, Coltrane works to tie up loose ends.

1.title: FR - Nemesis - S01E03 - Tête-À-Tête
1.plot: Convinced he's identified the crew's ringleader, Stiles races to produce hard evidence. Charlie urges Ebony to cover her bases.

1.title: FR - Nemesis - S01E04 - It Was a Good Day
1.plot: Coltrane's team takes on a high-stakes job for a volatile client. Stiles puts pressure on a key suspect. Candace leans on Ebony's friendship.

1.title: FR - Nemesis - S01E05 - Business. Never Personal.
1.plot: Emboldened by a break in the case, Stiles strikes at the heart of the Wilder home. Coltrane plots a devious revenge strategy.

1.title: FR - Nemesis - S01E06 - The Die Is Cast
1.plot: Stiles and Coltrane face off in an explosive confrontation. A painful revelation prompts Stiles to pursue a new target.

1.title: FR - Nemesis - S01E07 - Repercussions
1.plot: The Stiles family is rocked by a violent act that implicates Isaiah — and Noah. Sick of sitting on the sidelines, Ebony takes control of the narrative.

1.title: FR - Nemesis - S01E08 - Zugzwang
1.plot: With his options running out, Coltrane stages a bold extraction plan. Stiles makes a last-ditch effort to corner his adversary once and for all.

1.title: FR - Chiruran Shinsengumi Requiem - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - Reverse [VOSTFR] - S01E01 - The Accident
1.plot: Myo Jin loses all her memories due to a major traffic accident. She can’t remember what caused the accident, where she lives, or even the name of her fiancé, Jun Ho. Sometimes fragments of memory come back, and she even sees someone burning. In the end, Myo Jin announces that she’s done waiting for her memories to return.

1.title: FR - Reverse [VOSTFR] - S01E02 - Distrust
1.plot: Myo Jin sees the initial “H” on a painting hanging on the wall and is reminded of Hee Soo. She immediately sets out to find Hee Soo and discovers that the two of them were very close. When she asks Jun Ho what kind of friend Hee Soo was, he somehow avoids giving a clear answer. Meanwhile, Jun Ho has Ria stay at the house to keep an eye on Myo Jin.

1.title: FR - Reverse [VOSTFR] - S01E03 - The Chase
1.plot: Myo Jin recalls how she first met Jun Ho and realises she has inflicted an irreparable wound on Hee Soo and that Jun Ho lied to her. Sang Ho tracks Lee Jong Su down. Myo Jin follows Lee Jong Su with Sang Ho to figure out what he has on Hee Soo. She finds out the shocking truth.

1.title: FR - Reverse [VOSTFR] - S01E04 - Caught
1.plot: After going through Lee Jong Su’s phone, Myo Jin realises he wasn’t just after Hee Soo’s money. Myo Jin meets Wang Gi Cheol in person and asks him to tell her what he knows about her. Gi Cheol shares what happened to Myo Jin’s parents and why he was sent to prison.

1.title: FR - Reverse [VOSTFR] - S01E05 - Kidnapping
1.plot: Myo Jin gets kidnapped, but Jun Ho manages to bring her home safely. Gi Cheol finds out that he has terminal pancreatic cancer and that he only has three months to live. Woo Sik brings the guys who kidnapped him to Myo Jin and Jun Ho’s house, so that they can get the money they want from Ria and Jun Ho. Meanwhile, Sang Ho goes to meet Lee Jong Ju at the hospital.

1.title: FR - Reverse [VOSTFR] - S01E06 - Descent Into Darkness
1.plot: After overhearing Ria’s phone call with Jun Ho, Myo Jin runs away from home. Jun Ho tells CEO Oh that he dropped out of the competition out of conscience as an architect, but CEO Oh doesn’t believe him. Meanwhile, Jun Ho learns from his doctor friend that Myo Jin is getting better fast, but Jun Ho stops his friend from giving Myo Jin any better treatment.

1.title: FR - Reverse [VOSTFR] - S01E07 - The Hunt
1.plot: Detective Woo finds an important piece of evidence regarding the villa murder case. Myo Jin regains her memory and realises who killed her parents. Details about what happened on the day Myo Jin’s parents passed away come to light. Meanwhile, Gi Cheol decides to end things for Myo Jin.

1.title: FR - Reverse [VOSTFR] - S01E08 - The Revenge
1.plot: Myo Jin learns that memories are part of the past and that you can’t change what’s already happened. She learns that the memory will haunt her until the day she dies, but she executes her plans nonetheless. Despite her mixed feelings toward Hee Soo, she carries out her revenge.

meta.plot: Un pâtissier ordinaire, accusé à tort du meurtre de sa femme, se lance dans une aventure pleine de suspense pour prouver son innocence, en manipulant l'inspecteur chargé de l'affaire et cherchant à dévoiler la vérité.

1.title: FR - Reboot [VOSTFR] - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Hayase (Matsuyama Kenichi) is being pursued by the police for murdering his wife. One day, Ichika (Toda Erika), who works at the same company as his wife, proposes that he change his face and live with detective Gido (Suzuki Ryohei) in order to find the real culprit.

1.title: FR - Reboot [VOSTFR] - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR - Reboot [VOSTFR] - S01E03 - Episode 3
FR - Reboot [VOSTFR] - S01E04 - Episode 4
FR - Reboot [VOSTFR] - S01E05 - Episode 5
FR - Reboot [VOSTFR] - S01E06 - Episode 6
FR - Reboot [VOSTFR] - S01E07 - Episode 7
FR - Reboot [VOSTFR] - S01E08 - Episode 8
FR - Reboot [VOSTFR] - S01E09 - Episode 9
FR - Reboot [VOSTFR] - S01E10 - Episode 10
FR - Filing For Love [VOSTFR] - S01E01 - Up & Down
1.plot: In-a demotes Ki-jun as she becomes the new Director of the Audit Office at HAEMU GROUP.

1.title: FR - Filing For Love [VOSTFR] - S01E02 - I Am The Best
1.plot: Ki-jun's first case takes a dark turn and escalates into a sudden raid.

1.title: FR - Filing For Love [VOSTFR] - S01E03 - A Woman With A Twist
1.plot: With incriminating evidence in hand, Ki-jun plots his revenge against In-a.

1.title: FR - Filing For Love [VOSTFR] - S01E04 - Playing With Fire
1.plot: Things get complicated as Ki-jun and In-a go on a business trip together.

meta.plot: Mordecai, un geai bleu, et Rigby, un raton laveur, deux amis paresseux, travaillent dans un parc municipal. Mais, quoi qu'ils entreprennent, leurs tâches quotidiennes finissent invariablement par basculer dans un chaos totalement surréaliste, au grand désespoir de leur patron et de leurs collègues...

1.title: FR - Regular Show: The Lost Tapes - S01E01 - Fix That Tape
1.plot: A broken VHS tape needs to be fixed.

1.title: FR - Regular Show: The Lost Tapes - S01E02 - Skips' Luau
1.plot: Mordecai and Rigby want a burger with a special ingredient.

1.title: FR - Regular Show: The Lost Tapes - S01E03 - Blade Games
1.plot: Benson learns a better way to motivate.

1.title: FR - Regular Show: The Lost Tapes - S01E04 - Nap Spot
1.plot: A secret nap spot causes major problems.

1.title: FR - Deep - S01E01 -
FR - Deep - S01E02 -
FR - The 'Burbs [VOSTFR] - S01E01 - The Goddamn Brownies
1.plot: Samira and Rob's suburban life is upended when a mysterious new neighbor moves into the Victorian.

1.title: FR - The 'Burbs [VOSTFR] - S01E02 - Mind Your Own Business
1.plot: Samira becomes convinced that her new neighbor is up to no good and possibly involved in a crime.

meta.plot: Le monde est confronté à un événement sans précédent : l’apparition d’un phénomène extraterrestre au‑dessus de Stockholm. Présenté comme un premier contact pacifique, cet événement déclenche fascination, espoir mais aussi peur et instabilité. Dans un climat de tension croissante où certitudes scientifiques, enjeux gouvernementaux et mouvements de panique s’entremêlent, les réactions humaines et politiques face à l’inconnu sont diverses et variées.

1.title: FR - We Come In Peace - S01E01 - Day 0
1.plot: A jellyfish-like alien object hovers over Stockholm and chaos erupts. Biologist Zandra Kraft links the phenomenon to a mysterious fungus. Meanwhile, Prime Minister Moa Halmgren and crisis expert Elias Charbel try to understand the situation.

1.title: FR - We Come In Peace - S01E02 - Zandra's discovery
1.plot: Moa orders an attack on the creature in the sky, but Elias warns of a possible explosion. Zandra breaks curfew to investigate the mushroom and reach Moa and Elias with her find before it's too late.

meta.plot: La romance improbable entre Hannah Wells, étudiante en musique ironique qui déteste le hockey, et Garrett Graham, centre vedette et séducteur de l'université Briar, alors qu'ils concluent un accord pour s'entraider. Mais leur accord se déroulera-t-il comme prévu ?

1.title: FR - Off Campus - S01E01 - The Deal
1.plot: A hockey-averse music major and Briar U's womanizing star center strike an unlikely deal to get her crush's attention and his grades up.

1.title: FR - Off Campus - S01E02 - The Practice
1.plot: Hannah and Garrett's faux relationship is put to the test as they are forced to share a room at an overnight house party.

1.title: FR - Off Campus - S01E03 - The Orgasm
1.plot: Just as Hannah and Garrett's deal begins working like a charm, Hannah ups the stakes by redefining the terms.

1.title: FR - Off Campus - S01E04 - The Breakup
1.plot: Hannah and Garrett get closer than either anticipated and things get messy when they're forced to confront their feelings at Drunk Shakespeare.

1.title: FR - Off Campus - S01E05 - The Cold Turkey
1.plot: Garrett brings Hannah home for Thanksgiving while Tucker hosts an epic Friendsgiving at the Off Campus house.

1.title: FR - Off Campus - S01E06 - The Breakaway
1.plot: At a hockey fundraiser, Garrett and Logan butt heads, Hannah and Justin's musical collaboration encounters its biggest hurdle, and romance simmers.

1.title: FR - Off Campus - S01E07 - The Faceoff
1.plot: Hannah confronts her past while Garrett faces the most challenging game of his season and Allie meets her hero.

1.title: FR - Off Campus - S01E08 - The Line Change
1.plot: As the semester ends, fallout from the St. Anthony's game rattles the Hawks, and Hannah strives to find her voice.

meta.plot: 1987, l'espionne est-allemande Kleo tue un homme d'affaires à Berlin-Ouest alors qu'elle était en mission avec un commando secret de la Stasi. Peu de temps après, elle est arrêtée par l'organisation sous des prétextes fallacieux, et dénoncée et vilipendée par tous ceux qu'elle connaît - même son propre grand-père. Lorsque le mur de Berlin tombe, après deux ans de prison, Kleo est soudainement libre et avide de vengeance...

1.title: FR - Kleo - S01E01 - Big Eden
1.plot: Top Stasi agent Kleo Straub liquidates a target in a West German nightclub. Soon after, she must face a life-changing betrayal and a heartbreaking loss.

1.title: FR - Kleo - S01E02 - The Reunion
1.plot: Determined to find her files, Kleo tracks down her former handler and makes her way into Stasi headquarters. Later, she seeks out Thilo in a dance club.

1.title: FR - Kleo - S01E03 - Snow in Sóller
1.plot: Kleo heads to Mallorca, chased by Sven. She infiltrates a party and uses a toxin to paralyze Wieczorek's wife, leading him to make a deadly confession.

1.title: FR - Kleo - S01E04 - The Minister
1.plot: With Min and Uwe on her tail, Kleo bribes a little girl to deliver a poisoned Bundt cake to Mielke's jail cell. After a showdown, Kleo digs up a letter.

1.title: FR - Kleo - S01E05 - Uwe
1.plot: Kleo and Sven form a wary alliance. Anne visits Kleo claiming to look for her grandfather. After failing to kill her, Uwe sets up a meeting with Kleo.

1.title: FR - Kleo - S01E06 - Object Else
1.plot: Severely wounded in a shooting, Kleo has a revealing flashback. With the ominous red suitcase seemingly in hand, Sven shares a devastating truth.

1.title: FR - Kleo - S01E07 - The Snipe and the Clam
1.plot: After Andi is wounded by Kleo, a double agent prevents him from unpacking the conspiracy behind the red suitcase. Sven, Kleo and Min move in on a mole.

1.title: FR - Kleo - S01E08 - The Purple Witch
1.plot: Kleo and Sven arrive in Chile, where they track down an elusive Jorge. Later they tangle with Ramona, whose water breaks at an inopportune moment.

2.title: FR - Kleo - S02E01 - The Seahorse
2.plot: A surprise visit from her mother puts Kleo back on the trail of the red suitcase, which could have an unsettling link to her childhood.

2.title: FR - Kleo - S02E02 - Object Moni
2.plot: Kleo plans a daring heist to retrieve classified files from the KGB, unaware that Sven is after them as well.

2.title: FR - Kleo - S02E03 - The Bear
2.plot: Kleo follows a lead to Belgrade, where Sven makes a romantic connection. Thilo is on a mission of his own.

2.title: FR - Kleo - S02E04 - Beer and Schnapps
2.plot: Thilo discovers that his soulmate is not who she seems. Uwe receives a new target and uses the opportunity to set a deadly trap for Kleo.

2.title: FR - Kleo - S02E05 - From Russia with Love
2.plot: Uwe is left cleaning up a mess. Sven unmasks a double agent, while Kleo heads for her family cabin in search of answers.

2.title: FR - Kleo - S02E06 - Harald
2.plot: With the future of Europe hanging in the balance, Kleo prepares herself for a final confrontation in Moscow.

meta.plot: Condamnée à mourir à l'ère Joseon, une méchante se réveille dans le Séoul moderne et rencontre un héritier sans pitié qui pourrait être sa dernière chance de réécrire son destin.

1.title: FR - My Royal Nemesis - S01E01 - The Vixen and the Beast
1.plot: Royal Concubine Kang Dan-sim is sentenced to death by poison. But when she wakes, she finds herself in a very different place: modern-day Korea.

1.title: FR - My Royal Nemesis - S01E02 - A Guide to Optimizing Your Fate
1.plot: As Dan-sim tries to adapt to the new world, her strange ways attract the attention of chaebol heir Cha Se-gye — who approaches her with a proposal.

1.title: FR - My Royal Nemesis - S01E03 - A Whole New Reality
1.plot: Se-gye finds he can't stop thinking about Shin Seo-ri — especially after a weird dream sparks some foreign emotions within him.

meta.plot: Avide d'un nouveau coup, Berlin réunit son équipe à Séville et fait d'un ambitieux duc la victime de son propre plan : voler un chef-d'œuvre de Léonard de Vinci.

1.title: FR - Berlin et La Dame à l'hermine - S01E01 - The Collection
1.plot: When Berlin and Damián go fishing for a new multi-millionaire target, they end up on a mission in Seville that brings the whole gang back together.

1.title: FR - Berlin et La Dame à l'hermine - S01E02 - An Ode to Life
1.plot: High off the night's exploits with Candela, Berlin and the gang embark on a high-risk reconnaissance mission of the duke's sprawling country estate.

1.title: FR - Berlin et La Dame à l'hermine - S01E03 - Stendhal Syndrome
1.plot: While Roi and Cameron reluctantly stay behind, the events of the day take Berlin and the others back to the countryside with a brand new set of plans.

1.title: FR - Berlin et La Dame à l'hermine - S01E04 - Oranges from China
1.plot: As the heist takes a new direction, Keila sets a daring strategy in motion. At a clandestine party, the duchess approaches Berlin and enrages Candela.

1.title: FR - Berlin et La Dame à l'hermine - S01E05 - Demolition Boys
1.plot: As Damián hunts down lost luggage, Berlin mixes business with pleasure. At the duke's mansion, Keila and Bruce continue the team's search for the vault.

1.title: FR - Berlin et La Dame à l'hermine - S01E06 - Pomelo Loves Mandarin
1.plot: The duke's scrutiny pushes Berlin to devise a decoy heist plan. At a candlelit dinner, Bruce opens up and the duchess communicates covertly with Damián.

1.title: FR - Berlin et La Dame à l'hermine - S01E07 - Night of the Double Dodge
1.plot: Armed with new information, Damián attempts to solve the burning issue of the fireball. As Berlin falls deeper for Candela, his past catches up with him.

1.title: FR - Berlin et La Dame à l'hermine - S01E08 - Happiness Belongs to He Who Loves
1.plot: A night out in Peñíscola inspires Berlin to radically change his plans. Will he and the gang manage to pull off the greatest heist in history?

meta.plot: Rip Wheeler et Beth Dutton misent tout sur une nouvelle vie dans le sud du Texas, mais leur rêve de se construire un avenir loin des fantômes de Yellowstone se heurte à de nouvelles réalités et à un ranch rival prêt à tout pour protéger son empire.

1.title: FR - Dutton Ranch - S01E01 - The Untold Want
1.plot: Beth and Rip fight to rebuild their lives in Texas.

1.title: FR - Dutton Ranch - S01E02 - Earn Another Day
1.plot: Beth and Rip work to forge their new life in Rio Paloma.

meta.plot: Glendale, Californie, en 1931. Mildred Pierce, une mère au foyer, découvre l'infidélité de son époux. Après une violente dispute, celui-ci s'en va, la laissant seule avec leurs deux jeunes enfants. Mildred, qui n'a pas travaillé en-dehors de la maison depuis des années, décide d'exploiter ses talents de pâtissière, essayant de vendre ses gâteaux et créations à ses voisins et amis. Rapidement, Mildred s'aperçoit que cette activité ne lui permettra pas de subvenir à ses besoins, et elle tente de trouver un poste de vendeuse ou de réceptionniste. Après avoir refusé un emploi de femme de ménage, elle doit se résoudre à travailler dans un restaurant bas de gamme. Elle demande à son amie Lucy de ne pas le révéler à ses enfants.

1.title: FR - Mildred Pierce - S01E01 - Part 1
1.plot: After a fight with her husband, Mildred Pierce finds herself alone and caring for her two young daughters. She hasn't worked outside of the home for several years but is excellent at making pastries and sells cakes and pies to friends and neighbors. She would like to work as a sales clerk or a receptionist but those jobs are hard to come by. She has an interview with a Mrs. Forrester about becoming her housekeeper but it's clear that her pride will not let her take such a low position. She finally realizes - urged on by her friend and neighbor Lucy Gessler - that she'll never get the type of job that she wants and settles for a job as a waitress in a hash house. She begs Lucy never to tell her daughters, especially the elder Veda, of the type of work she does.

1.title: FR - Mildred Pierce - S01E02 - Part 2
1.plot: Mildred brings a sample of her pies into the diner and they're a big hit with the customers. Soon she gets an order for 35 pies a week and the orders start to pile up from other restaurants as well. Veda discovers her waitress uniforms and Mildred is forced to admit what she does for a living. The selfish Veda thinks it's all so degrading. Mildred tells her she plans on opening a restaurant of her own and eventually asks Wally to develop an estimate of what it would cost to set herself up, but he has another idea for her. With a divorce from husband Bert she's able to buy and convert a house into a restaurant. On her last day at the diner, she leaves early to spend time at the beach with one of the customers, Monty Beragon. She returns home the next day to learn that her youngest daughter is seriously ill in hospital.

1.title: FR - Mildred Pierce - S01E03 - Part 3
1.plot: After her youngest daughter's funeral, Mildred concentrates on opening her new restaurant. Opening night is a smashing success and even Veda seems to approve. It's all a little too busy for a first night but friends come to the rescue. When Monty Beragon shows up, she learns that he is quite a well-known personality. Veda is quite taken with him. Monty recommends a new music teacher for Veda and Mildred decides to start saving to buy her a proper piano. With the repeal of prohibition, neighbor Lucy suggests that Mildred opens a bar in the restaurant. Vera, not happy with the wristwatch her mother gave her for Christmas, rebels. She blames Monty for turning Veda against her.

1.title: FR - Mildred Pierce - S01E04 - Part 4
1.plot: As the years have gone by, Mildred has become quite a successful businesswoman. It's now 1937 and she and Lucy, now a partner, is looking to open her third restaurant on Laguna Beach after having opened her second place in Beverly Hills. Veda has grown into an attractive 18 year-old but is no less selfish as a young adult. She's taken to partying and staying out until all hours but refuses to follow her mother's advice. She's now thinking that she wants to be an actress, which Mildred encourages. She is soon pregnant but the child's father refuses to marry her leaving Mildred in the dark until she learns that something is going on from the boy's mother. Veda however wants something other than marriage from the boy and his family. Mildred throws her out but after several months with no word from her, learns that Veda has become a successful singer.

1.title: FR - Mildred Pierce - S01E05 - Part 5
1.plot: Mildred is quite proud of Veda's accomplishments as a singer but finds that her daughter refuses to take her phone calls or respond to any of her letters. She and Monty Beragon spend some time together and she decides to buy his old family mansion. They also decide to marry and is thrilled when Monty arranges for Veda to come to the reception and sing for them. Success has only inflated Veda's ego however. She has many offers whether it be to endorse products or sing in New York City. Mildred however suffers a serious business setback when the restaurant in Laguna Beach starts to lose money. She's also had to increase her personal expenses to cover her expenses. She learns that Wally Burgan and Ida are quite prepared to push her aside. Mildred has been spending her money on Veda and her ex-husband Bert suggests that Veda will just have to contribute more. Her world comes crashing down when she returns home unexpectedly.

meta.plot: A life-long housecat decides that he doesn’t want to live with people anymore. Loosely inspired by a real break-up and the cat caught in the middle, Kevin dares to ask himself, "Is there a world where I don’t do the owner thing and am just… single for the rest of my life?"

1.title: FR - Kevin [VOSTFR] - S01E01 - The Breakup
1.plot: After the unexpected break-up of his "owners" Dan and Dana, neurotic housecat Kevin moves into a local pet rescue in Queens where he meets other "independent" cats who can help him figure out what he wants out of life.

1.title: FR - Kevin [VOSTFR] - S01E02 - Animal of the Month
1.plot: After being named "Animal of the Month," Kevin struggles to fill out his "adoption profile" on the Furrever Friends website. In order to figure out what type of person he's looking for, Kevin decides to hit the streets with Cupcake to see her New York. An excited Judy escorts Armando to his nail appointment, but they both end up going home with an unlikely potential human companion.

1.title: FR - Kevin [VOSTFR] - S01E03 - In Heat
1.plot: A heat wave leads Armando to seek refuge with a wealthy woman in the Hamptons. Kevin, avoiding offers of help from Dan and Dana, begs Armando to bring him along. Cupcake tries to escape the heat by finally spending the night with one of her casual hook-ups, a pitbull named Mia. Judy is left alone in the rescue to contend with ants seeking shelter.

1.title: FR - Kevin [VOSTFR] - S01E04 - Kitten Season
1.plot: Kevin and Judy try to be mentors to the out-of-control new kittens who flood the rescue. Armando is coaxed into returning to the theater as the director of an all-horse production of a beloved American musical. His return is spoiled by the unexpected appearance of his rival... Broadway legend Patti LuPony. Seth and Brandi turn to Cupcake for help in getting the new kittens ready to be adopted.

1.title: FR - Kevin [VOSTFR] - S01E05 - Quarantined
1.plot: A new strain of Kennel Cough forces Kevin and the rest of animals into quarantine. They turn on each other as mob mentality causes an obsession over identifying "Patient Zero." Armando finds himself at odds with Patti LuPony when he refuses to cancel Mame rehearsals despite being sick. Brandi feels betrayed by Seth's insistence on including her in the quarantine protocols.

1.title: FR - Kevin [VOSTFR] - S01E06 - Fourth of July
1.plot: Kevin and the other animals take a heavy duty sedative to cope with the horrors of the Fourth of July in Queens. Kevin finds himself re-evaluating his decision to reject Dana and live on his own. Cupcake thwarts Armando's attempt to escape into lucid dreaming. Seth tries to save runaway dogs to impress Brandi. Judy helps Peter impress his visiting parents.

1.title: FR - Kevin [VOSTFR] - S01E07 - Provincetown
1.plot: When the gang attends a pet adoption ceremony in Provincetown, Kevin finds himself competing with a collie for Franny's attention. Bear helps Armando face his past. Cupcake is concerned when Judy develops a crush on another sickly kitten. Seth laments the fact that he and Brandi never had an official adoption ceremony themselves.

1.title: FR - Kevin [VOSTFR] - S01E08 - Opening Night
1.plot: Kevin impulsively tells Franny that he wants to take their relationship to the next level. An unexpected visit by an important figure from his past forces Armando to consider his behavior patterns in relationships. Cupcake puts herself in a compromising position as she tries to help Judy get over her recent heartbreak.

meta.plot: La série explore les coulisses de la création des vacances de rêve au Club Med, icône du tourisme mondial : comment sont sélectionnés les futurs chefs de village, et comment naissent les Resorts de demain. De Marrakech à Punta Cana, de l'Afrique du Sud à Oman, découvrez comment le Club Med s'est réinventé, sans jamais renier son ADN, autour d'une figure clé : le chef de village.

1.title: FR - Dream Makers - S01E01 - The Journey Begins
1.plot: From Marrakech to Val d'Isère, this episode explores a both demanding and decisive role: the Chef de Village (Resort Manager). At La Palmyre (France), 11 candidates have one month to prove they are ready.

1.title: FR - Dream Makers - S01E02 - Endless Possibilities
1.plot: As Barq prepares for his journey to South Africa and discovers the construction of his future Resort, the candidates push their limits at La Palmyre, while a renovation is completed in Punta Cana.

1.title: FR - Dream Makers - S01E03 - Under Pressure
1.plot: Barq sets out to find new talent, while others explore a new location. At La Palmyre, high-pressure interviews and committee decisions reshape careers and hopes… except for one, for whom everything can still change.

1.title: FR - Dream Makers - S01E04 - New Chapters
1.plot: The moment of truth arrives for one candidate, as Barq prepares for a life-changing move. Between achievement and new ambitions, the series concludes with new destinations… and destinies yet to be written.

1.title: FR - The Legend of Kitchen Soldier [VOSTFR] - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Kang Seong-jae enlists in the army as a cook and receives mysterious game-like commands that appear only to him.

1.title: FR - The Legend of Kitchen Soldier [VOSTFR] - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Facing reassignment, Seong-jae must complete a high-stakes cooking quest within 72 hours to secure his role as military cook.

1.title: FR - Operation Dark Phone: Murder by Text - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: The inside story of the biggest ever joint law enforcement operation against a global network of organised crime groups who believed their encrypted phones were safe. For 74 frantic days the authorities could read all the messages and sought to save lives and bring down the gangs, before the criminals realised that their data was being captured.

1.title: FR - Operation Dark Phone: Murder by Text - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: How one of the users in the encrypted chat was identified as he leader of one of the most dangerous organised crime groups in north-west England, now running his criminal enterprises from outside the UK. He had no idea that his messages had been intercepted and was planning coordinated shootings against the families of two of his enemies.

1.title: FR - Operation Dark Phone: Murder by Text - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: As the National Crime Agency team mobilise to find the mole within their team, word gets out that there has been a fatal development in the investigation in the Netherlands. A leading crime journalist, Wouter Laumans, is quickly on the case. The murder victim is a very close friend of the crime boss who has built the torture chamber. The authorities fear a terrifying escalation when they uncover a plot to kidnap his enemy's family in revenge. It becomes increasingly clear that the authorities will soon have to reveal their hands if more deaths are to be avoided.

1.title: FR - Operation Dark Phone: Murder by Text - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Sixty days since the authorities first broke into the criminals' messages, it's approaching the beginning of the end of the EncroChat hack, as the owners become suspicious that they've been compromised. But as each batch of messages that have been given to the UK authorities are analysed, more and more criminality is exposed. Analysts reveal that it's the first time that they've ever come across exportation of drugs from the UK, as they discover half a tonne of ecstasy is bound for Australia.

meta.plot: Caro Pardíaco, influenceuse pétillante et diva dans l'âme, a tout pour elle... jusqu'à ce qu'elle tombe dans le piège de l'amour romantique en pleine crise de la trentaine.

1.title: FR - Carísima - S01E01 - Who is Caro Pardíaco?
1.plot: Just as Caro falls head over heels for Leo, a stalker threatens to end their love story before it even begins.

1.title: FR - Carísima - S01E02 - Hotwater Rave
1.plot: An invitation to a strange festival inspires Caro to heal herself. Who cares if the pledge was signed in blood?

1.title: FR - Carísima - S01E03 - Seawarma
1.plot: Caro's 30th birthday nears, and she can't find a date. At least her stalker has a special gift ready.

1.title: FR - Carísima - S01E04 - Money Catch
1.plot: One mission, several dates, and zero chance Caro lands a boyfriend before 30. Is love a dangerous game after all?

1.title: FR - Carísima - S01E05 - The Guillotine
1.plot: On the surface, it's a birthday roast. To Caro, it's a public execution, and the executioner has big plans.

1.title: FR - Carísima - S01E06 - The Event of the Year
1.plot: A combined birthday-wedding celebration brings out the worst in Caro, and Leo issues a dire threat.

1.title: FR - Carísima - S01E07 - Bachelorette Party
1.plot: Three party girls, two brothers at odds and an engagement on the edge of disaster.

1.title: FR - Carísima - S01E08 - Wedding Planner
1.plot: Leo overtakes the wedding planning and Caro's life, while an investigation unmasks the groom — and buried secrets.

1.title: FR - Carísima - S01E09 - Now That's a Red Flag
1.plot: In Bariloche, the party of the century takes a dark turn when Caro struggles with Leo's demands — and only her friends can save her.

1.title: FR - Carísima - S01E10 - Carísima
1.plot: At the altar, Caro has an awakening, but it's an unexpected wedding crasher who spills all of Leo's secrets.

meta.plot: Au sein d'une communauté de retraités située dans un endroit pittoresque, plusieurs héros improbables unissent leurs forces pour empêcher une menace d'un autre monde de leur voler la seule chose qu'ils n'ont pas : le temps.

1.title: FR - The Boroughs : Retraite rebelle - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - The Boroughs : Retraite rebelle - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR - The Boroughs : Retraite rebelle - S01E03 - Episode 3
FR - The Boroughs : Retraite rebelle - S01E04 - Episode 4
FR - The Boroughs : Retraite rebelle - S01E05 - Episode 5
FR - The Boroughs : Retraite rebelle - S01E06 - Episode 6
FR - The Boroughs : Retraite rebelle - S01E07 - Episode 7
FR - The Boroughs : Retraite rebelle - S01E08 - Episode 8

meta.plot: It is 1986 and Britain is booming. "Rivals" dives headfirst into the cutthroat world of TV where hair-dos are big and ambitions are even bigger. Deals are brokered in boardrooms, as well as bedrooms. Nobody can be sure who will come out on top. With every man and woman out only for themselves, can true love really blossom?

1.title: FR - Rivals - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: To ensure the success of his TV company, Corinium, Tony Baddingham hires brilliant interviewer Declan O'Hara and ambitious American producer Cameron Cook. As the O'Haras move to the countryside, Declan has a rude awakening on his first day on the job, while Declan's daughter, Taggie, and wife, Maud,must adjust to their new life and neighbors. As the O'Haras find themselves caught in the cross-fire between rivals Tony and Rupert Campbell-Black, will Declan regret his new career move?

1.title: FR - Rivals - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Declan feels the pressure to deliver a new hit show for Tony and his company, Corinium, with producer Cameron on hand to help despite their fractious relationship. Keen to recruit businessman Freddie Jones, Tony agrees to attend a dinner party, but the guest list holds nasty surprises. Taggie gets her first catering job, but the evening is fraught with incidents. When the dinner party descends into chaos, can Tony salvage the situation and kill two birds with one stone?

1.title: FR - Rivals - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: It is Christmas time and everyone is celebrating except Declan, who worries about Maud's extravagant party plans for their son's twenty-first birthday on New Year's Eve. Taggie is eager to reunite with an old flame and works to make the night perfect, but the evening is full of surprises as worlds collide. A serious event shocks Taggie and she is taken aback when Rupert offers help. Will Taggie accept Rupert's apology? Where will the chips fall for all concerned when the hangovers fade?

1.title: FR - Rivals - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Keen to punish Rupert, Declan prepares to interview and obliterate him live on television. Meanwhile, Tony invites Freddie to his prestigious pheasant shoot, eager to recruit him to the Corinium board. With a little nudge from Rupert, Taggie starts to assert herself, but she worries that Declan has lost his way. The nation waits with bated breath for Rupert and Declan's showdown. Will Tony finally get his wish to bring down Rupert Campbell-Black?

1.title: FR - Rivals - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: It is a busy week at Corinium Studios. Preparations are underway for the first beauty pageant and a historic interview with Prime Minister Margaret Thatcher. Declan's ego is growing with each successful show, but he strives for journalistic glory and to prove his integrity. As Tony breathes down his neck, will he play ball? If not, is Corinium big enough for both of them?

1.title: FR - Rivals - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: Cameron attends an awards ceremony in Spain alone, and is surprised to bump into Rupert staying at the same hotel. Out of Rutshire and away from prying eyes, could this be the start of something new, and what could it mean for Tony or Taggie? Meanwhile, Rupert takes a gamble to help new company Venturer take on rival Tony's Corinium. Will it pay off or will Declan and Freddie think Rupert has finally gone too far?

1.title: FR - Rivals - S01E07 - Episode 7
1.plot: When Tony learns that Rupert, Declan, and Freddie have formed Venturer to challenge his bid for the television franchise, he is furious. Things look up when Corinium is nominated for another prestigious award, and his relationship with Cameron deepens. Meanwhile, Taggie offers to help campaign for Venturer, which means a chance to get closer to Rupert. But with Rupert linked to Cameron, can Taggie ever really get close?

1.title: FR - Rivals - S01E08 - Episode 8
1.plot: Paranoid, Tony demands loyalty, but can he trust those closest to him? Corinium and Venturer prepare for a gladiatorial public meeting to decide if Rupert, Declan, and Freddie can contend for the franchise against Tony. Both teams pull out all the stops to impress local residents and the IBA, but as fissures appear, could Tony and his dirty tricks derail Venturer before they have really started? With secrets exposed, which relationships will survive, and which rival will ultimately win out?

2.title: FR - Rivals - S02E01 - Episode 1
2.plot: Following the events of the previous season, Rupert shelters Cameron whilst Tony, having survived his injury, seeks justice. A polo match takes place with both Corinium and Venturer filming for broadcast. Despite pressure from Tony, Cameron sides with Rupert. Tony promises revenge.

2.title: FR - Rivals - S02E02 - Episode 2
2.plot: Tony Baddingham returns more dangerous than ever; as Declan attempts to rebuild his life, Taggie pines for a missing Rupert; a high-stakes polo match reignites the rivalry, redrawing battle lines for a costly new war.

meta.plot: Dans cette série documentaire, James Rodríguez, légendaire numéro 10 colombien, raconte son ascension vers les sommets du football et le plus grand rendez-vous mondial de ce sport.

1.title: FR - James. - S01E01 - James vs Life
1.plot: After early rejections, James doubles down on his dream. Far from home, he learns to survive, train harder and shine as his path to the pros takes shape.

1.title: FR - James. - S01E02 - James vs. The World
1.plot: Colombia lights up the 2014 World Cup and James becomes its spark. As the hype explodes worldwide overnight, a team pivot raises new pressure.

1.title: FR - James. - S01E03 - James vs James
1.plot: James tries to reset his career and prove he still belongs. Rejoining Colombia renews his fire, and a long-held Copa dream finally comes back into view.

meta.plot: Cette délirante série d'animation comique pour adultes, sortie de l'esprit tordu des créateurs de "Big Mouth", parle de cœur, de sexe et de relations amoureuses… chez les animaux.

1.title: FR - Mating Season - S01E01 - The Copulatory Tie
1.plot: Josh wakes up late from hibernation to find his longtime girlfriend has moved on. Fawn tries dating an older stag. Ray gets himself stuck inside a skunk.

1.title: FR - Mating Season - S01E02 - The Dating Sites
1.plot: Ray urges a nervous Josh to get back out on the dating scene. Fawn plays Penelope's wing-deer to help her pick up girls at The Beaver Dam.

1.title: FR - Mating Season - S01E03 - The Lull
1.plot: Josh steals his dad's stash of horny goat weed to help Ray keep it up. Penelope consults a psychic. Fawn dates a moose who won't make the first move.

1.title: FR - Mating Season - S01E04 - The Truth About Canada
1.plot: A flashback reveals Penelope's brush with forbidden love, Fawn's frustrating attempts to cohabitate — and the moment the two first became friends.

1.title: FR - Mating Season - S01E05 - The Hot Mess
1.plot: Josh is on guard when Ray's deadbeat mom pops into town to throw him a party. Fawn celebrates her freedom, and Penelope learns how to do "The Thing."

1.title: FR - Mating Season - S01E06 - The Horse Who Loved Me
1.plot: While Penelope and Fawn take Zeke to The Boneyard to sow his wild oats, Josh goes out with a well-heeled horse who's running from her past.

1.title: FR - Mating Season - S01E07 - The Polycule
1.plot: A pair of polyamorous marmots pull Penelope into a throuple. Fawn hits it off with a cute bobcat, and Ray takes Josh to an orgy with too many rules.

1.title: FR - Mating Season - S01E08 - The Passion of Raynal Skidski
1.plot: Ray falls in love with a sweet schoolteacher while Fawn dates a bro-goat from hell. Josh and Penelope try living as platonic partners.

1.title: FR - Mating Season - S01E09 - The All-Nighter
1.plot: Penelope plans a cozy night in for a heartbroken Ray — but he wants a wild night out. Fawn runs into her ex. Josh finds trouble with a tempting mink.

1.title: FR - Mating Season - S01E10 - The Wolf Wedding
1.plot: The friends leave the forest to crash Dylan's wedding when Fawn admits she still has feelings for him. Will the truth come out... or is it too late?

meta.plot: En 1980, une énorme bombe a été lancée dans le Harvey's Resort Hotel and Casino avec une demande de rançon de 3 millions de dollars. Alors que le FBI s'empresse de le désarmer et de trouver les coupables, rien ne se passe comme prévu.

1.title: FR - 450 kg de Dynamite - S01E01 - The Bomb
1.plot: Unbeknownst to the FBI, a quiet Hungarian immigrant landscaper, with no apparent ties to organised crime and no known record, concocts an elaborate extortion plan.

1.title: FR - 450 kg de Dynamite - S01E02 - The Ransom
1.plot: Meticulous and methodical, Big John engineers his ransom scheme with military precision. On paper, it’s flawless. But as the deadline approaches, nothing goes according to plan.

1.title: FR - 450 kg de Dynamite - S01E03 - The Manhunt
1.plot: When the bomb detonates inside Harvey’s Wagon Wheel Casino, it leaves behind more than shattered concrete and twisted steel: a maze of unanswered questions.

meta.plot: Une psychologue, qui suit des titans de la haute technologie au sein de la Silicon Valley, est en désaccord avec un PDG autoproclamé "inventeur du futur", en raison d'un scandale déclenché par l’exploitation de données personnelles.

1.title: FR - The Audacity [VOSTFR] - S01E01 - Best of All Possible Worlds
1.plot: Duncan, almost tech titan, must prove he and his company are F-able. JoAnne provides therapy with benefits. Orson lands from Baltimore. The party for Dr. Webb ends in a cat burglary.

1.title: FR - The Audacity [VOSTFR] - S01E02 - Shine Brightly
1.plot: JoAnne squirms in Duncan's grasp. Lili needs these diagnoses by yesterday. The press is on to a scandal. Bardolph's triggered. Xander gets the joke. Orson has his heart stolen by someone with practice. Gary's Pippin is - it's too awful to say.

1.title: FR - The Audacity [VOSTFR] - S01E03 - Valley of Heart's Delight
1.plot: Wildfires hit the Valley, poisoning everything: marriages, neuro-psych evals, cheeseburgers, fifth homes. When someone poops in a hat, one A.I. friend to teens might just be the hero we've been waiting for. Also, there's bad news about Linus Po.

1.title: FR - The Audacity [VOSTFR] - S01E04 - Vanitas
1.plot: Toxic masculinity makes a comeback in Martin's spine, Orson's gut, Duncan's shins. But the feminine side is strong: Sorrel's tincture, Lili's mud, JoJo's bridge. Anushka holds Duncan's feet to the fire as an atomic reaction sweeps through Las Altas.

1.title: FR - The Audacity [VOSTFR] - S01E05 - Lamplighters
1.plot: HyperG's salvation is close, but there's danger to Duncan. Lili has a secret. JoAnne hopes garlic can save her. Anushka finds gold at the end of the slide, but a witness to Easter Island threatens to destroy her. Beatrice cuts a deal with the Tang.

1.title: FR - The Audacity [VOSTFR] - S01E06 - Sandbox
1.plot: JoAnne trusts Sheldon to do her dirty work. Ruffery is shattered. Duncan can't escape Hamish's legacy of flashy machinations. Tess discovers Orson's dark secret. Chekhov's gun might go off. Lili hits upon the greatest metaphor ever.

1.title: FR - The Audacity [VOSTFR] - S01E07 - Foundering
1.plot: Is Xander a hero or a villain?; Duncan is ready to disrupt with P.I.N.A.T.A.; JoAnne contends with the consequences of her counsel; Anushka takes the lead and Martin has a decision to make; Gary get to the root of Orson's strange behaviour.

meta.plot: Un documentaire révélateur sur la montée, la chute et le retour épique de l'icône mondiale Tiger Woods.

1.title: FR - Tiger - S01E01 - Part I
1.plot: Spanning Tiger Woods' earliest days handling a club to his unforgettable performance at the 2006 British Open, Part I highlights the golfer's unparalleled rise to fame and his complicated relationship with his father Earl Woods. As Tiger evolves into both a sports and cultural phenomenon, the significance of his place in history—as the first superstar golfer of color in a traditionally white sport—is undeniable.

1.title: FR - Tiger - S01E02 - Part II
1.plot: Despite ever more staggering expectations, Tiger maintains his competitive dominance, while secretly navigating a double life. At the center of that double life is Tiger's ex-mistress, Rachel Uchitel, who breaks her silence in the film about the affair that forever altered the golfer's world. Meanwhile, just as the scandal begins to fade, Tiger's body begins to betray him, and leads to a battle with prescription drug abuse. But in 2018, he mounts one more comeback, with epic results.

meta.plot: L'inspecteur Jouin doit résoudre un double meurtre impliquant Marguerite Meg Steinheil, la mondaine surnommée La Pompe Funèbre après la mort de Félix Faure.

1.title: FR - Paris Police 1910 - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - Paris Police 1910 - S01E02 - Episode 2

meta.plot: L'un des plus grands joueurs de tennis de tous les temps, Rafael Nadal, revient sur sa carrière, son héritage et sa dernière saison.

1.title: FR - Rafa - S01E01 - No Tomorrow
1.plot: An emotional Rafael Nadal announces his retirement to the world, and remembers the Davis Cup final that launched his career 20 years earlier.

1.title: FR - Rafa - S01E02 - Rainmaker
1.plot: As he chases one final triumph, Rafa struggles with injuries. Years earlier, a game against Roger Federer kicks off the greatest rivalry in tennis history.

1.title: FR - Rafa - S01E03 - The Hunter and The Hunted
1.plot: Novak Djokovic's rapid and unexpected rise heralds the era of "The Big Three." As Rafa fights to stay on top of the game, he pushes his body to extremes.

1.title: FR - Rafa - S01E04 - No Fear
1.plot: Throughout his career, even when the odds were stacked against him, Rafa refused to give up — and he keeps fighting as the end edges inevitably closer.

meta.plot: Ben Reilly, détective privé, est engagé pour enquêter sur ce qui semble être de banales affaires... jusqu'à ce que des gangsters, des monstres et une mystérieuse femme fatale tissent une toile qui va le confronter à son ancienne vie de seul et unique super-héros de New York : L'Araignée.

1.title: FR - Spider-Noir - S01E01 - Step into My Office
1.plot: It won't end the way you want it to.

1.title: FR - Spider-Noir - S01E02 - Tread Lightly
1.plot: You're an investigator. Investigate.

1.title: FR - Spider-Noir - S01E03 - Double Cross
1.plot: The quicker you prove it, the quicker they die.

1.title: FR - Spider-Noir - S01E04 - A Mistake I'll Never Make Again
1.plot: I don't know, I think he's still got it.

1.title: FR - Spider-Noir - S01E05 - Betrayal
1.plot: Careful is for stock tips and hot sauce.

1.title: FR - Spider-Noir - S01E06 - Nightmare on a Gurney
1.plot: If you haven't found the answer, it's because there isn't one.

1.title: FR - Spider-Noir - S01E07 - Nobody's Hero
1.plot: I can't protect you when I'm dead.

1.title: FR - Spider-Noir - S01E08 - The Man in the Mask
1.plot: Gee whiz, what's a down-on-his-luck private investigator to do?

meta.plot: En 1970, la Seleção pénètre sur le terrain avec de grands rêves et un défi immense : devenir la première équipe à être trois fois couronnée championne du monde de football.

1.title: FR - Brasil 70 : Le troisième sacre - S01E01 - Play for Us, Pelé
1.plot: After a harrowing 1966 season, Pelé hesitates to return to the field — but the energetic encouragement of coach João Saldanha may change his mind.

1.title: FR - Brasil 70 : Le troisième sacre - S01E02 - Zagallo's Eleven
1.plot: With Saldanha out, the team heads to Mexico for the cup — but neither the heat nor their superstitious new coach cuts them any slack.

1.title: FR - Brasil 70 : Le troisième sacre - S01E03 - What King Am I?
1.plot: Facing a strong, united opponent, Brazil's team must set aside their political differences to stay focused on the game... and keep scoring.

1.title: FR - Brasil 70 : Le troisième sacre - S01E04 - The Ghost of Maracanazo
1.plot: Daring to hope for the finals, Brazil's national team gets cold feet, haunted by memories of a historic Maracanã defeat to Uruguay in 1950.

1.title: FR - Brasil 70 : Le troisième sacre - S01E05 - I'm Not Dead
1.plot: As the final looms and pressure mounts for Brazil to bring the cup home, the star player isn't in top form — but he's definitely not dead.

1.title: FR - Calabasas Confidential - S01E01 - Calabasas Coded
1.plot: Back in Calabasas after college, the group kicks off summer at Jemma's house party, but it gets messy when new friends collide with old exes.

1.title: FR - Calabasas Confidential - S01E02 - All Beef, No Toppings
1.plot: Are the vibes off between Emma and Dylan? At Kimora's song release party, a flirty connection unleashes years of baggage between childhood besties.

1.title: FR - Calabasas Confidential - S01E03 - Something To Take The Edge Off
1.plot: In the wake of Kikichella, Emilie's bond with Kimora hits an all-time low. A surprise soft launch has the group chat buzzing — and Jemma stunned.

1.title: FR - Calabasas Confidential - S01E04 - Cowboys Don't Get Scared
1.plot: Lines are drawn in the sand after an awkward beach day. Hercy chases his basketball dreams. Suede saddles up for dinner with the Calabasas Cowboy.

1.title: FR - Calabasas Confidential - S01E05 - Cut The Cap
1.plot: As rumors spread about her date with Dylan, Suede confronts Nicole. Emilie gets the ick, then a surprising glow-up catches the girls' attention.

1.title: FR - Calabasas Confidential - S01E06 - All's Fair In Love And Calabasas
1.plot: The boys swap Rodeo Drive for the rodeo, but who gave Dylan that hickey? Nicole sits Suede down for tough love. Ben is all green flags to Emilie.

1.title: FR - Calabasas Confidential - S01E07 - Who Needs Enemies
1.plot: Suede kicks off her redemption arc. The beef is beefing between Alexie and Emilie. A messy bar night ends in tears after Nicole calls out Emma.

1.title: FR - Calabasas Confidential - S01E08 - Playing With Fire
1.plot: The group heads to Malibu for an end-of-summer celebration. After years of drama, will Jemma and Dylan finally sit down for a mature heart-to-heart?

1.title: FR - Fifties Professionals [VOSTFR] - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: A former top agent discovers a long-lost figure linked to his disastrously failed mission from 10 years ago.

1.title: FR - Fifties Professionals [VOSTFR] - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Suspecting Je-sun holds crucial evidence, Ho-myeong pursues him, determined to finally resolve the failed operation from a decade ago.

meta.plot: De vedette de la télé à superstar, la carrière de Kylie est jalonnée de rebondissements et de revirements, comme elle le révèle ouvertement dans ce documentaire sans filtre.

1.title: FR - Kylie - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Teenage soap star, Kylie Minogue, releases a single in the UK that catapults her straight to number one in the charts - and onto every tabloid headline.

1.title: FR - Kylie - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Kylie's relationship with rockstar Michael Hutchence sees her embark on an era of discovery, as she tries out a new look, a new sound and a new label.

1.title: FR - Kylie - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Riding high on a new raft of pop hits, Kylie prepares to headline Glastonbury — until a shocking diagnosis turns her life and career upside down.

1.title: FR - Jae-seok's B&B Rules! - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Yu Jae-seok recruits Lee Kwang-soo, Byeon Woo-seok and Ji Ye-eun to build a one-of-a-kind camp — but panic brews before the arrival of the guests.

1.title: FR - Jae-seok's B&B Rules! - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Full of excitement and surprises, Jae-seok kicks off introductions with a set of ground rules. But soon, the group scrambles to put food on the table.

1.title: FR - Jae-seok's B&B Rules! - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: On their first day, the group dives into a fun, lively game they've always dreamed of playing — in a place full of surprises and laughter.

1.title: FR - Jae-seok's B&B Rules! - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Day 2 kicks off with a surprise mission. From cooking to cleaning, the staff powers through a non-stop day of chores — but it's too early to feel tired!

1.title: FR - Jae-seok's B&B Rules! - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: The staff comes up with a thoughtful parting gift for the guests. After a delicious dinner, a sentimental campfire gives way to a lively talent show.

1.title: FR - Jae-seok's B&B Rules! - S01E06 - Episode 6
FR - Jae-seok's B&B Rules! - S01E07 - Episode 7
FR - Jae-seok's B&B Rules! - S01E08 - Episode 8
FR - Jae-seok's B&B Rules! - S01E09 - Episode 9
FR - Jae-seok's B&B Rules! - S01E10 - Episode 10

meta.plot: Quand leur ami Sanglier se retrouve dans le viseur du crime organisé, Zero et sa bande unissent leurs forces pour le sauver malgré leurs propres difficultés.

1.title: FR - Pour un sou - S01E01 - Two Cents of Values
1.plot: Always late and drowning in anxiety 'cause one of my best friends is hiding something. And Sarah, instead of helping, just dumps more on my shoulders.

1.title: FR - Pour un sou - S01E02 - Ninety-Nine Grand
1.plot: The only thing Wild Boar keeps saying is, "don't tell my wife." I think about the mess he's made while I spend my last night alone.

1.title: FR - Pour un sou - S01E03 - Last Resort
1.plot: Smeralda moves into my place while we try to deal with the Wild Boar situation without her noticing. Last call for Secco.

1.title: FR - Pour un sou - S01E04 - The Damage Done
1.plot: The way to help Wild Boar isn't what I'd hoped. Smeralda tells me what she's running from. That's when I find out what pain really means.

1.title: FR - Pour un sou - S01E05 - Two Cents of Hope
1.plot: Our venture into Moody's territory plays out like every betting site forecast. Meanwhile, Smeralda goes back to her ex — also wildly predictable.

1.title: FR - Pour un sou - S01E06 - The Last Saints in Heaven
1.plot: I always say a man needs a secret bunker — and here we are. Reinforcements arrive. Our date with destiny is getting closer.

1.title: FR - Pour un sou - S01E07 - Two Cents of Responsibility
1.plot: It should be a final goodbye with my mother, but instead she asks me to fix her phone. Unbelievable. And Smeralda's brothers might actually be worse.

1.title: FR - Pour un sou - S01E08 - Like Comets
1.plot: Time to face Moody, hoping it's the end of this mess and not of us. Eight episodes in, we can finally ask: What cuts deeper, a knife or the truth?

meta.plot: Confrontée à un danger qui risque de détruire le laboratoire de police scientifique, une remarquable équipe d'enquêteurs doit compter sur le soutien de Gil Grissom et Sara Sidle, de vieux amis qui les aideront à résoudre des crimes et à appliquer de nouvelles techniques pour sauver le laboratoire et servir la justice.

1.title: FR - Les Experts : Las Vegas - S01E01 - Legacy
1.plot: An attack on Jim Brass kicks off a twisted conspiracy targeting the Las Vegas crime lab.

1.title: FR - Les Experts : Las Vegas - S01E02 - Honeymoon in Vegas
1.plot: Gil Grissom and Sara Sidle come to the aid of a former colleague who is implicated in tampering with evidence. Maxine and the rest of the CSI team work the murder of a couple slain on their wedding day, following the evidence to the salacious underbelly of the Las Vegas elite.

1.title: FR - Les Experts : Las Vegas - S01E03 - Under the Skin
1.plot: Grissom and Sara's investigation into charges against David Hodges heats up as Internal Affairs joins the hunt. Also, pressure rises for the CSIs when a video game developer's body is found floating in a fountain before a huge gaming tournament.

1.title: FR - Les Experts : Las Vegas - S01E04 - Long Pig
1.plot: The CSI team investigates when a body is dug up in the luau pit of a Hawaiian-themed hotel. Also, Internal Affairs begins to question Grissom and Sara's return to the crime lab.

1.title: FR - Les Experts : Las Vegas - S01E05 - Let the Chips Fall
1.plot: As Grissom and Sara close in on who framed Hodges, the CSI team investigates a lock room murder mystery at 30,000 feet, when a cargo plane lands autonomously at McCarran Airport and everyone on board has been killed.

1.title: FR - Les Experts : Las Vegas - S01E06 - Funhouse
1.plot: Max puts CSI on lockdown when evidence in a new murder tips Grissom and Sara to a new suspect in the crime lab. Also, Folsom and Allie investigate a series of chilling killings at a dilapidated clown-themed hotel.

1.title: FR - Les Experts : Las Vegas - S01E07 - In the Blood
1.plot: An abandoned horse covered in blood leads the CSI team to a halfway house for convicted murderers. Also, Grissom and Sara begin to circle their prime suspect in the David Hodges case.

1.title: FR - Les Experts : Las Vegas - S01E08 - Pipe Cleaner
1.plot: When the CSIs are called to investigate human remains found in a convention center owner’s bathtub, Sara and Grissom use the case to get close to attorney Anson Wix’s star forensic expert witness, just days before David Hodges’ trial begins

1.title: FR - Les Experts : Las Vegas - S01E09 - Waiting in the Wings
1.plot: The CSI team looks closely at the eccentric world of sideshows when a couple of performers are discovered burned in a pit. Also, Hodges mulls a plea deal as his criminal trial kicks off, while Max, Grissom and Sara search for evidence to exonerate him.

1.title: FR - Les Experts : Las Vegas - S01E10 - Signed, Sealed, Delivered
1.plot: When David Hodges goes missing, the entire CSI team searches for any piece of evidence that can help locate him, clear his name and save the reputation of the entire crime lab.

meta.plot: Avery Ryan, spécialiste comportementale et experte en technologies de l'information, dirige une unité du FBI spécialisée dans les cyber-crimes et dans les rouages du Dark Web et du Deep Web, les faces sombres de l'Internet : avec son équipe, elle traque les hackers, les pirates informatiques et les délinquants sexuels qui sévissent sur la toile informatique mondiale.

1.title: FR - Les Experts : Cyber - S01E01 - Kidnapping 2.0
1.plot: Special Agent Avery Ryan and her team analyze cyber evidence when a string of infant abductions leads them to an auction site hidden in the deep web.

1.title: FR - Les Experts : Cyber - S01E02 - CMND:Crash
1.plot: Ryan and her Cyber team investigate a rollercoaster crash that appears to have been caused by someone hacking into the ride’s internal computer.

1.title: FR - Les Experts : Cyber - S01E03 - Killer En Route
1.plot: The cyber team investigates when a car service company's dispatch software is hacked in order to target certain passengers.

1.title: FR - Les Experts : Cyber - S01E04 - Fire Code
1.plot: Ryan and her team are alerted to a new cyber threat when they discover that arsonists have a new, less traceable way to start fires in homes – by hacking into the owners’ printers and laptops via a software patch.

1.title: FR - Les Experts : Cyber - S01E05 - Crowd Sourced
1.plot: The Cyber team must track down a bomber fixated on revealing the “truth” about society’s overreliance on technology.

1.title: FR - Les Experts : Cyber - S01E06 - The Evil Twin
1.plot: Avery and her team investigate the murder of a woman whose electronic devices indicate that she was alive for three days after her official time of death.

1.title: FR - Les Experts : Cyber - S01E07 - URL, Interrupted
1.plot: The Cyber team investigates when a high school victim of intense cyberbullying by her classmates pledges to retaliate.

1.title: FR - Les Experts : Cyber - S01E08 - Selfie 2.0
1.plot: The cyber team investigates the abductions of young women whose social network pages are being kept up to date. Also, Ryan helps Trish McCarthy cope with the death of Trish’s sister, Ryan’s former psych patient.

1.title: FR - Les Experts : Cyber - S01E09 - L0m1s
1.plot: The cyber crime team investigates when nine planes that departed from the same airport face a coordinated Wi-Fi attack while in flight.

1.title: FR - Les Experts : Cyber - S01E10 - Click Your Poison
1.plot: Special Agent Avery Ryan and her team investigate when a man dies after taking medication he purchased from a hacked ad on a medical website.

1.title: FR - Les Experts : Cyber - S01E11 - Ghost in the Machine
1.plot: The cyber team tracks a killer who hacks into a popular online game and tricks gamers into delivering illegal weapons.

1.title: FR - Les Experts : Cyber - S01E12 - Bit by Bit
1.plot: Avery and the team investigate when a power outage in Detroit is used to mask a jewelry store robbery-homicide in which the jewels weren’t the target.

1.title: FR - Les Experts : Cyber - S01E13 - Family Secrets
1.plot: Avery confronts the hacker who released her patients’ information when she was a psychologist, and Krumitz confronts the man who murdered his parents.

2.title: FR - Les Experts : Cyber - S02E01 - Why-Fi
2.plot: D.B. Russell joins the team as the new Director of Next Generation Forensics while they investigate a case of burglary and homicide committed by someone who hacked the home's security system.

2.title: FR - Les Experts : Cyber - S02E02 - Heart Me
2.plot: When Raven's friend, Tracey (Lyndon Smith), is fired, evicted and her bank accounts emptied as a result of being hacked by a man she met on a dating app, Raven helps to locate the culprit. However, Raven asks for her team's help when the hacker is found dead and Tracy wakes up in a motel room with the murder weapon and no memory of what happened.

2.title: FR - Les Experts : Cyber - S02E03 - Brown Eyes, Blue Eyes
2.plot: When a police officer’s body camera is hacked and the incendiary video goes viral, the Cyber team is sent to find the truth and the hacker before the small town erupts in unrest.

2.title: FR - Les Experts : Cyber - S02E04 - Red Crone
2.plot: The Cyber team investigates a child abduction case based on the “Red Crone,” an online myth where an abductor lures children through an app on their phones. Also, Elijah’s aggressive behavior at work causes Avery to bench him, and romance is in the air for D.B.

2.title: FR - Les Experts : Cyber - S02E05 - hack E.R.
2.plot: When a hacker takes control of all networked medical devices at a hospital in Dallas and threatens to kill one patient every hour if his demands are not met, the Cyber team must find the source and figure out how they accessed an airtight security system.

2.title: FR - Les Experts : Cyber - S02E06 - Gone in 6 Seconds
2.plot: A man is killed by a driverless car while drag racing. The investigation leads to a hacker who is cyber-hacking vehicles and using them as remote-controlled cars to cause deadly crashes.

2.title: FR - Les Experts : Cyber - S02E07 - Corrupted Memory
2.plot: A woman is murdered while she video chats with her parents. Avery's skill is tested when she interviews the only witness, an agoraphobic neighbor who is suffering from PTSD following the incident.

2.title: FR - Les Experts : Cyber - S02E08 - Python
2.plot: When Avery's friend, an Interpol agent, is murdered by the #1 criminal on the FBI Cyber's Most Wanted List, Avery risks her life to capture the killer, the Deep Web's most notorious and dangerous drug dealer.

2.title: FR - Les Experts : Cyber - S02E09 - iWitness
2.plot: The cyber team investigates the murder of a hacker who was hired to erase an assault victim’s comments from a confessional website.

2.title: FR - Les Experts : Cyber - S02E10 - Shades of Grey
2.plot: An innocent bystander is killed when dozens of ATMs spew money into the street. The team investigates the bank heist and learns it was orchestrated by a real-life Robin Hood.

2.title: FR - Les Experts : Cyber - S02E11 - 404: Flight Not Found
2.plot: When the Cyber team investigates what appears to be a hack into air traffic control’s communication system, a greater threat emerges when a flight vanishes into thin air, drawing the team into the world’s first case of cyber-hijacking.

2.title: FR - Les Experts : Cyber - S02E12 - Going Viral
2.plot: When residents of New York City cannot reach the police when calling 911, the Cyber team realizes this is an airborne computer virus that is infecting cell phones and must find the hacker responsible. Also, D.B. meets a woman after responding to a mistaken text sent by her.

2.title: FR - Les Experts : Cyber - S02E13 - The Walking Dead
2.plot: Avery and the Cyber team attempt to work with black hat hacker Stella Kaine (Kelly Osbourne), to track down the hacker who took identity theft to a new level and digitally “killed” Avery’s ex-husband,

2.title: FR - Les Experts : Cyber - S02E14 - Fit-and-Run
2.plot: When a jogger’s body is found, the Cyber team use the fitness tracker she was wearing at the time of the murder to retrace her steps for the entire night leading up to her death.

2.title: FR - Les Experts : Cyber - S02E15 - Python's Revenge
2.plot: Cyber’s most notorious criminal, Python, returns to kidnap Avery’s surrogate daughter, making the team decipher a series of elaborate code-like puzzles in an attempt to save her life.

2.title: FR - Les Experts : Cyber - S02E16 - 5 Deadly Sins
2.plot: The Cyber team tracks a vigilante who is killing the biggest offenders of objectionable posts on social media websites.

2.title: FR - Les Experts : Cyber - S02E17 - Flash Squad
2.plot: The Cyber team investigates when users of a traffic app are rerouted to remote locations and robbed by masked women. Also, Russell reconnects with Greer Latimore after the team completes business in Los Angeles.

2.title: FR - Les Experts : Cyber - S02E18 - Legacy
2.plot: The fate of the U.S. government is at stake as Avery and the Cyber team search for the hacker responsible for the largest breach of highly classified data in history after millions of federal employee files are stolen. Also, Avery and her ex-husband have a heart-to-heart and D. B. considers a future with Greer.

meta.plot: Raconté par ceux qui y étaient, ce documentaire minutieux chronique le procès de Michael Jackson et examine l'héritage complexe de la star.
