FR - Michael Jackson : Le Verdict - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR - Michael Jackson : Le Verdict - S01E03 - Episode 3

meta.plot: Do Jiui, chirurgien plasticien, est promis à un brillant avenir, lorsqu'une affectation comme médecin de santé publique sur l'île isolée de Pyeondongdo vient bouleverser sa vie. Pour Jiui, cet endroit perdu au milieu de l'océan est plus qu'un simple exil. Hanté par un traumatisme, la mer est pour lui une source de terreur, une prison à ciel ouvert. Entre les habitants indiscrets et les insectes qui l'assaillent de toutes parts, la vie sur l'île est un véritable enfer pour ce citadin. C'est là qu'il rencontre l'infirmière mystérieuse, Yuk Hari. Derrière un doux sourire lourd de secrets, elle semble toujours là lorsque la phobie de Jiui refait surface. Alors que leurs chemins ne cessent de se croiser, Jiui parviendra-t-il à surmonter ses peurs et à quitter l'île ?

1.title: FR - Doctor on the Edge [VOSTFR] - S01E01 - The Doctor Sent to the Island
1.plot: Dreading his post, Do Ji-ui arrives on Pyeondongdo, meets Yuk Ha-ri, and begins harsh island life.

FR - Zodiaque - S01E02 -

meta.plot: Deux meilleures amies fans de pop deviennent rivales quand une occasion de rencontrer leur groupe favori en Corée met à l'épreuve les limites entre dévotion et obsession.

1.title: FR - Night Shift for Cuties - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Stars align when minimart coworkers Muti and Jenar bond over their obsession with Purple Tea — right before an announcement too good to  b-b-believe.

1.title: FR - Night Shift for Cuties - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Bogged down by the mounting costs of home life, Muti joins Jenar's tricky plan to save money to see Purple Tea. Jenar catches a hunky delivery guy's eye.

1.title: FR - Night Shift for Cuties - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: As Muti basks in the glow of good news from the Cutie-verse, Jenar grows anxious about the looming ticket war. Indra finally makes his feelings known.

1.title: FR - Night Shift for Cuties - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: An encounter with someone from Indra's past sends Jenar on an online spiral, while suspicions at the minimart threaten the Cuties' Korea trip fund.

1.title: FR - Night Shift for Cuties - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: As the dust settles from a family bombshell, Muti distracts herself with social media sleuthing on Boki's private life. Jenar receives a pivotal request.

1.title: FR - Night Shift for Cuties - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: Indra and Jenar's news sends shockwaves through socials, prompting Muti's suspicions and a drastic move. Boki breaks the mold to stay true to herself.

1.title: FR - Night Shift for Cuties - S01E07 - Episode 7
1.plot: With the concert approaching, Muti's Boki obsession waxes as Jenar's wanes. But when unexpected challenges arise, will Purple Tea's future remain bright?

1.title: FR - Night Shift for Cuties - S01E08 - Episode 8
1.plot: The Cuties face the fallout from their viral sasaeng shenanigans. Meanwhile, their devotion to Purple Tea — and each other — is put to the ultimate test.

meta.plot:
En 1992, Rachel Nickell est violemment assassinée sous les yeux de son fils de deux ans, Alex, alors qu'ils se promenaient dans un parc de Londres. Cette tragédie a des répercussions énormes sur la famille et la vie de l'homme innocent condamné à tort avant que le véritable meurtrier ne soit finalement arrêté quelques années plus tard.

D'après une histoire vraie.

1.title: FR - Sous ses yeux - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: A woman is murdered in front of her 2-year-old in '90s London. While his father tries to shield him from a media storm, the police identify a key suspect.

1.title: FR - Sous ses yeux - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: As DI Pedder's undercover operation develops, another murder hits the headlines. André and Alex move abroad, but their grief continues to follow them.

1.title: FR - Sous ses yeux - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Over a decade later, old evidence is re-examined by new eyes on the case. Will André and Alex finally get justice — or is there more to the story?

meta.plot: Dans une réalité alternative dans laquelle l'Union soviétique est la première nation à mettre un pied sur la lune, la course à l'espace est retracée de derrière le rideau de fer, montrant la vie des cosmonautes, des ingénieurs et des officiers du renseignement du programme spatial soviétique, ainsi que les risques que chacun d'eux a pris pour propulser l'humanité vers une nouvelle ère.

1.title: FR - Star City - S01E01 - The Eyes
1.plot: The Soviet Union reignites the race to the Moon—but this time, with a daring mission to send a woman.

1.title: FR - Star City - S01E02 - A Bear on a Chain
1.plot: Anastasia is thrust onto the world stage. Lyudmilla tries a new tactic to get information.

1.title: FR - Star City - S01E03 - Bad Dancer
1.plot: Irina has an unexpected encounter. The Soviets scramble to maintain dominance on the Moon.

1.title: FR - Gameoverse - S01E01 - Pilot
1.plot: Kit, Kaboodle, and Gobbles must save a vibrant underwater game world. To stop its destruction, they team up with the villain to prevent the heroic dolphin, Flappers, from winning, all while fighting off a helpful group called the Syntax.

meta.plot: Lorsque le respect s'effrite au lycée, une unité spéciale dispense des leçons de vie directes et efficaces qu'on ne trouve pas dans les manuels, pour repartir sur de bonnes bases.

1.title: FR - Que ça vous serve de leçon ! - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Inspector Na Hwa-jin steps into the chaos and takes control of a school plagued by the spoiled son of a powerful politician — to teach him a lesson.

1.title: FR - Que ça vous serve de leçon ! - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: With unassuming Bong Geun-dae on his side, Hwa-jin uses his special ops skills to handle a school gang and defend a student who just wants to study.

1.title: FR - Que ça vous serve de leçon ! - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: When a teen influencer spreads false claims about her teachers, the team's loose-cannon Inspector Im Han-rim steps in to set the record straight.

1.title: FR - Que ça vous serve de leçon ! - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Choi Gang-seok weathers a political attack on his bureau. Hwa-jin's team visits an elite school to uncover why a student attacked a respected teacher.

1.title: FR - Que ça vous serve de leçon ! - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: When an elementary school teacher's spirit wears down under pressure, Hwa-jin steps in to be her substitute — turning the tables to solve the case.

1.title: FR - Que ça vous serve de leçon ! - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: Four juvenile delinquents think they're above the law — until the team takes an interest in their extracurricular crimes and gives a harsh reality check.

1.title: FR - Que ça vous serve de leçon ! - S01E07 - Episode 7
1.plot: Geun-dae goes undercover to help a father find his gambling addict son. To undermine the bureau politically, Hwang Gi-tae visits a juvenile inmate.

1.title: FR - Que ça vous serve de leçon ! - S01E08 - Episode 8
1.plot: After a pre-med student collapses in class, Hwa-jin investigates his obsessive mother, whose access to illicit pills hints at a larger conspiracy.

1.title: FR - Que ça vous serve de leçon ! - S01E09 - Episode 9
1.plot: To help a student escape his exploitative friends, Han-rim adopts a new persona to join his circle. Cho Gyu-cheol's return puts the bureau in danger.

1.title: FR - Que ça vous serve de leçon ! - S01E10 - Episode 10
1.plot: After public backlash hits the bureau, Hwa-jin and his team go rogue to expose a deadly conspiracy led by a violent student-run gang.

meta.plot: Une tempête approche pour un couple heureux d’avocats quand un tueur tristement célèbre resurgit de leur passé à sa sortie de prison.

1.title: FR - Cape Fear - Les Nerfs à vif - S01E01 - Fingers & Toes
1.plot: After 17 years in prison, Max Cady walks free—and back into the lives of the lawyers who jailed him.

1.title: FR - Cape Fear - Les Nerfs à vif - S01E02 - Why Would I Want to Hurt You?
1.plot: Desperate to understand what's happening with Zack, Anna and Tom take action. Max settles in.

meta.plot: Une quinquagénaire se donne tous les moyens pour tenter de garder le contrôle de son sublime lodge, fort convoité après la disparition en mer de son mari volage.

1.title: FR - Kër Nafy - S01E01 - Episode 1

meta.plot: Lukas, un ancien mercenaire hanté par un syndrome de stress post-traumatique, parcourt la ville avec son chariot. Au refuge pour sans-abri où il vit, il récupère des débris pour aider les autres. Grâce à son talent de métallurgiste, il crée des statuettes qu'il vend pour gagner sa vie, luttant en silence contre un passé violent qu'il aspire à fuir.

1.title: FR - The Nowhere Man - S01E01 - The things we carry
1.plot: Haunted by his days as a mercenary, Lukas lives in the shadows, scraping a living asa waste picker. But when he witnesses a brutal crime, he's thrust back into a world of violence he thought he'd left behind.

1.title: FR - The Nowhere Man - S01E02 - No safe haven
1.plot: Phumza shatters Lukas and Neo's fragile refuge at the homeless shelter, unleashing tragedy, a child's desperate fight for survival, and igniting Lukas's hunger for vengeance.

1.title: FR - The Nowhere Man - S01E03 - Race against blood
1.plot: Lukas races to save a missing teenager from a deadly underground fighting ring, only to be reunited with a ghost from his past. A close army friend who isn't the man he used to be.

1.title: FR - The Nowhere Man - S01E04 - Nothing left to lose
1.plot: Betrayed and pushed to the edge, Lukas must summon every last ounce of his resolve to save a precious life.

1.title: FR - The Nowhere Man - S01E05 - Salt in the wounds
1.plot: Having uncovered a deadly diamond-smuggling ring, Lukas must unravel a web of deceit from his past.

1.title: FR - The Nowhere Man - S01E06 - It ends here
1.plot: Trapped in a deadly set-up, Lukas faces a life-or-death showdown in the shadows of an old salt mine. The lives of everyone he loves is at stake.

meta.plot: Neuropsychiatre consultant dont la famille vole en éclats, le Dr Eldon Chance doit faire face à un divorce tendu et à des secrets qu'il tente de garder enfouis. Lorsqu'il tente de venir en aide à une patiente souffrant d'un dédoublement de personnalité, dont la vie est menacée par un mari abusif, Chance est propulsé malgré lui dans un monde violent et dangereux, peuplé de policiers corrompus et de criminels.

1.title: FR - Chance - S01E01 - The Summer of Love
1.plot: Dr. Eldon Chance resolves to help Jaclyn Blackstone, a woman with a second personality, escape her abusive, crooked cop husband with the help of a dangerous, Nietzsche-quoting, antique furniture restorer known simply as D.

1.title: FR - Chance - S01E02 - The Axiom of Choice
1.plot: Chance investigates Jaclyn’s last psychiatrist and a secret rendezvous with Jaclyn forces an ominous encounter.

1.title: FR - Chance - S01E03 - Hiring It Done
1.plot: As Jaclyn continues her therapy, Chance attempts to protect himself and his family from Blackstone’s latest round of harassments.

1.title: FR - Chance - S01E04 - The Mad Doctor
1.plot: Chance and D begin surveillance of Blackstone, hoping to get hard evidence of his corruption. Chance's desire to help Jaclyn veers into obsessive, making him question the mission and his own sanity.

1.title: FR - Chance - S01E05 - A Still Point in the Turning World
1.plot: Chance undergoes a brain scan in a bid to find a medical explanation for his uncharacteristic behavior. Meanwhile, Blackstone arrives to deliver a beatdown, and Chance teams with D to incriminate Blackstone, but their in-the-shadows mission turns deadly.

1.title: FR - Chance - S01E06 - The Unflinching Spark
1.plot: Awaiting the fallout from their last mission, Chance fears for his family’s safety. During a night alone with Jaclyn, Chance suspects his patient may not be as helpless as he believed.

1.title: FR - Chance - S01E07 - Unlocking Your Hidden Powers
1.plot: Chance’s world is thrown into chaos when he uncovers the truth about the people closest to him.

1.title: FR - Chance - S01E08 - The House of Space and Time
1.plot: Proof of Blackstone’s criminal activities comes from an unexpected source as Chance is finally poised to take down his enemy.

1.title: FR - Chance - S01E09 - Camera Obscura
1.plot: It's now or never: Eldon and D have to decide how to proceed to get Nicole back. The next step is crucial.

1.title: FR - Chance - S01E10 - Fluid Management
1.plot: In the season finale Chance struggles to understand the truth of his tragic encounter with Blackstone.

2.title: FR - Chance - S02E01 - Multiaxial System
2.plot: By day, Chance ministers to patients at the Victims of Violent Crime Unit; by night, he and D assault the victimizers. Detective Hynes blackmails Chance to use his skills to take down suspected serial killer Ryan Winter.

2.title: FR - Chance - S02E02 - A Very Special Onion
2.plot: Attacked by Chance, Winter becomes a patient at the unit, with unintended results. D discovers Detective Hynes has a more personal connection to Winter’s case than he originally let on.

2.title: FR - Chance - S02E03 - The Flitcraft Parable
2.plot: D gaslights Winter in an attempt to make him open up to Chance in therapy and meets a girl in the process; with D’s guidance, Nicole confronts a bully.

2.title: FR - Chance - S02E04 - The Coping Mechanism
2.plot: Chance and Hynes talk to someone from Winter’s past. D and Lorena get to know each other. Chance pushes Winter into a “limit experience” and begins to break him down. Winter makes a new friend at the unit.

2.title: FR - Chance - S02E05 - The Collected Works of William Shakespeare
2.plot: With the warehouse no longer safe, D needs a place to crash. Winter turns to his coping mechanism while Chance and Hynes face a major setback in their case against him. Carl has money trouble.

2.title: FR - Chance - S02E06 - Treasures in Jars of Clay
2.plot: Chance’s progress with Winter is interrupted. Hynes asks his friend Frank Lambert for a favor. D settles old scores. Nicole faces the music. Hynes pursues a new break in the Winter case.

2.title: FR - Chance - S02E07 - Define Normal
2.plot: Chance and D grapple with news about Hynes. Chance accuses Winter of lying to him, but Winter learns he isn’t the only one who’s been dishonest. Nicole underestimates Christina. Kirsten tracks down a lead. Winter lays a trap.

2.title: FR - Chance - S02E08 - An Infant, a Brute or a Wild Beast
2.plot: Chance discovers Lambert’s background. Kirsten asks Lambert for help. Winter is in uncharted territory. Nicole adapts to a new reality. Lorena’s past catches up with her. Chance defends his choices.

2.title: FR - Chance - S02E09 - A Madness of Two
2.plot: Lucy comes to Chance’s aid. Chance and D disagree on the next move. Lambert goes on the defensive. D won’t stop until Lorena is safe. Kirsten makes a choice. After a charged encounter, Chance changes course.

2.title: FR - Chance - S02E10 - Especially If You Run Away
2.plot: With Lorena’s help, Chance and D return to San Francisco to handle unfinished business. Frank Lambert has a new protégé. Chance embraces a familiar role in a new way.

meta.plot: Des membres de votre équipage ont été remplacés par un métamorphe extraterrestre déterminé à semer la confusion, à saboter le vaisseau et à tuer tout le monde. Éliminez l'imposteur ou devenez la victime de ses plans meurtriers.

1.title: FR - Among Us - S01E02 - You Can't Be Hot and Smart
1.plot: A dead body is found -- Who ya gonna call? Hot Doctor!

1.title: FR - Among Us - S01E03 - CHAOS HAS FOUND A NEW HOME!
1.plot: Something isn't right on board. Time for the first EMERGENCY MEETING!

1.title: FR - Among Us - S01E04 - AND THEY LIKE TO KILL!
1.plot: Factions form, pizza is eaten, and the hunter may become hunted.

1.title: FR - Among Us - S01E05 - Good Vibes Only
1.plot: The crew votes out the Imposter...but something feels off.

1.title: FR - Among Us - S01E06 - Insecurity in Security
1.plot: Equipment on board has been sabotaged the crew must figure it out...again.

1.title: FR - Among Us - S01E07 - 6 Angry Crewmates
1.plot: Crewmates are put on trial, secrets come out, and decisions get even harder.

1.title: FR - Among Us - S01E08 - Imposter Syndrome
1.plot: Alliances form as blame spreads and a startling discovery changes things.

1.title: FR - Among Us - S01E09 - I'm Just Venting
1.plot: Fewer survivors, rising panic, and a reactor on the brink.

1.title: FR - Among Us - S01E10 - Everyone Is Still Alive. No One Is Dead.
1.plot: Survival is on the line, secrets collide, and long-running tensions finally explode.

meta.plot: À Paris, trois colocataires se cherchent, entre rêves et tourments existentiels. Après “Foodie Love”, Isabel Coixet revient à ses obsessions mélancoliques avec une série tour à tour légère et grave. Emmenée par un trio d’acteurs passionnés, accompagnés de Jeanne Balibar et Tim Robbins, une tragicomédie sur l’amitié, l’amour, la jeunesse et le cinéma.

FR - Best of the World with Antoni Porowski - S01E01 - Mexico City
1.plot: Antoni uncovers Mexico City’s most remarkable travel experiences, from Michelin-starred cuisine to fight nights at the cathedral of the lucha libre. He learns how heirloom corn can transform a taco, discovers bold architecture, glides through Xochimilco’s ancient waterways, and joins a vibrant folk-art parade featuring fantastical creatures.

1.title: FR - Best of the World with Antoni Porowski - S01E02 - Paris
1.plot: Antoni explores Paris’ most unforgettable experiences, from the luxury of Hôtel de Crillon to cycling to the top of Montmartre. He dives into hyper-local cuisine, meets artisans preserving French heritage, discovers a hidden cheese cave, and goes behind the scenes at the Moulin Rouge — all alongside the locals who bring the City of Light to life.

1.title: FR - Best of the World with Antoni Porowski - S01E03 - New York City
1.plot: Antoni explores New York City’s most singular, world-class experiences and uncovers the best of a city where history and modern life collide. Escape to bold fusion cuisine, mind-bending cocktails and a unique twist on NYC-style pizza, he discovers some of the remarkable people and cultural influences that shape the place he calls home.

1.title: FR - Best of the World with Antoni Porowski - S01E04 - London
1.plot: Antoni curates London’s most memorable experiences, from Brick Lane’s multicultural cuisine to a swim at Canary Wharf. He learns what makes Big Ben’s Great Clock tick, tastes a Sunday roast with a twist, climbs up to the top of The Shard, explores Kew Gardens, and dives into London’s drag scene with the performers who bring it to life.

meta.plot: Oli, un jeune aspirant DJ, est complètement paralysé par son anxiété de performance. Un jour, une nouvelle mélodie émerge dans sa vie : Zach, un jeune homme ayant la trisomie 21, lui ouvre les yeux sur de nouvelles perspectives.

1.title: FR - Synchro - S01E01 - Episode 1

meta.plot: Cinq jeunes d'une vingtaine d'années obsédés par le travail se démènent pour réussir professionnellement et, s'ils en ont le temps, de trouver leur bonheur dans le quartier le plus glamour de Manhattan, Murray Hill.

1.title: FR - Not Suitable for Work - S01E01 - Welcome to Murray Hill
1.plot: Whoa. Two girls live across the hall from three guys? Yeah, I'll watch this.

1.title: FR - Not Suitable for Work - S01E02 - Evil Nepo Son of the King
1.plot: Whoa. That one guy's getting treated bad because he didn't get his job the right way. Meanwhile the girls be hustlin'.

1.title: FR - Not Suitable for Work - S01E03 - The Philadelphia Thirst Monster
1.plot: Whoa. Date or dinner party? That is the main issue in this episode.

1.title: FR - Not Suitable for Work - S01E04 - The Jawline of Your Dreams
1.plot: Whoa. This handsome guy is on a billboard but the twist is he didn't want to be.

1.title: FR - Not Suitable for Work - S01E05 - Fisher Trashen
1.plot: Whoa. That tall guy dated a girl, and now she hates him. Glad it’s not me.

meta.plot: Après 26 ans sans tournoi majeur, la qualification de la Norvège pour la Coupe du monde 2026 semblait compromise. Ce documentaire raconte comment l’espoir est revenu dans le pays.

1.title: FR - La Norvège en reconquête - S01E01 - Ståle’s Last Chance
1.plot: As the 2026 World Cup qualifiers draw closer, Norway's manager Ståle Solbakken faces mounting pressure from the press and public for his team to succeed.

1.title: FR - La Norvège en reconquête - S01E02 - Now or Never
1.plot: With Norway's World Cup dream hanging by a thread, Ståle and his squad travel to the iconic San Siro for a decisive clash that could end a 26-year wait.

meta.plot: Une série documentaire révélatrice en trois parties consacrée à la secte Eternal Values de l'excentrique Frederick von Mierers.

1.title: FR - Bring Me the Beauties: A Model Cult - S01E01 - The Promise
1.plot: Hoyt Richards recounts how, in 1978, he met Frederick von Mierers, a self-proclaimed guru preaching a seductive gospel of Eastern philosophy, astrology, and New Age spirituality. To the outside world, Hoyt was a successful, jet-setting model, but at the same time, he lived an ascetic life while espousing Frederick’s teachings and funding much of his lifestyle.

1.title: FR - Bring Me the Beauties: A Model Cult - S01E02 - The Antichrist Tapes
1.plot: In preparation for Frederick’s prediction of a coming global cataclysm in 1999, the group sets up a compound in North Carolina, where he claims alien spaceships can land to take them to safety. Jacki Adams, another top model, joins the group, only to trigger a series of events that end up publicly exposing the true nature of the Eternal Values.

meta.plot: Dans un monde où sport et magie se mêlent, le jeune fermier Key découvre son talent surpuissant : il pourrait être le légendaire Dragon Striker. Il rejoint la gardienne Ssyelle et sa nouvelle équipe pour défier les champions de l'école. Alors que Key peine à maîtriser le dragon qui est en lui et que Ssyelle se bat pour souder son équipe, ils découvrent de sombres secrets du passé et un mal ancestral.

1.title: FR - Dragon Striker - S01E01 - The Awakening
1.plot: Key hopes to get a glimpse of a Gorotama game.

1.title: FR - Dragon Striker - S01E02 - Welcome to Kal Asterock (1)
1.plot: Key arrives at Kal Asterock.

1.title: FR - Dragon Striker - S01E03 - Welcome to Kal Asterock (2)
1.plot: Key strives to master his tama before time runs out.

1.title: FR - Dragon Striker - S01E04 - The Fifth Banner
1.plot: Ssyelle looks for a way to compete with Key and Milo.

1.title: FR - Dragon Striker - S01E05 - The Armorer of Mestras
1.plot: The Knights spend the day getting their armor fixed.

1.title: FR - Dragon Striker - S01E06 - Out of Their League
1.plot: The Tournament proves harder than The Knights thought.

1.title: FR - Dragon Striker - S01E07 - The Sum of its Parts
1.plot: Team unity weakens in the run‑up to their first game.

1.title: FR - Dragon Striker - S01E08 - Dragon Fever
1.plot: The Shadows accuse The Knights of stealing.

1.title: FR - Dragon Striker - S01E09 - The Dragon Within
1.plot: Key is given an ultimatum to master his tama.

1.title: FR - Dragon Striker - S01E10 - The Leech
1.plot: The mysterious attack on Falco sparks suspicion.

1.title: FR - Dragon Striker - S01E11 - Revelations
1.plot: Key can't wait to show off his new signature move.

meta.plot: Alors que l’équipe de foot d’Angleterre traverse l’une des périodes les plus sombres de son histoire, Gareth Southgate prend les commandes avec la volonté de faire oublier son triste record de pire équipe au monde aux tirs au but. Ancien joueur marqué par ses propres échecs, Southgate sait qu’il doit affronter les fantômes du passé pour briser une longue série d’échecs. Dans une nation qui a accumulé les désillusions, il tente l’impossible : réconcilier l’Angleterre avec la victoire.

1.title: FR - Dear England - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: With the England team at an all-time low, Gareth Southgate becomes the new manager. Haunted by his own penalty miss, he transforms the squad’s mindset with a radical new approach.

1.title: FR - Dear England - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: After a breakthrough World Cup reignites belief, the England team return to a tournament on home turf as Southgate’s squad strive to unite the country and finally bring it home.

1.title: FR - Dear England - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: In the aftermath of the devastating defeat at Wembley, Southgate’s guilt weighs heavily on his conscience. When the fans then turn on Southgate, accusing him of prioritising politics over performance, he begins to doubt himself ahead of a controversial World Cup in Qatar.

1.title: FR - Dear England - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: As Euro 2024 begins, England arrive as favourites for Southgate’s final tournament. Gareth is forced to make some challenging changes to the team and puts his trust in a new generation. When the team struggles unexpectedly and pressure mounts, Gareth wonders how his story will end.

meta.plot: On a remote tropical island, 16 players must survive the elements, outmaneuver rivals and remain part of a team for a chance to win a $1 million prize.

1.title: FR - Outlast: The Jungle - S01E01 - Welcome to the Jungle
1.plot: The players make a key strategic choice, establishing teams — and unique resource advantages. One player is quickly put in a desperate position.

1.title: FR - Outlast: The Jungle - S01E02 - The Traders
1.plot: When a seductive offer tempts players with an overwhelming advantage, they must decide whether to break up their newly formed teams to get ahead.

1.title: FR - Outlast: The Jungle - S01E03 - Burned Out
1.plot: A shocking accident forces an unlikely player from the game. While an act of sacrifice heats up Alpha Camp's chances, Bravo hatches a "diabolical" plan.

1.title: FR - Outlast: The Jungle - S01E04 - Split Decision
1.plot: The competition's strongest swimmers go stroke-for-stroke in a sprint for new supplies. Macho energy begins to grate on two camps' female teammates.

1.title: FR - Outlast: The Jungle - S01E05 - Staying Afloat
1.plot: The winners of a paddle race score a game-changing opportunity to hobble the competition. Two players struggle with their mental and physical limits.

1.title: FR - Outlast: The Jungle - S01E06 - Playing Dirty
1.plot: A trio of players plots a high-stakes operation to double-cross a rival camp. Without fire or a bow, one team resorts to desperate measures.

meta.plot: Après avoir accidentellement fait le buzz à la suite d'une bagarre, un ado pauvre et harcelé lance une chaîne de streaming pour se faire de l'argent et échapper au désespoir.

1.title: FR - Viral Hit - S01E01 - Do You Want to Become Stronger?
1.plot: Shimura endures daily torment from school tyrant Hamaken. But his luck changes when a scuffle with bootlicker Kanegon accidentally goes live — and viral.

1.title: FR - Viral Hit - S01E02 - Fan the Flames of Anger
1.plot: Mugged by delinquents, Shimura follows TOU-KEI's teachings to fight back. Later, despite landing a blow on Hamaken, Shimura lands in even deeper trouble.

1.title: FR - Viral Hit - S01E03 - I'm Not a Loser!
1.plot: Humiliated in front of his crush, Shimura disappears. As everyone searches desperately for him, Kanegon endures brutal violence from Hamaken.

1.title: FR - Viral Hit - S01E04 - Well Then, My Friend
1.plot: Viral Hit faces its first crisis and Shimura must take on multiple opponents. Later, ex-taekwondo champ Shinjo targets them and attacks Kanegon.

1.title: FR - Viral Hit - S01E05 - The Original Viral Hit
1.plot: The Shimura vs. Shinjo fight reaches a shocking conclusion. Viral Hit reaches 1M subscribers, and the head of BAD FELLOWS approaches with a proposition.

1.title: FR - Viral Hit - S01E06 - This is My Youth
1.plot: As the final battle nears, Shimura's group face mounting challenges. TOU-KEI's secret emerges and their last fight begins — for friends, family and love.

meta.plot: Joyce, chouchoute des réseaux sociaux, est l'image même de la perfection conjugale, jusqu'à ce que les conquêtes de son mari infidèle déclenchent une crise qui tourne au scandale.

1.title: FR - The Polygamist - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Beyond the picture-perfect funeral tears and her immaculate influencer wife persona, Joyce leaves behind a past of rage and a marriage built on secrets.

1.title: FR - The Polygamist - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: As Matipa seductively weaves her way into the Gomora empire, Joyce's flawless brand and family begin to crumble.

1.title: FR - The Polygamist - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Joyce stages a glamorous anniversary party to save her public image, forcing her broken family to smile through the betrayal.

1.title: FR - The Polygamist - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Jonasi returns home. Matipa tries to win him back while Joyce is torn between peace and self-preservation.

1.title: FR - The Polygamist - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Matipa’s expectations for a generous settlement fail, so she seeks greener (and more powerful) pastures.

1.title: FR - The Polygamist - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: News of a possible pregnancy unsettles Joyce and raises new suspicions about family secrets.

1.title: FR - The Polygamist - S01E07 - Episode 7
1.plot: After the birth of the twins, Joyce has an emotional breakdown. The children grow tired of Jonasi’s violent games.

1.title: FR - The Polygamist - S01E08 - Episode 8
1.plot: To survive the scandal, Joyce makes a desperate suggestion — turning private heartbreak into a shared experiment for power (polygamy).

1.title: FR - The Polygamist - S01E09 - Episode 9
1.plot: Joyce puts on a happy face, but the new marriage structure sparks social backlash and isolates the family.

1.title: FR - The Polygamist - S01E10 - Episode 10
1.plot: A secret first love emerges, revealing decades of sacrifice and Jonasi’s long-hidden lies.

1.title: FR - The Polygamist - S01E11 - Episode 11
1.plot: Jonasi seeks birthday adoration from three women but faces resentment and family loneliness.

1.title: FR - The Polygamist - S01E12 - Episode 12
1.plot: The twins’ Christening explodes into chaos as long-buried family secrets detonate.

1.title: FR - The Polygamist - S01E13 - Episode 13
1.plot: Essie pleads with Joyce. Overwhelmed by secrets, Joyce considers abandoning fame to confront Jonasi.

1.title: FR - The Polygamist - S01E14 - Episode 14
1.plot: Jonasi pursues a new conquest with power and luxury. Xolani publicly confronts Lindani.

1.title: FR - The Polygamist - S01E15 - Episode 15
1.plot: Lindani desperately seeks help from Mpume and Joyce. Jonasi deepens his betrayals.

1.title: FR - The Polygamist - S01E16 - Episode 16
1.plot: The family home descends into chaos. Lindani’s mother steps in. Medical results enrage Joyce.

1.title: FR - The Polygamist - S01E17 - Episode 17
1.plot: Joyce plays the dutiful wife while Jonasi is hospitalized, but his health issues don’t curb his thirst for power.

1.title: FR - The Polygamist - S01E18 - Episode 18
1.plot: Matipa and Joyce find uneasy solidarity after Jonasi’s abuse. Magesh helps Joyce choose freedom.

1.title: FR - The Polygamist - S01E19 - Episode 19
1.plot: After alienating everyone, Jonasi receives harrowing health news while completely alone.

1.title: FR - The Polygamist - S01E20 - Episode 20
1.plot: Three-year time jump: The Gomoras are thriving, but Jonasi returns as a shadow of his former self.

1.title: FR - The Polygamist - S01E21 - Episode 21
1.plot: Jonasi’s health fails as he lives discarded and alone. The family struggles with love and hate for him.

1.title: FR - The Polygamist - S01E22 - Episode 22
1.plot: Competition between the wives continues beyond the grave as Essie and Joyce clash over how to memorialize Jonasi.

meta.plot: 100 cuisiniers amateurs s'affrontent dans des épreuves variées pour essayer d'empocher 100 000 dollars et le titre de meilleur chef des États-Unis !

1.title: FR - Le tournoi des 100 chefs - S01E01 - Give it 100
1.plot: Host Terry Crews randomly selects over 50 of the 100 home cooks to compete in five challenges, such as best noodle dish, rotisserie chicken battle, and a blind taste test. Judges Alex Guarnaschelli and Nick DiGiovanni decide which cooks are going home

meta.plot: Filip est un jeune homme gay, effronté et irresponsable, convaincu que le monde lui appartient. Lorsqu’une tragédie familiale éclate, son égocentrisme se mue en un sentiment de culpabilité persistant. Alors qu’il prend en charge sa jeune nièce, Filip aspire à sa liberté, mais l’idée de confier le bébé à des inconnus réveille en lui ses propres traumatismes d’enfance. Pour s’occuper d’elle, il doit affronter ses faiblesses, ses échecs et les préjugés de la société.

1.title: FR - Proud - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: When his carefree lifestyle is upended by a catastrophic family event, Filip faces a serious choice: grow up or lose all he has left.

meta.plot: Au Fil des années de Carley Fortune est une romance teintée de nostalgie sur les premières amours et les choix qui nous marquent pour la vie.

1.title: FR - Au fil des années - S01E01 - Every Summer After
1.plot: The death of Sue Florek, a beloved mother figure, brings Percy Fraser back to a place that has haunted her for a decade: Barry's Bay. As she faces all the people and secrets she ran from years ago, she wonders if returning was a mistake. Honoring Sue and seeing Sam Florek-the great love of her life-brings back beautiful memories of her first summer at the lake, but also the pain of all she's lost.

1.title: FR - Au fil des années - S01E02 - Young Blood
1.plot: The Tavern raises tensions between the brothers. Jordie introduces Chantal to lake life, and catches Delilah in a lie. Meanwhile, Percy starts to realize she came here for more than just Sue. Reconnecting with Sam makes her remember her second summer in Barry's Bay, when a game of Truth or Dare changed everything.

1.title: FR - Au fil des années - S01E03 - Playing with Fire
1.plot: Delilah tells Jordie her secret, Chantal enlists Charlie's help with a crisis, and Percy and Sam spend more time together-which quickly feels like playing with fire. It's almost like high school all over again... like that summer of the power outage and the bonfire party, where hormones were raging and emotions were high.

1.title: FR - Au fil des années - S01E04 - Anatomy of a Romance
1.plot: Sue's will reading leaves everybody in shock. While Sam and Charlie are furious, Percy is utterly lost. She, Delilah, and Chantal admit some hard truths to both each other and themselves, and Percy wonders whatever happened to the girl she once was... the girl who wrote scary stories, swam across the lake, and wasn't afraid to go after what-and who-she wanted.

1.title: FR - Au fil des années - S01E05 - I Choose You
1.plot: Drew shows up with an unexpected guest. Meanwhile, Delilah and Charlie reach a crossroads, and Sam makes a life-changing decision-prompting Percy to do whatever she can to distract from her own feelings. Yearning and jealousy are in the air-just like at that New Year's Eve Party in 2015, when Percy's plus one caused a stir, and an unlikely pair shared a midnight kiss.

1.title: FR - Au fil des années - S01E06 - Plan B
1.plot: Percy's shocking secret is out, and everyone's caught in the fallout. An unlikely trio forms a search party, while Percy puts her own drama aside to be there for Delilah and make up for past wrongs. As Percy and Sam fall apart in the present, we see how they fell head over heels in love for the first time as teenagers.

1.title: FR - Au fil des années - S01E07 - The Boathouse
1.plot: Grudges simmer, a love triangle heats up, and Charlie and Percy are forced to reckon with their past mistakes. As Percy struggles under the weight of yet another shameful secret, she thinks about what led to all of this in the first place-that last summer, when they fixed up the boat, and one moment that ruined everything.

1.title: FR - Au fil des années - S01E08 - Goodbye…
1.plot: The day of the memorial has finally arrived, and emotions are high. Charlie tries to make amends, Delilah has an epiphany, Chantal gets stuck choosing between her head and her heart-while Percy and Sam don't quite know where they stand. As everyone struggles to reconcile the past with the present, our Barry's Bay crew wonders what's worth holding onto, and what's important to let go.
